authors_text: Ziya Erkoç,Fangchang Ma,Qi Shan,Matthias Nießner,Angela Dai
title: HyperDiffusion: Generating Implicit Neural Fields with Weight-Space Diffusion
title_zh: 超扩散：通过权重空间扩散生成隐式神经场
abstract: Implicit neural fields, typically encoded by a multilayer perceptron (MLP) that maps from coordinates (e.g., xyz) to signals (e.g., signed distances), have shown remarkable promise as a high-fidelity and compact representation. However, the lack of a regular and explicit grid structure also makes it challenging to apply generative modeling directly on implicit neural fields in order to synthesize new data. To this end, we propose HyperDiffusion, a novel approach for unconditional generative modeling of implicit neural fields. HyperDiffusion operates directly on MLP weights and generates new neural implicit fields encoded by synthesized MLP parameters. Specifically, a collection of MLPs is first optimized to faithfully represent individual data samples. Subsequently, a diffusion process is trained in this MLP weight space to model the underlying distribution of neural implicit fields. HyperDiffusion enables diffusion modeling over a implicit, compact, and yet high-fidelity representation of complex signals across 3D shapes and 4D mesh animations within one single unified framework.
summary: Implicit neural fields, typically encoded by a multilayer perceptron (MLP) that maps from coordinates (e.g., xyz) to signals (e.g., signed distances), have shown remarkable promise as a high-fidelity and compact representation. However, the lack of a regular and explicit grid structure also makes it challenging to apply generative modeling directly on implicit neural fields in order to synthesize new data. To this end, we propose HyperDiffusion, a novel approach for unconditional generative modeling of implicit neural fields. HyperDiffusion operates directly on MLP weights and generates new neural implicit fields encoded by synthesized MLP parameters. Specifically, a collection of MLPs is first optimized to faithfully represent individual data samples. Subsequently, a diffusion process is trained in this MLP weight space to model the underlying distribution of neural implicit fields. HyperDiffusion enables diffusion modeling over a implicit, compact, and yet high-fidelity representation of complex signals across 3D shapes and 4D mesh animations within one single unified framework.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经场通常由多层感知器（MLP）编码，从坐标（例如，xyz）映射到信号（例如，有符号距离），作为高保真和紧凑的表示，已显示出非凡的前景。然而，缺乏规则和显式的网格结构也使得直接在隐式神经场上应用生成模型以合成新数据变得具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了 HyperDiffusion，这是一种用于隐式神经场无条件生成建模的新方法。 HyperDiffusion 直接对 MLP 权重进行操作，并生成由合成的 MLP 参数编码的新神经隐式场。具体来说，首先优化 MLP 集合以忠实地表示各个数据样本。随后，在此 MLP 权重空间中训练扩散过程，以对神经隐式场的底层分布进行建模。 HyperDiffusion 能够在一个统一框架内对跨 3D 形状和 4D 网格动画的复杂信号进行隐式、紧凑且高保真表示的扩散建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperDiffusion方法，通过在MLP权重空间进行扩散过程，实现对隐式神经场的无条件生成建模。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经场虽具有高保真和紧凑性优势，但其缺乏显式网格结构，导致难以直接应用生成模型进行新数据合成。
AI.method: 首先优化一组MLP以准确表示样本数据，随后在MLP权重空间训练扩散过程，建模神经隐式场的潜在分布。
AI.result: HyperDiffusion可在统一框架中生成复杂信号的3D形状和4D网格动画，实现隐式、紧凑且高保真的表示。
AI.conclusion: HyperDiffusion通过权重空间扩散解决了隐式神经场生成难题，为复杂信号建模提供了有效方法。

ai_content.conclusion: HyperDiffusion通过权重空间扩散解决了隐式神经场生成难题，为复杂信号建模提供了有效方法。

authors_text: Colin G. West
title: Advances in apparent conceptual physics reasoning in GPT-4
title_zh: GPT-4 中明显概念物理推理的进展
comment: 5 pages, one figure one table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.01067 (longer, prior version of this project)
comments: 5 pages, one figure one table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.01067 (longer, prior version of this project)
abstract: ChatGPT is built on a large language model trained on an enormous corpus of human text to emulate human conversation. Despite lacking any explicit programming regarding the laws of physics, recent work has demonstrated that GPT-3.5 could pass an introductory physics course at some nominal level and register something close to a minimal understanding of Newtonian Mechanics on the Force Concept Inventory. This work replicates those results and also demonstrates that the latest version, GPT-4, has reached a much higher mark in the latter context. Indeed, its responses come quite close to perfectly demonstrating expert-level competence, with a few very notable exceptions and limitations. We briefly comment on the implications of this for the future of physics education and pedagogy.
summary: ChatGPT is built on a large language model trained on an enormous corpus of human text to emulate human conversation. Despite lacking any explicit programming regarding the laws of physics, recent work has demonstrated that GPT-3.5 could pass an introductory physics course at some nominal level and register something close to a minimal understanding of Newtonian Mechanics on the Force Concept Inventory. This work replicates those results and also demonstrates that the latest version, GPT-4, has reached a much higher mark in the latter context. Indeed, its responses come quite close to perfectly demonstrating expert-level competence, with a few very notable exceptions and limitations. We briefly comment on the implications of this for the future of physics education and pedagogy.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 建立在一个大型语言模型之上，该模型经过大量人类文本语料库的训练来模拟人类对话。尽管缺乏有关物理定律的任何明确编程，但最近的工作表明，GPT-3.5 可以在某种名义水平上通过入门物理课程，并在力概念清单上记录一些接近牛顿力学的最低限度的理解。这项工作复制了这些结果，并表明最新版本 GPT-4 在后一种情况下达到了更高的分数。事实上，它的回答非常接近完美地展示了专家级的能力，但有一些非常显着的例外和限制。我们简要评论这对物理教育和教学法的未来的影响。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-4在概念性物理推理方面的能力，并与GPT-3.5进行比较
AI.motivation: 探讨大型语言模型在没有明确物理编程的情况下，是否能掌握物理概念，以及这对教育的影响
AI.method: 通过复现对GPT-3.5的测试，使用力概念库存（FCI）等评估工具测试GPT-4的物理概念理解能力
AI.result: GPT-4在力概念库存测试中表现优于GPT-3.5，接近专家水平，但仍存在一些局限性
AI.conclusion: GPT-4在物理概念推理上的进步可能改变教育方式，但需进一步研究其局限性

authors_text: Ameesh Shah,Jonathan DeCastro,John Gideon,Beyazit Yalcinkaya,Guy Rosman,Sanjit A. Seshia
title: Specification-Guided Data Aggregation for Semantically Aware Imitation Learning
title_zh: 用于语义感知模仿学习的规范引导数据聚合
abstract: Advancements in simulation and formal methods-guided environment sampling have enabled the rigorous evaluation of machine learning models in a number of safety-critical scenarios, such as autonomous driving. Application of these environment sampling techniques towards improving the learned models themselves has yet to be fully exploited. In this work, we introduce a novel method for improving imitation-learned models in a semantically aware fashion by leveraging specification-guided sampling techniques as a means of aggregating expert data in new environments. Specifically, we create a set of formal specifications as a means of partitioning the space of possible environments into semantically similar regions, and identify elements of this partition where our learned imitation behaves most differently from the expert. We then aggregate expert data on environments in these identified regions, leading to more accurate imitation of the expert's behavior semantics. We instantiate our approach in a series of experiments in the CARLA driving simulator, and demonstrate that our approach leads to models that are more accurate than those learned with other environment sampling methods.
summary: Advancements in simulation and formal methods-guided environment sampling have enabled the rigorous evaluation of machine learning models in a number of safety-critical scenarios, such as autonomous driving. Application of these environment sampling techniques towards improving the learned models themselves has yet to be fully exploited. In this work, we introduce a novel method for improving imitation-learned models in a semantically aware fashion by leveraging specification-guided sampling techniques as a means of aggregating expert data in new environments. Specifically, we create a set of formal specifications as a means of partitioning the space of possible environments into semantically similar regions, and identify elements of this partition where our learned imitation behaves most differently from the expert. We then aggregate expert data on environments in these identified regions, leading to more accurate imitation of the expert's behavior semantics. We instantiate our approach in a series of experiments in the CARLA driving simulator, and demonstrate that our approach leads to models that are more accurate than those learned with other environment sampling methods.
abstract_zh: 模拟和形式化方法引导的环境采样的进步使得能够在自动驾驶等许多安全关键场景中对机器学习模型进行严格评估。这些环境采样技术在改进学习模型本身方面的应用尚未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，通过利用规范引导的采样技术作为在新环境中聚合专家数据的手段，以语义感知的方式改进模仿学习模型。具体来说，我们创建了一组正式规范，作为将可能环境的空间划分为语义相似区域的手段，并识别该划分中我们学习到的模仿行为与专家表现最不同的元素。然后，我们汇总这些已识别区域的环境专家数据，从而更准确地模仿专家的行为语义。我们在 CARLA 驾驶模拟器中的一系列实验中实例化了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法产生的模型比使用其他环境采样方法学习的模型更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于规范引导的数据聚合方法，通过语义感知的模仿学习提升自动驾驶等安全关键场景下的模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有环境采样技术主要用于模型评估而非改进，且模仿学习模型在语义理解上存在不足，需更精准的数据聚合策略。
AI.method: 利用形式化规范划分环境语义区域，识别模型与专家行为差异显著的区域，并针对性地聚合专家数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在CARLA模拟器实验中，该方法生成的模型在行为语义准确性上优于其他环境采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 规范引导的数据聚合能有效提升模仿学习的语义准确性，为安全关键场景的模型优化提供新思路。

Specifically, we create a set of formal specifications as a means of partitioning the space of possible environments into semantically similar regions, and identify elements of this partition where our learned imitation behaves most differently from the expert. We then aggregate expert data on environments in these identified regions, leading to more accurate imitation of the expert's behavior semantics. We instantiate our approach in a series of experiments in the CARLA driving simulator, and demonstrate that our approach leads to models that are more accurate than those learned with other environment sampling methods. 模拟和形式化方法引导的环境采样的进步使得能够在自动驾驶等许多安全关键场景中对机器学习模型进行严格评估。这些环境采样技术在改进学习模型本身方面的应用尚未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，通过利用规范引导的采样技术作为在新环境中聚合专家数据的手段，以语义感知的方式改进模仿学习模型。具体来说，我们创建了一组正式规范，作为将可能环境的空间划分为语义相似区域的手段，并识别该划分中我们学习到的模仿行为与专家表现最不同的元素。然后，我们汇总这些已识别区域的环境专家数据，从而更准确地模仿专家的行为语义。我们在 CARLA 驾驶模拟器中的一系列实验中实例化了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法产生的模型比使用其他环境采样方法学习的模型更准确。 本文提出一种基于规范引导的数据聚合方法，通过语义感知的模仿学习提升自动驾驶等安全关键场景下的模型准确性。 Ameesh Shah,Jonathan DeCastro,John Gideon,Beyazit Yalcinkaya,Guy Rosman,Sanjit A. Seshia cs.LG,cs.FL,cs.RO

authors_text: Igor Zingman,Sergio Frayle,Ivan Tankoyeu,Segrey Sukhanov,Fabian Heinemann
title: A comparative evaluation of image-to-image translation methods for stain transfer in histopathology
title_zh: 组织病理学中染色转移的图像到图像转换方法的比较评估
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, accepted to Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2023, to be published in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research
comments: 17 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, accepted to Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2023, to be published in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research
abstract: Image-to-image translation (I2I) methods allow the generation of artificial images that share the content of the original image but have a different style. With the advances in Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs)-based methods, I2I methods enabled the generation of artificial images that are indistinguishable from natural images. Recently, I2I methods were also employed in histopathology for generating artificial images of in silico stained tissues from a different type of staining. We refer to this process as stain transfer. The number of I2I variants is constantly increasing, which makes a well justified choice of the most suitable I2I methods for stain transfer challenging. In our work, we compare twelve stain transfer approaches, three of which are based on traditional and nine on GAN-based image processing methods. The analysis relies on complementary quantitative measures for the quality of image translation, the assessment of the suitability for deep learning-based tissue grading, and the visual evaluation by pathologists. Our study highlights the strengths and weaknesses of the stain transfer approaches, thereby allowing a rational choice of the underlying I2I algorithms. Code, data, and trained models for stain transfer between H&E and Masson's Trichrome staining will be made available online.

The number of I2I variants is constantly increasing, which makes a well justified choice of the most suitable I2I methods for stain transfer challenging. In our work, we compare twelve stain transfer approaches, three of which are based on traditional and nine on GAN-based image processing methods. The analysis relies on complementary quantitative measures for the quality of image translation, the assessment of the suitability for deep learning-based tissue grading, and the visual evaluation by pathologists. Our study highlights the strengths and weaknesses of the stain transfer approaches, thereby allowing a rational choice of the underlying I2I algorithms. Code, data, and trained models for stain transfer between H&E and Masson's Trichrome staining will be made available online.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像转换（I2I）方法允许生成共享原始图像内容但具有不同风格的人造图像。随着基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的方法的进步，I2I 方法能够生成与自然图像无法区分的人工图像。最近，I2I 方法也被用于组织病理学中，用于通过不同类型的染色生成计算机染色组织的人工图像。我们将此过程称为污渍转移。 I2I 变体的数量不断增加，这使得合理选择最合适的 I2I 方法进行染色转移具有挑战性。在我们的工作中，我们比较了 12 种染色转移方法，其中 3 种基于传统的图像处理方法，9 种基于 GAN 的图像处理方法。该分析依赖于图像翻译质量的补充定量测量、基于深度学习的组织分级的适用性评估以及病理学家的视觉评估。我们的研究强调了染色转移方法的优点和缺点，从而允许合理选择基础 I2I 算法。用于 H&E 和 Masson Trichrome 染色之间染色转移的代码、数据和训练模型将在线提供。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了十二种图像到图像转换方法在组织病理学染色转移中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 随着图像到图像转换方法的增多，选择最适合组织病理学染色转移的算法变得具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过定量指标评估图像转换质量、深度学习组织分级适用性及病理学家视觉评估，比较三种传统和九种基于GAN的方法。
AI.result: 分析揭示了各染色转移方法的优势与不足，为算法选择提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为组织病理学染色转移的I2I算法选型提供了理性决策支持。

authors_text: Lin Zhao,Mingxi Zhou,Brice Loose
title: Tightly-coupled Visual-DVL-Inertial Odometry for Robot-based Ice-water Boundary Exploration
title_zh: 用于机器人冰水边界探索的紧耦合视觉-DVL-惯性里程计
abstract: Robotic underwater systems, e.g., Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) and Remotely Operated Vehicles (ROVs), are promising tools for collecting biogeochemical data at the ice-water interface for scientific advancements. However, state estimation, i.e., localization, is a well-known problem for robotic systems, especially, for the ones that travel underwater. In this paper, we present a tightly-coupled multi-sensors fusion framework to increase localization accuracy that is robust to sensor failure. Visual images, Doppler Velocity Log (DVL), Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Pressure sensor are integrated into the state-of-art Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) for state estimation. Besides that a new keyframe-based state clone mechanism and a new DVL-aided feature enhancement are presented to further improve the localization performance. The proposed method is validated with a data set collected in the field under frozen ice, and the result is compared with 6 other different sensor fusion setups. Overall, the result with the keyframe enabled and DVL-aided feature enhancement yields the best performance with a Root-mean-square error of less than 2 m compared to the ground truth path with a total traveling distance of about 200 m.
summary: Robotic underwater systems, e.g., Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) and Remotely Operated Vehicles (ROVs), are promising tools for collecting biogeochemical data at the ice-water interface for scientific advancements. However, state estimation, i.e., localization, is a well-known problem for robotic systems, especially, for the ones that travel underwater. In this paper, we present a tightly-coupled multi-sensors fusion framework to increase localization accuracy that is robust to sensor failure. Visual images, Doppler Velocity Log (DVL), Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and Pressure sensor are integrated into the state-of-art Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) for state estimation. Besides that a new keyframe-based state clone mechanism and a new DVL-aided feature enhancement are presented to further improve the localization performance. The proposed method is validated with a data set collected in the field under frozen ice, and the result is compared with 6 other different sensor fusion setups. Overall, the result with the keyframe enabled and DVL-aided feature enhancement yields the best performance with a Root-mean-square error of less than 2 m compared to the ground truth path with a total traveling distance of about 200 m.
abstract_zh: 水下机器人系统，例如自主水下航行器（AUV）和遥控潜水器（ROV），是在冰水界面收集生物地球化学数据以促进科学进步的有前途的工具。然而，状态估计，即定位，是机器人系统的一个众所周知的问题，特别是对于水下移动的机器人系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种紧密耦合的多传感器融合框架，以提高定位精度，并且对传感器故障具有鲁棒性。视觉图像、多普勒速度日志 (DVL)、惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和压力传感器集成到最先进的多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器 (MSCKF) 中，用于状态估计。此外，还提出了新的基于关键帧的状态克隆机制和新的 DVL 辅助特征增强，以进一步提高定位性能。所提出的方法通过在冻冰下现场收集的数据集进行了验证，并将结果与​​其他 6 种不同的传感器融合设置进行了比较。总体而言，与总行进距离约为 200 m 的地面真实路径相比，启用关键帧和 DVL 辅助特征增强的结果产生了最佳性能，均方根误差小于 2 m。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种紧密耦合的多传感器融合框架，用于提高水下机器人在冰水界面探索中的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 水下机器人（如AUV/ROV）在冰水界面收集生物地球化学数据时面临定位难题，尤其在传感器失效情况下需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将视觉、DVL、IMU和压力传感器数据融合至MSCKF滤波器，引入关键帧状态克隆机制与DVL辅助特征增强技术。
AI.result: 在冰下实地数据集测试中，方法实现200米路径的定位均方根误差低于2米，优于其他六种传感器融合方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过多传感器协同与算法优化，在冰水界面复杂环境下实现了高精度、鲁棒的定位性能。

authors_text: Desnes Nunes,Ricardo Primi,Ramon Pires,Roberto Lotufo,Rodrigo Nogueira
title: Evaluating GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 Models on Brazilian University Admission Exams
title_zh: 评估巴西大学入学考试中的 GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4 模型
abstract: The present study aims to explore the capabilities of Language Models (LMs) in tackling high-stakes multiple-choice tests, represented here by the Exame Nacional do Ensino Médio (ENEM), a multidisciplinary entrance examination widely adopted by Brazilian universities. This exam poses challenging tasks for LMs, since its questions may span into multiple fields of knowledge, requiring understanding of information from diverse domains. For instance, a question may require comprehension of both statistics and biology to be solved. This work analyzed responses generated by GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 models for questions presented in the 2009-2017 exams, as well as for questions of the 2022 exam, which were made public after the training of the models was completed. Furthermore, different prompt strategies were tested, including the use of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts to generate explanations for answers. On the 2022 edition, the best-performing model, GPT-4 with CoT, achieved an accuracy of 87%, largely surpassing GPT-3.5 by 11 points. The code and data used on experiments are available at https://github.com/piresramon/gpt-4-enem.
summary: The present study aims to explore the capabilities of Language Models (LMs) in tackling high-stakes multiple-choice tests, represented here by the Exame Nacional do Ensino Médio (ENEM), a multidisciplinary entrance examination widely adopted by Brazilian universities. This exam poses challenging tasks for LMs, since its questions may span into multiple fields of knowledge, requiring understanding of information from diverse domains. For instance, a question may require comprehension of both statistics and biology to be solved. This work analyzed responses generated by GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 models for questions presented in the 2009-2017 exams, as well as for questions of the 2022 exam, which were made public after the training of the models was completed. Furthermore, different prompt strategies were tested, including the use of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts to generate explanations for answers. On the 2022 edition, the best-performing model, GPT-4 with CoT, achieved an accuracy of 87%, largely surpassing GPT-3.5 by 11 points. The code and data used on experiments are available at https://github.com/piresramon/gpt-4-enem.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在探索语言模型（LM）在处理高风险多项选择测试方面的能力，其中以巴西大学广泛采用的多学科入学考试 ENEM 为代表。这项考试给 LM 带来了挑战性的任务，因为它的问题可能跨越多个知识领域，需要理解不同领域的信息。例如，一个问题可能需要理解统计学和生物学才能解决。这项工作分析了 GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4 模型针对 2009-2017 年考试以及 2022 年考试问题生成的答案，这些答案在模型训练完成后公开。此外，还测试了不同的提示策略，包括使用思维链（CoT）提示来生成答案的解释。在 2022 年版本中，表现最好的模型，带有 CoT 的 GPT-4，准确率达到 87%，大大超过 GPT-3.5 11 个百分点。实验中使用的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/piresramon/gpt-4-enem 获取。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-3.5和GPT-4在巴西大学入学考试ENEM中的表现，分析其处理多学科交叉题目的能力及不同提示策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 探索语言模型在高风险多学科考试中的应用潜力，验证其跨领域知识整合能力及提示策略对性能的影响。
AI.method: 使用GPT-3.5和GPT-4模型处理2009-2017年及2022年ENEM考试题目，测试包括Chain-of-Thought（CoT）在内的多种提示策略。
AI.result: GPT-4结合CoT提示在2022年ENEM中达到87%准确率，较GPT-3.5提升11个百分点，显著优于前者。
AI.conclusion: GPT-4通过CoT提示能有效应对复杂多学科题目，但模型在跨领域知识整合上仍有优化空间。

search_text: Evaluating GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 Models on Brazilian University Admission Exams 评估巴西大学入学考试中的 GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4 模型 The present study aims to explore the capabilities of Language Models (LMs) in tackling high-stakes multiple-choice tests, represented here by the Exame Nacional do Ensino Médio (ENEM), a multidisciplinary entrance examination widely adopted by Brazilian universities. This exam poses challenging tasks for LMs, since its questions may span into multiple fields of knowledge, requiring understanding of information from diverse domains. For instance, a question may require comprehension of both statistics and biology to be solved. This work analyzed responses generated by GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 models for questions presented in the 2009-2017 exams, as well as for questions of the 2022 exam, which were made public after the training of the models was completed. Furthermore, different prompt strategies were tested, including the use of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts to generate explanations for answers. On the 2022 edition, the best-performing model, GPT-4 with CoT, achieved an accuracy of 87%, largely surpassing GPT-3.5 by 11 points. The code and data used on experiments are available at https://github.com/piresramon/gpt-4-enem. 本研究旨在探索语言模型（LM）在处理高风险多项选择测试方面的能力，其中以巴西大学广泛采用的多学科入学考试 ENEM 为代表。这项考试给 LM 带来了挑战性的任务，因为它的问题可能跨越多个知识领域，需要理解不同领域的信息。例如，一个问题可能需要理解统计学和生物学才能解决。这项工作分析了 GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4 模型针对 2009-2017 年考试以及 2022 年考试问题生成的答案，这些答案在模型训练完成后公开。此外，还测试了不同的提示策略，包括使用思维链（CoT）提示来生成答案的解释。在 2022 年版本中，表现最好的模型，带有 CoT 的 GPT-4，准确率达到 87%，大大超过 GPT-3.5 11 个百分点。实验中使用的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/piresramon/gpt-4-enem 获取。 评估GPT-3.5和GPT-4在巴西大学入学考试ENEM中的表现，分析其处理多学科交叉题目的能力及不同提示策略的效果。 Desnes Nunes,Ricardo Primi,Ramon Pires,Roberto Lotufo,Rodrigo Nogueira cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jialin Dong,Lin F. Yang
title: Does Sparsity Help in Learning Misspecified Linear Bandits?
title_zh: 稀疏性有助于学习错误指定的线性老虎机吗？
abstract: Recently, the study of linear misspecified bandits has generated intriguing implications of the hardness of learning in bandits and reinforcement learning (RL). In particular, Du et al. (2020) show that even if a learner is given linear features in $\mathbb{R}^d$ that approximate the rewards in a bandit or RL with a uniform error of $\varepsilon$, searching for an $O(\varepsilon)$-optimal action requires pulling at least $Ω(\exp(d))$ queries. Furthermore, Lattimore et al. (2020) show that a degraded $O(\varepsilon\sqrt{d})$-optimal solution can be learned within $\operatorname{poly}(d/\varepsilon)$ queries. Yet it is unknown whether a structural assumption on the ground-truth parameter, such as sparsity, could break the $\varepsilon\sqrt{d}$ barrier. In this paper, we address this question by showing that algorithms can obtain $O(\varepsilon)$-optimal actions by querying $O(\varepsilon^{-s}d^s)$ actions, where $s$ is the sparsity parameter, removing the $\exp(d)$-dependence. We then establish information-theoretical lower bounds, i.e., $Ω(\exp(s))$, to show that our upper bound on sample complexity is nearly tight if one demands an error $ O(s^δ\varepsilon)$ for $0<δ<1$. For $δ\geq 1$, we further show that $\operatorname{poly}(s/\varepsilon)$ queries are possible when the linear features are "good" and even in general settings. These results provide a nearly complete picture of how sparsity can help in misspecified bandit learning and provide a deeper understanding of when linear features are "useful" for bandit and reinforcement learning with misspecification.

AI.tldr: 本文研究稀疏性是否能帮助在误指定线性带宽问题中降低样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，误指定线性带宽问题需要指数级样本复杂度，但稀疏性假设可能打破这一限制。
AI.method: 提出基于稀疏性假设的算法，并通过信息论下界分析样本复杂度。
AI.result: 算法可在$O(\\varepsilon^{-s}d^s)$次查询中达到$O(\\varepsilon)$-最优解，且下界证明该结果接近最优。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性显著降低误指定线性带宽问题的样本复杂度，为特征有效性提供理论依据。

authors_text: Brian Chen,Nina Shvetsova,Andrew Rouditchenko,Daniel Kondermann,Samuel Thomas,Shih-Fu Chang,Rogerio Feris,James Glass,Hilde Kuehne
title: What, when, and where? -- Self-Supervised Spatio-Temporal Grounding in Untrimmed Multi-Action Videos from Narrated Instructions
title_zh: 什么、何时、何地？ ——来自叙述指令的未经修剪的多动作视频中的自我监督时空基础
comment: To be presented at CVPR 2024. Project page: https://brian7685.github.io/STG/
comments: To be presented at CVPR 2024. Project page: https://brian7685.github.io/STG/
abstract: Spatio-temporal grounding describes the task of localizing events in space and time, e.g., in video data, based on verbal descriptions only. Models for this task are usually trained with human-annotated sentences and bounding box supervision. This work addresses this task from a multimodal supervision perspective, proposing a framework for spatio-temporal action grounding trained on loose video and subtitle supervision only, without human annotation. To this end, we combine local representation learning, which focuses on leveraging fine-grained spatial information, with a global representation encoding that captures higher-level representations and incorporates both in a joint approach. To evaluate this challenging task in a real-life setting, a new benchmark dataset is proposed providing dense spatio-temporal grounding annotations in long, untrimmed, multi-action instructional videos for over 5K events. We evaluate the proposed approach and other methods on the proposed and standard downstream tasks showing that our method improves over current baselines in various settings, including spatial, temporal, and untrimmed multi-action spatio-temporal grounding.
summary: Spatio-temporal grounding describes the task of localizing events in space and time, e.g., in video data, based on verbal descriptions only. Models for this task are usually trained with human-annotated sentences and bounding box supervision. This work addresses this task from a multimodal supervision perspective, proposing a framework for spatio-temporal action grounding trained on loose video and subtitle supervision only, without human annotation. To this end, we combine local representation learning, which focuses on leveraging fine-grained spatial information, with a global representation encoding that captures higher-level representations and incorporates both in a joint approach. To evaluate this challenging task in a real-life setting, a new benchmark dataset is proposed providing dense spatio-temporal grounding annotations in long, untrimmed, multi-action instructional videos for over 5K events. We evaluate the proposed approach and other methods on the proposed and standard downstream tasks showing that our method improves over current baselines in various settings, including spatial, temporal, and untrimmed multi-action spatio-temporal grounding.
abstract_zh: 时空基础描述了仅基于口头描述在空间和时间（例如在视频数据中）定位事件的任务。此任务的模型通常使用人工注释的句子和边界框监督进行训练。这项工作从多模态监督的角度解决了这一任务，提出了一个仅在松散视频和字幕监督上训练的时空动作基础框架，无需人工注释。为此，我们将专注于利用细粒度空间信息的局部表示学习与捕获更高级别表示并将两者合并到联合方法中的全局表示编码相结合。为了在现实生活中评估这一具有挑战性的任务，提出了一个新的基准数据集，在超过 5K 事件的长的、未修剪的多动作教学视频中提供密集的时空基础注释。我们在建议的和标准的下游任务上评估了所提出的方法和其他方法，表明我们的方法在各种设置（包括空间、时间和未修剪的多动作时空基础）下比当前基线有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的自监督时空定位方法，通过结合局部和全局表示学习，在未剪辑的多动作视频中实现基于叙述指令的时空事件定位。
AI.motivation: 现有时空定位方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，而本文旨在利用视频和字幕的弱监督信号，降低对人工标注的依赖，提升模型在真实场景中的适用性。
AI.method: 融合局部细粒度空间信息学习与全局高层特征编码，提出联合表示框架，并构建包含5000+事件的密集时空标注数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在标准任务和新数据集上均优于现有基线方法，尤其在未剪辑多动作视频的时空定位场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过弱监督学习有效解决了多动作视频的时空定位问题，新数据集为后续研究提供了重要基准。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文方法通过弱监督学习有效解决了多动作视频的时空定位问题，新数据集为后续研究提供了重要基准。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的自监督时空定位方法，通过结合局部和全局表示学习，在未剪辑的多动作视频中实现基于叙述指令的时空事件定位。
motivation: 现有时空定位方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，而本文旨在利用视频和字幕的弱监督信号，降低对人工标注的依赖，提升模型在真实场景中的适用性。
method: 融合局部细粒度空间信息学习与全局高层特征编码，提出联合表示框架，并构建包含5000+事件的密集时空标注数据集进行评估。
result: 在标准任务和新数据集上均优于现有基线方法，尤其在未剪辑多动作视频的时空定位场景中表现突出。
conclusion: 本文方法通过弱监督学习有效解决了多动作视频的时空定位问题，新数据集为后续研究提供了重要基准。
search_text: What, when, and where? -- Self-Supervised Spatio-Temporal Grounding in Untrimmed Multi-Action Videos from Narrated Instructions 什么、何时、何地？ ——来自叙述指令的未经修剪的多动作视频中的自我监督时空基础 Spatio-temporal grounding describes the task of localizing events in space and time, e.g., in video data, based on verbal descriptions only. Models for this task are usually trained with human-annotated sentences and bounding box supervision. This work addresses this task from a multimodal supervision perspective, proposing a framework for spatio-temporal action grounding trained on loose video and subtitle supervision only, without human annotation. To this end, we combine local representation learning, which focuses on leveraging fine-grained spatial information, with a global representation encoding that captures higher-level representations and incorporates both in a joint approach. To evaluate this challenging task in a real-life setting, a new benchmark dataset is proposed providing dense spatio-temporal grounding annotations in long, untrimmed, multi-action instructional videos for over 5K events. We evaluate the proposed approach and other methods on the proposed and standard downstream tasks showing that our method improves over current baselines in various settings, including spatial, temporal, and untrimmed multi-action spatio-temporal grounding. 时空基础描述了仅基于口头描述在空间和时间（例如在视频数据中）定位事件的任务。此任务的模型通常使用人工注释的句子和边界框监督进行训练。这项工作从多模态监督的角度解决了这一任务，提出了一个仅在松散视频和字幕监督上训练的时空动作基础框架，无需人工注释。为此，我们将专注于利用细粒度空间信息的局部表示学习与捕获更高级别表示并将两者合并到联合方法中的全局表示编码相结合。为了在现实生活中评估这一具有挑战性的任务，提出了一个新的基准数据集，在超过 5K 事件的长的、未修剪的多动作教学视频中提供密集的时空基础注释。我们在建议的和标准的下游任务上评估了所提出的方法和其他方法，表明我们的方法在各种设置（包括空间、时间和未修剪的多动作时空基础）下比当前基线有所改进。 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的自监督时空定位方法，通过结合局部和全局表示学习，在未剪辑的多动作视频中实现基于叙述指令的时空事件定位。 Brian Chen,Nina Shvetsova,Andrew Rouditchenko,Daniel Kondermann,Samuel Thomas,Shih-Fu Chang,Rogerio Feris,James Glass,Hilde Kuehne cs.CV

authors_text: Colin Leong,Herumb Shandilya,Bonaventure F. P. Dossou,Atnafu Lambebo Tonja,Joel Mathew,Abdul-Hakeem Omotayo,Oreen Yousuf,Zainab Akinjobi,Chris Chinenye Emezue,Shamsudeen Muhammad,Steven Kolawole,Younwoo Choi,Tosin Adewumi
title: Adapting to the Low-Resource Double-Bind: Investigating Low-Compute Methods on Low-Resource African Languages
title_zh: 适应低资源双重束缚：研究低资源非洲语言的低计算方法
comment: Accepted to AfricaNLP workshop at ICLR2023
comments: Accepted to AfricaNLP workshop at ICLR2023
abstract: Many natural language processing (NLP) tasks make use of massively pre-trained language models, which are computationally expensive. However, access to high computational resources added to the issue of data scarcity of African languages constitutes a real barrier to research experiments on these languages. In this work, we explore the applicability of low-compute approaches such as language adapters in the context of this low-resource double-bind. We intend to answer the following question: do language adapters allow those who are doubly bound by data and compute to practically build useful models? Through fine-tuning experiments on African languages, we evaluate their effectiveness as cost-effective approaches to low-resource African NLP. Using solely free compute resources, our results show that language adapters achieve comparable performances to massive pre-trained language models which are heavy on computational resources. This opens the door to further experimentation and exploration on full-extent of language adapters capacities.
summary: Many natural language processing (NLP) tasks make use of massively pre-trained language models, which are computationally expensive. Using solely free compute resources, our results show that language adapters achieve comparable performances to massive pre-trained language models which are heavy on computational resources. This opens the door to further experimentation and exploration on full-extent of language adapters capacities.
abstract_zh: 许多自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务都使用大量预先训练的语言模型，这些模型的计算成本很高。然而，获得高计算资源又增加了非洲语言数据稀缺的问题，这对这些语言的研究实验构成了真正的障碍。在这项工作中，我们探索了低计算方法（例如语言适配器）在这种低资源双重绑定的背景下的适用性。我们打算回答以下问题：语言适配器是否允许那些受到数据和计算双重束缚的人实际构建有用的模型？通过对非洲语言的微调实验，我们评估了它们作为低资源非洲 NLP 的成本效益方法的有效性。我们的结果表明，仅使用免费的计算资源，语言适配器就可以实现与大量占用计算资源的预训练语言模型相当的性能。这为进一步实验和探索语言适配器能力的全面性打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究在计算资源和数据均有限的双重困境下，如何通过低计算方法（如语言适配器）构建有效的非洲语言自然语言处理模型。
AI.motivation: 非洲语言面临数据稀缺与计算资源不足的双重限制，传统大规模预训练模型难以应用，需探索低成本替代方案。
AI.method: 通过微调实验，在非洲语言数据集上评估语言适配器等低计算方法的性能，仅使用免费计算资源进行测试。
AI.result: 语言适配器在低资源场景下表现与计算密集型的大规模模型相当，证明其作为成本效益方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 语言适配器能有效缓解低资源非洲语言NLP的双重困境，为后续研究提供了可扩展的技术路径。

authors_text: Vishal Asnani,Xi Yin,Tal Hassner,Xiaoming Liu
title: MaLP: Manipulation Localization Using a Proactive Scheme
title_zh: MaLP：使用主动方案进行操作定位
comment: Published at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
comments: Published at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
abstract: Advancements in the generation quality of various Generative Models (GMs) has made it necessary to not only perform binary manipulation detection but also localize the modified pixels in an image. However, prior works termed as passive for manipulation localization exhibit poor generalization performance over unseen GMs and attribute modifications. To combat this issue, we propose a proactive scheme for manipulation localization, termed MaLP. We encrypt the real images by adding a learned template. If the image is manipulated by any GM, this added protection from the template not only aids binary detection but also helps in identifying the pixels modified by the GM. The template is learned by leveraging local and global-level features estimated by a two-branch architecture. We show that MaLP performs better than prior passive works. We also show the generalizability of MaLP by testing on 22 different GMs, providing a benchmark for future research on manipulation localization. Finally, we show that MaLP can be used as a discriminator for improving the generation quality of GMs. Our models/codes are available at www.github.com/vishal3477/pro_loc.
summary: Advancements in the generation quality of various Generative Models (GMs) has made it necessary to not only perform binary manipulation detection but also localize the modified pixels in an image. However, prior works termed as passive for manipulation localization exhibit poor generalization performance over unseen GMs and attribute modifications. To combat this issue, we propose a proactive scheme for manipulation localization, termed MaLP. We encrypt the real images by adding a learned template. If the image is manipulated by any GM, this added protection from the template not only aids binary detection but also helps in identifying the pixels modified by the GM. The template is learned by leveraging local and global-level features estimated by a two-branch architecture. We show that MaLP performs better than prior passive works. We also show the generalizability of MaLP by testing on 22 different GMs, providing a benchmark for future research on manipulation localization. Finally, we show that MaLP can be used as a discriminator for improving the generation quality of GMs. Our models/codes are available at www.github.com/vishal3477/pro_loc.
abstract_zh: 各种生成模型（GM）生成质量的进步使得不仅需要执行二进制操作检测，而且还需要定位图像中修改的像素。然而，之前被称为被动操作本地化的工作对于看不见的 GM 和属性修改表现出较差的泛化性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种主动的操纵本地化方案，称为 MaLP。我们通过添加学习模板来加密真实图像。如果图像被任何 GM 操作，这种对模板的额外保护不仅有助于二进制检测，而且还有助于识别 GM 修改的像素。该模板是通过利用由两分支架构估计的本地和全局级特征来学习的。我们证明 MaLP 的表现比之前的被动工作更好。我们还通过在 22 个不同的 GM 上进行测试来展示 MaLP 的普遍性，为未来的操纵定位研究提供了基准。最后，我们证明 MaLP 可以用作提高 GM 生成质量的判别器。我们的模型/代码可在 www.github.com/vishal3477/pro_loc 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MaLP的主动方案，用于定位图像中由生成模型（GMs）篡改的像素区域。
AI.motivation: 现有被动式篡改定位方法在面对未见过的生成模型和修改属性时泛化性能较差，需改进以提升检测与定位能力。
AI.method: 通过向真实图像添加学习到的模板进行加密，利用双分支架构提取局部与全局特征学习模板，篡改图像中模板保护区域的异常可辅助二分类检测与像素级定位。
AI.result: MaLP在22种不同生成模型上均优于现有被动方法，建立了定位篡改的基准，并可作为生成模型的判别器提升生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 主动式模板保护机制显著提升了篡改定位的泛化能力，为后续研究提供了有效方案与基准。

authors_text: Rishi Hazra,Brian Chen,Akshara Rai,Nitin Kamra,Ruta Desai
title: EgoTV: Egocentric Task Verification from Natural Language Task Descriptions
title_zh: EgoTV：从自然语言任务描述中验证以自我为中心的任务
abstract: To enable progress towards egocentric agents capable of understanding everyday tasks specified in natural language, we propose a benchmark and a synthetic dataset called Egocentric Task Verification (EgoTV). The goal in EgoTV is to verify the execution of tasks from egocentric videos based on the natural language description of these tasks. EgoTV contains pairs of videos and their task descriptions for multi-step tasks -- these tasks contain multiple sub-task decompositions, state changes, object interactions, and sub-task ordering constraints. In addition, EgoTV also provides abstracted task descriptions that contain only partial details about ways to accomplish a task. Consequently, EgoTV requires causal, temporal, and compositional reasoning of video and language modalities, which is missing in existing datasets. We also find that existing vision-language models struggle at such all round reasoning needed for task verification in EgoTV. Inspired by the needs of EgoTV, we propose a novel Neuro-Symbolic Grounding (NSG) approach that leverages symbolic representations to capture the compositional and temporal structure of tasks. We demonstrate NSG's capability towards task tracking and verification on our EgoTV dataset and a real-world dataset derived from CrossTask (CTV). We open-source the EgoTV and CTV datasets and the NSG model for future research on egocentric assistive agents.

The goal in EgoTV is to verify the execution of tasks from egocentric videos based on the natural language description of these tasks. EgoTV contains pairs of videos and their task descriptions for multi-step tasks -- these tasks contain multiple sub-task decompositions, state changes, object interactions, and sub-task ordering constraints. In addition, EgoTV also provides abstracted task descriptions that contain only partial details about ways to accomplish a task. Consequently, EgoTV requires causal, temporal, and compositional reasoning of video and language modalities, which is missing in existing datasets. We also find that existing vision-language models struggle at such all round reasoning needed for task verification in EgoTV. Inspired by the needs of EgoTV, we propose a novel Neuro-Symbolic Grounding (NSG) approach that leverages symbolic representations to capture the compositional and temporal structure of tasks. We demonstrate NSG's capability towards task tracking and verification on our EgoTV dataset and a real-world dataset derived from CrossTask (CTV). We open-source the EgoTV and CTV datasets and the NSG model for future research on egocentric assistive agents.
abstract_zh: 为了使以自我为中心的智能体能够理解自然语言中指定的日常任务，我们提出了一个基准和一个名为“自我中心任务验证”（EgoTV）的综合数据集。 EgoTV 的目标是根据这些任务的自然语言描述来验证以自我为中心的视频中任务的执行情况。 EgoTV 包含多对视频及其多步骤任务的任务描述 - 这些任务包含多个子任务分解、状态更改、对象交互和子任务排序约束。此外，EgoTV 还提供抽象的任务描述，其中仅包含有关完成任务的方法的部分细节。因此，EgoTV 需要对视频和语言模式进行因果、时间和组合推理，而这在现有数据集中是缺失的。我们还发现，现有的视觉语言模型很难满足 EgoTV 任务验证所需的全面推理。受 EgoTV 需求的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的神经符号基础（NSG）方法，该方法利用符号表示来捕获任务的组成和时间结构。我们在 EgoTV 数据集和源自 CrossTask (CTV) 的真实数据集上展示了 NSG 的任务跟踪和验证能力。我们开源 EgoTV 和 CTV 数据集以及 NSG 模型，用于未来以自我为中心的辅助代理的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoTV基准和合成数据集，用于基于自然语言任务描述验证第一视角视频中的任务执行。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对因果关系、时间顺序和组合推理的需求，而任务验证需要这些能力，现有视觉语言模型难以满足。
AI.method: 提出神经符号接地（NSG）方法，利用符号表示捕捉任务的组合性和时间结构，并在EgoTV和CTV数据集上验证。
AI.result: NSG在任务跟踪和验证任务中表现优异，EgoTV和CTV数据集已开源以促进第一视角助人代理的研究。
AI.conclusion: EgoTV和NSG方法为第一视角任务验证提供了新基准，推动了需要复杂推理的助人智能体研究。

authors_text: Organizers Of QueerInAI,:,Anaelia Ovalle,Arjun Subramonian,Ashwin Singh,Claas Voelcker,Danica J. Sutherland,Davide Locatelli,Eva Breznik,Filip Klubička,Hang Yuan,Hetvi J,Huan Zhang,Jaidev Shriram,Kruno Lehman,Luca Soldaini,Maarten Sap,Marc Peter Deisenroth,Maria Leonor Pacheco,Maria Ryskina,Martin Mundt,Milind Agarwal,Nyx McLean,Pan Xu,A Pranav, et al. (26 additional authors not shown)
title: Queer In AI: A Case Study in Community-Led Participatory AI
title_zh: 人工智能中的酷儿：社区主导的参与式人工智能案例研究
abstract: We present Queer in AI as a case study for community-led participatory design in AI. We examine how participatory design and intersectional tenets started and shaped this community's programs over the years. We discuss different challenges that emerged in the process, look at ways this organization has fallen short of operationalizing participatory and intersectional principles, and then assess the organization's impact. Queer in AI provides important lessons and insights for practitioners and theorists of participatory methods broadly through its rejection of hierarchy in favor of decentralization, success at building aid and programs by and for the queer community, and effort to change actors and institutions outside of the queer community. Finally, we theorize how communities like Queer in AI contribute to the participatory design in AI more broadly by fostering cultures of participation in AI, welcoming and empowering marginalized participants, critiquing poor or exploitative participatory practices, and bringing participation to institutions outside of individual research projects. Queer in AI's work serves as a case study of grassroots activism and participatory methods within AI, demonstrating the potential of community-led participatory methods and intersectional praxis, while also providing challenges, case studies, and nuanced insights to researchers developing and using participatory methods.
summary: We present Queer in AI as a case study for community-led participatory design in AI. We examine how participatory design and intersectional tenets started and shaped this community's programs over the years. We discuss different challenges that emerged in the process, look at ways this organization has fallen short of operationalizing participatory and intersectional principles, and then assess the organization's impact. Queer in AI provides important lessons and insights for practitioners and theorists of participatory methods broadly through its rejection of hierarchy in favor of decentralization, success at building aid and programs by and for the queer community, and effort to change actors and institutions outside of the queer community. Finally, we theorize how communities like Queer in AI contribute to the participatory design in AI more broadly by fostering cultures of participation in AI, welcoming and empowering marginalized participants, critiquing poor or exploitative participatory practices, and bringing participation to institutions outside of individual research projects. Queer in AI's work serves as a case study of grassroots activism and participatory methods within AI, demonstrating the potential of community-led participatory methods and intersectional praxis, while also providing challenges, case studies, and nuanced insights to researchers developing and using participatory methods.
abstract_zh: 我们将人工智能中的酷儿作为社区主导的人工智能参与式设计的案例研究。我们研究了多年来参与式设计和交叉原则是如何开始和塑造这个社区的项目的。我们讨论在此过程中出现的不同挑战，研究该组织在实施参与性和交叉原则方面的不足，然后评估该组织的影响。 《人工智能中的酷儿》通过拒绝等级制度、支持权力下放、成功地为酷儿社区建立援助和项目，以及努力改变酷儿社区之外的参与者和机构，为参与方法的实践者和理论家提供了重要的教训和见解。最后，我们理论化了像人工智能中的酷儿这样的社区如何通过培育人工智能参与文化、欢迎和赋予边缘化参与者权力、批评不良或剥削性的参与实践以及将参与带入个人研究项目之外的机构，从而更广泛地促进人工智能的参与式设计。 《人工智能中的酷儿》的工作是人工智能中草根行动主义和参与方法的案例研究，展示了社区主导的参与方法和交叉实践的潜力，同时也为开发和使用参与方法的研究人员提供了挑战、案例研究和细致入微的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文以Queer in AI为案例，研究社区主导的参与式AI设计方法，分析其实践过程、挑战及影响。
AI.motivation: 探讨社区主导的参与式设计在AI领域的应用，为实践者和理论家提供关于去中心化、包容性及机构变革的启示。
AI.method: 通过案例研究方法，分析Queer in AI的项目发展、挑战及成果，结合参与式设计与交叉性理论进行评估。
AI.result: Queer in AI展示了社区主导方法的潜力，揭示了在实施参与式原则时的不足，并为改进AI领域的参与式实践提供了具体案例和反思。
AI.conclusion: 社区主导的参与式AI实践能够推动包容性文化，批判剥削性做法，并将参与扩展至机构层面，为未来研究提供了重要参考。

authors_text: Wiktor Piotrowski,Yoni Sher,Sachin Grover,Roni Stern,Shiwali Mohan
title: Heuristic Search For Physics-Based Problems: Angry Birds in PDDL+
title_zh: 基于物理问题的启发式搜索：PDDL+ 中的《愤怒​​的小鸟》
abstract: This paper studies how a domain-independent planner and combinatorial search can be employed to play Angry Birds, a well established AI challenge problem. To model the game, we use PDDL+, a planning language for mixed discrete/continuous domains that supports durative processes and exogenous events. The paper describes the model and identifies key design decisions that reduce the problem complexity. In addition, we propose several domain-specific enhancements including heuristics and a search technique similar to preferred operators. Together, they alleviate the complexity of combinatorial search. We evaluate our approach by comparing its performance with dedicated domain-specific solvers on a range of Angry Birds levels. The results show that our performance is on par with these domain-specific approaches in most levels, even without using our domain-specific search enhancements.
summary: This paper studies how a domain-independent planner and combinatorial search can be employed to play Angry Birds, a well established AI challenge problem. To model the game, we use PDDL+, a planning language for mixed discrete/continuous domains that supports durative processes and exogenous events. The paper describes the model and identifies key design decisions that reduce the problem complexity. In addition, we propose several domain-specific enhancements including heuristics and a search technique similar to preferred operators. Together, they alleviate the complexity of combinatorial search. We evaluate our approach by comparing its performance with dedicated domain-specific solvers on a range of Angry Birds levels. The results show that our performance is on par with these domain-specific approaches in most levels, even without using our domain-specific search enhancements.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了如何使用与领域无关的规划器和组合搜索来玩“愤怒的小鸟”，这是一个成熟的人工智能挑战问题。为了对游戏进行建模，我们使用 PDDL+，这是一种用于混合离散/连续域的规划语言，支持持续过程和外生事件。本文描述了该模型并确定了降低问题复杂性的关键设计决策。此外，我们提出了一些特定于领域的增强功能，包括启发式和类似于首选运算符的搜索技术。它们共同减轻了组合搜索的复杂性。我们通过在一系列《愤怒的小鸟》关卡上将其性能与专用领域特定求解器进行比较来评估我们的方法。结果表明，即使不使用我们的特定领域搜索增强功能，我们的性能在大多数级别上都与这些特定领域的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用领域无关规划器和组合搜索技术解决《愤怒的小鸟》游戏问题，并通过PDDL+建模和启发式方法优化搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统规划器难以处理包含物理模拟的连续动态问题，而《愤怒的小鸟》作为经典AI挑战问题，需要验证领域无关方法的可行性。
AI.method: 采用PDDL+语言建模游戏，结合领域设计决策降低复杂度，并引入启发式函数与类似优选操作符的搜索技术优化求解过程。
AI.result: 在多数《愤怒的小鸟》关卡测试中，该方法性能与专用领域求解器相当，且无需依赖领域特定搜索增强即可达到相近效果。
AI.conclusion: 领域无关规划器通过合理建模和启发式优化可有效处理物理模拟问题，为复杂动态环境下的AI求解提供新思路。

search_text: Heuristic Search For Physics-Based Problems: Angry Birds in PDDL+ 基于物理问题的启发式搜索：PDDL+ 中的《愤怒​​的小鸟》 This paper studies how a domain-independent planner and combinatorial search can be employed to play Angry Birds, a well established AI challenge problem. To model the game, we use PDDL+, a planning language for mixed discrete/continuous domains that supports durative processes and exogenous events. The paper describes the model and identifies key design decisions that reduce the problem complexity. In addition, we propose several domain-specific enhancements including heuristics and a search technique similar to preferred operators. Together, they alleviate the complexity of combinatorial search. We evaluate our approach by comparing its performance with dedicated domain-specific solvers on a range of Angry Birds levels. The results show that our performance is on par with these domain-specific approaches in most levels, even without using our domain-specific search enhancements. 本文研究了如何使用与领域无关的规划器和组合搜索来玩“愤怒的小鸟”，这是一个成熟的人工智能挑战问题。为了对游戏进行建模，我们使用 PDDL+，这是一种用于混合离散/连续域的规划语言，支持持续过程和外生事件。本文描述了该模型并确定了降低问题复杂性的关键设计决策。此外，我们提出了一些特定于领域的增强功能，包括启发式和类似于首选运算符的搜索技术。它们共同减轻了组合搜索的复杂性。我们通过在一系列《愤怒的小鸟》关卡上将其性能与专用领域特定求解器进行比较来评估我们的方法。结果表明，即使不使用我们的特定领域搜索增强功能，我们的性能在大多数级别上都与这些特定领域的方法相当。 本文研究如何利用领域无关规划器和组合搜索技术解决《愤怒的小鸟》游戏问题，并通过PDDL+建模和启发式方法优化搜索效率。 Wiktor Piotrowski,Yoni Sher,Sachin Grover,Roni Stern,Shiwali Mohan cs.AI

authors_text: Haoran Geng,Ziming Li,Yiran Geng,Jiayi Chen,Hao Dong,He Wang
title: PartManip: Learning Cross-Category Generalizable Part Manipulation Policy from Point Cloud Observations
title_zh: PartManip：从点云观测中学习跨类别可推广零件操作策略
abstract: Learning a generalizable object manipulation policy is vital for an embodied agent to work in complex real-world scenes. Parts, as the shared components in different object categories, have the potential to increase the generalization ability of the manipulation policy and achieve cross-category object manipulation. In this work, we build the first large-scale, part-based cross-category object manipulation benchmark, PartManip, which is composed of 11 object categories, 494 objects, and 1432 tasks in 6 task classes. Compared to previous work, our benchmark is also more diverse and realistic, i.e., having more objects and using sparse-view point cloud as input without oracle information like part segmentation. To tackle the difficulties of vision-based policy learning, we first train a state-based expert with our proposed part-based canonicalization and part-aware rewards, and then distill the knowledge to a vision-based student. We also find an expressive backbone is essential to overcome the large diversity of different objects. For cross-category generalization, we introduce domain adversarial learning for domain-invariant feature extraction. Extensive experiments in simulation show that our learned policy can outperform other methods by a large margin, especially on unseen object categories. We also demonstrate our method can successfully manipulate novel objects in the real world.
summary: Learning a generalizable object manipulation policy is vital for an embodied agent to work in complex real-world scenes. Parts, as the shared components in different object categories, have the potential to increase the generalization ability of the manipulation policy and achieve cross-category object manipulation. In this work, we build the first large-scale, part-based cross-category object manipulation benchmark, PartManip, which is composed of 11 object categories, 494 objects, and 1432 tasks in 6 task classes. Compared to previous work, our benchmark is also more diverse and realistic, i.e., having more objects and using sparse-view point cloud as input without oracle information like part segmentation. To tackle the difficulties of vision-based policy learning, we first train a state-based expert with our proposed part-based canonicalization and part-aware rewards, and then distill the knowledge to a vision-based student. We also find an expressive backbone is essential to overcome the large diversity of different objects. For cross-category generalization, we introduce domain adversarial learning for domain-invariant feature extraction. Extensive experiments in simulation show that our learned policy can outperform other methods by a large margin, especially on unseen object categories. We also demonstrate our method can successfully manipulate novel objects in the real world.
abstract_zh: 学习通用的对象操作策略对于实体代理在复杂的现实场景中工作至关重要。部件作为不同对象类别中的共享组件，有潜力增加操作策略的泛化能力，实现跨类别对象操作。在这项工作中，我们构建了第一个大规模、基于部件的跨类别对象操作基准，PartManip，它由 11 个对象类别、494 个对象和 6 个任务类的 1432 个任务组成。与之前的工作相比，我们的基准测试也更加多样化和现实，即具有更多的对象并使用稀疏视点云作为输入，而不需要像零件分割这样的预言信息。为了解决基于视觉的政策学习的困难，我们首先使用我们提出的基于部分的规范化和部分感知奖励来训练一个基于状态的专家，然后将知识提炼给一个基于视觉的学生。我们还发现，表达性的支柱对于克服不同对象的巨大多样性至关重要。对于跨类别泛化，我们引入了域对抗学习来提取域不变特征。大量的模拟实验表明，我们学习的策略可以大幅优于其他方法，特别是在看不见的对象类别上。我们还证明了我们的方法可以成功地操纵现实世界中的新物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PartManip基准和方法，通过点云观测学习跨类别可泛化的物体部件操作策略。
AI.motivation: 现有操作策略泛化能力不足，难以应对真实场景中多样化的物体类别和稀疏观测条件。
AI.method: 构建包含11类物体的跨类别基准，采用部件归一化与感知奖励训练状态专家模型，并通过知识蒸馏与领域对抗学习提升视觉学生模型的跨类别泛化能力。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中均显著优于现有方法，尤其在未见过的物体类别上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 基于部件表示与领域不变特征学习的方法能有效提升跨类别物体操作的泛化性，为现实应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Tanmay Gautam,Samuel Pfrommer,Somayeh Sojoudi
title: Meta-Learning Parameterized First-Order Optimizers using Differentiable Convex Optimization
title_zh: 使用可微凸优化的元学习参数化一阶优化器
abstract: Conventional optimization methods in machine learning and controls rely heavily on first-order update rules. Selecting the right method and hyperparameters for a particular task often involves trial-and-error or practitioner intuition, motivating the field of meta-learning. We generalize a broad family of preexisting update rules by proposing a meta-learning framework in which the inner loop optimization step involves solving a differentiable convex optimization (DCO). We illustrate the theoretical appeal of this approach by showing that it enables one-step optimization of a family of linear least squares problems, given that the meta-learner has sufficient exposure to similar tasks. Various instantiations of the DCO update rule are compared to conventional optimizers on a range of illustrative experimental settings.
summary: Conventional optimization methods in machine learning and controls rely heavily on first-order update rules. Selecting the right method and hyperparameters for a particular task often involves trial-and-error or practitioner intuition, motivating the field of meta-learning. We generalize a broad family of preexisting update rules by proposing a meta-learning framework in which the inner loop optimization step involves solving a differentiable convex optimization (DCO). We illustrate the theoretical appeal of this approach by showing that it enables one-step optimization of a family of linear least squares problems, given that the meta-learner has sufficient exposure to similar tasks. Various instantiations of the DCO update rule are compared to conventional optimizers on a range of illustrative experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和控制中的传统优化方法严重依赖一阶更新规则。为特定任务选择正确的方法和超参数通常涉及试错或实践者的直觉，这推动了元学习领域的发展。我们通过提出一个元学习框架来概括一系列预先存在的更新规则，其中内循环优化步骤涉及求解可微凸优化（DCO）。我们通过证明这种方法能够对一系列线性最小二乘问题进行一步优化来说明这种方法的理论吸引力，前提是元学习器有足够的时间接触类似的任务。在一系列说明性实验设置上将 DCO 更新规则的各种实例与传统优化器进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分凸优化的元学习框架，用于参数化一阶优化器。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法依赖人工选择一阶更新规则和超参数，过程繁琐且依赖经验，需通过元学习实现自动化优化。
AI.method: 构建元学习框架，通过可微分凸优化（DCO）解决内部循环优化问题，推广现有更新规则并实现参数化。
AI.result: 理论证明该方法可一步优化线性最小二乘问题家族，并在实验中验证其优于传统优化器的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自适应优化器参数提供了有效方案，兼具理论保证和实际应用潜力。

Various instantiations of the DCO update rule are compared to conventional optimizers on a range of illustrative experimental settings. 机器学习和控制中的传统优化方法严重依赖一阶更新规则。为特定任务选择正确的方法和超参数通常涉及试错或实践者的直觉，这推动了元学习领域的发展。我们通过提出一个元学习框架来概括一系列预先存在的更新规则，其中内循环优化步骤涉及求解可微凸优化（DCO）。我们通过证明这种方法能够对一系列线性最小二乘问题进行一步优化来说明这种方法的理论吸引力，前提是元学习器有足够的时间接触类似的任务。在一系列说明性实验设置上将 DCO 更新规则的各种实例与传统优化器进行比较。 本文提出一种基于可微分凸优化的元学习框架，用于参数化一阶优化器。 Tanmay Gautam,Samuel Pfrommer,Somayeh Sojoudi cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Irfansha Shaik,Jaco van de Pol
title: Concise QBF Encodings for Games on a Grid (extended version)
title_zh: 网格游戏的简洁 QBF 编码（扩展版）
comment: 15 pages (main paper), 20 listings, 3 figures, 3 tables and 2 appendix sections
comments: 15 pages (main paper), 20 listings, 3 figures, 3 tables and 2 appendix sections
abstract: Encoding 2-player games in QBF correctly and efficiently is challenging and error-prone. To enable concise specifications and uniform encodings of games played on grid boards, like Tic-Tac-Toe, Connect-4, Domineering, Pursuer-Evader and Breakthrough, we introduce Board-game Domain Definition Language (BDDL), inspired by the success of PDDL in the planning domain. We provide an efficient translation from BDDL into QBF, encoding the existence of a winning strategy of bounded depth. Our lifted encoding treats board positions symbolically and allows concise definitions of conditions, effects and winning configurations, relative to symbolic board positions. The size of the encoding grows linearly in the input model and the considered depth. To show the feasibility of such a generic approach, we use QBF solvers to compute the critical depths of winning strategies for instances of several known games. For several games, our work provides the first QBF encoding. Unlike plan validation in SAT-based planning, validating QBF-based winning strategies is difficult. We show how to validate winning strategies using QBF certificates and interactive game play.
summary: Encoding 2-player games in QBF correctly and efficiently is challenging and error-prone. To enable concise specifications and uniform encodings of games played on grid boards, like Tic-Tac-Toe, Connect-4, Domineering, Pursuer-Evader and Breakthrough, we introduce Board-game Domain Definition Language (BDDL), inspired by the success of PDDL in the planning domain. We provide an efficient translation from BDDL into QBF, encoding the existence of a winning strategy of bounded depth. Our lifted encoding treats board positions symbolically and allows concise definitions of conditions, effects and winning configurations, relative to symbolic board positions. The size of the encoding grows linearly in the input model and the considered depth. To show the feasibility of such a generic approach, we use QBF solvers to compute the critical depths of winning strategies for instances of several known games. For several games, our work provides the first QBF encoding. Unlike plan validation in SAT-based planning, validating QBF-based winning strategies is difficult. We show how to validate winning strategies using QBF certificates and interactive game play.
abstract_zh: 在 QBF 中正确有效地编码 2 人游戏具有挑战性且容易出错。为了使在网格棋盘上玩的游戏（如 Tic-Tac-Toe、Connect-4、Domineering、Pursuer-Evader 和 Breakthrough）实现简洁的规范和统一的编码，我们引入了棋盘游戏域定义语言（BDDL），其灵感来自 PDDL 在规划领域的成功。我们提供从 BDDL 到 QBF 的有效转换，编码有限深度获胜策略的存在。我们的提升编码以符号方式对待棋盘位置，并允许相对于符号棋盘位置对条件、效果和获胜配置进行简明定义。编码的大小在输入模型和考虑的深度中线性增长。为了展示这种通用方法的可行性，我们使用 QBF 求解器来计算几个已知游戏实例的获胜策略的临界深度。对于一些游戏，我们的工作提供了第一个 QBF 编码。与基于 SAT 的规划中的计划验证不同，验证基于 QBF 的获胜策略很困难。我们展示如何使用 QBF 证书和​​互动游戏来验证获胜策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于QBF（量化布尔公式）的简洁编码方法，用于网格上的两人游戏，如井字棋、四连棋等，并引入了类似PDDL的BDDL语言进行统一建模。
AI.motivation: 将两人游戏正确高效地编码为QBF具有挑战性且易出错，现有方法缺乏统一的建模方式和对深度有限的胜利策略的有效验证手段。
AI.method: 设计了BDDL语言用于符号化表示游戏规则和状态，将其转化为QBF公式，并通过符号化板位处理实现编码规模与输入模型及深度线性增长，结合QBF求解器验证策略深度。
AI.result: 首次为多种网格游戏提供了QBF编码，计算了多个游戏的策略关键深度，并展示了基于QBF证书和交互式游戏验证策略的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了网格游戏的通用简洁QBF编码，有效支持胜利策略分析，同时解决了QBF策略验证的难题。

authors_text: Congpei Qiu,Tong Zhang,Wei Ke,Mathieu Salzmann,Sabine Süsstrunk
title: De-coupling and De-positioning Dense Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 解耦、去定位密集自监督学习
abstract: Dense Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods address the limitations of using image-level feature representations when handling images with multiple objects. Although the dense features extracted by employing segmentation maps and bounding boxes allow networks to perform SSL for each object, we show that they suffer from coupling and positional bias, which arise from the receptive field increasing with layer depth and zero-padding. We address this by introducing three data augmentation strategies, and leveraging them in (i) a decoupling module that aims to robustify the network to variations in the object's surroundings, and (ii) a de-positioning module that encourages the network to discard positional object information. We demonstrate the benefits of our method on COCO and on a new challenging benchmark, OpenImage-MINI, for object classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection. Our extensive experiments evidence the better generalization of our method compared to the SOTA dense SSL methods
summary: Dense Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods address the limitations of using image-level feature representations when handling images with multiple objects. Although the dense features extracted by employing segmentation maps and bounding boxes allow networks to perform SSL for each object, we show that they suffer from coupling and positional bias, which arise from the receptive field increasing with layer depth and zero-padding. We address this by introducing three data augmentation strategies, and leveraging them in (i) a decoupling module that aims to robustify the network to variations in the object's surroundings, and (ii) a de-positioning module that encourages the network to discard positional object information. We demonstrate the benefits of our method on COCO and on a new challenging benchmark, OpenImage-MINI, for object classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection. Our extensive experiments evidence the better generalization of our method compared to the SOTA dense SSL methods
abstract_zh: 密集自监督学习（SSL）方法解决了处理具有多个对象的图像时使用图像级特征表示的局限性。尽管通过使用分割图和边界框提取的密集特征允许网络对每个对象执行 SSL，但我们表明它们会受到耦合和位置偏差的影响，这是由于感受野随着层深度和零填充而增加而产生的。我们通过引入三种数据增强策略来解决这个问题，并在（i）一个解耦模块中利用它们，该模块旨在增强网络对物体周围环境变化的鲁棒性，以及（ii）一个去定位模块，鼓励网络丢弃位置物体信息。我们在 COCO 和新的具有挑战性的基准 OpenImage-MINI 上展示了我们的方法在对象分类、语义分割和对象检测方面的优势。我们广泛的实验证明，与 SOTA 密集 SSL 方法相比，我们的方法具有更好的泛化能力

AI.tldr: 本文提出了解耦与去定位模块，以解决密集自监督学习中的耦合与位置偏差问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有密集自监督学习方法在处理多物体图像时存在特征耦合和位置偏差问题，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计三种数据增强策略，结合解耦模块（增强环境变化鲁棒性）和去定位模块（消除位置信息依赖）进行优化。
AI.result: 在COCO和OpenImage-MINI数据集上，方法在分类、分割和检测任务中均展现出优于现有SOTA方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 解耦与去定位策略有效缓解了密集SSL中的关键问题，为多物体场景下的自监督学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: James Giroux,Martin Bouchard,Robert Laganiere
title: T-FFTRadNet: Object Detection with Swin Vision Transformers from Raw ADC Radar Signals
title_zh: T-FFTRadNet：使用 Swin Vision Transformer 根据原始 ADC 雷达信号进行物体检测
abstract: Object detection utilizing Frequency Modulated Continous Wave radar is becoming increasingly popular in the field of autonomous systems. Radar does not possess the same drawbacks seen by other emission-based sensors such as LiDAR, primarily the degradation or loss of return signals due to weather conditions such as rain or snow. However, radar does possess traits that make it unsuitable for standard emission-based deep learning representations such as point clouds. Radar point clouds tend to be sparse and therefore information extraction is not efficient. To overcome this, more traditional digital signal processing pipelines were adapted to form inputs residing directly in the frequency domain via Fast Fourier Transforms. Commonly, three transformations were used to form Range-Azimuth-Doppler cubes in which deep learning algorithms could perform object detection. This too has drawbacks, namely the pre-processing costs associated with performing multiple Fourier Transforms and normalization. We explore the possibility of operating on raw radar inputs from analog to digital converters via the utilization of complex transformation layers. Moreover, we introduce hierarchical Swin Vision transformers to the field of radar object detection and show their capability to operate on inputs varying in pre-processing, along with different radar configurations, i.e. relatively low and high numbers of transmitters and receivers, while obtaining on par or better results than the state-of-the-art.
summary: Object detection utilizing Frequency Modulated Continous Wave radar is becoming increasingly popular in the field of autonomous systems. Radar does not possess the same drawbacks seen by other emission-based sensors such as LiDAR, primarily the degradation or loss of return signals due to weather conditions such as rain or snow. However, radar does possess traits that make it unsuitable for standard emission-based deep learning representations such as point clouds. Radar point clouds tend to be sparse and therefore information extraction is not efficient. To overcome this, more traditional digital signal processing pipelines were adapted to form inputs residing directly in the frequency domain via Fast Fourier Transforms. Commonly, three transformations were used to form Range-Azimuth-Doppler cubes in which deep learning algorithms could perform object detection. This too has drawbacks, namely the pre-processing costs associated with performing multiple Fourier Transforms and normalization. We explore the possibility of operating on raw radar inputs from analog to digital converters via the utilization of complex transformation layers. Moreover, we introduce hierarchical Swin Vision transformers to the field of radar object detection and show their capability to operate on inputs varying in pre-processing, along with different radar configurations, i.e. relatively low and high numbers of transmitters and receivers, while obtaining on par or better results than the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 利用调频连续波雷达进行物体检测在自主系统领域变得越来越流行。 Radar does not possess the same drawbacks seen by other emission-based sensors such as LiDAR, primarily the degradation or loss of return signals due to weather conditions such as rain or snow.然而，雷达确实具有一些特性，使其不适合基于标准发射的深度学习表示，例如点云。雷达点云往往稀疏，因此信息提取效率不高。 To overcome this, more traditional digital signal processing pipelines were adapted to form inputs residing directly in the frequency domain via Fast Fourier Transforms.通常，使用三种变换来形成距离-方位角-多普勒立方体，其中深度学习算法可以执行对象检测。这也有缺点，即与执行多个傅里叶变换和归一化相关的预处理成本。 We explore the possibility of operating on raw radar inputs from analog to digital converters via the utilization of complex transformation layers. Moreover, we introduce hierarchical Swin Vision transformers to the field of radar object detection and show their capability to operate on inputs varying in pre-processing, along with different radar configurations, i.e. relatively low and high numbers of transmitters and receivers, while obtaining on par or better results than the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-FFTRadNet方法，利用Swin视觉Transformer直接处理原始ADC雷达信号进行目标检测，避免传统FFT预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达目标检测依赖FFT转换生成Range-Azimuth-Doppler立方体，但存在预处理成本高、雷达点云稀疏导致信息提取效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计复杂变换层处理原始ADC信号，引入分层Swin Vision Transformer架构，适应不同雷达配置（高低收发器数量）和预处理方式。
AI.result: 在多种雷达配置下实现与现有最佳方法相当或更优的检测性能，验证了方法对原始信号的适应性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 直接处理原始ADC信号的Transformer方法可有效提升雷达目标检测效率，为自动驾驶等场景提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: T-FFTRadNet: Object Detection with Swin Vision Transformers from Raw ADC Radar Signals T-FFTRadNet：使用 Swin Vision Transformer 根据原始 ADC 雷达信号进行物体检测 Object detection utilizing Frequency Modulated Continous Wave radar is becoming increasingly popular in the field of autonomous systems. Radar does not possess the same drawbacks seen by other emission-based sensors such as LiDAR, primarily the degradation or loss of return signals due to weather conditions such as rain or snow. However, radar does possess traits that make it unsuitable for standard emission-based deep learning representations such as point clouds. Radar point clouds tend to be sparse and therefore information extraction is not efficient. To overcome this, more traditional digital signal processing pipelines were adapted to form inputs residing directly in the frequency domain via Fast Fourier Transforms. Commonly, three transformations were used to form Range-Azimuth-Doppler cubes in which deep learning algorithms could perform object detection. This too has drawbacks, namely the pre-processing costs associated with performing multiple Fourier Transforms and normalization. We explore the possibility of operating on raw radar inputs from analog to digital converters via the utilization of complex transformation layers. Moreover, we introduce hierarchical Swin Vision transformers to the field of radar object detection and show their capability to operate on inputs varying in pre-processing, along with different radar configurations, i.e. relatively low and high numbers of transmitters and receivers, while obtaining on par or better results than the state-of-the-art. 利用调频连续波雷达进行物体检测在自主系统领域变得越来越流行。 Radar does not possess the same drawbacks seen by other emission-based sensors such as LiDAR, primarily the degradation or loss of return signals due to weather conditions such as rain or snow.然而，雷达确实具有一些特性，使其不适合基于标准发射的深度学习表示，例如点云。雷达点云往往稀疏，因此信息提取效率不高。 To overcome this, more traditional digital signal processing pipelines were adapted to form inputs residing directly in the frequency domain via Fast Fourier Transforms.通常，使用三种变换来形成距离-方位角-多普勒立方体，其中深度学习算法可以执行对象检测。这也有缺点，即与执行多个傅里叶变换和归一化相关的预处理成本。 We explore the possibility of operating on raw radar inputs from analog to digital converters via the utilization of complex transformation layers. Moreover, we introduce hierarchical Swin Vision transformers to the field of radar object detection and show their capability to operate on inputs varying in pre-processing, along with different radar configurations, i.e. relatively low and high numbers of transmitters and receivers, while obtaining on par or better results than the state-of-the-art. 本文提出T-FFTRadNet方法，利用Swin视觉Transformer直接处理原始ADC雷达信号进行目标检测，避免传统FFT预处理步骤。 James Giroux,Martin Bouchard,Robert Laganiere cs.CV

authors_text: Vasco Lopes,Bruno Degardin,Luís A. Alexandre
title: Are Neural Architecture Search Benchmarks Well Designed? A Deeper Look Into Operation Importance
title_zh: 神经架构搜索基准设计得好吗？深入探讨运营重要性
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) benchmarks significantly improved the capability of developing and comparing NAS methods while at the same time drastically reduced the computational overhead by providing meta-information about thousands of trained neural networks. However, tabular benchmarks have several drawbacks that can hinder fair comparisons and provide unreliable results. These usually focus on providing a small pool of operations in heavily constrained search spaces -- usually cell-based neural networks with pre-defined outer-skeletons. In this work, we conducted an empirical analysis of the widely used NAS-Bench-101, NAS-Bench-201 and TransNAS-Bench-101 benchmarks in terms of their generability and how different operations influence the performance of the generated architectures. We found that only a subset of the operation pool is required to generate architectures close to the upper-bound of the performance range. Also, the performance distribution is negatively skewed, having a higher density of architectures in the upper-bound range. We consistently found convolution layers to have the highest impact on the architecture's performance, and that specific combination of operations favors top-scoring architectures. These findings shed insights on the correct evaluation and comparison of NAS methods using NAS benchmarks, showing that directly searching on NAS-Bench-201, ImageNet16-120 and TransNAS-Bench-101 produces more reliable results than searching only on CIFAR-10. Furthermore, with this work we provide suggestions for future benchmark evaluations and design. The code used to conduct the evaluations is available at https://github.com/VascoLopes/NAS-Benchmark-Evaluation.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) benchmarks significantly improved the capability of developing and comparing NAS methods while at the same time drastically reduced the computational overhead by providing meta-information about thousands of trained neural networks. However, tabular benchmarks have several drawbacks that can hinder fair comparisons and provide unreliable results. These usually focus on providing a small pool of operations in heavily constrained search spaces -- usually cell-based neural networks with pre-defined outer-skeletons. In this work, we conducted an empirical analysis of the widely used NAS-Bench-101, NAS-Bench-201 and TransNAS-Bench-101 benchmarks in terms of their generability and how different operations influence the performance of the generated architectures. We found that only a subset of the operation pool is required to generate architectures close to the upper-bound of the performance range. Also, the performance distribution is negatively skewed, having a higher density of architectures in the upper-bound range. We consistently found convolution layers to have the highest impact on the architecture's performance, and that specific combination of operations favors top-scoring architectures. These findings shed insights on the correct evaluation and comparison of NAS methods using NAS benchmarks, showing that directly searching on NAS-Bench-201, ImageNet16-120 and TransNAS-Bench-101 produces more reliable results than searching only on CIFAR-10. Furthermore, with this work we provide suggestions for future benchmark evaluations and design. The code used to conduct the evaluations is available at https://github.com/VascoLopes/NAS-Benchmark-Evaluation.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 基准显着提高了开发和比较 NAS 方法的能力，同时通过提供有关数千个经过训练的神经网络的元信息，大大减少了计算开销。然而，表格基准有几个缺点，可能会阻碍公平比较并提供不可靠的结果。这些通常侧重于在严重受限的搜索空间中提供少量操作——通常是具有预定义外骨架的基于细胞的神经网络。在这项工作中，我们对广泛使用的 NAS-Bench-101、NAS-Bench-201 和 TransNAS-Bench-101 基准测试的可生成性以及不同操作如何影响生成架构的性能进行了实证分析。我们发现只需要操作池的一个子集来生成接近性能范围上限的架构。此外，性能分布呈负偏态，在上限范围内具有更高的架构密度。我们一致发现卷积层对架构的性能影响最大，并且特定的操作组合有利于得分最高的架构。这些发现为使用 NAS 基准正确评估和比较 NAS 方法提供了见解，表明直接在 NAS-Bench-201、ImageNet16-120 和 TransNAS-Bench-101 上搜索比仅在 CIFAR-10 上搜索产生更可靠的结果。此外，通过这项工作，我们为未来的基准评估和设计提供建议。用于进行评估的代码可在 https://github.com/VascoLopes/NAS-Benchmark-Evaluation 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了主流神经网络架构搜索（NAS）基准的设计缺陷，并探讨了不同操作对生成模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS基准存在搜索空间受限、操作池过小等问题，可能导致公平性不足和结果不可靠，需重新评估其设计合理性。
AI.method: 对NAS-Bench-101、NAS-Bench-201和TransNAS-Bench-101进行实证分析，研究操作重要性及性能分布特征。
AI.result: 发现仅需操作池子集即可接近性能上限，性能分布呈负偏态，卷积层影响最大，特定操作组合更易获得高分架构。
AI.conclusion: 直接在ImageNet16-120等更大数据集上搜索比仅用CIFAR-10更可靠，未来需优化基准设计以提升NAS方法评估的准确性。

search_text: Are Neural Architecture Search Benchmarks Well Designed? A Deeper Look Into Operation Importance 神经架构搜索基准设计得好吗？深入探讨运营重要性 Neural Architecture Search (NAS) benchmarks significantly improved the capability of developing and comparing NAS methods while at the same time drastically reduced the computational overhead by providing meta-information about thousands of trained neural networks. In this work, we conducted an empirical analysis of the widely used NAS-Bench-101, NAS-Bench-201 and TransNAS-Bench-101 benchmarks in terms of their generability and how different operations influence the performance of the generated architectures. We found that only a subset of the operation pool is required to generate architectures close to the upper-bound of the performance range. Also, the performance distribution is negatively skewed, having a higher density of architectures in the upper-bound range. These findings shed insights on the correct evaluation and comparison of NAS methods using NAS benchmarks, showing that directly searching on NAS-Bench-201, ImageNet16-120 and TransNAS-Bench-101 produces more reliable results than searching only on CIFAR-10. Furthermore, with this work we provide suggestions for future benchmark evaluations and design. authors_text: Carlo Adornetto,Gianluigi Greco
title: A New Deep Learning and XAI-Based Algorithm for Features Selection in Genomics
title_zh: 一种新的基于深度学习和 XAI 的基因组特征选择算法
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, Best Doctoral Consortium Paper AIxIA2022 (Udine, Italy)
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, Best Doctoral Consortium Paper AIxIA2022 (Udine, Italy)
abstract: In the field of functional genomics, the analysis of gene expression profiles through Machine and Deep Learning is increasingly providing meaningful insight into a number of diseases. The paper proposes a novel algorithm to perform Feature Selection on genomic-scale data, which exploits the reconstruction capabilities of autoencoders and an ad-hoc defined Explainable Artificial Intelligence-based score in order to select the most informative genes for diagnosis, prognosis, and precision medicine. Results of the application on a Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia dataset evidence the effectiveness of the algorithm, by identifying and suggesting a set of meaningful genes for further medical investigation.
summary: In the field of functional genomics, the analysis of gene expression profiles through Machine and Deep Learning is increasingly providing meaningful insight into a number of diseases. The paper proposes a novel algorithm to perform Feature Selection on genomic-scale data, which exploits the reconstruction capabilities of autoencoders and an ad-hoc defined Explainable Artificial Intelligence-based score in order to select the most informative genes for diagnosis, prognosis, and precision medicine. Results of the application on a Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia dataset evidence the effectiveness of the algorithm, by identifying and suggesting a set of meaningful genes for further medical investigation.
abstract_zh: 在功能基因组学领域，通过机器和深度学习对基因表达谱的分析越来越多地为许多疾病提供有意义的见解。该论文提出了一种对基因组规模数据进行特征选择的新颖算法，该算法利用自动编码器的重建功能和基于临时定义的可解释人工智能的评分，以便选择信息最丰富的基因用于诊断、预后和精准医疗。在慢性淋巴细胞白血病数据集上的应用结果通过识别和建议一组有意义的基因以供进一步的医学研究来证明该算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与可解释AI（XAI）的新型特征选择算法，用于基因组数据中关键基因的筛选。
AI.motivation: 传统基因组数据分析方法在处理高维数据时存在局限，需更高效的特征选择技术以提升疾病诊断与精准医疗的准确性。
AI.method: 利用自编码器的特征重建能力，结合自定义的XAI评分体系，对基因表达数据进行可解释性驱动的特征筛选。
AI.result: 在慢性淋巴细胞白血病数据集上验证了算法有效性，成功识别出具有潜在医学价值的基因集合。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过深度学习与可解释性分析的结合，在基因组特征选择任务中展现出显著优势，可为精准医学研究提供新工具。
