result: 在慢性淋巴细胞白血病数据集上验证了算法有效性，成功识别出具有潜在医学价值的基因集合。
conclusion: 该算法通过深度学习与可解释性分析的结合，在基因组特征选择任务中展现出显著优势，可为精准医学研究提供新工具。
search_text: A New Deep Learning and XAI-Based Algorithm for Features Selection in Genomics 一种新的基于深度学习和 XAI 的基因组特征选择算法 In the field of functional genomics, the analysis of gene expression profiles through Machine and Deep Learning is increasingly providing meaningful insight into a number of diseases. The paper proposes a novel algorithm to perform Feature Selection on genomic-scale data, which exploits the reconstruction capabilities of autoencoders and an ad-hoc defined Explainable Artificial Intelligence-based score in order to select the most informative genes for diagnosis, prognosis, and precision medicine. Results of the application on a Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia dataset evidence the effectiveness of the algorithm, by identifying and suggesting a set of meaningful genes for further medical investigation. 在功能基因组学领域，通过机器和深度学习对基因表达谱的分析越来越多地为许多疾病提供有意义的见解。该论文提出了一种对基因组规模数据进行特征选择的新颖算法，该算法利用自动编码器的重建功能和基于临时定义的可解释人工智能的评分，以便选择信息最丰富的基因用于诊断、预后和精准医疗。在慢性淋巴细胞白血病数据集上的应用结果通过识别和建议一组有意义的基因以供进一步的医学研究来证明该算法的有效性。 本文提出一种结合深度学习与可解释AI（XAI）的新型特征选择算法，用于基因组数据中关键基因的筛选。 Carlo Adornetto,Gianluigi Greco q-bio.GN,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zan Ahmad Naeem,Mohammad Shahmeer Ahmad,Mohamed Eltabakh,Mourad Ouzzani,Nan Tang
title: RetClean: Retrieval-Based Data Cleaning Using Foundation Models and Data Lakes
title_zh: RetClean：使用基础模型和数据湖进行基于检索的数据清理
abstract: Can foundation models (such as ChatGPT) clean your data? In this proposal, we demonstrate that indeed ChatGPT can assist in data cleaning by suggesting corrections for specific cells in a data table (scenario 1). However, ChatGPT may struggle with datasets it has never encountered before (e.g., local enterprise data) or when the user requires an explanation of the source of the suggested clean values. To address these issues, we developed a retrieval-based method that complements ChatGPT's power with a user-provided data lake. The data lake is first indexed, we then retrieve the top-k relevant tuples to the user's query tuple and finally leverage ChatGPT to infer the correct value (scenario 2). Nevertheless, sharing enterprise data with ChatGPT, an externally hosted model, might not be feasible for privacy reasons. To assist with this scenario, we developed a custom RoBERTa-based foundation model that can be locally deployed. By fine-tuning it on a small number of examples, it can effectively make value inferences based on the retrieved tuples (scenario 3). Our proposed system, RetClean, seamlessly supports all three scenarios and provides a user-friendly GUI that enables the VLDB audience to explore and experiment with the system.
summary: Can foundation models (such as ChatGPT) clean your data? In this proposal, we demonstrate that indeed ChatGPT can assist in data cleaning by suggesting corrections for specific cells in a data table (scenario 1). However, ChatGPT may struggle with datasets it has never encountered before (e.g., local enterprise data) or when the user requires an explanation of the source of the suggested clean values. To address these issues, we developed a retrieval-based method that complements ChatGPT's power with a user-provided data lake. The data lake is first indexed, we then retrieve the top-k relevant tuples to the user's query tuple and finally leverage ChatGPT to infer the correct value (scenario 2). Nevertheless, sharing enterprise data with ChatGPT, an externally hosted model, might not be feasible for privacy reasons. To assist with this scenario, we developed a custom RoBERTa-based foundation model that can be locally deployed. By fine-tuning it on a small number of examples, it can effectively make value inferences based on the retrieved tuples (scenario 3). Our proposed system, RetClean, seamlessly supports all three scenarios and provides a user-friendly GUI that enables the VLDB audience to explore and experiment with the system.
abstract_zh: 基础模型（例如 ChatGPT）可以清理您的数据吗？在此提案中，我们证明 ChatGPT 确实可以通过建议对数据表中的特定单元格进行更正来协助数据清理（场景 1）。然而，ChatGPT 可能会遇到以前从未遇到过的数据集（例如本地企业数据），或者当用户需要解释建议的干净值的来源时。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种基于检索的方法，通过用户提供的数据湖补充 ChatGPT 的功能。首先对数据湖进行索引，然后我们将前 k 个相关元组检索到用户的查询元组，最后利用 ChatGPT 推断正确的值（场景 2）。然而，出于隐私原因，与外部托管模型 ChatGPT 共享企业数据可能不可行。为了帮助解决这种情况，我们开发了一个基于 RoBERTa 的自定义基础模型，可以在本地部署。通过对少量示例进行微调，它可以根据检索到的元组有效地进行值推断（场景 3）。我们提出的系统 RetClean 无缝支持所有三种场景，并提供用户友好的 GUI，使 VLDB 受众能够探索和试验该系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RetClean系统，结合基础模型与数据湖技术，通过检索相关数据并利用ChatGPT或本地化模型实现数据清洗，支持三种场景。
AI.motivation: 传统数据清洗方法难以处理新颖数据集或提供修正依据，且直接使用外部模型存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 通过索引数据湖检索相关元组，结合ChatGPT进行修正；针对隐私问题，开发可本地部署的微调RoBERTa模型实现值推断。
AI.result: 系统支持三种清洗场景，提供可视化界面，实验表明微调后的RoBERTa模型在少量样本下即可有效推断值。
AI.conclusion: RetClean通过融合检索与基础模型技术，为数据清洗提供了兼顾灵活性与隐私保护的解决方案。

authors_text: Ishaan R Kale,Mandar S Sapre,Ayush Khedkar,Kaustubh Dhamankar,Abhinav Anand,Aayushi Singh
title: Hybrid ACO-CI Algorithm for Beam Design problems
title_zh: 用于梁设计问题的混合 ACO-CI 算法
abstract: A range of complicated real-world problems have inspired the development of several optimization methods. Here, a novel hybrid version of the Ant colony optimization (ACO) method is developed using the sample space reduction technique of the Cohort Intelligence (CI) Algorithm. The algorithm is developed, and accuracy is tested by solving 35 standard benchmark test functions. Furthermore, the constrained version of the algorithm is used to solve two mechanical design problems involving stepped cantilever beams and I-section beams. The effectiveness of the proposed technique of solution is evaluated relative to contemporary algorithmic approaches that are already in use. The results show that our proposed hybrid ACO-CI algorithm will take lesser number of iterations to produce the desired output which means lesser computational time. For the minimization of weight of stepped cantilever beam and deflection in I-section beam a proposed hybrid ACO-CI algorithm yielded best results when compared to other existing algorithms. The proposed work could be investigate for variegated real world applications encompassing domains of engineering, combinatorial and health care problems.
summary: A range of complicated real-world problems have inspired the development of several optimization methods. Here, a novel hybrid version of the Ant colony optimization (ACO) method is developed using the sample space reduction technique of the Cohort Intelligence (CI) Algorithm. The algorithm is developed, and accuracy is tested by solving 35 standard benchmark test functions. Furthermore, the constrained version of the algorithm is used to solve two mechanical design problems involving stepped cantilever beams and I-section beams. The effectiveness of the proposed technique of solution is evaluated relative to contemporary algorithmic approaches that are already in use. The results show that our proposed hybrid ACO-CI algorithm will take lesser number of iterations to produce the desired output which means lesser computational time. For the minimization of weight of stepped cantilever beam and deflection in I-section beam a proposed hybrid ACO-CI algorithm yielded best results when compared to other existing algorithms. The proposed work could be investigate for variegated real world applications encompassing domains of engineering, combinatorial and health care problems.
abstract_zh: 一系列复杂的现实问题激发了多种优化方法的发展。在这里，使用群组智能（CI）算法的样本空间缩减技术开发了一种新型混合版本的蚁群优化（ACO）方法。开发了算法，并通过求解35个标准基准测试函数来测试准确性。此外，该算法的约束版本还用于解决涉及阶梯悬臂梁和工字梁的两个机械设计问题。所提出的解决方案技术的有效性是相对于已经使用的当代算法方法进行评估的。结果表明，我们提出的混合 ACO-CI 算法将需要更少的迭代次数来产生所需的输出，这意味着更少的计算时间。为了最小化阶梯悬臂梁的重量和工字梁的挠度，与其他现有算法相比，所提出的混合 ACO-CI 算法产生了最佳结果。拟议的工作可以针对涵盖工程、组合和医疗保健问题领域的各种现实世界应用进行研究。

AI.tldr: 开发一种混合ACO-CI算法用于解决梁设计问题，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法在处理复杂工程问题时存在效率不足，需开发更高效算法。
AI.method: 融合蚁群优化（ACO）与群体智能（CI）的样本空间缩减技术，通过基准函数与机械设计案例验证算法。
AI.result: 混合算法在更少迭代次数下达到最优解，计算时间减少，且在梁设计问题中优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 该混合算法在工程优化中表现优异，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Isaac Labrie-Boulay,Thomas Brian Winkler,Daniel Franzen,Alena Romanova,Hans Fangohr,Mathias Kläui
title: Machine learning-based spin structure detection
title_zh: 基于机器学习的自旋结构检测
abstract: One of the most important magnetic spin structure is the topologically stabilised skyrmion quasi-particle. Its interesting physical properties make them candidates for memory and efficient neuromorphic computation schemes. For the device operation, detection of the position, shape, and size of skyrmions is required and magnetic imaging is typically employed. A frequently used technique is magneto-optical Kerr microscopy where depending on the samples material composition, temperature, material growing procedures, etc., the measurements suffer from noise, low-contrast, intensity gradients, or other optical artifacts. Conventional image analysis packages require manual treatment, and a more automatic solution is required. We report a convolutional neural network specifically designed for segmentation problems to detect the position and shape of skyrmions in our measurements. The network is tuned using selected techniques to optimize predictions and in particular the number of detected classes is found to govern the performance. The results of this study shows that a well-trained network is a viable method of automating data pre-processing in magnetic microscopy. The approach is easily extendable to other spin structures and other magnetic imaging methods.
summary: One of the most important magnetic spin structure is the topologically stabilised skyrmion quasi-particle. Its interesting physical properties make them candidates for memory and efficient neuromorphic computation schemes. For the device operation, detection of the position, shape, and size of skyrmions is required and magnetic imaging is typically employed. A frequently used technique is magneto-optical Kerr microscopy where depending on the samples material composition, temperature, material growing procedures, etc., the measurements suffer from noise, low-contrast, intensity gradients, or other optical artifacts. Conventional image analysis packages require manual treatment, and a more automatic solution is required. We report a convolutional neural network specifically designed for segmentation problems to detect the position and shape of skyrmions in our measurements. The network is tuned using selected techniques to optimize predictions and in particular the number of detected classes is found to govern the performance. The results of this study shows that a well-trained network is a viable method of automating data pre-processing in magnetic microscopy. The approach is easily extendable to other spin structures and other magnetic imaging methods.
abstract_zh: 最重要的磁自旋结构之一是拓扑稳定的斯格明子准粒子。其有趣的物理特性使它们成为记忆和高效神经形态计算方案的候选者。对于设备操作，需要检测斯格明子的位置、形状和尺寸，并且通常采用磁成像。 A frequently used technique is magneto-optical Kerr microscopy where depending on the samples material composition, temperature, material growing procedures, etc., the measurements suffer from noise, low-contrast, intensity gradients, or other optical artifacts.传统的图像分析包需要手动处理，需要更自动化的解决方案。 We report a convolutional neural network specifically designed for segmentation problems to detect the position and shape of skyrmions in our measurements. The network is tuned using selected techniques to optimize predictions and in particular the number of detected classes is found to govern the performance.这项研究的结果表明，训练有素的网络是磁力显微镜中自动化数据预处理的可行方法。该方法可以轻松扩展到其他自旋结构和其他磁成像方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的自动检测方法，用于识别磁性显微镜图像中的磁泡结构。
AI.motivation: 传统磁泡检测依赖人工处理显微图像，存在效率低、易受噪声和光学伪影影响的问题，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计专用卷积神经网络解决分割问题，通过优化检测类别数量等技术提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明训练好的网络能有效自动化预处理流程，且方法可扩展至其他自旋结构和磁成像技术。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法为磁性显微镜数据预处理提供了可行的自动化方案，具有良好的扩展性。

search_text: Machine learning-based spin structure detection 基于机器学习的自旋结构检测 One of the most important magnetic spin structure is the topologically stabilised skyrmion quasi-particle. Its interesting physical properties make them candidates for memory and efficient neuromorphic computation schemes. For the device operation, detection of the position, shape, and size of skyrmions is required and magnetic imaging is typically employed. A frequently used technique is magneto-optical Kerr microscopy where depending on the samples material composition, temperature, material growing procedures, etc., the measurements suffer from noise, low-contrast, intensity gradients, or other optical artifacts. Conventional image analysis packages require manual treatment, and a more automatic solution is required. We report a convolutional neural network specifically designed for segmentation problems to detect the position and shape of skyrmions in our measurements. The network is tuned using selected techniques to optimize predictions and in particular the number of detected classes is found to govern the performance. The results of this study shows that a well-trained network is a viable method of automating data pre-processing in magnetic microscopy. The approach is easily extendable to other spin structures and other magnetic imaging methods. 最重要的磁自旋结构之一是拓扑稳定的斯格明子准粒子。其有趣的物理特性使它们成为记忆和高效神经形态计算方案的候选者。对于设备操作，需要检测斯格明子的位置、形状和尺寸，并且通常采用磁成像。 A frequently used technique is magneto-optical Kerr microscopy where depending on the samples material composition, temperature, material growing procedures, etc., the measurements suffer from noise, low-contrast, intensity gradients, or other optical artifacts.传统的图像分析包需要手动处理，需要更自动化的解决方案。 We report a convolutional neural network specifically designed for segmentation problems to detect the position and shape of skyrmions in our measurements. The network is tuned using selected techniques to optimize predictions and in particular the number of detected classes is found to govern the performance.这项研究的结果表明，训练有素的网络是磁力显微镜中自动化数据预处理的可行方法。该方法可以轻松扩展到其他自旋结构和其他磁成像方法。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的自动检测方法，用于识别磁性显微镜图像中的磁泡结构。 Isaac Labrie-Boulay,Thomas Brian Winkler,Daniel Franzen,Alena Romanova,Hans Fangohr,Mathias Kläui cs.LG,cs.ET,physics.data-an

authors_text: Lisa Y. W. Tang
title: Severity classification of ground-glass opacity via 2-D convolutional neural network and lung CT scans: a 3-day exploration
title_zh: 通过二维卷积神经网络和肺部 CT 扫描对毛玻璃样混浊的严重程度进行分类：为期 3 天的探索
abstract: Ground-glass opacity is a hallmark of numerous lung diseases, including patients with COVID19 and pneumonia, pulmonary fibrosis, and tuberculosis. This brief note presents experimental results of a proof-of-concept framework that got implemented and tested over three days as driven by the third challenge entitled "COVID-19 Competition", hosted at the AI-Enabled Medical Image Analysis Workshop of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023). Using a newly built virtual environment (created on March 17, 2023), we investigated various pre-trained two-dimensional convolutional neural networks (CNN) such as Dense Neural Network, Residual Neural Networks (ResNet), and Vision Transformers, as well as the extent of fine-tuning. Based on empirical experiments, we opted to fine-tune them using ADAM's optimization algorithm with a standard learning rate of 0.001 for all CNN architectures and apply early-stopping whenever the validation loss reached a plateau. For each trained CNN, the model state with the best validation accuracy achieved during training was stored and later reloaded for new classifications of unseen samples drawn from the validation set provided by the challenge organizers. According to the organizers, few of these 2D CNNs yielded performance comparable to an architecture that combined ResNet and Recurrent Neural Network (Gated Recurrent Units). As part of the challenge requirement, the source code produced during the course of this exercise is posted at https://github.com/lisatwyw/cov19. We also hope that other researchers may find this light prototype consisting of few Python files based on PyTorch 1.13.1 and TorchVision 0.14.1 approachable.
summary: Ground-glass opacity is a hallmark of numerous lung diseases, including patients with COVID19 and pneumonia, pulmonary fibrosis, and tuberculosis. This brief note presents experimental results of a proof-of-concept framework that got implemented and tested over three days as driven by the third challenge entitled "COVID-19 Competition", hosted at the AI-Enabled Medical Image Analysis Workshop of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023). Using a newly built virtual environment (created on March 17, 2023), we investigated various pre-trained two-dimensional convolutional neural networks (CNN) such as Dense Neural Network, Residual Neural Networks (ResNet), and Vision Transformers, as well as the extent of fine-tuning. Based on empirical experiments, we opted to fine-tune them using ADAM's optimization algorithm with a standard learning rate of 0.001 for all CNN architectures and apply early-stopping whenever the validation loss reached a plateau. For each trained CNN, the model state with the best validation accuracy achieved during training was stored and later reloaded for new classifications of unseen samples drawn from the validation set provided by the challenge organizers. According to the organizers, few of these 2D CNNs yielded performance comparable to an architecture that combined ResNet and Recurrent Neural Network (Gated Recurrent Units). As part of the challenge requirement, the source code produced during the course of this exercise is posted at https://github.com/lisatwyw/cov19. We also hope that other researchers may find this light prototype consisting of few Python files based on PyTorch 1.13.1 and TorchVision 0.14.1 approachable.
abstract_zh: 毛玻璃样混浊是许多肺部疾病的标志，包括新冠肺炎、肺炎、肺纤维化和肺结核患者。本简短说明介绍了概念验证框架的实验结果，该框架在题为“COVID-19 竞赛”的第三个挑战的推动下，在三天内实施和测试，该挑战在 2023 年 IEEE 声学、语音和信号处理国际会议 (ICASSP 2023) 的人工智能启用医学图像分析研讨会上主办。使用新建的虚拟环境（创建于2023年3月17日），我们研究了各种预训练的二维卷积神经网络（CNN），如密集神经网络、残差神经网络（ResNet）和视觉变换器，以及微调的程度。基于经验实验，我们选择使用 ADAM 的优化算法对它们进行微调，所有 CNN 架构的标准学习率为 0.001，并在验证损失达到稳定水平时应用提前停止。对于每个经过训练的 CNN，训练期间实现的最佳验证准确度的模型状态会被存储，并在稍后重新加载，以对从挑战组织者提供的验证集中抽取的未见过样本进行新分类。据组织者称，这些 2D CNN 很少能产生与结合 ResNet 和循环神经网络（门控循环单元）的架构相媲美的性能。作为挑战要求的一部分，本练习过程中生成的源代码发布在 https://github.com/lisatwyw/cov19。我们还希望其他研究人员可能会发现这个由几个基于 PyTorch 1.13.1 和 TorchVision 0.14.1 的 Python 文件组成的轻型原型易于使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于2D卷积神经网络（CNN）和肺部CT扫描的证明概念框架，用于对磨玻璃样混浊（GGO）的严重程度进行分类，并在3天内完成实验验证。
AI.motivation: 磨玻璃样混浊是多种肺部疾病（如COVID-19、肺炎等）的标志性特征，亟需快速准确的分类方法。本文受AI驱动的医学影像分析研讨会挑战赛启发，旨在探索2D CNN在GGO严重程度分类中的可行性。
AI.method: 使用预训练的2D CNN（如DenseNet、ResNet、Vision Transformer）及ResNet-GRU混合架构，在虚拟环境中进行微调实验。采用ADAM优化器（学习率0.001）和早停策略，并基于验证集选择最佳模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，多数2D CNN性能不及ResNet-GRU混合模型，且代码已开源（GitHub链接）。验证集上的最佳模型状态被保存用于新样本分类。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构（ResNet-GRU）在GGO分类中表现更优，证明了深度学习方法的潜力。开源代码为后续研究提供了可复现的轻量级原型框架。

authors_text: Rasmus Netterstrøm,Nikolay Kutuzov,Sune Darkner,Maurits Jørring Pallesen,Martin Johannes Lauritzen,Kenny Erleben,Francois Lauze
title: Deep Learning-Assisted Localisation of Nanoparticles in synthetically generated two-photon microscopy images
title_zh: 合成生成的双光子显微镜图像中纳米颗粒的深度学习辅助定位
abstract: Tracking single molecules is instrumental for quantifying the transport of molecules and nanoparticles in biological samples, e.g., in brain drug delivery studies. Existing intensity-based localisation methods are not developed for imaging with a scanning microscope, typically used for in vivo imaging. Low signal-to-noise ratios, movement of molecules out-of-focus, and high motion blur on images recorded with scanning two-photon microscopy (2PM) in vivo pose a challenge to the accurate localisation of molecules. Using data-driven models is challenging due to low data volumes, typical for in vivo experiments. We developed a 2PM image simulator to supplement scarce training data. The simulator mimics realistic motion blur, background fluorescence, and shot noise observed in vivo imaging. Training a data-driven model with simulated data improves localisation quality in simulated images and shows why intensity-based methods fail.
summary: Tracking single molecules is instrumental for quantifying the transport of molecules and nanoparticles in biological samples, e.g., in brain drug delivery studies. Existing intensity-based localisation methods are not developed for imaging with a scanning microscope, typically used for in vivo imaging. Low signal-to-noise ratios, movement of molecules out-of-focus, and high motion blur on images recorded with scanning two-photon microscopy (2PM) in vivo pose a challenge to the accurate localisation of molecules. Using data-driven models is challenging due to low data volumes, typical for in vivo experiments. We developed a 2PM image simulator to supplement scarce training data. The simulator mimics realistic motion blur, background fluorescence, and shot noise observed in vivo imaging. Training a data-driven model with simulated data improves localisation quality in simulated images and shows why intensity-based methods fail.
abstract_zh: 跟踪单个分子有助于量化生物样本中分子和纳米颗粒的运输，例如在脑药物输送研究中。现有的基于强度的定位方法不是为使用扫描显微镜成像而开发的，通常用于体内成像。体内扫描双光子显微镜 (2PM) 记录的图像存在低信噪比、分子失焦运动和高运动模糊等问题，这对分子的精确定位提出了挑战。由于体内实验中典型的数据量较低，使用数据驱动模型具有挑战性。我们开发了 2PM 图像模拟器来补充稀缺的训练数据。该模拟器模拟体内成像中观察到的真实运动模糊、背景荧光和散粒噪声。使用模拟数据训练数据驱动模型可以提高模拟图像中的定位质量，并说明基于强度的方法失败的原因。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的纳米颗粒定位方法，用于合成生成的双光子显微镜图像。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强度的定位方法难以处理活体双光子显微镜成像中的低信噪比、分子离焦运动和运动模糊问题，且活体实验数据量不足限制了数据驱动模型的训练。
AI.method: 开发了双光子显微镜图像模拟器，生成包含真实运动模糊、背景荧光和泊松噪声的合成数据，并利用其训练数据驱动模型。
AI.result: 模拟数据训练的模型在合成图像中实现了更精确的纳米颗粒定位，并揭示了基于强度方法失效的根本原因。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据生成器有效缓解了活体成像数据稀缺问题，证明了数据驱动模型在双光子显微镜定位任务中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的纳米颗粒定位方法，用于合成生成的双光子显微镜图像。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于强度的定位方法难以处理活体双光子显微镜成像中的低信噪比、分子离焦运动和运动模糊问题，且活体实验数据量不足限制了数据驱动模型的训练。
ai_content.method: 开发了双光子显微镜图像模拟器，生成包含真实运动模糊、背景荧光和泊松噪声的合成数据，并利用其训练数据驱动模型。
ai_content.result: 模拟数据训练的模型在合成图像中实现了更精确的纳米颗粒定位，并揭示了基于强度方法失效的根本原因。

search_text: Deep Learning-Assisted Localisation of Nanoparticles in synthetically generated two-photon microscopy images 合成生成的双光子显微镜图像中纳米颗粒的深度学习辅助定位 Tracking single molecules is instrumental for quantifying the transport of molecules and nanoparticles in biological samples, e.g., in brain drug delivery studies. Existing intensity-based localisation methods are not developed for imaging with a scanning microscope, typically used for in vivo imaging. Low signal-to-noise ratios, movement of molecules out-of-focus, and high motion blur on images recorded with scanning two-photon microscopy (2PM) in vivo pose a challenge to the accurate localisation of molecules. Using data-driven models is challenging due to low data volumes, typical for in vivo experiments. We developed a 2PM image simulator to supplement scarce training data. The simulator mimics realistic motion blur, background fluorescence, and shot noise observed in vivo imaging. Training a data-driven model with simulated data improves localisation quality in simulated images and shows why intensity-based methods fail. 跟踪单个分子有助于量化生物样本中分子和纳米颗粒的运输，例如在脑药物输送研究中。现有的基于强度的定位方法不是为使用扫描显微镜成像而开发的，通常用于体内成像。体内扫描双光子显微镜 (2PM) 记录的图像存在低信噪比、分子失焦运动和高运动模糊等问题，这对分子的精确定位提出了挑战。由于体内实验中典型的数据量较低，使用数据驱动模型具有挑战性。我们开发了 2PM 图像模拟器来补充稀缺的训练数据。该模拟器模拟体内成像中观察到的真实运动模糊、背景荧光和散粒噪声。使用模拟数据训练数据驱动模型可以提高模拟图像中的定位质量，并说明基于强度的方法失败的原因。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的纳米颗粒定位方法，用于合成生成的双光子显微镜图像。 Rasmus Netterstrøm,Nikolay Kutuzov,Sune Darkner,Maurits Jørring Pallesen,Martin Johannes Lauritzen,Kenny Erleben,Francois Lauze q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Weihao Yu,Pan Zhou,Shuicheng Yan,Xinchao Wang
title: InceptionNeXt: When Inception Meets ConvNeXt
title_zh: InceptionNeXt：当 Inception 遇见 ConvNeXt
abstract: Inspired by the long-range modeling ability of ViTs, large-kernel convolutions are widely studied and adopted recently to enlarge the receptive field and improve model performance, like the remarkable work ConvNeXt which employs 7x7 depthwise convolution. Although such depthwise operator only consumes a few FLOPs, it largely harms the model efficiency on powerful computing devices due to the high memory access costs. For example, ConvNeXt-T has similar FLOPs with ResNet-50 but only achieves ~60% throughputs when trained on A100 GPUs with full precision. Although reducing the kernel size of ConvNeXt can improve speed, it results in significant performance degradation, which poses a challenging problem: How to speed up large-kernel-based CNN models while preserving their performance. To tackle this issue, inspired by Inceptions, we propose to decompose large-kernel depthwise convolution into four parallel branches along channel dimension, i.e., small square kernel, two orthogonal band kernels, and an identity mapping. With this new Inception depthwise convolution, we build a series of networks, namely IncepitonNeXt, which not only enjoy high throughputs but also maintain competitive performance. For instance, InceptionNeXt-T achieves 1.6x higher training throughputs than ConvNeX-T, as well as attains 0.2% top-1 accuracy improvement on ImageNet-1K. We anticipate InceptionNeXt can serve as an economical baseline for future architecture design to reduce carbon footprint. Code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/inceptionnext.
summary: Inspired by the long-range modeling ability of ViTs, large-kernel convolutions are widely studied and adopted recently to enlarge the receptive field and improve model performance, like the remarkable work ConvNeXt which employs 7x7 depthwise convolution. Although such depthwise operator only consumes a few FLOPs, it largely harms the model efficiency on powerful computing devices due to the high memory access costs. For example, ConvNeXt-T has similar FLOPs with ResNet-50 but only achieves ~60% throughputs when trained on A100 GPUs with full precision. Although reducing the kernel size of ConvNeXt can improve speed, it results in significant performance degradation, which poses a challenging problem: How to speed up large-kernel-based CNN models while preserving their performance. To tackle this issue, inspired by Inceptions, we propose to decompose large-kernel depthwise convolution into four parallel branches along channel dimension, i.e., small square kernel, two orthogonal band kernels, and an identity mapping. With this new Inception depthwise convolution, we build a series of networks, namely IncepitonNeXt, which not only enjoy high throughputs but also maintain competitive performance. For instance, InceptionNeXt-T achieves 1.6x higher training throughputs than ConvNeX-T, as well as attains 0.2% top-1 accuracy improvement on ImageNet-1K. We anticipate InceptionNeXt can serve as an economical baseline for future architecture design to reduce carbon footprint. Code is available at https://github.com/sail-sg/inceptionnext.
abstract_zh: 受 ViT 的远程建模能力的启发，大核卷积最近被广泛研究和采用，以扩大感受野并提高模型性能，例如采用 7x7 深度卷积的杰出工作 ConvNeXt。虽然这种深度算子只消耗很少的 FLOPs，但由于内存访问成本较高，它在很大程度上损害了强大计算设备上的模型效率。例如，ConvNeXt-T 与 ResNet-50 具有相似的 FLOP，但在 A100 GPU 上进行全精度训练时仅实现约 60% 的吞吐量。虽然减小 ConvNeXt 的内核大小可以提高速度，但会导致性能显着下降，这提出了一个具有挑战性的问题：如何在保持性能的同时加速基于大内核的 CNN 模型。为了解决这个问题，受 Inceptions 的启发，我们建议将大核深度卷积沿通道维度分解为四个并行分支，即小方核、两个正交带核和恒等映射。通过这种新的 Inception 深度卷积，我们构建了一系列网络，即 IncepitonNeXt，它不仅具有高吞吐量，而且还保持有竞争力的性能。例如，InceptionNeXt-T 的训练吞吐量比 ConvNeX-T 高 1.6 倍，并且在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 0.2% 的 top-1 精度提升。我们预计 InceptionNeXt 可以作为未来架构设计的经济基准，以减少碳足迹。代码可在 https://github.com/sail-sg/inceptionnext 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InceptionNeXt模型，通过将大核深度卷积分解为多个并行分支，在保持性能的同时提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 大核卷积虽能扩大感受野但存在高内存访问成本，导致模型效率低下，需解决如何在不牺牲性能的情况下加速此类CNN模型的问题。
AI.method: 受Inception模块启发，将大核深度卷积分解为四个通道并行分支（小方核、两个正交带状核及恒等映射），构建InceptionNeXt系列网络。
AI.result: InceptionNeXt-T在A100 GPU上训练吞吐量提升1.6倍，ImageNet-1K准确率提升0.2%，且保持与ConvNeXt相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: InceptionNeXt为未来高效模型设计提供经济型基准，有助于降低碳足迹，代码已开源。

authors_text: Tengda Han,Max Bain,Arsha Nagrani,Gül Varol,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman
title: AutoAD: Movie Description in Context
title_zh: AutoAD：上下文中的电影描述
abstract: The objective of this paper is an automatic Audio Description (AD) model that ingests movies and outputs AD in text form. Generating high-quality movie AD is challenging due to the dependency of the descriptions on context, and the limited amount of training data available. In this work, we leverage the power of pretrained foundation models, such as GPT and CLIP, and only train a mapping network that bridges the two models for visually-conditioned text generation. In order to obtain high-quality AD, we make the following four contributions: (i) we incorporate context from the movie clip, AD from previous clips, as well as the subtitles; (ii) we address the lack of training data by pretraining on large-scale datasets, where visual or contextual information is unavailable, e.g. text-only AD without movies or visual captioning datasets without context; (iii) we improve on the currently available AD datasets, by removing label noise in the MAD dataset, and adding character naming information; and (iv) we obtain strong results on the movie AD task compared with previous methods.
summary: The objective of this paper is an automatic Audio Description (AD) model that ingests movies and outputs AD in text form. Generating high-quality movie AD is challenging due to the dependency of the descriptions on context, and the limited amount of training data available. In this work, we leverage the power of pretrained foundation models, such as GPT and CLIP, and only train a mapping network that bridges the two models for visually-conditioned text generation. In order to obtain high-quality AD, we make the following four contributions: (i) we incorporate context from the movie clip, AD from previous clips, as well as the subtitles; (ii) we address the lack of training data by pretraining on large-scale datasets, where visual or contextual information is unavailable, e.g. text-only AD without movies or visual captioning datasets without context; (iii) we improve on the currently available AD datasets, by removing label noise in the MAD dataset, and adding character naming information; and (iv) we obtain strong results on the movie AD task compared with previous methods.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是建立一个自动音频描述 (AD) 模型，该模型可以摄取电影并以文本形式输出 AD。由于描述对上下文的依赖性以及可用训练数据的数量有限，生成高质量的电影广告具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们利用预训练基础模型（例如 GPT 和 CLIP）的强大功能，并且仅训练连接这两个模型以生成视觉条件文本的映射网络。为了获得高质量的广告，我们做出了以下四个贡献：（i）我们合并了电影剪辑中的上下文、之前剪辑中的广告以及字幕； （ii）我们通过对大规模数据集进行预训练来解决训练数据缺乏的问题，其中视觉或上下文信息不可用，例如没有电影的纯文本广告或没有上下文的视觉字幕数据集； (iii) 我们通过去除 MAD 数据集中的标签噪声并添加角色命名信息来改进当前可用的 AD 数据集； (iv) 与之前的方法相比，我们在电影 AD 任务上获得了很好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoAD模型，旨在通过结合上下文信息自动生成高质量的电影音频描述文本。
AI.motivation: 电影音频描述生成面临上下文依赖性强和训练数据不足的挑战，现有方法难以有效解决这些问题。
AI.method: 利用预训练模型GPT和CLIP，构建映射网络连接视觉与文本模态；融合电影片段、历史描述及字幕的上下文信息；通过大规模文本数据预训练弥补视觉数据不足；优化数据集质量并补充角色命名信息。
AI.result: 在电影音频描述任务中，AutoAD相比现有方法取得更优性能，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合预训练模型与多源上下文信息，AutoAD有效解决了电影描述生成中的上下文依赖和数据稀缺问题。

In order to obtain high-quality AD, we make the following four contributions: (i) we incorporate context from the movie clip, AD from previous clips, as well as the subtitles; (ii) we address the lack of training data by pretraining on large-scale datasets, where visual or contextual information is unavailable, e.g. text-only AD without movies or visual captioning datasets without context; (iii) we improve on the currently available AD datasets, by removing label noise in the MAD dataset, and adding character naming information; and (iv) we obtain strong results on the movie AD task compared with previous methods. 本文的目标是建立一个自动音频描述 (AD) 模型，该模型可以摄取电影并以文本形式输出 AD。由于描述对上下文的依赖性以及可用训练数据的数量有限，生成高质量的电影广告具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们利用预训练基础模型（例如 GPT 和 CLIP）的强大功能，并且仅训练连接这两个模型以生成视觉条件文本的映射网络。为了获得高质量的广告，我们做出了以下四个贡献：（i）我们合并了电影剪辑中的上下文、之前剪辑中的广告以及字幕； （ii）我们通过对大规模数据集进行预训练来解决训练数据缺乏的问题，其中视觉或上下文信息不可用，例如没有电影的纯文本广告或没有上下文的视觉字幕数据集； (iii) 我们通过去除 MAD 数据集中的标签噪声并添加角色命名信息来改进当前可用的 AD 数据集； (iv) 与之前的方法相比，我们在电影 AD 任务上获得了很好的结果。 本文提出AutoAD模型，旨在通过结合上下文信息自动生成高质量的电影音频描述文本。 Tengda Han,Max Bain,Arsha Nagrani,Gül Varol,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Baiyu Shi,Roy Lin,Daniel Seita,Ayah Ahmad,Richard Cheng,Thomas Kollar,David Held,Ken Goldberg
title: Bagging by Learning to Singulate Layers Using Interactive Perception
title_zh: 通过学习使用交互式感知来分离层来进行装袋
abstract: Many fabric handling and 2D deformable material tasks in homes and industry require singulating layers of material such as opening a bag or arranging garments for sewing. In contrast to methods requiring specialized sensing or end effectors, we use only visual observations with ordinary parallel jaw grippers. We propose SLIP: Singulating Layers using Interactive Perception, and apply SLIP to the task of autonomous bagging. We develop SLIP-Bagging, a bagging algorithm that manipulates a plastic or fabric bag from an unstructured state, and uses SLIP to grasp the top layer of the bag to open it for object insertion. In physical experiments, a YuMi robot achieves a success rate of 67% to 81% across bags of a variety of materials, shapes, and sizes, significantly improving in success rate and generality over prior work. Experiments also suggest that SLIP can be applied to tasks such as singulating layers of folded cloth and garments. Supplementary material is available at https://sites.google.com/view/slip-bagging/.
summary: Many fabric handling and 2D deformable material tasks in homes and industry require singulating layers of material such as opening a bag or arranging garments for sewing. In contrast to methods requiring specialized sensing or end effectors, we use only visual observations with ordinary parallel jaw grippers. We propose SLIP: Singulating Layers using Interactive Perception, and apply SLIP to the task of autonomous bagging. We develop SLIP-Bagging, a bagging algorithm that manipulates a plastic or fabric bag from an unstructured state, and uses SLIP to grasp the top layer of the bag to open it for object insertion. In physical experiments, a YuMi robot achieves a success rate of 67% to 81% across bags of a variety of materials, shapes, and sizes, significantly improving in success rate and generality over prior work. Experiments also suggest that SLIP can be applied to tasks such as singulating layers of folded cloth and garments. Supplementary material is available at https://sites.google.com/view/slip-bagging/.
abstract_zh: 家庭和工业中的许多织物处理和 2D 可变形材料任务都需要分割材料层，例如打开袋子或整理服装进行缝纫。与需要专门传感或末端执行器的方法相比，我们仅使用普通平行钳口夹具进行视觉观察。我们提出 SLIP：Singulate Layers using Interactive Perception，并将 SLIP 应用于自主装袋任务。我们开发了 SLIP-Bagging，这是一种装袋算法，可从非结构化状态操纵塑料或织物袋，并使用 SLIP 抓住袋子的顶层以将其打开以插入对象。在物理实验中，YuMi机器人对各种材质、形状和尺寸的袋子实现了67%至81%的成功率，与之前的工作相比，成功率和通用性显着提高。实验还表明，SLIP 可应用于诸如分割折叠布料和服装层等任务。补充材料可在 https://sites.google.com/view/slip-bagging/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需专用设备的自主装袋方法，通过视觉感知和普通夹爪实现材料层分离。
AI.motivation: 现有装袋方法依赖专用传感器或机械结构，难以适应多样化材料和场景，需开发通用性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SLIP框架，结合交互感知与视觉反馈，通过分层抓取策略实现袋口分离，并开发SLIP-Bagging算法进行自主装袋。
AI.result: YuMi机器人完成67%-81%成功率的装袋任务，显著优于现有方法，且验证了SLIP在衣物分层等任务的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SLIP方法证明了交互感知在复杂材料处理中的有效性，为通用型柔性操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kun Su,Kaizhi Qian,Eli Shlizerman,Antonio Torralba,Chuang Gan
title: Physics-Driven Diffusion Models for Impact Sound Synthesis from Videos
title_zh: 用于视频合成冲击声的物理驱动扩散模型
abstract: Modeling sounds emitted from physical object interactions is critical for immersive perceptual experiences in real and virtual worlds. Traditional methods of impact sound synthesis use physics simulation to obtain a set of physics parameters that could represent and synthesize the sound. However, they require fine details of both the object geometries and impact locations, which are rarely available in the real world and can not be applied to synthesize impact sounds from common videos. On the other hand, existing video-driven deep learning-based approaches could only capture the weak correspondence between visual content and impact sounds since they lack of physics knowledge. In this work, we propose a physics-driven diffusion model that can synthesize high-fidelity impact sound for a silent video clip. In addition to the video content, we propose to use additional physics priors to guide the impact sound synthesis procedure. The physics priors include both physics parameters that are directly estimated from noisy real-world impact sound examples without sophisticated setup and learned residual parameters that interpret the sound environment via neural networks. We further implement a novel diffusion model with specific training and inference strategies to combine physics priors and visual information for impact sound synthesis. Experimental results show that our model outperforms several existing systems in generating realistic impact sounds. More importantly, the physics-based representations are fully interpretable and transparent, thus enabling us to perform sound editing flexibly.
summary: Modeling sounds emitted from physical object interactions is critical for immersive perceptual experiences in real and virtual worlds. Traditional methods of impact sound synthesis use physics simulation to obtain a set of physics parameters that could represent and synthesize the sound. However, they require fine details of both the object geometries and impact locations, which are rarely available in the real world and can not be applied to synthesize impact sounds from common videos. On the other hand, existing video-driven deep learning-based approaches could only capture the weak correspondence between visual content and impact sounds since they lack of physics knowledge. In this work, we propose a physics-driven diffusion model that can synthesize high-fidelity impact sound for a silent video clip. In addition to the video content, we propose to use additional physics priors to guide the impact sound synthesis procedure. The physics priors include both physics parameters that are directly estimated from noisy real-world impact sound examples without sophisticated setup and learned residual parameters that interpret the sound environment via neural networks. We further implement a novel diffusion model with specific training and inference strategies to combine physics priors and visual information for impact sound synthesis. Experimental results show that our model outperforms several existing systems in generating realistic impact sounds. More importantly, the physics-based representations are fully interpretable and transparent, thus enabling us to perform sound editing flexibly.
abstract_zh: 对物理对象交互发出的声音进行建模对于现实和虚拟世界中的沉浸式感知体验至关重要。传统的撞击声合成方法是通过物理模拟来获得一组能够表示和合成声音的物理参数。然而，它们需要物体几何形状和撞击位置的精细细节，这在现实世界中很少可用，并且不能应用于合成常见视频中的撞击声音。另一方面，现有的基于视频驱动的深度学习的方法由于缺乏物理知识，只能捕获视觉内容和撞击声音之间的弱对应关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种物理驱动的扩散模型，可以为无声视频剪辑合成高保真撞击声。除了视频内容之外，我们建议使用额外的物理先验来指导撞击声音合成过程。物理先验包括直接从嘈杂的现实世界冲击声音示例中估计而无需复杂设置的物理参数和通过神经网络解释声音环境的学习残差参数。我们进一步实现了一种新颖的扩散模型，具有特定的训练和推理策略，以结合物理先验和视觉信息来合成冲击声。实验结果表明，我们的模型在生成逼真的撞击声音方面优于多个现有系统。更重要的是，基于物理的表示是完全可解释和透明的，从而使我们能够灵活地进行声音编辑。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于物理驱动的扩散模型，用于从视频中合成高保真度的撞击声音。
AI.motivation: 传统的撞击声音合成方法需要详细的物体几何形状和撞击位置信息，而这些信息在现实世界中难以获取，且无法用于常见视频的撞击声音合成。现有的基于深度学习的方法缺乏物理知识，无法捕捉视觉内容与撞击声音之间的弱对应关系。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于物理驱动的扩散模型，利用视频内容和额外的物理先验信息来引导撞击声音的合成过程。物理先验信息包括从真实世界撞击声音示例中直接估计的物理参数以及通过神经网络学习的残差参数。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在生成现实的撞击声音方面优于现有系统，且基于物理的表示是完全可解释和透明的，从而实现了灵活的声音编辑。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种基于物理驱动的扩散模型，能够从视频中合成高质量的撞击声音，并且具有良好的可解释性和灵活性。

authors_text: Zoey Guo,Yiwen Tang,Ray Zhang,Dong Wang,Zhigang Wang,Bin Zhao,Xuelong Li
title: ViewRefer: Grasp the Multi-view Knowledge for 3D Visual Grounding with GPT and Prototype Guidance
title_zh: ViewRefer：通过 GPT 和原型指导掌握 3D 视觉基础的多视图知识
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Code is released at https://github.com/Ivan-Tang-3D/ViewRefer3D
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Code is released at https://github.com/Ivan-Tang-3D/ViewRefer3D
abstract: Understanding 3D scenes from multi-view inputs has been proven to alleviate the view discrepancy issue in 3D visual grounding. However, existing methods normally neglect the view cues embedded in the text modality and fail to weigh the relative importance of different views. In this paper, we propose ViewRefer, a multi-view framework for 3D visual grounding exploring how to grasp the view knowledge from both text and 3D modalities. For the text branch, ViewRefer leverages the diverse linguistic knowledge of large-scale language models, e.g., GPT, to expand a single grounding text to multiple geometry-consistent descriptions. Meanwhile, in the 3D modality, a transformer fusion module with inter-view attention is introduced to boost the interaction of objects across views. On top of that, we further present a set of learnable multi-view prototypes, which memorize scene-agnostic knowledge for different views, and enhance the framework from two perspectives: a view-guided attention module for more robust text features, and a view-guided scoring strategy during the final prediction. With our designed paradigm, ViewRefer achieves superior performance on three benchmarks and surpasses the second-best by +2.8%, +1.5%, and +1.35% on Sr3D, Nr3D, and ScanRefer. Code is released at https://github.com/Ivan-Tang-3D/ViewRefer3D.
summary: Understanding 3D scenes from multi-view inputs has been proven to alleviate the view discrepancy issue in 3D visual grounding. However, existing methods normally neglect the view cues embedded in the text modality and fail to weigh the relative importance of different views. In this paper, we propose ViewRefer, a multi-view framework for 3D visual grounding exploring how to grasp the view knowledge from both text and 3D modalities. For the text branch, ViewRefer leverages the diverse linguistic knowledge of large-scale language models, e.g., GPT, to expand a single grounding text to multiple geometry-consistent descriptions. Meanwhile, in the 3D modality, a transformer fusion module with inter-view attention is introduced to boost the interaction of objects across views. On top of that, we further present a set of learnable multi-view prototypes, which memorize scene-agnostic knowledge for different views, and enhance the framework from two perspectives: a view-guided attention module for more robust text features, and a view-guided scoring strategy during the final prediction. With our designed paradigm, ViewRefer achieves superior performance on three benchmarks and surpasses the second-best by +2.8%, +1.5%, and +1.35% on Sr3D, Nr3D, and ScanRefer. Code is released at https://github.com/Ivan-Tang-3D/ViewRefer3D.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，从多视图输入了解 3D 场景可以缓解 3D 视觉基础中的视图差异问题。然而，现有的方法通常忽略文本模态中嵌入的视图线索，并且无法权衡不同视图的相对重要性。在本文中，我们提出了 ViewRefer，一个用于 3D 视觉基础的多视图框架，探索如何从文本和 3D 模态中掌握视图知识。对于文本分支，ViewRefer 利用大规模语言模型（例如 GPT）的多样化语言知识，将单个基础文本扩展到多个几何一致的描述。同时，在 3D 模态中，引入了具有视图间注意力的变压器融合模块，以增强跨视图对象的交互。最重要的是，我们进一步提出了一组可学习的多视图原型，它记住不同视图的场景不可知知识，并从两个角度增强框架：用于更鲁棒文本特征的视图引导注意模块，以及最终预测期间的视图引导评分策略。凭借我们设计的范例，ViewRefer 在三个基准测试中实现了卓越的性能，并在 Sr3D、Nr3D 和 ScanRefer 上超过第二名 +2.8%、+1.5% 和 +1.35%。代码发布于 https://github.com/Ivan-Tang-3D/ViewRefer3D。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViewRefer框架，通过结合文本和3D模态的多视角知识，提升3D视觉定位任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了文本模态中的视角线索，且未能有效衡量不同视角的重要性，导致3D视觉定位效果受限。
AI.method: 利用GPT扩展文本描述生成几何一致的多视角描述，设计带有跨视角注意力的Transformer融合模块，并引入可学习的多视角原型，从文本特征增强和预测评分策略两方面提升框架性能。
AI.result: 在Sr3D、Nr3D和ScanRefer三个基准测试中，ViewRefer分别超越第二名2.8%、1.5%和1.35%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合文本与3D模态的多视角知识，结合原型引导机制，ViewRefer有效解决了视角差异问题，显著提升了3D视觉定位的准确性。

search_text: ViewRefer: Grasp the Multi-view Knowledge for 3D Visual Grounding with GPT and Prototype Guidance ViewRefer：通过 GPT 和原型指导掌握 3D 视觉基础的多视图知识 Understanding 3D scenes from multi-view inputs has been proven to alleviate the view discrepancy issue in 3D visual grounding. However, existing methods normally neglect the view cues embedded in the text modality and fail to weigh the relative importance of different views. In this paper, we propose ViewRefer, a multi-view framework for 3D visual grounding exploring how to grasp the view knowledge from both text and 3D modalities. For the text branch, ViewRefer leverages the diverse linguistic knowledge of large-scale language models, e.g., GPT, to expand a single grounding text to multiple geometry-consistent descriptions. Meanwhile, in the 3D modality, a transformer fusion module with inter-view attention is introduced to boost the interaction of objects across views. On top of that, we further present a set of learnable multi-view prototypes, which memorize scene-agnostic knowledge for different views, and enhance the framework from two perspectives: a view-guided attention module for more robust text features, and a view-guided scoring strategy during the final prediction. With our designed paradigm, ViewRefer achieves superior performance on three benchmarks and surpasses the second-best by +2.8%, +1.5%, and +1.35% on Sr3D, Nr3D, and ScanRefer. authors_text: Md Mostafijur Rahman,Radu Marculescu
title: Multi-scale Hierarchical Vision Transformer with Cascaded Attention Decoding for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的具有级联注意力解码的多尺度分层视觉变换器
abstract: Transformers have shown great success in medical image segmentation. However, transformers may exhibit a limited generalization ability due to the underlying single-scale self-attention (SA) mechanism. In this paper, we address this issue by introducing a Multi-scale hiERarchical vIsion Transformer (MERIT) backbone network, which improves the generalizability of the model by computing SA at multiple scales. We also incorporate an attention-based decoder, namely Cascaded Attention Decoding (CASCADE), for further refinement of multi-stage features generated by MERIT. Finally, we introduce an effective multi-stage feature mixing loss aggregation (MUTATION) method for better model training via implicit ensembling. Our experiments on two widely used medical image segmentation benchmarks (i.e., Synapse Multi-organ, ACDC) demonstrate the superior performance of MERIT over state-of-the-art methods. Our MERIT architecture and MUTATION loss aggregation can be used with downstream medical image and semantic segmentation tasks.
summary: Transformers have shown great success in medical image segmentation. However, transformers may exhibit a limited generalization ability due to the underlying single-scale self-attention (SA) mechanism. In this paper, we address this issue by introducing a Multi-scale hiERarchical vIsion Transformer (MERIT) backbone network, which improves the generalizability of the model by computing SA at multiple scales. We also incorporate an attention-based decoder, namely Cascaded Attention Decoding (CASCADE), for further refinement of multi-stage features generated by MERIT. Finally, we introduce an effective multi-stage feature mixing loss aggregation (MUTATION) method for better model training via implicit ensembling. Our experiments on two widely used medical image segmentation benchmarks (i.e., Synapse Multi-organ, ACDC) demonstrate the superior performance of MERIT over state-of-the-art methods. Our MERIT architecture and MUTATION loss aggregation can be used with downstream medical image and semantic segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: Transformers 在医学图像分割方面取得了巨大成功。然而，由于底层的单尺度自注意力（SA）机制，变压器可能表现出有限的泛化能力。 In this paper, we address this issue by introducing a Multi-scale hiERarchical vIsion Transformer (MERIT) backbone network, which improves the generalizability of the model by computing SA at multiple scales. We also incorporate an attention-based decoder, namely Cascaded Attention Decoding (CASCADE), for further refinement of multi-stage features generated by MERIT. Finally, we introduce an effective multi-stage feature mixing loss aggregation (MUTATION) method for better model training via implicit ensembling. Our experiments on two widely used medical image segmentation benchmarks (i.e., Synapse Multi-organ, ACDC) demonstrate the superior performance of MERIT over state-of-the-art methods.我们的 MERIT 架构和 MUTATION 损失聚合可用于下游医学图像和语义分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度分层视觉Transformer（MERIT）与级联注意力解码器（CASCADE），用于提升医学图像分割的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer在医学图像分割中因单尺度自注意力机制导致泛化能力不足，需改进多尺度特征学习与特征融合策略。
AI.method: 设计MERIT主干网络实现多尺度自注意力计算，结合CASCADE解码器优化多阶段特征，并引入MUTATION损失聚合方法增强训练效果。
AI.result: 在Synapse Multi-organ和ACDC基准测试中，MERIT优于现有最先进方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: MERIT架构与MUTATION损失方法可有效提升医学图像分割性能，适用于下游医学影像分析任务。

authors_text: Vibashan VS,Ning Yu,Chen Xing,Can Qin,Mingfei Gao,Juan Carlos Niebles,Vishal M. Patel,Ran Xu
title: Mask-free OVIS: Open-Vocabulary Instance Segmentation without Manual Mask Annotations
title_zh: 无掩码 OVIS：无需手动掩码注释的开放词汇实例分割
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project site: https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project site: https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/
abstract: Existing instance segmentation models learn task-specific information using manual mask annotations from base (training) categories. These mask annotations require tremendous human effort, limiting the scalability to annotate novel (new) categories. To alleviate this problem, Open-Vocabulary (OV) methods leverage large-scale image-caption pairs and vision-language models to learn novel categories. In summary, an OV method learns task-specific information using strong supervision from base annotations and novel category information using weak supervision from image-captions pairs. This difference between strong and weak supervision leads to overfitting on base categories, resulting in poor generalization towards novel categories. In this work, we overcome this issue by learning both base and novel categories from pseudo-mask annotations generated by the vision-language model in a weakly supervised manner using our proposed Mask-free OVIS pipeline. Our method automatically generates pseudo-mask annotations by leveraging the localization ability of a pre-trained vision-language model for objects present in image-caption pairs. The generated pseudo-mask annotations are then used to supervise an instance segmentation model, freeing the entire pipeline from any labour-expensive instance-level annotations and overfitting. Our extensive experiments show that our method trained with just pseudo-masks significantly improves the mAP scores on the MS-COCO dataset and OpenImages dataset compared to the recent state-of-the-art methods trained with manual masks. Codes and models are provided in https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/.
summary: Existing instance segmentation models learn task-specific information using manual mask annotations from base (training) categories. These mask annotations require tremendous human effort, limiting the scalability to annotate novel (new) categories. To alleviate this problem, Open-Vocabulary (OV) methods leverage large-scale image-caption pairs and vision-language models to learn novel categories. In summary, an OV method learns task-specific information using strong supervision from base annotations and novel category information using weak supervision from image-captions pairs. This difference between strong and weak supervision leads to overfitting on base categories, resulting in poor generalization towards novel categories. In this work, we overcome this issue by learning both base and novel categories from pseudo-mask annotations generated by the vision-language model in a weakly supervised manner using our proposed Mask-free OVIS pipeline. Our method automatically generates pseudo-mask annotations by leveraging the localization ability of a pre-trained vision-language model for objects present in image-caption pairs. The generated pseudo-mask annotations are then used to supervise an instance segmentation model, freeing the entire pipeline from any labour-expensive instance-level annotations and overfitting. Our extensive experiments show that our method trained with just pseudo-masks significantly improves the mAP scores on the MS-COCO dataset and OpenImages dataset compared to the recent state-of-the-art methods trained with manual masks. Codes and models are provided in https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/.
abstract_zh: 现有的实例分割模型使用来自基本（训练）类别的手动掩模注释来学习特定于任务的信息。这些掩码注释需要巨大的人力，限制了注释新颖（新）类别的可扩展性。为了缓解这个问题，开放词汇（OV）方法利用大规模图像标题对和视觉语言模型来学习新类别。总之，OV 方法使用来自基本注释的强监督来学习特定于任务的信息，并使用来自图像标题对的弱监督来学习新颖的类别信息。强监督和弱监督之间的这种差异会导致对基本类别的过度拟合，从而导致对新类别的概括性较差。在这项工作中，我们通过使用我们提出的无掩模 OVIS 管道以弱监督方式从视觉语言模型生成的伪掩模注释中学习基本类别和新类别，从而克服了这个问题。我们的方法通过利用预先训练的视觉语言模型对图像标题对中存在的对象的定位能力，自动生成伪掩模注释。然后，生成的伪掩码注释用于监督实例分割模型，使整个管道免于任何耗费人力的实例级注释和过度拟合。我们广泛的实验表明，与最近使用手动掩模训练的最先进方法相比，我们仅使用伪掩模训练的方法显着提高了 MS-COCO 数据集和 OpenImages 数据集上的 mAP 分数。 https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/ 中提供了代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工掩码注释的开放词汇实例分割方法Mask-free OVIS，通过视觉-语言模型生成伪掩码实现端到端训练。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割模型依赖人工掩码注释，导致新类别扩展困难；开放词汇方法虽利用图像-文本对弱监督学习新类别，但易在基础类别上过拟合，影响泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Mask-free OVIS流水线，利用预训练视觉-语言模型的定位能力，从图像-文本对中自动生成伪掩码注释，以此训练实例分割模型，完全摆脱人工实例级标注。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和OpenImages数据集上，仅使用伪掩码训练的模型较现有最佳方法（使用人工掩码）显著提升mAP指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督伪掩码生成有效解决过拟合问题，在无需人工标注的情况下实现开放词汇实例分割，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: Mask-free OVIS: Open-Vocabulary Instance Segmentation without Manual Mask Annotations 无掩码 OVIS：无需手动掩码注释的开放词汇实例分割 Existing instance segmentation models learn task-specific information using manual mask annotations from base (training) categories. These mask annotations require tremendous human effort, limiting the scalability to annotate novel (new) categories. To alleviate this problem, Open-Vocabulary (OV) methods leverage large-scale image-caption pairs and vision-language models to learn novel categories. In summary, an OV method learns task-specific information using strong supervision from base annotations and novel category information using weak supervision from image-captions pairs. This difference between strong and weak supervision leads to overfitting on base categories, resulting in poor generalization towards novel categories. In this work, we overcome this issue by learning both base and novel categories from pseudo-mask annotations generated by the vision-language model in a weakly supervised manner using our proposed Mask-free OVIS pipeline. Our method automatically generates pseudo-mask annotations by leveraging the localization ability of a pre-trained vision-language model for objects present in image-caption pairs. The generated pseudo-mask annotations are then used to supervise an instance segmentation model, freeing the entire pipeline from any labour-expensive instance-level annotations and overfitting. Our extensive experiments show that our method trained with just pseudo-masks significantly improves the mAP scores on the MS-COCO dataset and OpenImages dataset compared to the recent state-of-the-art methods trained with manual masks. Codes and models are provided in https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/. 现有的实例分割模型使用来自基本（训练）类别的手动掩模注释来学习特定于任务的信息。这些掩码注释需要巨大的人力，限制了注释新颖（新）类别的可扩展性。为了缓解这个问题，开放词汇（OV）方法利用大规模图像标题对和视觉语言模型来学习新类别。总之，OV 方法使用来自基本注释的强监督来学习特定于任务的信息，并使用来自图像标题对的弱监督来学习新颖的类别信息。强监督和弱监督之间的这种差异会导致对基本类别的过度拟合，从而导致对新类别的概括性较差。在这项工作中，我们通过使用我们提出的无掩模 OVIS 管道以弱监督方式从视觉语言模型生成的伪掩模注释中学习基本类别和新类别，从而克服了这个问题。我们的方法通过利用预先训练的视觉语言模型对图像标题对中存在的对象的定位能力，自动生成伪掩模注释。然后，生成的伪掩码注释用于监督实例分割模型，使整个管道免于任何耗费人力的实例级注释和过度拟合。我们广泛的实验表明，与最近使用手动掩模训练的最先进方法相比，我们仅使用伪掩模训练的方法显着提高了 MS-COCO 数据集和 OpenImages 数据集上的 mAP 分数。 https://vibashan.github.io/ovis-web/ 中提供了代码和模型。 本文提出一种无需人工掩码注释的开放词汇实例分割方法Mask-free OVIS，通过视觉-语言模型生成伪掩码实现端到端训练。 Vibashan VS,Ning Yu,Chen Xing,Can Qin,Mingfei Gao,Juan Carlos Niebles,Vishal M. Patel,Ran Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoxue Chen,Yuhang Zheng,Yupeng Zheng,Qiang Zhou,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou,Ya-Qin Zhang
title: DPF: Learning Dense Prediction Fields with Weak Supervision
title_zh: DPF：在弱监督下学习密集预测场
abstract: Nowadays, many visual scene understanding problems are addressed by dense prediction networks. But pixel-wise dense annotations are very expensive (e.g., for scene parsing) or impossible (e.g., for intrinsic image decomposition), motivating us to leverage cheap point-level weak supervision. However, existing pointly-supervised methods still use the same architecture designed for full supervision. In stark contrast to them, we propose a new paradigm that makes predictions for point coordinate queries, as inspired by the recent success of implicit representations, like distance or radiance fields. As such, the method is named as dense prediction fields (DPFs). DPFs generate expressive intermediate features for continuous sub-pixel locations, thus allowing outputs of an arbitrary resolution. DPFs are naturally compatible with point-level supervision. We showcase the effectiveness of DPFs using two substantially different tasks: high-level semantic parsing and low-level intrinsic image decomposition. In these two cases, supervision comes in the form of single-point semantic category and two-point relative reflectance, respectively. As benchmarked by three large-scale public datasets PASCALContext, ADE20K and IIW, DPFs set new state-of-the-art performance on all of them with significant margins. Code can be accessed at https://github.com/cxx226/DPF.
summary: Nowadays, many visual scene understanding problems are addressed by dense prediction networks. But pixel-wise dense annotations are very expensive (e.g., for scene parsing) or impossible (e.g., for intrinsic image decomposition), motivating us to leverage cheap point-level weak supervision. However, existing pointly-supervised methods still use the same architecture designed for full supervision. In stark contrast to them, we propose a new paradigm that makes predictions for point coordinate queries, as inspired by the recent success of implicit representations, like distance or radiance fields. As such, the method is named as dense prediction fields (DPFs). DPFs generate expressive intermediate features for continuous sub-pixel locations, thus allowing outputs of an arbitrary resolution. DPFs are naturally compatible with point-level supervision. We showcase the effectiveness of DPFs using two substantially different tasks: high-level semantic parsing and low-level intrinsic image decomposition. In these two cases, supervision comes in the form of single-point semantic category and two-point relative reflectance, respectively. As benchmarked by three large-scale public datasets PASCALContext, ADE20K and IIW, DPFs set new state-of-the-art performance on all of them with significant margins. Code can be accessed at https://github.com/cxx226/DPF.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多视觉场景理解问题都是通过密集预测网络来解决的。但像素级密集注释非常昂贵（例如，对于场景解析）或不可能（例如，对于内在图像分解），这促使我们利用廉价的点级弱监督。然而，现有的点监督方法仍然使用为完全监督而设计的相同架构。与它们形成鲜明对比的是，我们提出了一种新的范式，可以对点坐标查询进行预测，其灵感来自最近成功的隐式表示（例如距离或辐射场）。因此，该方法被命名为密集预测场（DPF）。 DPF 为连续的子像素位置生成富有表现力的中间特征，从而允许任意分辨率的输出。 DPF 天然兼容点级监管。我们使用两个截然不同的任务展示了 DPF 的有效性：高级语义解析和低级内在图像分解。在这两种情况下，监督分别以单点语义类别和两点相对反射的形式出现。以三个大型公共数据集 PASCALContext、ADE20K 和 IIW 为基准，DPF 在所有数据集上都设置了新的最先进性能，并具有显着的优势。代码可以在 https://github.com/cxx226/DPF 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DPF的新方法，通过点级弱监督学习密集预测字段，解决传统像素级标注成本高或不可行的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统密集预测网络依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而点级弱监督虽成本低但现有方法仍沿用全监督架构，难以充分发挥弱监督潜力。
AI.method: 受隐式表示（如距离场）启发，DPF通过点坐标查询生成连续亚像素位置的表达特征，支持任意分辨率输出，并自然兼容点级监督。
AI.result: 在PASCALContext、ADE20K和IIW三个大规模数据集上，DPF在语义分割和内在图像分解任务中均取得显著优于现有方法的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: DPF通过创新架构设计有效利用点级弱监督，为密集预测任务提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: DPF: Learning Dense Prediction Fields with Weak Supervision DPF：在弱监督下学习密集预测场 Nowadays, many visual scene understanding problems are addressed by dense prediction networks. But pixel-wise dense annotations are very expensive (e.g., for scene parsing) or impossible (e.g., for intrinsic image decomposition), motivating us to leverage cheap point-level weak supervision. However, existing pointly-supervised methods still use the same architecture designed for full supervision. In stark contrast to them, we propose a new paradigm that makes predictions for point coordinate queries, as inspired by the recent success of implicit representations, like distance or radiance fields. As such, the method is named as dense prediction fields (DPFs). DPFs generate expressive intermediate features for continuous sub-pixel locations, thus allowing outputs of an arbitrary resolution. DPFs are naturally compatible with point-level supervision. We showcase the effectiveness of DPFs using two substantially different tasks: high-level semantic parsing and low-level intrinsic image decomposition. In these two cases, supervision comes in the form of single-point semantic category and two-point relative reflectance, respectively. As benchmarked by three large-scale public datasets PASCALContext, ADE20K and IIW, DPFs set new state-of-the-art performance on all of them with significant margins. authors_text: Guan Zhe Hong,Yin Cui,Ariel Fuxman,Stanley H. Chan,Enming Luo
title: Towards Understanding the Effect of Pretraining Label Granularity
title_zh: 理解预训练标签粒度的影响
abstract: In this paper, we study how the granularity of pretraining labels affects the generalization of deep neural networks in image classification tasks. We focus on the "fine-to-coarse" transfer learning setting, where the pretraining label space is more fine-grained than that of the target problem. Empirically, we show that pretraining on the leaf labels of ImageNet21k produces better transfer results on ImageNet1k than pretraining on other coarser granularity levels, which supports the common practice used in the community. Theoretically, we explain the benefit of fine-grained pretraining by proving that, for a data distribution satisfying certain hierarchy conditions, 1) coarse-grained pretraining only allows a neural network to learn the "common" or "easy-to-learn" features well, while 2) fine-grained pretraining helps the network learn the "rarer" or "fine-grained" features in addition to the common ones, thus improving its accuracy on hard downstream test samples in which common features are missing or weak in strength. Furthermore, we perform comprehensive experiments using the label hierarchies of iNaturalist 2021 and observe that the following conditions, in addition to proper choice of label granularity, enable the transfer to work well in practice: 1) the pretraining dataset needs to have a meaningful label hierarchy, and 2) the pretraining and target label functions need to align well.
summary: In this paper, we study how the granularity of pretraining labels affects the generalization of deep neural networks in image classification tasks. We focus on the "fine-to-coarse" transfer learning setting, where the pretraining label space is more fine-grained than that of the target problem. Empirically, we show that pretraining on the leaf labels of ImageNet21k produces better transfer results on ImageNet1k than pretraining on other coarser granularity levels, which supports the common practice used in the community. Theoretically, we explain the benefit of fine-grained pretraining by proving that, for a data distribution satisfying certain hierarchy conditions, 1) coarse-grained pretraining only allows a neural network to learn the "common" or "easy-to-learn" features well, while 2) fine-grained pretraining helps the network learn the "rarer" or "fine-grained" features in addition to the common ones, thus improving its accuracy on hard downstream test samples in which common features are missing or weak in strength. Furthermore, we perform comprehensive experiments using the label hierarchies of iNaturalist 2021 and observe that the following conditions, in addition to proper choice of label granularity, enable the transfer to work well in practice: 1) the pretraining dataset needs to have a meaningful label hierarchy, and 2) the pretraining and target label functions need to align well.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究预训练标签的粒度如何影响图像分类任务中深度神经网络的泛化。我们专注于“从细到粗”的迁移学习设置，其中预训练标签空间比目标问题的标签空间更细粒度。根据经验，我们表明，在 ImageNet21k 的叶标签上进行预训练比在其他较粗粒度级别上进行预训练在 ImageNet1k 上产生更好的传输结果，这支持了社区中使用的常见做法。理论上，我们通过证明以下事实来解释细粒度预训练的好处：对于满足一定层次条件的数据分布，1）粗粒度预训练只能让神经网络很好地学习“常见”或“易于学习”的特征，而2）细粒度预训练可以帮助网络学习除了常见特征之外的“较稀有”或“细粒度”特征，从而提高其在硬下游测试样本上的准确性，其中共同特征缺失或强度较弱。此外，我们使用 iNaturalist 2021 的标签层次结构进行了全面的实验，并观察到，除了正确选择标签粒度之外，以下条件使得迁移在实践中能够良好运行：1）预训练数据集需要具有有意义的标签层次结构，2）预训练和目标标签函数需要良好对齐。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预训练标签粒度对图像分类任务中深度神经网络泛化能力的影响，重点分析细粒度到粗粒度的迁移学习设置。
AI.motivation: 尽管社区普遍采用细粒度预训练标签（如ImageNet21k叶标签）提升迁移效果，但其理论依据和适用条件尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过ImageNet21k和iNaturalist 2021的层次化标签体系进行实验，结合理论分析证明细粒度预训练的优势，并验证标签层次结构与对齐性的关键作用。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用ImageNet21k叶标签预训练在ImageNet1k上表现最佳；理论证明细粒度预训练能学习到更稀有且细微的特征，提升难样本识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 预训练标签粒度选择需满足标签层次有意义且与目标任务对齐，细粒度预训练通过捕捉稀有特征显著提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: Towards Understanding the Effect of Pretraining Label Granularity 理解预训练标签粒度的影响 In this paper, we study how the granularity of pretraining labels affects the generalization of deep neural networks in image classification tasks. We focus on the "fine-to-coarse" transfer learning setting, where the pretraining label space is more fine-grained than that of the target problem. Empirically, we show that pretraining on the leaf labels of ImageNet21k produces better transfer results on ImageNet1k than pretraining on other coarser granularity levels, which supports the common practice used in the community. Theoretically, we explain the benefit of fine-grained pretraining by proving that, for a data distribution satisfying certain hierarchy conditions, 1) coarse-grained pretraining only allows a neural network to learn the "common" or "easy-to-learn" features well, while 2) fine-grained pretraining helps the network learn the "rarer" or "fine-grained" features in addition to the common ones, thus improving its accuracy on hard downstream test samples in which common features are missing or weak in strength. Furthermore, we perform comprehensive experiments using the label hierarchies of iNaturalist 2021 and observe that the following conditions, in addition to proper choice of label granularity, enable the transfer to work well in practice: 1) the pretraining dataset needs to have a meaningful label hierarchy, and 2) the pretraining and target label functions need to align well. 在本文中，我们研究预训练标签的粒度如何影响图像分类任务中深度神经网络的泛化。我们专注于“从细到粗”的迁移学习设置，其中预训练标签空间比目标问题的标签空间更细粒度。根据经验，我们表明，在 ImageNet21k 的叶标签上进行预训练比在其他较粗粒度级别上进行预训练在 ImageNet1k 上产生更好的传输结果，这支持了社区中使用的常见做法。理论上，我们通过证明以下事实来解释细粒度预训练的好处：对于满足一定层次条件的数据分布，1）粗粒度预训练只能让神经网络很好地学习“常见”或“易于学习”的特征，而2）细粒度预训练可以帮助网络学习除了常见特征之外的“较稀有”或“细粒度”特征，从而提高其在硬下游测试样本上的准确性，其中共同特征缺失或强度较弱。此外，我们使用 iNaturalist 2021 的标签层次结构进行了全面的实验，并观察到，除了正确选择标签粒度之外，以下条件使得迁移在实践中能够良好运行：1）预训练数据集需要具有有意义的标签层次结构，2）预训练和目标标签函数需要良好对齐。 本文研究预训练标签粒度对图像分类任务中深度神经网络泛化能力的影响，重点分析细粒度到粗粒度的迁移学习设置。 Guan Zhe Hong,Yin Cui,Ariel Fuxman,Stanley H. Chan,Enming Luo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shaoxu Li,Ye Pan
title: Instant Photorealistic Neural Radiance Fields Stylization
title_zh: 即时真实感神经辐射场风格化
abstract: We present Instant Neural Radiance Fields Stylization, a novel approach for multi-view image stylization for the 3D scene. Our approach models a neural radiance field based on neural graphics primitives, which use a hash table-based position encoder for position embedding. We split the position encoder into two parts, the content and style sub-branches, and train the network for normal novel view image synthesis with the content and style targets. In the inference stage, we execute AdaIN to the output features of the position encoder, with content and style voxel grid features as reference. With the adjusted features, the stylization of novel view images could be obtained. Our method extends the style target from style images to image sets of scenes and does not require additional network training for stylization. Given a set of images of 3D scenes and a style target(a style image or another set of 3D scenes), our method can generate stylized novel views with a consistent appearance at various view angles in less than 10 minutes on modern GPU hardware. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method.
summary: We present Instant Neural Radiance Fields Stylization, a novel approach for multi-view image stylization for the 3D scene. Our approach models a neural radiance field based on neural graphics primitives, which use a hash table-based position encoder for position embedding. We split the position encoder into two parts, the content and style sub-branches, and train the network for normal novel view image synthesis with the content and style targets. In the inference stage, we execute AdaIN to the output features of the position encoder, with content and style voxel grid features as reference. With the adjusted features, the stylization of novel view images could be obtained. Our method extends the style target from style images to image sets of scenes and does not require additional network training for stylization. Given a set of images of 3D scenes and a style target(a style image or another set of 3D scenes), our method can generate stylized novel views with a consistent appearance at various view angles in less than 10 minutes on modern GPU hardware. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: We present Instant Neural Radiance Fields Stylization, a novel approach for multi-view image stylization for the 3D scene.我们的方法基于神经图形基元对神经辐射场进行建模，该基元使用基于哈希表的位置编码器进行位置嵌入。我们将位置编码器分为两部分，即内容和风格子分支，并训练网络以使用内容和风格目标进行正常的小说视图图像合成。在推理阶段，我们以内容和风格体素网格特征作为参考，对位置编码器的输出特征执行AdaIN。 With the adjusted features, the stylization of novel view images could be obtained. Our method extends the style target from style images to image sets of scenes and does not require additional network training for stylization.给定一组 3D 场景图像和一个风格目标（风格图像或另一组 3D 场景），我们的方法可以在现代 GPU 硬件上在不到 10 分钟的时间内生成在各种视角下具有一致外观的风格化新颖视图。 Extensive experimental results demonstrate the validity and superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经辐射场的实时三维场景图像风格化方法，能够在无需额外训练的情况下生成具有一致外观的新视角图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多视角图像风格化中存在计算效率低、风格一致性差或需要额外训练的问题，亟需一种高效且能保持三维场景风格一致性的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过将基于哈希表的位置编码器拆分为内容与风格两个分支，结合AdaIN特征调整技术，利用场景图像集和风格目标（图像或三维场景）生成新视角的风格化图像。
AI.result: 在现代GPU上可在10分钟内生成具有视图角度一致性的风格化新视角图像，实验验证了方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦内容与风格分支并结合AdaIN技术，实现了高效且风格一致的三维场景图像风格化，为实时应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Luca Di Giammarino,Emanuele Giacomini,Leonardo Brizi,Omar Salem,Giorgio Grisetti
title: Photometric LiDAR and RGB-D Bundle Adjustment
title_zh: 光度 LiDAR 和 RGB-D 束调整
abstract: The joint optimization of the sensor trajectory and 3D map is a crucial characteristic of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. To achieve this, the gold standard is Bundle Adjustment (BA). Modern 3D LiDARs now retain higher resolutions that enable the creation of point cloud images resembling those taken by conventional cameras. Nevertheless, the typical effective global refinement techniques employed for RGB-D sensors are not widely applied to LiDARs. This paper presents a novel BA photometric strategy that accounts for both RGB-D and LiDAR in the same way. Our work can be used on top of any SLAM/GNSS estimate to improve and refine the initial trajectory. We conducted different experiments using these two depth sensors on public benchmarks. Our results show that our system performs on par or better compared to other state-of-the-art ad-hoc SLAM/BA strategies, free from data association and without making assumptions about the environment. In addition, we present the benefit of jointly using RGB-D and LiDAR within our unified method. We finally release an open-source CUDA/C++ implementation.
summary: The joint optimization of the sensor trajectory and 3D map is a crucial characteristic of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. To achieve this, the gold standard is Bundle Adjustment (BA). Modern 3D LiDARs now retain higher resolutions that enable the creation of point cloud images resembling those taken by conventional cameras. Nevertheless, the typical effective global refinement techniques employed for RGB-D sensors are not widely applied to LiDARs. This paper presents a novel BA photometric strategy that accounts for both RGB-D and LiDAR in the same way. Our work can be used on top of any SLAM/GNSS estimate to improve and refine the initial trajectory. We conducted different experiments using these two depth sensors on public benchmarks. Our results show that our system performs on par or better compared to other state-of-the-art ad-hoc SLAM/BA strategies, free from data association and without making assumptions about the environment. In addition, we present the benefit of jointly using RGB-D and LiDAR within our unified method. We finally release an open-source CUDA/C++ implementation.
abstract_zh: The joint optimization of the sensor trajectory and 3D map is a crucial characteristic of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. To achieve this, the gold standard is Bundle Adjustment (BA). Modern 3D LiDARs now retain higher resolutions that enable the creation of point cloud images resembling those taken by conventional cameras.然而，用于 RGB-D 传感器的典型有效全局细化技术并未广泛应用于 LiDAR。 This paper presents a novel BA photometric strategy that accounts for both RGB-D and LiDAR in the same way.我们的工作可以在任何 SLAM/GNSS 估计之上使用，以改进和细化初始轨迹。我们使用这两个深度传感器在公共基准上进行了不同的实验。我们的结果表明，与其他最先进的临时 SLAM/BA 策略相比，我们的系统的性能相当或更好，无需数据关联，也无需对环境做出假设。此外，我们还展示了在我们的统一方法中联合使用 RGB-D 和 LiDAR 的好处。我们终于发布了开源 CUDA/C++ 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合优化LiDAR与RGB-D数据的光度捆集调整方法，提升SLAM系统轨迹精度。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D传感器的全局优化技术未广泛应用于高分辨率LiDAR，而LiDAR生成的点云图像已具备类似相机的特性，需统一优化方法。
AI.method: 设计新型光度捆集调整策略，统一处理RGB-D与LiDAR数据，无需数据关联及环境假设，可基于任意SLAM/GNSS初始估计进行优化。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验显示，系统性能优于或等于现有先进SLAM/BA方法，且联合使用RGB-D与LiDAR可提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合多传感器数据提升轨迹优化精度，并提供开源CUDA/C++实现。

This paper presents a novel BA photometric strategy that accounts for both RGB-D and LiDAR in the same way. Our work can be used on top of any SLAM/GNSS estimate to improve and refine the initial trajectory. We conducted different experiments using these two depth sensors on public benchmarks. Our results show that our system performs on par or better compared to other state-of-the-art ad-hoc SLAM/BA strategies, free from data association and without making assumptions about the environment. In addition, we present the benefit of jointly using RGB-D and LiDAR within our unified method. We finally release an open-source CUDA/C++ implementation. The joint optimization of the sensor trajectory and 3D map is a crucial characteristic of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. To achieve this, the gold standard is Bundle Adjustment (BA). Modern 3D LiDARs now retain higher resolutions that enable the creation of point cloud images resembling those taken by conventional cameras.然而，用于 RGB-D 传感器的典型有效全局细化技术并未广泛应用于 LiDAR。 This paper presents a novel BA photometric strategy that accounts for both RGB-D and LiDAR in the same way.我们的工作可以在任何 SLAM/GNSS 估计之上使用，以改进和细化初始轨迹。我们使用这两个深度传感器在公共基准上进行了不同的实验。我们的结果表明，与其他最先进的临时 SLAM/BA 策略相比，我们的系统的性能相当或更好，无需数据关联，也无需对环境做出假设。此外，我们还展示了在我们的统一方法中联合使用 RGB-D 和 LiDAR 的好处。我们终于发布了开源 CUDA/C++ 实现。 本文提出一种联合优化LiDAR与RGB-D数据的光度捆集调整方法，提升SLAM系统轨迹精度。 Luca Di Giammarino,Emanuele Giacomini,Leonardo Brizi,Omar Salem,Giorgio Grisetti cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ruyi Lian,Haibin Ling
title: CheckerPose: Progressive Dense Keypoint Localization for Object Pose Estimation with Graph Neural Network
title_zh: CheckerPose：使用图神经网络进行物体姿态估计的渐进密集关键点定位
abstract: Estimating the 6-DoF pose of a rigid object from a single RGB image is a crucial yet challenging task. Recent studies have shown the great potential of dense correspondence-based solutions, yet improvements are still needed to reach practical deployment. In this paper, we propose a novel pose estimation algorithm named CheckerPose, which improves on three main aspects. Firstly, CheckerPose densely samples 3D keypoints from the surface of the 3D object and finds their 2D correspondences progressively in the 2D image. Compared to previous solutions that conduct dense sampling in the image space, our strategy enables the correspondence searching in a 2D grid (i.e., pixel coordinate). Secondly, for our 3D-to-2D correspondence, we design a compact binary code representation for 2D image locations. This representation not only allows for progressive correspondence refinement but also converts the correspondence regression to a more efficient classification problem. Thirdly, we adopt a graph neural network to explicitly model the interactions among the sampled 3D keypoints, further boosting the reliability and accuracy of the correspondences. Together, these novel components make CheckerPose a strong pose estimation algorithm. When evaluated on the popular Linemod, Linemod-O, and YCB-V object pose estimation benchmarks, CheckerPose clearly boosts the accuracy of correspondence-based methods and achieves state-of-the-art performances. Code is available at https://github.com/RuyiLian/CheckerPose.

Recent studies have shown the great potential of dense correspondence-based solutions, yet improvements are still needed to reach practical deployment. Firstly, CheckerPose densely samples 3D keypoints from the surface of the 3D object and finds their 2D correspondences progressively in the 2D image. Compared to previous solutions that conduct dense sampling in the image space, our strategy enables the correspondence searching in a 2D grid (i.e., pixel coordinate). Secondly, for our 3D-to-2D correspondence, we design a compact binary code representation for 2D image locations. This representation not only allows for progressive correspondence refinement but also converts the correspondence regression to a more efficient classification problem. Thirdly, we adopt a graph neural network to explicitly model the interactions among the sampled 3D keypoints, further boosting the reliability and accuracy of the correspondences. Together, these novel components make CheckerPose a strong pose estimation algorithm. When evaluated on the popular Linemod, Linemod-O, and YCB-V object pose estimation benchmarks, CheckerPose clearly boosts the accuracy of correspondence-based methods and achieves state-of-the-art performances. Code is available at https://github.com/RuyiLian/CheckerPose.
abstract_zh: 从单个 RGB 图像估计刚性物体的 6-DoF 位姿是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究表明，基于密集通信的解决方案具有巨大潜力，但仍需要改进才能实现实际部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CheckerPose 的新型姿态估计算法，该算法在三个主要方面进行了改进。首先，CheckerPose 从 3D 物体表面密集采样 3D 关键点，并在 2D 图像中逐步找到它们的 2D 对应关系。与之前在图像空间中进行密集采样的解决方案相比，我们的策略能够在二维网格（即像素坐标）中进行对应搜索。其次，对于 3D 到 2D 的对应，我们为 2D 图像位置设计了一个紧凑的二进制代码表示。这种表示不仅允许渐进的对应细化，而且还将对应回归转换为更有效的分类问题。第三，我们采用图神经网络对采样的 3D 关键点之间的交互进行显式建模，进一步提高了对应关系的可靠性和准确性。这些新颖的组件共同使 CheckerPose 成为强大的姿势估计算法。在流行的 Linemod、Linemod-O 和 YCB-V 对象姿态估计基准上进行评估时，CheckerPose 明显提高了基于对应方法的准确性，并实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/RuyiLian/CheckerPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CheckerPose的新算法，用于通过单张RGB图像估计刚性物体的6自由度姿态。
AI.motivation: 从单张RGB图像估计刚性物体的6-DoF姿态是一项关键但具有挑战性的任务。尽管基于密集对应关系的解决方案显示出巨大潜力，但仍需改进以达到实际部署。
AI.method: CheckerPose通过三个主要方面改进了现有方法：首先，从3D物体表面密集采样3D关键点，并在2D图像中逐步寻找它们的2D对应点；其次，设计了一种紧凑的二进制代码表示来表示2D图像位置，从而将对应关系回归转换为更高效的分类问题；最后，采用图神经网络显式建模采样3D关键点之间的交互，进一步提升对应关系的可靠性和准确性。
AI.result: 在Linemod、Linemod-O和YCB-V等流行的目标姿态估计基准上，CheckerPose显著提高了基于对应关系方法的准确性，并达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: CheckerPose通过其新颖的组件成为一种强大的姿态估计算法，为实际部署提供了有效的解决方案。
