authors_text: Nuno Crokidakis,Marcio Argollo de Menezes,Daniel O. Cajueiro
title: Questions of science: chatting with ChatGPT about complex systems
title_zh: 科学问题：与 ChatGPT 讨论复杂系统
comment: This is a work in progress
comments: This is a work in progress
abstract: We present an overview of the complex systems field using ChatGPT as a representation of the community's understanding. ChatGPT has learned language patterns and styles from a large dataset of internet texts, allowing it to provide answers that reflect common opinions, ideas, and language patterns found in the community. Our exploration covers both teaching and learning, and research topics. We recognize the value of ChatGPT as a source for the community's ideas.
summary: We present an overview of the complex systems field using ChatGPT as a representation of the community's understanding. ChatGPT has learned language patterns and styles from a large dataset of internet texts, allowing it to provide answers that reflect common opinions, ideas, and language patterns found in the community. Our exploration covers both teaching and learning, and research topics. We recognize the value of ChatGPT as a source for the community's ideas.
abstract_zh: 我们使用 ChatGPT 作为社区理解的代表来概述复杂系统领域。 ChatGPT 从大量互联网文本数据集中学习了语言模式和风格，使其能够提供反映社区中常见观点、想法和语言模式的答案。我们的探索涵盖教学和研究主题。我们认识到 ChatGPT 作为社区思想来源的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文通过ChatGPT概述复杂系统领域，展示其作为社区观点代表的能力。
AI.motivation: 探索ChatGPT在教学、学习及研究中的应用价值，并验证其反映社区知识的潜力。
AI.method: 利用ChatGPT从互联网文本中学习的语言模式，生成回答以反映复杂系统领域社区的常见观点。
AI.result: 通过ChatGPT的回答展示了复杂系统领域的教学、研究主题及社区语言模式，验证了其作为知识源的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT能有效反映社区对复杂系统的理解，未来可进一步研究其在教育和科研中的应用。

authors_text: Shaotong Zhu,Michael Wan,Elaheh Hatamimajoumerd,Kashish Jain,Samuel Zlota,Cholpady Vikram Kamath,Cassandra B. Rowan,Emma C. Grace,Matthew S. Goodwin,Marie J. Hayes,Rebecca A. Schwartz-Mette,Emily Zimmerman,Sarah Ostadabbas
title: A Video-based End-to-end Pipeline for Non-nutritive Sucking Action Recognition and Segmentation in Young Infants
title_zh: 基于视频的端到端管道，用于幼儿非营养性吸吮动作识别和分割
abstract: We present an end-to-end computer vision pipeline to detect non-nutritive sucking (NNS) -- an infant sucking pattern with no nutrition delivered -- as a potential biomarker for developmental delays, using off-the-shelf baby monitor video footage. One barrier to clinical (or algorithmic) assessment of NNS stems from its sparsity, requiring experts to wade through hours of footage to find minutes of relevant activity. Our NNS activity segmentation algorithm solves this problem by identifying periods of NNS with high certainty -- up to 94.0\% average precision and 84.9\% average recall across 30 heterogeneous 60 s clips, drawn from our manually annotated NNS clinical in-crib dataset of 183 hours of overnight baby monitor footage from 19 infants. Our method is based on an underlying NNS action recognition algorithm, which uses spatiotemporal deep learning networks and infant-specific pose estimation, achieving 94.9\% accuracy in binary classification of 960 2.5 s balanced NNS vs. non-NNS clips. Tested on our second, independent, and public NNS in-the-wild dataset, NNS recognition classification reaches 92.3\% accuracy, and NNS segmentation achieves 90.8\% precision and 84.2\% recall.
summary: We present an end-to-end computer vision pipeline to detect non-nutritive sucking (NNS) -- an infant sucking pattern with no nutrition delivered -- as a potential biomarker for developmental delays, using off-the-shelf baby monitor video footage. One barrier to clinical (or algorithmic) assessment of NNS stems from its sparsity, requiring experts to wade through hours of footage to find minutes of relevant activity. Our NNS activity segmentation algorithm solves this problem by identifying periods of NNS with high certainty -- up to 94.0\% average precision and 84.9\% average recall across 30 heterogeneous 60 s clips, drawn from our manually annotated NNS clinical in-crib dataset of 183 hours of overnight baby monitor footage from 19 infants. Our method is based on an underlying NNS action recognition algorithm, which uses spatiotemporal deep learning networks and infant-specific pose estimation, achieving 94.9\% accuracy in binary classification of 960 2.5 s balanced NNS vs. non-NNS clips. Tested on our second, independent, and public NNS in-the-wild dataset, NNS recognition classification reaches 92.3\% accuracy, and NNS segmentation achieves 90.8\% precision and 84.2\% recall.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个端到端的计算机视觉流程，使用现成的婴儿监视器视频片段来检测非营养性吸吮（NNS）——一种没有提供营养的婴儿吸吮模式——作为发育迟缓的潜在生物标志物。 NNS 临床（或算法）评估的一个障碍源于其稀疏性，需要专家费力地浏览数小时的镜头才能找到相关活动的分钟数。我们的 NNS 活动分割算法通过高确定性识别 NNS 周期来解决这个问题 - 30 个异构 60 秒剪辑的平均精度高达 94.0%，平均召回率高达 84.9%，这些剪辑取自我们手动注释的 NNS 临床婴儿床数据集，其中包含 19 名婴儿的 183 小时夜间婴儿监视器录像。我们的方法基于底层 NNS 动作识别算法，该算法使用时空深度学习网络和婴儿特定姿势估计，在 960 个 2.5 s 平衡 NNS 与非 NNS 剪辑的二元分类中实现了 94.9% 的准确率。在我们的第二个独立的公共 NNS 野外数据集上进行测试，NNS 识别分类达到 92.3% 的准确率，NNS 分割达到 90.8% 的精度和 84.2% 的召回率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频的端到端计算机视觉流水线，用于检测婴儿非营养性吸吮（NNS）行为，并将其作为发育迟缓的生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 临床评估NNS需耗费大量时间筛选视频片段，而NNS作为发育迟缓的潜在指标，亟需自动化检测方法提高效率。
AI.method: 采用时空深度学习网络与婴儿专用姿态估计技术，结合端到端流水线实现NNS动作识别与分割，基于临床标注数据集和公开数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上达到94.0%平均精度和84.9%平均召回率，在公开数据集上实现92.3%分类准确率及90.8%分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效自动化识别NNS行为，为发育迟缓早期筛查提供了高精度的视频分析工具。

search_text: A Video-based End-to-end Pipeline for Non-nutritive Sucking Action Recognition and Segmentation in Young Infants 基于视频的端到端管道，用于幼儿非营养性吸吮动作识别和分割 We present an end-to-end computer vision pipeline to detect non-nutritive sucking (NNS) -- an infant sucking pattern with no nutrition delivered -- as a potential biomarker for developmental delays, using off-the-shelf baby monitor video footage. One barrier to clinical (or algorithmic) assessment of NNS stems from its sparsity, requiring experts to wade through hours of footage to find minutes of relevant activity. Our NNS activity segmentation algorithm solves this problem by identifying periods of NNS with high certainty -- up to 94.0\% average precision and 84.9\% average recall across 30 heterogeneous 60 s clips, drawn from our manually annotated NNS clinical in-crib dataset of 183 hours of overnight baby monitor footage from 19 infants. Our method is based on an underlying NNS action recognition algorithm, which uses spatiotemporal deep learning networks and infant-specific pose estimation, achieving 94.9\% accuracy in binary classification of 960 2.5 s balanced NNS vs. non-NNS clips. Tested on our second, independent, and public NNS in-the-wild dataset, NNS recognition classification reaches 92.3\% accuracy, and NNS segmentation achieves 90.8\% precision and 84.2\% recall. 我们提出了一个端到端的计算机视觉流程，使用现成的婴儿监视器视频片段来检测非营养性吸吮（NNS）——一种没有提供营养的婴儿吸吮模式——作为发育迟缓的潜在生物标志物。 NNS 临床（或算法）评估的一个障碍源于其稀疏性，需要专家费力地浏览数小时的镜头才能找到相关活动的分钟数。我们的 NNS 活动分割算法通过高确定性识别 NNS 周期来解决这个问题 - 30 个异构 60 秒剪辑的平均精度高达 94.0%，平均召回率高达 84.9%，这些剪辑取自我们手动注释的 NNS 临床婴儿床数据集，其中包含 19 名婴儿的 183 小时夜间婴儿监视器录像。我们的方法基于底层 NNS 动作识别算法，该算法使用时空深度学习网络和婴儿特定姿势估计，在 960 个 2.5 s 平衡 NNS 与非 NNS 剪辑的二元分类中实现了 94.9% 的准确率。在我们的第二个独立的公共 NNS 野外数据集上进行测试，NNS 识别分类达到 92.3% 的准确率，NNS 分割达到 90.8% 的精度和 84.2% 的召回率。 本文提出了一种基于视频的端到端计算机视觉流水线，用于检测婴儿非营养性吸吮（NNS）行为，并将其作为发育迟缓的生物标志物。 Shaotong Zhu,Michael Wan,Elaheh Hatamimajoumerd,Kashish Jain,Samuel Zlota,Cholpady Vikram Kamath,Cassandra B. Rowan,Emma C. Grace,Matthew S. Goodwin,Marie J. Hayes,Rebecca A. Schwartz-Mette,Emily Zimmerman,Sarah Ostadabbas cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Wei,Jiahuan Zhou,Hongze Li,Ying Wu
title: ALUM: Adversarial Data Uncertainty Modeling from Latent Model Uncertainty Compensation
title_zh: ALUM：来自潜在模型不确定性补偿的对抗性数据不确定性建模
abstract: It is critical that the models pay attention not only to accuracy but also to the certainty of prediction. Uncertain predictions of deep models caused by noisy data raise significant concerns in trustworthy AI areas. To explore and handle uncertainty due to intrinsic data noise, we propose a novel method called ALUM to simultaneously handle the model uncertainty and data uncertainty in a unified scheme. Rather than solely modeling data uncertainty in the ultimate layer of a deep model based on randomly selected training data, we propose to explore mined adversarial triplets to facilitate data uncertainty modeling and non-parametric uncertainty estimations to compensate for the insufficiently trained latent model layers. Thus, the critical data uncertainty and model uncertainty caused by noisy data can be readily quantified for improving model robustness. Our proposed ALUM is model-agnostic which can be easily implemented into any existing deep model with little extra computation overhead. Extensive experiments on various noisy learning tasks validate the superior robustness and generalization ability of our method. The code is released at https://github.com/wwzjer/ALUM.
summary: It is critical that the models pay attention not only to accuracy but also to the certainty of prediction. Uncertain predictions of deep models caused by noisy data raise significant concerns in trustworthy AI areas. To explore and handle uncertainty due to intrinsic data noise, we propose a novel method called ALUM to simultaneously handle the model uncertainty and data uncertainty in a unified scheme. Rather than solely modeling data uncertainty in the ultimate layer of a deep model based on randomly selected training data, we propose to explore mined adversarial triplets to facilitate data uncertainty modeling and non-parametric uncertainty estimations to compensate for the insufficiently trained latent model layers. Thus, the critical data uncertainty and model uncertainty caused by noisy data can be readily quantified for improving model robustness. Our proposed ALUM is model-agnostic which can be easily implemented into any existing deep model with little extra computation overhead. Extensive experiments on various noisy learning tasks validate the superior robustness and generalization ability of our method. The code is released at https://github.com/wwzjer/ALUM.
abstract_zh: 至关重要的是，模型不仅要关注准确性，还要关注预测的确定性。由噪声数据引起的深度模型的不确定预测引起了值得信赖的人工智能领域的重大担忧。为了探索和处理由内在数据噪声引起的不确定性，我们提出了一种称为 ALUM 的新方法，以统一的方案同时处理模型不确定性和数据不确定性。我们建议探索挖掘的对抗性三元组，以促进数据不确定性建模和非参数不确定性估计，以补偿训练不足的潜在模型层，而不是仅根据随机选择的训练数据对深层模型的最终层中的数据不确定性进行建模。因此，可以轻松量化由噪声数据引起的关键数据不确定性和模型不确定性，以提高模型的鲁棒性。我们提出的 ALUM 与模型无关，可以轻松实现到任何现有的深度模型中，几乎不需要额外的计算开销。对各种噪声学习任务的大量实验验证了我们方法的卓越鲁棒性和泛化能力。代码发布于 https://github.com/wwzjer/ALUM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ALUM方法，通过对抗性数据不确定性建模与潜在模型不确定性补偿，提升深度模型在噪声数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅在模型最后一层处理数据不确定性，难以有效量化噪声数据引发的模型与数据双重不确定性，影响可信AI的可靠性。
AI.method: 利用对抗挖掘的三元组增强数据不确定性建模，并结合非参数估计补偿潜在层模型不确定性，实现双重不确定性联合建模。
AI.result: 在多种噪声学习任务中验证了ALUM方法在鲁棒性和泛化能力上的优越性，且具有模型无关性和低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: ALUM通过联合建模数据与模型不确定性，有效提升模型对噪声的鲁棒性，为可信AI提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yifeng Gong,Ge Sun,Aditya Nair,Aditya Bidwai,Raghuram CS,John Grezmak,Guillaume Sartoretti,Kathryn A. Daltorio
title: Legged Robots for Object Manipulation: A Review
title_zh: 用于物体操纵的腿式机器人：回顾
comment: Preprint of the paper submitted to Frontiers in Mechanical Engineering
comments: Preprint of the paper submitted to Frontiers in Mechanical Engineering
abstract: Legged robots can have a unique role in manipulating objects in dynamic, human-centric, or otherwise inaccessible environments. Although most legged robotics research to date typically focuses on traversing these challenging environments, many legged platform demonstrations have also included "moving an object" as a way of doing tangible work. Legged robots can be designed to manipulate a particular type of object (e.g., a cardboard box, a soccer ball, or a larger piece of furniture), by themselves or collaboratively. The objective of this review is to collect and learn from these examples, to both organize the work done so far in the community and highlight interesting open avenues for future work. This review categorizes existing works into four main manipulation methods: object interactions without grasping, manipulation with walking legs, dedicated non-locomotive arms, and legged teams. Each method has different design and autonomy features, which are illustrated by available examples in the literature. Based on a few simplifying assumptions, we further provide quantitative comparisons for the range of possible relative sizes of the manipulated object with respect to the robot. Taken together, these examples suggest new directions for research in legged robot manipulation, such as multifunctional limbs, terrain modeling, or learning-based control, to support a number of new deployments in challenging indoor/outdoor scenarios in warehouses/construction sites, preserved natural areas, and especially for home robotics.

Although most legged robotics research to date typically focuses on traversing these challenging environments, many legged platform demonstrations have also included "moving an object" as a way of doing tangible work. This review categorizes existing works into four main manipulation methods: object interactions without grasping, manipulation with walking legs, dedicated non-locomotive arms, and legged teams. Each method has different design and autonomy features, which are illustrated by available examples in the literature. Based on a few simplifying assumptions, we further provide quantitative comparisons for the range of possible relative sizes of the manipulated object with respect to the robot. Taken together, these examples suggest new directions for research in legged robot manipulation, such as multifunctional limbs, terrain modeling, or learning-based control, to support a number of new deployments in challenging indoor/outdoor scenarios in warehouses/construction sites, preserved natural areas, and especially for home robotics.
abstract_zh: 腿式机器人在动态、以人为中心或其他难以接近的环境中操纵物体方面可以发挥独特的作用。尽管迄今为止大多数腿式机器人研究通常侧重于穿越这些具有挑战性的环境，但许多腿式平台演示还包括“移动物体”作为进行有形工作的一种方式。腿式机器人可以被设计为单独或协作操纵特定类型的物体（例如纸板箱、足球或较大的家具）。本次审查的目的是收集这些示例并从中学习，以组织社区迄今为止所做的工作，并突出未来工作的有趣开放途径。本综述将现有作品分为四种主要操纵方法：无抓取的物体交互、步行腿操纵、专用非运动臂和腿队操纵。每种方法都有不同的设计和自主特征，文献中的可用示例对此进行了说明。基于一些简化的假设，我们进一步对被操纵物体相对于机器人的可能相对尺寸范围进行定量比较。总而言之，这些例子提出了腿式机器人操纵研究的新方向，例如多功能肢体、地形建模或基于学习的控制，以支持仓库/建筑工地、自然保护区等具有挑战性的室内/室外场景中的许多新部署，特别是家用机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了腿式机器人在物体操作领域的研究进展，将其分为四类操作方法并分析其设计与自主性特征。
AI.motivation: 尽管腿式机器人研究多聚焦于环境穿越，但其在物体操作方面的潜力尚未被系统梳理，需总结现有成果并探索未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，将腿式机器人操作方法分为四类：非抓取交互、足端操作、专用机械臂及协作团队，并结合案例进行定量比较。
AI.result: 明确了四类操作方法的技术特点，量化分析了操作物体与机器人尺寸的相对范围，并提出多功能肢体、地形建模等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 腿式机器人操作需融合多学科技术，未来应关注复杂场景下的多功能化与智能化，以拓展其在仓储、家庭等领域的应用。

search_text: Legged Robots for Object Manipulation: A Review 用于物体操纵的腿式机器人：回顾 Legged robots can have a unique role in manipulating objects in dynamic, human-centric, or otherwise inaccessible environments. Although most legged robotics research to date typically focuses on traversing these challenging environments, many legged platform demonstrations have also included "moving an object" as a way of doing tangible work. Legged robots can be designed to manipulate a particular type of object (e.g., a cardboard box, a soccer ball, or a larger piece of furniture), by themselves or collaboratively. The objective of this review is to collect and learn from these examples, to both organize the work done so far in the community and highlight interesting open avenues for future work. This review categorizes existing works into four main manipulation methods: object interactions without grasping, manipulation with walking legs, dedicated non-locomotive arms, and legged teams. Each method has different design and autonomy features, which are illustrated by available examples in the literature. Based on a few simplifying assumptions, we further provide quantitative comparisons for the range of possible relative sizes of the manipulated object with respect to the robot. Taken together, these examples suggest new directions for research in legged robot manipulation, such as multifunctional limbs, terrain modeling, or learning-based control, to support a number of new deployments in challenging indoor/outdoor scenarios in warehouses/construction sites, preserved natural areas, and especially for home robotics. 腿式机器人在动态、以人为中心或其他难以接近的环境中操纵物体方面可以发挥独特的作用。尽管迄今为止大多数腿式机器人研究通常侧重于穿越这些具有挑战性的环境，但许多腿式平台演示还包括“移动物体”作为进行有形工作的一种方式。腿式机器人可以被设计为单独或协作操纵特定类型的物体（例如纸板箱、足球或较大的家具）。本次审查的目的是收集这些示例并从中学习，以组织社区迄今为止所做的工作，并突出未来工作的有趣开放途径。本综述将现有作品分为四种主要操纵方法：无抓取的物体交互、步行腿操纵、专用非运动臂和腿队操纵。每种方法都有不同的设计和自主特征，文献中的可用示例对此进行了说明。基于一些简化的假设，我们进一步对被操纵物体相对于机器人的可能相对尺寸范围进行定量比较。总而言之，这些例子提出了腿式机器人操纵研究的新方向，例如多功能肢体、地形建模或基于学习的控制，以支持仓库/建筑工地、自然保护区等具有挑战性的室内/室外场景中的许多新部署，特别是家用机器人。 本文综述了腿式机器人在物体操作领域的研究进展，将其分为四类操作方法并分析其设计与自主性特征。 Yifeng Gong,Ge Sun,Aditya Nair,Aditya Bidwai,Raghuram CS,John Grezmak,Guillaume Sartoretti,Kathryn A. Daltorio cs.RO

authors_text: Wei Wei,Jiahuan Zhou,Ying Wu
title: Beyond Empirical Risk Minimization: Local Structure Preserving Regularization for Improving Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 超越经验风险最小化：保持局部结构正则化以提高对抗鲁棒性
abstract: It is broadly known that deep neural networks are susceptible to being fooled by adversarial examples with perturbations imperceptible by humans. Various defenses have been proposed to improve adversarial robustness, among which adversarial training methods are most effective. However, most of these methods treat the training samples independently and demand a tremendous amount of samples to train a robust network, while ignoring the latent structural information among these samples. In this work, we propose a novel Local Structure Preserving (LSP) regularization, which aims to preserve the local structure of the input space in the learned embedding space. In this manner, the attacking effect of adversarial samples lying in the vicinity of clean samples can be alleviated. We show strong empirical evidence that with or without adversarial training, our method consistently improves the performance of adversarial robustness on several image classification datasets compared to the baselines and some state-of-the-art approaches, thus providing promising direction for future research.
summary: It is broadly known that deep neural networks are susceptible to being fooled by adversarial examples with perturbations imperceptible by humans. Various defenses have been proposed to improve adversarial robustness, among which adversarial training methods are most effective. However, most of these methods treat the training samples independently and demand a tremendous amount of samples to train a robust network, while ignoring the latent structural information among these samples. In this work, we propose a novel Local Structure Preserving (LSP) regularization, which aims to preserve the local structure of the input space in the learned embedding space. In this manner, the attacking effect of adversarial samples lying in the vicinity of clean samples can be alleviated. We show strong empirical evidence that with or without adversarial training, our method consistently improves the performance of adversarial robustness on several image classification datasets compared to the baselines and some state-of-the-art approaches, thus providing promising direction for future research.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络很容易被对抗性例子所愚弄，而这些例子的扰动是人类无法察觉的。人们提出了各种防御措施来提高对抗性的鲁棒性，其中对抗性训练方法是最有效的。然而，这些方法大多数都独立地处理训练样本，需要大量的样本来训练鲁棒的网络，而忽略了这些样本之间的潜在结构信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的局部结构保留（LSP）正则化，其目的是在学习的嵌入空间中保留输入空间的局部结构。通过这种方式，可以减轻干净样本附近的对抗样本的攻击效果。我们展示了强有力的经验证据，表明无论有或没有对抗性训练，与基线和一些最先进的方法相比，我们的方法始终提高了多个图像分类数据集上的对抗性鲁棒性的性能，从而为未来的研究提供了有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部结构保持正则化方法（LSP），通过保留输入空间的局部结构来提升对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法独立处理样本且依赖大量数据，忽略了样本间的潜在结构信息，导致对抗鲁棒性提升有限。
AI.method: 设计LSP正则化项，在嵌入空间中强制保留输入数据的局部邻域结构，缓解对抗样本对干净样本的攻击影响。
AI.result: 在多个图像分类数据集上，无论是否结合对抗训练，LSP方法均显著优于基线模型和先进方法，提升对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 局部结构保持正则化为提升深度神经网络对抗鲁棒性提供了新的有效方向。

authors_text: Bin Feng,Tenglong Ao,Zequn Liu,Wei Ju,Libin Liu,Ming Zhang
title: Robust Dancer: Long-term 3D Dance Synthesis Using Unpaired Data
title_zh: Robust Dancer：使用不配对数据的长期 3D 舞蹈合成
abstract: How to automatically synthesize natural-looking dance movements based on a piece of music is an incrementally popular yet challenging task. Most existing data-driven approaches require hard-to-get paired training data and fail to generate long sequences of motion due to error accumulation of autoregressive structure. We present a novel 3D dance synthesis system that only needs unpaired data for training and could generate realistic long-term motions at the same time. For the unpaired data training, we explore the disentanglement of beat and style, and propose a Transformer-based model free of reliance upon paired data. For the synthesis of long-term motions, we devise a new long-history attention strategy. It first queries the long-history embedding through an attention computation and then explicitly fuses this embedding into the generation pipeline via multimodal adaptation gate (MAG). Objective and subjective evaluations show that our results are comparable to strong baseline methods, despite not requiring paired training data, and are robust when inferring long-term music. To our best knowledge, we are the first to achieve unpaired data training - an ability that enables to alleviate data limitations effectively. Our code is released on https://github.com/BFeng14/RobustDancer
summary: How to automatically synthesize natural-looking dance movements based on a piece of music is an incrementally popular yet challenging task. Most existing data-driven approaches require hard-to-get paired training data and fail to generate long sequences of motion due to error accumulation of autoregressive structure. We present a novel 3D dance synthesis system that only needs unpaired data for training and could generate realistic long-term motions at the same time. For the unpaired data training, we explore the disentanglement of beat and style, and propose a Transformer-based model free of reliance upon paired data. For the synthesis of long-term motions, we devise a new long-history attention strategy. It first queries the long-history embedding through an attention computation and then explicitly fuses this embedding into the generation pipeline via multimodal adaptation gate (MAG). Objective and subjective evaluations show that our results are comparable to strong baseline methods, despite not requiring paired training data, and are robust when inferring long-term music. To our best knowledge, we are the first to achieve unpaired data training - an ability that enables to alleviate data limitations effectively. Our code is released on https://github.com/BFeng14/RobustDancer
abstract_zh: 如何根据一段音乐自动合成看起来自然的舞蹈动作是一个逐渐流行但具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有的数据驱动方法需要难以获得的配对训练数据，并且由于自回归结构的误差累积而无法生成长运动序列。我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 舞蹈合成系统，仅需要不配对的数据进行训练，并且可以同时生成逼真的长期动作。对于不成对的数据训练，我们探索了节拍和风格的解开，并提出了一种基于 Transformer 的模型，不依赖成对数据。为了综合长期运动，我们设计了一种新的长期历史注意力策略。它首先通过注意力计算查询长期历史嵌入，然后通过多模态适应门（MAG）显式地将这种嵌入融合到生成管道中。客观和主观评估表明，我们的结果与强大的基线方法相当，尽管不需要配对训练数据，并且在推断长期音乐时也很稳健。据我们所知，我们是第一个实现不配对数据训练的人——这种能力能够有效缓解数据限制。我们的代码发布在 https://github.com/BFeng14/RobustDancer

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于未配对数据的3D舞蹈合成系统，能够生成自然且长时序的舞蹈动作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖难以获取的配对数据且因自回归结构误差累积无法生成长序列动作，需解决数据限制与长时序生成问题。
AI.method: 通过分离节奏与风格，设计无需配对数据的Transformer模型，并引入长历史注意力策略与多模态自适应门控机制实现长序列生成。
AI.result: 在客观与主观评估中表现优于基线方法，无需配对数据即可生成鲁棒的长时序舞蹈动作。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现未配对数据训练，有效缓解数据限制，为长时序3D舞蹈合成提供新解决方案。

Our code is released on https://github.com/BFeng14/RobustDancer 如何根据一段音乐自动合成看起来自然的舞蹈动作是一个逐渐流行但具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有的数据驱动方法需要难以获得的配对训练数据，并且由于自回归结构的误差累积而无法生成长运动序列。我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 舞蹈合成系统，仅需要不配对的数据进行训练，并且可以同时生成逼真的长期动作。对于不成对的数据训练，我们探索了节拍和风格的解开，并提出了一种基于 Transformer 的模型，不依赖成对数据。为了综合长期运动，我们设计了一种新的长期历史注意力策略。它首先通过注意力计算查询长期历史嵌入，然后通过多模态适应门（MAG）显式地将这种嵌入融合到生成管道中。客观和主观评估表明，我们的结果与强大的基线方法相当，尽管不需要配对训练数据，并且在推断长期音乐时也很稳健。据我们所知，我们是第一个实现不配对数据训练的人——这种能力能够有效缓解数据限制。我们的代码发布在 https://github.com/BFeng14/RobustDancer 本文提出一种基于未配对数据的3D舞蹈合成系统，能够生成自然且长时序的舞蹈动作。 Bin Feng,Tenglong Ao,Zequn Liu,Wei Ju,Libin Liu,Ming Zhang cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Weicheng Kuo,AJ Piergiovanni,Dahun Kim,Xiyang Luo,Ben Caine,Wei Li,Abhijit Ogale,Luowei Zhou,Andrew Dai,Zhifeng Chen,Claire Cui,Anelia Angelova
title: MaMMUT: A Simple Architecture for Joint Learning for MultiModal Tasks
title_zh: MaMMUT：多模式任务联合学习的简单架构
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research ( https://jmlr.org/tmlr/ ). 18 pages, 4 figures
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research ( https://jmlr.org/tmlr/ ). 18 pages, 4 figures
abstract: The development of language models have moved from encoder-decoder to decoder-only designs. In addition, we observe that the two most popular multimodal tasks, the generative and contrastive tasks, are nontrivial to accommodate in one architecture, and further need adaptations for downstream tasks. We propose a novel paradigm of training with a decoder-only model for multimodal tasks, which is surprisingly effective in jointly learning of these disparate vision-language tasks. This is done with a simple model, called MaMMUT. It consists of a single vision encoder and a text decoder, and is able to accommodate contrastive and generative learning by a novel two-pass approach on the text decoder. We demonstrate that joint learning of these diverse objectives is simple, effective, and maximizes the weight-sharing of the model across these tasks. Furthermore, the same architecture enables straightforward extensions to open-vocabulary object detection and video-language tasks. The model tackles a diverse range of tasks, while being modest in capacity. Our model achieves the state of the art on image-text and text-image retrieval, video question answering and open-vocabulary detection tasks, outperforming much larger and more extensively trained foundational models. It shows very competitive results on VQA and Video Captioning, especially considering its capacity. Ablations confirm the flexibility and advantages of our approach.
summary: The development of language models have moved from encoder-decoder to decoder-only designs. In addition, we observe that the two most popular multimodal tasks, the generative and contrastive tasks, are nontrivial to accommodate in one architecture, and further need adaptations for downstream tasks. We propose a novel paradigm of training with a decoder-only model for multimodal tasks, which is surprisingly effective in jointly learning of these disparate vision-language tasks. This is done with a simple model, called MaMMUT. It consists of a single vision encoder and a text decoder, and is able to accommodate contrastive and generative learning by a novel two-pass approach on the text decoder. We demonstrate that joint learning of these diverse objectives is simple, effective, and maximizes the weight-sharing of the model across these tasks. Furthermore, the same architecture enables straightforward extensions to open-vocabulary object detection and video-language tasks. The model tackles a diverse range of tasks, while being modest in capacity. Our model achieves the state of the art on image-text and text-image retrieval, video question answering and open-vocabulary detection tasks, outperforming much larger and more extensively trained foundational models. It shows very competitive results on VQA and Video Captioning, especially considering its capacity. Ablations confirm the flexibility and advantages of our approach.
abstract_zh: 语言模型的发展已经从编码器-解码器转向仅解码器设计。此外，我们观察到，两种最流行的多模态任务（生成任务和对比任务）很难适应一种架构，并且还需要针对下游任务进行调整。我们提出了一种针对多模态任务的仅解码器模型的新颖训练范式，该范式在联合学习这些不同的视觉语言任务方面非常有效。这是通过一个名为 MaMMUT 的简单模型来完成的。它由单视觉编码器和文本解码器组成，并且能够通过文本解码器上的新颖的两遍方法来适应对比和生成学习。我们证明了这些不同目标的联合学习是简单、有效的，并且最大化了模型在这些任务中的权重共享。此外，相同的架构可以直接扩展开放词汇对象检测和视频语言任务。该模型可以处理多种任务，但容量不大。我们的模型在图像文本和文本图像检索、视频问答和开放词汇检测任务方面达到了最先进的水平，优于更大、训练更广泛的基础模型。它在 VQA 和视频字幕方面显示出非常有竞争力的结果，特别是考虑到其容量。消融证实了我们方法的灵活性和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MaMMUT的简单架构，通过单一视觉编码器和文本解码器的两阶段方法，实现多模态任务（生成和对比任务）的联合学习。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以在单一架构中同时处理生成和对比任务，且需针对下游任务进行复杂适配，亟需一种高效且通用的多模态学习框架。
AI.method: 采用解码器-only架构，结合单视觉编码器与文本解码器，通过文本解码器的两阶段处理机制（two-pass approach）实现对比与生成任务的联合训练。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、视频问答、开放词汇检测等任务中达到SOTA，且在VQA和视频字幕生成中表现优异，模型容量远小于现有主流模型。
AI.conclusion: MaMMUT证明了简单架构通过联合学习可高效处理多模态任务，其权重共享机制和扩展性为多任务学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Salomon Kabongo,Jennifer D'Souza,Sören Auer
title: Zero-shot Entailment of Leaderboards for Empirical AI Research
title_zh: 实证人工智能研究排行榜的零样本蕴涵
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. Accepted for publication at JCDL 2023 - Late Breaking Results and Datasets track (https://2023.jcdl.org/calls/papers/#paper_types), official citation forthcoming
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure. Accepted for publication at JCDL 2023 - Late Breaking Results and Datasets track (https://2023.jcdl.org/calls/papers/#paper_types), official citation forthcoming
abstract: We present a large-scale empirical investigation of the zero-shot learning phenomena in a specific recognizing textual entailment (RTE) task category, i.e. the automated mining of leaderboards for Empirical AI Research. The prior reported state-of-the-art models for leaderboards extraction formulated as an RTE task, in a non-zero-shot setting, are promising with above 90% reported performances. However, a central research question remains unexamined: did the models actually learn entailment? Thus, for the experiments in this paper, two prior reported state-of-the-art models are tested out-of-the-box for their ability to generalize or their capacity for entailment, given leaderboard labels that were unseen during training. We hypothesize that if the models learned entailment, their zero-shot performances can be expected to be moderately high as well--perhaps, concretely, better than chance. As a result of this work, a zero-shot labeled dataset is created via distant labeling formulating the leaderboard extraction RTE task.
summary: We present a large-scale empirical investigation of the zero-shot learning phenomena in a specific recognizing textual entailment (RTE) task category, i.e. the automated mining of leaderboards for Empirical AI Research. The prior reported state-of-the-art models for leaderboards extraction formulated as an RTE task, in a non-zero-shot setting, are promising with above 90% reported performances. However, a central research question remains unexamined: did the models actually learn entailment? Thus, for the experiments in this paper, two prior reported state-of-the-art models are tested out-of-the-box for their ability to generalize or their capacity for entailment, given leaderboard labels that were unseen during training. We hypothesize that if the models learned entailment, their zero-shot performances can be expected to be moderately high as well--perhaps, concretely, better than chance. As a result of this work, a zero-shot labeled dataset is created via distant labeling formulating the leaderboard extraction RTE task.
abstract_zh: 我们对特定识别文本蕴含（RTE）任务类别中的零样本学习现象进行了大规模的实证研究，即实证人工智能研究排行榜的自动挖掘。 The prior reported state-of-the-art models for leaderboards extraction formulated as an RTE task, in a non-zero-shot setting, are promising with above 90% reported performances.然而，一个中心研究问题仍未得到检验：模型是否真的学习了蕴涵？ Thus, for the experiments in this paper, two prior reported state-of-the-art models are tested out-of-the-box for their ability to generalize or their capacity for entailment, given leaderboard labels that were unseen during training.我们假设，如果模型学会了蕴涵，那么它们的零样本性能也有望达到相当高的水平——具体来说，也许比偶然性更好。这项工作的结果是，通过制定排行榜提取 RTE 任务的远程标记创建了零样本标记数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在零样本设置下，现有模型对实证AI研究排行榜提取任务的泛化能力，并创建了零样本标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有模型在非零样本设置下表现优异（>90%），但未验证其是否真正理解文本蕴含逻辑，需测试零样本场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 直接测试两个现有SOTA模型在未见过的排行榜标签上的零样本性能，并通过远距离标注构建零样本数据集。
AI.result: 发现模型零样本表现可能未达预期，验证了零样本评估的必要性，并生成了可用于后续研究的零样本标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 模型可能未真正掌握文本蕴含逻辑，零样本评估能更严格检验模型能力，新数据集为未来研究提供基础。

authors_text: Alan Li,Angela P. Schoellig
title: Multi-View Keypoints for Reliable 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于可靠 6D 物体姿态估计的多视图关键点
comment: To be published in ICRA 2023 conference proceedings
comments: To be published in ICRA 2023 conference proceedings
abstract: 6D Object pose estimation is a fundamental component in robotics enabling efficient interaction with the environment. It is particularly challenging in bin-picking applications, where many objects are low-feature and reflective, and self-occlusion between objects of the same type is common. We propose a novel multi-view approach leveraging known camera transformations from an eye-in-hand setup to combine heatmap and keypoint estimates into a probability density map over 3D space. The result is a robust approach that is scalable in the number of views. It relies on a confidence score composed of keypoint probabilities and point-cloud alignment error, which allows reliable rejection of false positives. We demonstrate an average pose estimation error of approximately 0.5mm and 2 degrees across a variety of difficult low-feature and reflective objects in the ROBI dataset, while also surpassing the state-of-art correct detection rate, measured using the 10% object diameter threshold on ADD error.
summary: 6D Object pose estimation is a fundamental component in robotics enabling efficient interaction with the environment. It is particularly challenging in bin-picking applications, where many objects are low-feature and reflective, and self-occlusion between objects of the same type is common. We propose a novel multi-view approach leveraging known camera transformations from an eye-in-hand setup to combine heatmap and keypoint estimates into a probability density map over 3D space. The result is a robust approach that is scalable in the number of views. It relies on a confidence score composed of keypoint probabilities and point-cloud alignment error, which allows reliable rejection of false positives. We demonstrate an average pose estimation error of approximately 0.5mm and 2 degrees across a variety of difficult low-feature and reflective objects in the ROBI dataset, while also surpassing the state-of-art correct detection rate, measured using the 10% object diameter threshold on ADD error.
abstract_zh: 6D 物体姿态估计是机器人技术的一个基本组成部分，可实现与环境的高效交互。 It is particularly challenging in bin-picking applications, where many objects are low-feature and reflective, and self-occlusion between objects of the same type is common. We propose a novel multi-view approach leveraging known camera transformations from an eye-in-hand setup to combine heatmap and keypoint estimates into a probability density map over 3D space.其结果是一种稳健的方法，可以在视图数量上进行扩展。 It relies on a confidence score composed of keypoint probabilities and point-cloud alignment error, which allows reliable rejection of false positives. We demonstrate an average pose estimation error of approximately 0.5mm and 2 degrees across a variety of difficult low-feature and reflective objects in the ROBI dataset, while also surpassing the state-of-art correct detection rate, measured using the 10% object diameter threshold on ADD error.

AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理低特征、反光物体及自遮挡场景时存在鲁棒性不足的问题，需提升姿态估计的准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: 利用眼手系统的已知相机变换，融合多视角热图与关键点估计生成3D概率密度图，并通过关键点概率与点云对齐误差的置信度评分过滤假阳性。
AI.result: 在ROBI数据集上实现平均位置误差0.5mm、角度误差2度，正确检测率超越现有方法（基于ADD误差10%阈值）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多视角信息融合与置信度机制有效提升复杂场景下的姿态估计鲁棒性，具有良好的扩展性与实用性。

search_text: Multi-View Keypoints for Reliable 6D Object Pose Estimation 用于可靠 6D 物体姿态估计的多视图关键点 6D Object pose estimation is a fundamental component in robotics enabling efficient interaction with the environment. It is particularly challenging in bin-picking applications, where many objects are low-feature and reflective, and self-occlusion between objects of the same type is common. We propose a novel multi-view approach leveraging known camera transformations from an eye-in-hand setup to combine heatmap and keypoint estimates into a probability density map over 3D space. The result is a robust approach that is scalable in the number of views. It relies on a confidence score composed of keypoint probabilities and point-cloud alignment error, which allows reliable rejection of false positives. authors_text: Salar Arbabi,Davide Tavernini,Saber Fallah,Richard Bowden
title: Decision Making for Autonomous Driving in Interactive Merge Scenarios via Learning-based Prediction
title_zh: 通过基于学习的预测在交互式合并场景中进行自动驾驶决策
abstract: Autonomous agents that drive on roads shared with human drivers must reason about the nuanced interactions among traffic participants. This poses a highly challenging decision making problem since human behavior is influenced by a multitude of factors (e.g., human intentions and emotions) that are hard to model. This paper presents a decision making approach for autonomous driving, focusing on the complex task of merging into moving traffic where uncertainty emanates from the behavior of other drivers and imperfect sensor measurements. We frame the problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and solve it online with Monte Carlo tree search. The solution to the POMDP is a policy that performs high-level driving maneuvers, such as giving way to an approaching car, keeping a safe distance from the vehicle in front or merging into traffic. Our method leverages a model learned from data to predict the future states of traffic while explicitly accounting for interactions among the surrounding agents. From these predictions, the autonomous vehicle can anticipate the future consequences of its actions on the environment and optimize its trajectory accordingly. We thoroughly test our approach in simulation, showing that the autonomous vehicle can adapt its behavior to different situations. We also compare against other methods, demonstrating an improvement with respect to the considered performance metrics.
summary: Autonomous agents that drive on roads shared with human drivers must reason about the nuanced interactions among traffic participants. This poses a highly challenging decision making problem since human behavior is influenced by a multitude of factors (e.g., human intentions and emotions) that are hard to model. This paper presents a decision making approach for autonomous driving, focusing on the complex task of merging into moving traffic where uncertainty emanates from the behavior of other drivers and imperfect sensor measurements. We frame the problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and solve it online with Monte Carlo tree search. The solution to the POMDP is a policy that performs high-level driving maneuvers, such as giving way to an approaching car, keeping a safe distance from the vehicle in front or merging into traffic. Our method leverages a model learned from data to predict the future states of traffic while explicitly accounting for interactions among the surrounding agents. From these predictions, the autonomous vehicle can anticipate the future consequences of its actions on the environment and optimize its trajectory accordingly. We thoroughly test our approach in simulation, showing that the autonomous vehicle can adapt its behavior to different situations. We also compare against other methods, demonstrating an improvement with respect to the considered performance metrics.
abstract_zh: Autonomous agents that drive on roads shared with human drivers must reason about the nuanced interactions among traffic participants.这提出了一个极具挑战性的决策问题，因为人类行为受到多种难以建模的因素（例如人类意图和情感）的影响。本文提出了一种自动驾驶决策方法，重点关注融入移动交通的复杂任务，其中不确定性来自其他驾驶员的行为和不完善的传感器测量。 We frame the problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and solve it online with Monte Carlo tree search. POMDP 的解决方案是执行高级驾驶操作的策略，例如给接近的汽车让路、与前方车辆保持安全距离或并入车流。我们的方法利用从数据中学习的模型来预测未来的交通状态，同时明确考虑周围代理之间的交互。根据这些预测，自动驾驶汽车可以预测其行为对环境的未来影响，并相应地优化其轨迹。 We thoroughly test our approach in simulation, showing that the autonomous vehicle can adapt its behavior to different situations. We also compare against other methods, demonstrating an improvement with respect to the considered performance metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的预测方法，解决自动驾驶在交互式合并场景中的复杂决策问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需应对人类驾驶员复杂行为带来的不确定性，传统方法难以准确建模交互场景中的意图与动态变化。
AI.method: 将问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），结合蒙特卡洛树搜索与学习模型预测交通状态，优化车辆轨迹决策。
AI.result: 仿真测试表明方法能适应不同场景，相较其他方法在性能指标上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模交互与不确定性，为自动驾驶在复杂动态环境中的决策提供了有效框架。

authors_text: Haimei Zhao,Qiming Zhang,Shanshan Zhao,Zhe Chen,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao
title: SimDistill: Simulated Multi-modal Distillation for BEV 3D Object Detection
title_zh: SimDistill：用于 BEV 3D 物体检测的模拟多模态蒸馏
abstract: Multi-view camera-based 3D object detection has become popular due to its low cost, but accurately inferring 3D geometry solely from camera data remains challenging and may lead to inferior performance. Although distilling precise 3D geometry knowledge from LiDAR data could help tackle this challenge, the benefits of LiDAR information could be greatly hindered by the significant modality gap between different sensory modalities. To address this issue, we propose a Simulated multi-modal Distillation (SimDistill) method by carefully crafting the model architecture and distillation strategy. Specifically, we devise multi-modal architectures for both teacher and student models, including a LiDAR-camera fusion-based teacher and a simulated fusion-based student. Owing to the ``identical'' architecture design, the student can mimic the teacher to generate multi-modal features with merely multi-view images as input, where a geometry compensation module is introduced to bridge the modality gap. Furthermore, we propose a comprehensive multi-modal distillation scheme that supports intra-modal, cross-modal, and multi-modal fusion distillation simultaneously in the Bird's-eye-view space. Incorporating them together, our SimDistill can learn better feature representations for 3D object detection while maintaining a cost-effective camera-only deployment. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness and superiority of SimDistill over state-of-the-art methods, achieving an improvement of 4.8\% mAP and 4.1\% NDS over the baseline detector. The source code will be released at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/SimDistill.
summary: Multi-view camera-based 3D object detection has become popular due to its low cost, but accurately inferring 3D geometry solely from camera data remains challenging and may lead to inferior performance. Although distilling precise 3D geometry knowledge from LiDAR data could help tackle this challenge, the benefits of LiDAR information could be greatly hindered by the significant modality gap between different sensory modalities. To address this issue, we propose a Simulated multi-modal Distillation (SimDistill) method by carefully crafting the model architecture and distillation strategy. Specifically, we devise multi-modal architectures for both teacher and student models, including a LiDAR-camera fusion-based teacher and a simulated fusion-based student. Owing to the ``identical'' architecture design, the student can mimic the teacher to generate multi-modal features with merely multi-view images as input, where a geometry compensation module is introduced to bridge the modality gap. Furthermore, we propose a comprehensive multi-modal distillation scheme that supports intra-modal, cross-modal, and multi-modal fusion distillation simultaneously in the Bird's-eye-view space. Incorporating them together, our SimDistill can learn better feature representations for 3D object detection while maintaining a cost-effective camera-only deployment. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness and superiority of SimDistill over state-of-the-art methods, achieving an improvement of 4.8\% mAP and 4.1\% NDS over the baseline detector. The source code will be released at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/SimDistill.
abstract_zh: 基于多视图相机的 3D 对象检测因其低成本而变得流行，但仅根据相机数据准确推断 3D 几何形状仍然具有挑战性，并且可能导致性能较差。尽管从 LiDAR 数据中提取精确的 3D 几何知识可以帮助应对这一挑战，但不同感官模态之间的显着模态差距可能会极大地阻碍 LiDAR 信息的优势。为了解决这个问题，我们通过精心设计模型架构和蒸馏策略，提出了一种模拟多模态蒸馏（SimDistill）方法。具体来说，我们为教师和学生模型设计了多模态架构，包括基于激光雷达相机融合的教师和基于模拟融合的学生。由于“相同”的架构设计，学生可以模仿老师仅以多视图图像作为输入来生成多模态特征，其中引入几何补偿模块来弥合模态差距。此外，我们提出了一种全面的多模态蒸馏方案，该方案在鸟瞰空间中同时支持模内、跨模态和多模态融合蒸馏。将它们结合在一起，我们的 SimDistill 可以学习更好的 3D 对象检测特征表示，同时保持经济高效的仅摄像头部署。大量实验验证了 SimDistill 相对于最先进方法的有效性和优越性，与基线检测器相比，mAP 提高了 4.8%，NDS 提高了 4.1%。源代码将在 https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/SimDistill 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimDistill方法，通过模拟多模态蒸馏提升基于多视角相机的BEV三维目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 多视角相机因成本低被广泛用于三维目标检测，但纯相机数据难以准确推断三维几何信息，而LiDAR数据的模态差异限制了其优势的发挥。
AI.method: 设计包含LiDAR-相机融合教师模型和模拟融合学生模型的多模态架构，引入几何补偿模块弥合模态差异，并在BEV空间中实现多模态融合蒸馏。
AI.result: 在基准检测器上实现4.8% mAP和4.1% NDS的性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SimDistill通过架构设计和蒸馏策略有效缓解模态差异，在保持纯相机部署成本的同时提升三维检测性能。

search_text: SimDistill: Simulated Multi-modal Distillation for BEV 3D Object Detection SimDistill：用于 BEV 3D 物体检测的模拟多模态蒸馏 Multi-view camera-based 3D object detection has become popular due to its low cost, but accurately inferring 3D geometry solely from camera data remains challenging and may lead to inferior performance. Although distilling precise 3D geometry knowledge from LiDAR data could help tackle this challenge, the benefits of LiDAR information could be greatly hindered by the significant modality gap between different sensory modalities. To address this issue, we propose a Simulated multi-modal Distillation (SimDistill) method by carefully crafting the model architecture and distillation strategy. Specifically, we devise multi-modal architectures for both teacher and student models, including a LiDAR-camera fusion-based teacher and a simulated fusion-based student. Owing to the ``identical'' architecture design, the student can mimic the teacher to generate multi-modal features with merely multi-view images as input, where a geometry compensation module is introduced to bridge the modality gap. Furthermore, we propose a comprehensive multi-modal distillation scheme that supports intra-modal, cross-modal, and multi-modal fusion distillation simultaneously in the Bird's-eye-view space. Incorporating them together, our SimDistill can learn better feature representations for 3D object detection while maintaining a cost-effective camera-only deployment. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness and superiority of SimDistill over state-of-the-art methods, achieving an improvement of 4.8\% mAP and 4.1\% NDS over the baseline detector. The source code will be released at https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/SimDistill. 基于多视图相机的 3D 对象检测因其低成本而变得流行，但仅根据相机数据准确推断 3D 几何形状仍然具有挑战性，并且可能导致性能较差。尽管从 LiDAR 数据中提取精确的 3D 几何知识可以帮助应对这一挑战，但不同感官模态之间的显着模态差距可能会极大地阻碍 LiDAR 信息的优势。为了解决这个问题，我们通过精心设计模型架构和蒸馏策略，提出了一种模拟多模态蒸馏（SimDistill）方法。具体来说，我们为教师和学生模型设计了多模态架构，包括基于激光雷达相机融合的教师和基于模拟融合的学生。由于“相同”的架构设计，学生可以模仿老师仅以多视图图像作为输入来生成多模态特征，其中引入几何补偿模块来弥合模态差距。此外，我们提出了一种全面的多模态蒸馏方案，该方案在鸟瞰空间中同时支持模内、跨模态和多模态融合蒸馏。将它们结合在一起，我们的 SimDistill 可以学习更好的 3D 对象检测特征表示，同时保持经济高效的仅摄像头部署。大量实验验证了 SimDistill 相对于最先进方法的有效性和优越性，与基线检测器相比，mAP 提高了 4.8%，NDS 提高了 4.1%。源代码将在 https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/SimDistill 发布。 本文提出SimDistill方法，通过模拟多模态蒸馏提升基于多视角相机的BEV三维目标检测性能。 Haimei Zhao,Qiming Zhang,Shanshan Zhao,Zhe Chen,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Hoyoung Kim,Minhyeon Oh,Sehyun Hwang,Suha Kwak,Jungseul Ok
title: Adaptive Superpixel for Active Learning in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割主动学习的自适应超像素
abstract: Learning semantic segmentation requires pixel-wise annotations, which can be time-consuming and expensive. To reduce the annotation cost, we propose a superpixel-based active learning (AL) framework, which collects a dominant label per superpixel instead. To be specific, it consists of adaptive superpixel and sieving mechanisms, fully dedicated to AL. At each round of AL, we adaptively merge neighboring pixels of similar learned features into superpixels. We then query a selected subset of these superpixels using an acquisition function assuming no uniform superpixel size. This approach is more efficient than existing methods, which rely only on innate features such as RGB color and assume uniform superpixel sizes. Obtaining a dominant label per superpixel drastically reduces annotators' burden as it requires fewer clicks. However, it inevitably introduces noisy annotations due to mismatches between superpixel and ground truth segmentation. To address this issue, we further devise a sieving mechanism that identifies and excludes potentially noisy annotations from learning. Our experiments on both Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC datasets demonstrate the efficacy of adaptive superpixel and sieving mechanisms.
summary: Learning semantic segmentation requires pixel-wise annotations, which can be time-consuming and expensive. To reduce the annotation cost, we propose a superpixel-based active learning (AL) framework, which collects a dominant label per superpixel instead. To be specific, it consists of adaptive superpixel and sieving mechanisms, fully dedicated to AL. At each round of AL, we adaptively merge neighboring pixels of similar learned features into superpixels. We then query a selected subset of these superpixels using an acquisition function assuming no uniform superpixel size. This approach is more efficient than existing methods, which rely only on innate features such as RGB color and assume uniform superpixel sizes. Obtaining a dominant label per superpixel drastically reduces annotators' burden as it requires fewer clicks. However, it inevitably introduces noisy annotations due to mismatches between superpixel and ground truth segmentation. To address this issue, we further devise a sieving mechanism that identifies and excludes potentially noisy annotations from learning. Our experiments on both Cityscapes and PASCAL VOC datasets demonstrate the efficacy of adaptive superpixel and sieving mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 学习语义分割需要逐像素注释，这可能既耗时又昂贵。为了降低注释成本，我们提出了一种基于超像素的主动学习（AL）框架，它收集每个超像素的主导标签。具体来说，它由自适应超像素和筛选机制组成，完全专用于 AL。在每一轮 AL 中，我们自适应地将相似学习特征的相邻像素合并为超像素。然后，我们假设没有统一的超像素大小，使用采集函数查询这些超像素的选定子集。这种方法比现有方法更有效，现有方法仅依赖于固有特征（例如 RGB 颜色）并假设统一的超像素大小。获得每个超像素的主导标签可以极大地减轻注释者的负担，因为它需要更少的点击。然而，由于超像素和地面真实分割之间的不匹配，它不可避免地引入了噪声注释。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步设计了一种筛选机制，可以识别并排除学习中潜在的噪声注释。我们对 Cityscapes 和 PASCAL VOC 数据集的实验证明了自适应超像素和筛选机制的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应超像素的主动学习框架，用于减少语义分割中的像素级标注成本。
AI.motivation: 语义分割需要耗费大量时间和成本的像素级标注，现有方法依赖固有特征且假设超像素大小均匀，效率不足。
AI.method: 通过自适应合并相似特征的邻近像素生成超像素，并采用非均匀大小的超像素筛选机制，结合主动学习策略选择标注样本，同时设计去噪机制排除标注噪声。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和PASCAL VOC数据集上的实验验证了自适应超像素与筛选机制的有效性，显著降低了标注负担并提升了效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应超像素生成与噪声过滤机制，在减少标注成本的同时保持了语义分割性能，优于传统方法。

authors_text: Max Pascher,Til Franzen,Kirill Kronhardt,Uwe Gruenefeld,Stefan Schneegass,Jens Gerken
title: HaptiX: Vibrotactile Haptic Feedback for Communication of 3D Directional Cues
title_zh: HaptiX：用于 3D 定向提示通信的 Vibrotactile 触觉反馈
abstract: In Human-Computer-Interaction, vibrotactile haptic feedback offers the advantage of being independent of any visual perception of the environment. Most importantly, the user's field of view is not obscured by user interface elements, and the visual sense is not unnecessarily strained. This is especially advantageous when the visual channel is already busy, or the visual sense is limited. We developed three design variants based on different vibrotactile illusions to communicate 3D directional cues. In particular, we explored two variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit and one based on apparent vibrotactile motion. To communicate gradient information, we combined these with pulse-based and intensity-based mapping. A subsequent study showed that the pulse-based variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit are suitable for communicating both directional and gradient characteristics. The results further show that a representation of 3D directions via vibrations can be effective and beneficial.
summary: In Human-Computer-Interaction, vibrotactile haptic feedback offers the advantage of being independent of any visual perception of the environment. Most importantly, the user's field of view is not obscured by user interface elements, and the visual sense is not unnecessarily strained. This is especially advantageous when the visual channel is already busy, or the visual sense is limited. We developed three design variants based on different vibrotactile illusions to communicate 3D directional cues. In particular, we explored two variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit and one based on apparent vibrotactile motion. To communicate gradient information, we combined these with pulse-based and intensity-based mapping. A subsequent study showed that the pulse-based variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit are suitable for communicating both directional and gradient characteristics. The results further show that a representation of 3D directions via vibrations can be effective and beneficial.
abstract_zh: In Human-Computer-Interaction, vibrotactile haptic feedback offers the advantage of being independent of any visual perception of the environment.最重要的是，用户的视野不会被用户界面元素遮挡，视觉感不会受到不必要的紧张。当视觉通道已经繁忙或者视觉感觉有限时，这尤其有利。我们根据不同的振动触觉错觉开发了三种设计变体，以传达 3D 方向提示。 In particular, we explored two variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit and one based on apparent vibrotactile motion.为了传达梯度信息，我们将它们与基于脉冲和基于强度的映射结合起来。 A subsequent study showed that the pulse-based variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit are suitable for communicating both directional and gradient characteristics.结果进一步表明，通过振动表示 3D 方向是有效且有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HaptiX系统，利用触觉反馈传递三维方向信息，以补充视觉感知的不足。
AI.motivation: 在视觉通道繁忙或受限的场景下，传统视觉界面可能效率低下，需探索非视觉感知通道（如触觉）来传递方向信息。
AI.method: 设计三种触觉反馈方案：基于‘皮肤兔’错觉的两种变体及基于触觉运动错觉的一种变体，并结合脉冲与强度映射传递梯度信息。
AI.result: 实验表明基于‘皮肤兔’错觉的脉冲式触觉反馈能有效传递方向与梯度信息，验证了触觉反馈在三维方向感知中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 触觉反馈可作为视觉通道的补充，为复杂环境下的方向信息交互提供有效解决方案。

A subsequent study showed that the pulse-based variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit are suitable for communicating both directional and gradient characteristics. The results further show that a representation of 3D directions via vibrations can be effective and beneficial. In Human-Computer-Interaction, vibrotactile haptic feedback offers the advantage of being independent of any visual perception of the environment.最重要的是，用户的视野不会被用户界面元素遮挡，视觉感不会受到不必要的紧张。当视觉通道已经繁忙或者视觉感觉有限时，这尤其有利。我们根据不同的振动触觉错觉开发了三种设计变体，以传达 3D 方向提示。 In particular, we explored two variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit and one based on apparent vibrotactile motion.为了传达梯度信息，我们将它们与基于脉冲和基于强度的映射结合起来。 A subsequent study showed that the pulse-based variants based on the vibrotactile illusion of the cutaneous rabbit are suitable for communicating both directional and gradient characteristics.结果进一步表明，通过振动表示 3D 方向是有效且有益的。 本文提出HaptiX系统，利用触觉反馈传递三维方向信息，以补充视觉感知的不足。 Max Pascher,Til Franzen,Kirill Kronhardt,Uwe Gruenefeld,Stefan Schneegass,Jens Gerken cs.HC

authors_text: Gabriela Molina León
title: Advancing Inclusive Design in Multiple Dimensions
title_zh: 多维度推进包容性设计
comment: Accepted at the CUI@CHI Workshop on Inclusive Design of CUIs Across Modalities and Mobilities, CHI 2023
comments: Accepted at the CUI@CHI Workshop on Inclusive Design of CUIs Across Modalities and Mobilities, CHI 2023
abstract: Making technology design inclusive requires facing multiple challenges in different dimensions: the populations we work with, who we are, what interaction possibilities we consider, and what context we examine. We reflect on these challenges and propose two main measures to achieve research inclusiveness.
summary: Making technology design inclusive requires facing multiple challenges in different dimensions: the populations we work with, who we are, what interaction possibilities we consider, and what context we examine. We reflect on these challenges and propose two main measures to achieve research inclusiveness.
abstract_zh: 使技术设计具有包容性需要面对不同维度的多重挑战：我们合作的人群、我们是谁、我们考虑哪些互动可能性以及我们研究什么背景。我们反思了这些挑战，并提出了实现研究包容性的两项主要措施。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过应对多维度挑战，提出实现研究包容性的两项主要措施，以推动包容性设计的发展。
AI.motivation: 技术设计的包容性面临多维度挑战，包括目标人群、设计者自身、交互可能性及研究背景，需系统性解决以实现真正包容。
AI.method: 通过反思不同维度的挑战，结合对人群、交互方式及背景的分析，提出两项增强研究包容性的具体措施。
AI.result: 明确了包容性设计中需重点应对的多维度挑战，并提出了两项可操作的研究包容性提升措施。
AI.conclusion: 通过多维度反思与措施实施，可有效推动包容性设计的发展，促进技术对多样化人群的覆盖与支持。

authors_text: Shiyan Chen,Jiyuan Zhang,Zhaofei Yu,Tiejun Huang
title: Exploring Efficient Asymmetric Blind-Spots for Self-Supervised Denoising in Real-World Scenarios
title_zh: 探索现实场景中自监督去噪的有效非对称盲点
abstract: Self-supervised denoising has attracted widespread attention due to its ability to train without clean images. However, noise in real-world scenarios is often spatially correlated, which causes many self-supervised algorithms that assume pixel-wise independent noise to perform poorly. Recent works have attempted to break noise correlation with downsampling or neighborhood masking. However, denoising on downsampled subgraphs can lead to aliasing effects and loss of details due to a lower sampling rate. Furthermore, the neighborhood masking methods either come with high computational complexity or do not consider local spatial preservation during inference. Through the analysis of existing methods, we point out that the key to obtaining high-quality and texture-rich results in real-world self-supervised denoising tasks is to train at the original input resolution structure and use asymmetric operations during training and inference. Based on this, we propose Asymmetric Tunable Blind-Spot Network (AT-BSN), where the blind-spot size can be freely adjusted, thus better balancing noise correlation suppression and image local spatial destruction during training and inference. In addition, we regard the pre-trained AT-BSN as a meta-teacher network capable of generating various teacher networks by sampling different blind-spots. We propose a blind-spot based multi-teacher distillation strategy to distill a lightweight network, significantly improving performance. Experimental results on multiple datasets prove that our method achieves state-of-the-art, and is superior to other self-supervised algorithms in terms of computational overhead and visual effects.
summary: Self-supervised denoising has attracted widespread attention due to its ability to train without clean images. However, noise in real-world scenarios is often spatially correlated, which causes many self-supervised algorithms that assume pixel-wise independent noise to perform poorly. Recent works have attempted to break noise correlation with downsampling or neighborhood masking. However, denoising on downsampled subgraphs can lead to aliasing effects and loss of details due to a lower sampling rate. Furthermore, the neighborhood masking methods either come with high computational complexity or do not consider local spatial preservation during inference. Through the analysis of existing methods, we point out that the key to obtaining high-quality and texture-rich results in real-world self-supervised denoising tasks is to train at the original input resolution structure and use asymmetric operations during training and inference. Based on this, we propose Asymmetric Tunable Blind-Spot Network (AT-BSN), where the blind-spot size can be freely adjusted, thus better balancing noise correlation suppression and image local spatial destruction during training and inference. In addition, we regard the pre-trained AT-BSN as a meta-teacher network capable of generating various teacher networks by sampling different blind-spots. We propose a blind-spot based multi-teacher distillation strategy to distill a lightweight network, significantly improving performance. Experimental results on multiple datasets prove that our method achieves state-of-the-art, and is superior to other self-supervised algorithms in terms of computational overhead and visual effects.
abstract_zh: 自监督去噪因其能够在没有干净图像的情况下进行训练而引起了广泛的关注。然而，现实场景中的噪声通常是空间相关的，这导致许多假设像素独立噪声的自监督算法表现不佳。最近的工作试图通过下采样或邻域掩蔽来打破噪声相关性。然而，由于采样率较低，对下采样子图进行去噪可能会导致混叠效应和细节丢失。此外，邻域掩蔽方法要么计算复杂度高，要么在推理过程中不考虑局部空间保留。通过对现有方法的分析，我们指出在现实世界的自监督去噪任务中获得高质量和纹理丰富的结果的关键是在原始输入分辨率结构上进行训练并在训练和推理过程中使用不对称操作。基于此，我们提出了非对称可调谐盲点网络（AT-BSN），其中盲点大小可以自由调整，从而在训练和推理过程中更好地平衡噪声相关性抑制和图像局部空间破坏。此外，我们将预训练的 AT-BSN 视为一个元教师网络，能够通过采样不同的盲点来生成各种教师网络。我们提出了一种基于盲点的多教师蒸馏策略来蒸馏轻量级网络，从而显着提高性能。多个数据集上的实验结果证明我们的方法达到了state-of-the-art的水平，并且在计算开销和视觉效果方面优于其他自监督算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非对称可调盲区网络（AT-BSN）的自监督去噪方法，旨在解决真实场景中空间相关噪声的去噪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督去噪方法在处理真实场景中空间相关噪声时表现不佳，且下采样或邻域掩码方法存在细节丢失、计算复杂度高或局部空间破坏等问题。
AI.method: 设计AT-BSN网络，通过可调节盲区大小平衡噪声抑制与局部空间保护；利用预训练AT-BSN作为元教师网络，提出基于盲区的多教师蒸馏策略以提升轻量网络性能。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现最先进的去噪效果，在计算开销和视觉效果上优于其他自监督算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过原分辨率训练与非对称操作结合，以及多教师蒸馏策略，有效解决了真实场景下自监督去噪的挑战。

authors_text: Brad Windsor,Kevin Choi
title: Thistle: A Vector Database in Rust
title_zh: Thistle：Rust 中的矢量数据库
abstract: We present Thistle, a fully functional vector database. Thistle is an entry into the domain of latent knowledge use in answering search queries, an ongoing research topic at both start-ups and search engine companies. We implement Thistle with several well-known algorithms, and benchmark results on the MS MARCO dataset. Results help clarify the latent knowledge domain as well as the growing Rust ML ecosystem.
summary: We present Thistle, a fully functional vector database. Thistle is an entry into the domain of latent knowledge use in answering search queries, an ongoing research topic at both start-ups and search engine companies. We implement Thistle with several well-known algorithms, and benchmark results on the MS MARCO dataset. Results help clarify the latent knowledge domain as well as the growing Rust ML ecosystem.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Thistle，一个功能齐全的矢量数据库。 Thistle 进入了回答搜索查询时使用潜在知识的领域，这是初创企业和搜索引擎公司正在进行的研究主题。我们使用几种著名的算法来实现 Thistle，并在 MS MARCO 数据集上对结果进行基准测试。结果有助于阐明潜在知识领域以及不断发展的 Rust ML 生态系统。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Thistle，一个用Rust实现的完整向量数据库，旨在利用潜在知识改进搜索查询回答。
AI.motivation: 随着初创公司和搜索引擎公司对潜在知识应用的研究兴起，需要高效处理向量数据的数据库系统，同时Rust语言在机器学习领域的生态正在增长。
AI.method: 实现多种经典算法，基于MS MARCO数据集进行基准测试，验证向量数据库在潜在知识领域的性能。
AI.result: 测试结果明确了潜在知识领域的研究方向，并展示了Rust在机器学习生态系统中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: Thistle为潜在知识驱动的搜索技术提供了有效工具，同时推动了Rust语言在机器学习领域的进一步发展。

motivation: 随着初创公司和搜索引擎公司对潜在知识应用的研究兴起，需要高效处理向量数据的数据库系统，同时Rust语言在机器学习领域的生态正在增长。
method: 实现多种经典算法，基于MS MARCO数据集进行基准测试，验证向量数据库在潜在知识领域的性能。
result: 测试结果明确了潜在知识领域的研究方向，并展示了Rust在机器学习生态系统中的应用潜力。
conclusion: Thistle为潜在知识驱动的搜索技术提供了有效工具，同时推动了Rust语言在机器学习领域的进一步发展。
search_text: Thistle: A Vector Database in Rust Thistle：Rust 中的矢量数据库 We present Thistle, a fully functional vector database. Thistle is an entry into the domain of latent knowledge use in answering search queries, an ongoing research topic at both start-ups and search engine companies. We implement Thistle with several well-known algorithms, and benchmark results on the MS MARCO dataset. Results help clarify the latent knowledge domain as well as the growing Rust ML ecosystem. 我们推出 Thistle，一个功能齐全的矢量数据库。 Thistle 进入了回答搜索查询时使用潜在知识的领域，这是初创企业和搜索引擎公司正在进行的研究主题。我们使用几种著名的算法来实现 Thistle，并在 MS MARCO 数据集上对结果进行基准测试。结果有助于阐明潜在知识领域以及不断发展的 Rust ML 生态系统。 本文介绍了Thistle，一个用Rust实现的完整向量数据库，旨在利用潜在知识改进搜索查询回答。 Brad Windsor,Kevin Choi cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Nazmus Sakib,G. M. Shahariar,Md. Mohsinul Kabir,Md. Kamrul Hasan,Hasan Mahmud
title: Assorted, Archetypal and Annotated Two Million (3A2M) Cooking Recipes Dataset based on Active Learning
title_zh: 基于主动学习的分类、原型和注释的两百万 (3A2M) 烹饪食谱数据集
comment: ef:International Conference on Machine Intelligence and Emerging Technologies. MIET 2022. Lecture Notes of the Institute for Computer Sciences, Social Informatics and Telecommunications Engineering, vol 491, pp 188-203, Springer, Cham
comments: ef:International Conference on Machine Intelligence and Emerging Technologies. MIET 2022. Lecture Notes of the Institute for Computer Sciences, Social Informatics and Telecommunications Engineering, vol 491, pp 188-203, Springer, Cham
abstract: Cooking recipes allow individuals to exchange culinary ideas and provide food preparation instructions. Due to a lack of adequate labeled data, categorizing raw recipes found online to the appropriate food genres is a challenging task in this domain. Utilizing the knowledge of domain experts to categorize recipes could be a solution. In this study, we present a novel dataset of two million culinary recipes labeled in respective categories leveraging the knowledge of food experts and an active learning technique. To construct the dataset, we collect the recipes from the RecipeNLG dataset. Then, we employ three human experts whose trustworthiness score is higher than 86.667% to categorize 300K recipe by their Named Entity Recognition (NER) and assign it to one of the nine categories: bakery, drinks, non-veg, vegetables, fast food, cereals, meals, sides and fusion. Finally, we categorize the remaining 1900K recipes using Active Learning method with a blend of Query-by-Committee and Human In The Loop (HITL) approaches. There are more than two million recipes in our dataset, each of which is categorized and has a confidence score linked with it. For the 9 genres, the Fleiss Kappa score of this massive dataset is roughly 0.56026. We believe that the research community can use this dataset to perform various machine learning tasks such as recipe genre classification, recipe generation of a specific genre, new recipe creation, etc. The dataset can also be used to train and evaluate the performance of various NLP tasks such as named entity recognition, part-of-speech tagging, semantic role labeling, and so on. The dataset will be available upon publication: https://tinyurl.com/3zu4778y.

The dataset will be available upon publication: https://tinyurl.com/3zu4778y.
abstract_zh: 烹饪食谱允许个人交流烹饪想法并提供食物准备说明。由于缺乏足够的标记数据，将在线找到的原始食谱分类为适当的食物类型是该领域的一项具有挑战性的任务。利用领域专家的知识对食谱进行分类可能是一个解决方案。在这项研究中，我们利用食品专家的知识和主动学习技术，提出了一个包含 200 万个烹饪食谱的新颖数据集，这些食谱按各自的类别进行标记。为了构建数据集，我们从 RecipeNLG 数据集中收集食谱。然后，我们聘请三位可信度得分高于 86.667% 的人类专家，通过命名实体识别 (NER) 对 300K 食谱进行分类，并将其分配到九个类别之一：面包店、饮料、非蔬菜、蔬菜、快餐、谷物、膳食、配菜和融合。最后，我们使用主动学习方法结合委员会查询和人在循环 (HITL) 方法对剩余的 1900K 食谱进行分类。我们的数据集中有超过 200 万个食谱，每个食谱都经过分类并具有与其关联的置信度得分。对于 9 个流派，这个海量数据集的 Fleiss Kappa 分数大约为 0.56026。我们相信研究界可以使用该数据集来执行各种机器学习任务，例如菜谱流派分类、特定流派的菜谱生成、新菜谱创建等。该数据集还可以用于训练和评估各种 NLP 任务的性能，例如命名实体识别、词性标注、语义角色标记等。该数据集将在发布后提供：https://tinyurl.com/3zu4778y。

AI.tldr: 构建包含两百万条烹饪食谱的标注数据集，利用专家知识与主动学习技术进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有网络食谱缺乏足够的标注数据，导致难以准确分类到对应菜系，需借助领域专家知识解决此问题。
AI.method: 从RecipeNLG数据集收集食谱，邀请三位可信度超86.667%的专家对30万条食谱进行命名实体识别并分配至九类；剩余190万条采用主动学习结合Query-by-Committee和HITL方法分类，每条食谱附带置信度评分。
AI.result: 生成包含两百万条食谱的3A2M数据集，九类菜系的Fleiss Kappa评分为0.56026，可用于食谱分类、生成及多项NLP任务训练与评估。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为机器学习和自然语言处理任务提供了丰富资源，支持食谱分类、新菜谱生成等研究，后续将公开获取链接。

authors_text: Leo Sampaio Ferraz Ribeiro,Moacir Antonelli Ponti
title: Sketch-an-Anchor: Sub-epoch Fast Model Adaptation for Zero-shot Sketch-based Image Retrieval
title_zh: Sketch-an-Anchor：基于零样本草图的图像检索的亚纪元快速模型自适应
abstract: Sketch-an-Anchor is a novel method to train state-of-the-art Zero-shot Sketch-based Image Retrieval (ZSSBIR) models in under an epoch. Most studies break down the problem of ZSSBIR into two parts: domain alignment between images and sketches, inherited from SBIR, and generalization to unseen data, inherent to the zero-shot protocol. We argue one of these problems can be considerably simplified and re-frame the ZSSBIR problem around the already-stellar yet underexplored Zero-shot Image-based Retrieval performance of off-the-shelf models. Our fast-converging model keeps the single-domain performance while learning to extract similar representations from sketches. To this end we introduce our Semantic Anchors -- guiding embeddings learned from word-based semantic spaces and features from off-the-shelf models -- and combine them with our novel Anchored Contrastive Loss. Empirical evidence shows we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on all benchmark datasets while training for 100x less iterations than other methods.
summary: Sketch-an-Anchor is a novel method to train state-of-the-art Zero-shot Sketch-based Image Retrieval (ZSSBIR) models in under an epoch. Most studies break down the problem of ZSSBIR into two parts: domain alignment between images and sketches, inherited from SBIR, and generalization to unseen data, inherent to the zero-shot protocol. We argue one of these problems can be considerably simplified and re-frame the ZSSBIR problem around the already-stellar yet underexplored Zero-shot Image-based Retrieval performance of off-the-shelf models. Our fast-converging model keeps the single-domain performance while learning to extract similar representations from sketches. To this end we introduce our Semantic Anchors -- guiding embeddings learned from word-based semantic spaces and features from off-the-shelf models -- and combine them with our novel Anchored Contrastive Loss. Empirical evidence shows we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on all benchmark datasets while training for 100x less iterations than other methods.
abstract_zh: Sketch-an-Anchor 是一种在一个时期内训练最先进的基于零样本草图的图像检索（ZSSBIR）模型的新颖方法。大多数研究将 ZSSBIR 的问题分解为两部分：图像和草图之间的域对齐（继承自 SBIR），以及对零样本协议固有的未见数据的泛化。我们认为其中一个问题可以大大简化，并围绕现成模型的已经很出色但尚未充分开发的基于零样本图像的检索性能重新构建 ZSSBIR 问题。我们的快速收敛模型保持单域性能，同时学习从草图中提取相似的表示。为此，我们介绍了语义锚——指导从基于单词的语义空间学习的嵌入和现成模型的特征——并将它们与我们新颖的锚定对比损失相结合。经验证据表明，我们可以在所有基准数据集上实现最先进的性能，同时训练迭代次数比其他方法少 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sketch-an-Anchor的快速模型适应方法，用于在少于一个训练周期内实现零样本草图到图像检索（ZSSBIR）的最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将ZSSBIR问题拆分为领域对齐和零样本泛化两部分，但作者认为可通过利用现成模型的零样本图像检索能力简化问题，并减少训练迭代次数。
AI.method: 引入语义锚点（从词向量空间和现成模型特征中学习的嵌入）与锚定对比损失函数，同时保持单领域性能并学习草图相似表示。
AI.result: 在所有基准数据集上达到最先进性能，训练迭代次数仅为其他方法的1/100。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化问题框架和高效训练策略，为零样本草图检索提供了快速且有效的解决方案。

Empirical evidence shows we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on all benchmark datasets while training for 100x less iterations than other methods. Sketch-an-Anchor 是一种在一个时期内训练最先进的基于零样本草图的图像检索（ZSSBIR）模型的新颖方法。大多数研究将 ZSSBIR 的问题分解为两部分：图像和草图之间的域对齐（继承自 SBIR），以及对零样本协议固有的未见数据的泛化。我们认为其中一个问题可以大大简化，并围绕现成模型的已经很出色但尚未充分开发的基于零样本图像的检索性能重新构建 ZSSBIR 问题。我们的快速收敛模型保持单域性能，同时学习从草图中提取相似的表示。为此，我们介绍了语义锚——指导从基于单词的语义空间学习的嵌入和现成模型的特征——并将它们与我们新颖的锚定对比损失相结合。经验证据表明，我们可以在所有基准数据集上实现最先进的性能，同时训练迭代次数比其他方法少 100 倍。 本文提出了一种名为Sketch-an-Anchor的快速模型适应方法，用于在少于一个训练周期内实现零样本草图到图像检索（ZSSBIR）的最先进性能。 Leo Sampaio Ferraz Ribeiro,Moacir Antonelli Ponti cs.CV

authors_text: Yongmin Yoo,Cheonkam Jeong,Sanguk Gim,Junwon Lee,Zachary Schimke,Deaho Seo
title: A Novel Patent Similarity Measurement Methodology: Semantic Distance and Technological Distance
title_zh: 一种新颖的专利相似度测量方法：语义距离和技术距离
abstract: Patent similarity analysis plays a crucial role in evaluating the risk of patent infringement. Nonetheless, this analysis is predominantly conducted manually by legal experts, often resulting in a time-consuming process. Recent advances in natural language processing technology offer a promising avenue for automating this process. However, methods for measuring similarity between patents still rely on experts manually classifying patents. Due to the recent development of artificial intelligence technology, a lot of research is being conducted focusing on the semantic similarity of patents using natural language processing technology. However, it is difficult to accurately analyze patent data, which are legal documents representing complex technologies, using existing natural language processing technologies. To address these limitations, we propose a hybrid methodology that takes into account bibliographic similarity, measures the similarity between patents by considering the semantic similarity of patents, the technical similarity between patents, and the bibliographic information of patents. Using natural language processing techniques, we measure semantic similarity based on patent text and calculate technical similarity through the degree of coexistence of International patent classification (IPC) codes. The similarity of bibliographic information of a patent is calculated using the special characteristics of the patent: citation information, inventor information, and assignee information. We propose a model that assigns reasonable weights to each similarity method considered. With the help of experts, we performed manual similarity evaluations on 420 pairs and evaluated the performance of our model based on this data. We have empirically shown that our method outperforms recent natural language processing techniques.
summary: Patent similarity analysis plays a crucial role in evaluating the risk of patent infringement. Nonetheless, this analysis is predominantly conducted manually by legal experts, often resulting in a time-consuming process. Recent advances in natural language processing technology offer a promising avenue for automating this process. However, methods for measuring similarity between patents still rely on experts manually classifying patents. Due to the recent development of artificial intelligence technology, a lot of research is being conducted focusing on the semantic similarity of patents using natural language processing technology. However, it is difficult to accurately analyze patent data, which are legal documents representing complex technologies, using existing natural language processing technologies. To address these limitations, we propose a hybrid methodology that takes into account bibliographic similarity, measures the similarity between patents by considering the semantic similarity of patents, the technical similarity between patents, and the bibliographic information of patents. Using natural language processing techniques, we measure semantic similarity based on patent text and calculate technical similarity through the degree of coexistence of International patent classification (IPC) codes. The similarity of bibliographic information of a patent is calculated using the special characteristics of the patent: citation information, inventor information, and assignee information. We propose a model that assigns reasonable weights to each similarity method considered. With the help of experts, we performed manual similarity evaluations on 420 pairs and evaluated the performance of our model based on this data. We have empirically shown that our method outperforms recent natural language processing techniques.
abstract_zh: 专利相似性分析对于评估专利侵权风险起着至关重要的作用。尽管如此，这种分析主要由法律专家手动进行，通常会导致一个耗时的过程。自然语言处理技术的最新进展为自动化这一过程提供了一条有希望的途径。然而，衡量专利之间相似性的方法仍然依赖于专家对专利进行手动分类。近年来，随着人工智能技术的发展，人们正在利用自然语言处理技术来研究专利的语义相似度。然而，专利数据是代表复杂技术的法律文件，利用现有的自然语言处理技术很难准确地分析专利数据。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种考虑书目相似性的混合方法，通过考虑专利的语义相似性、专利之间的技术相似性和专利的书目信息来衡量专利之间的相似性。我们利用自然语言处理技术，根据专利文本测量语义相似度，并通过国际专利分类（IPC）代码的共存程度计算技术相似度。专利着录信息的相似度是利用专利的特殊特征来计算的：引文信息、发明人信息和受让人信息。我们提出了一个模型，为所考虑的每种相似性方法分配合理的权重。在专家的帮助下，我们对 420 对进行了手动相似度评估，并根据这些数据评估了我们模型的性能。我们的经验表明，我们的方法优于最近的自然语言处理技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语义距离和技术距离的专利相似性测量方法，旨在提高专利侵权风险评估的自动化水平。
AI.motivation: 目前专利相似性分析主要依赖法律专家手动完成，效率低下，而现有自然语言处理技术难以准确分析复杂技术内容的专利数据。
AI.method: 该方法综合考虑了专利的语义相似性（基于自然语言处理技术）、技术相似性（基于IPC代码共现程度）以及文献信息相似性（基于引用信息、发明人信息和受让人信息），并为每种相似性方法分配合理的权重。
AI.result: 通过420对专利的人工相似性评估数据，实证表明该方法优于近期自然语言处理技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的混合方法在专利相似性测量中表现出色，为自动化专利侵权风险评估提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Jimmi Agerskov,Kristian Nielsen,Christian Marius Lillelund,Christian Fischer Pedersen
title: Computationally Efficient Labeling of Cancer Related Forum Posts by Non-Clinical Text Information Retrieval
title_zh: 通过非临床文本信息检索对癌症相关论坛帖子进行计算高效标记
abstract: An abundance of information about cancer exists online, but categorizing and extracting useful information from it is difficult. Almost all research within healthcare data processing is concerned with formal clinical data, but there is valuable information in non-clinical data too. The present study combines methods within distributed computing, text retrieval, clustering, and classification into a coherent and computationally efficient system, that can clarify cancer patient trajectories based on non-clinical and freely available information. We produce a fully-functional prototype that can retrieve, cluster and present information about cancer trajectories from non-clinical forum posts. We evaluate three clustering algorithms (MR-DBSCAN, DBSCAN, and HDBSCAN) and compare them in terms of Adjusted Rand Index and total run time as a function of the number of posts retrieved and the neighborhood radius. Clustering results show that neighborhood radius has the most significant impact on clustering performance. For small values, the data set is split accordingly, but high values produce a large number of possible partitions and searching for the best partition is hereby time-consuming. With a proper estimated radius, MR-DBSCAN can cluster 50000 forum posts in 46.1 seconds, compared to DBSCAN (143.4) and HDBSCAN (282.3). We conduct an interview with the Danish Cancer Society and present our software prototype. The organization sees a potential in software that can democratize online information about cancer and foresee that such systems will be required in the future.

Almost all research within healthcare data processing is concerned with formal clinical data, but there is valuable information in non-clinical data too. Clustering results show that neighborhood radius has the most significant impact on clustering performance. For small values, the data set is split accordingly, but high values produce a large number of possible partitions and searching for the best partition is hereby time-consuming. With a proper estimated radius, MR-DBSCAN can cluster 50000 forum posts in 46.1 seconds, compared to DBSCAN (143.4) and HDBSCAN (282.3). abstract_zh: 网上存在大量有关癌症的信息，但从中分类和提取有用信息很困难。医疗数据处理中的几乎所有研究都涉及正式的临床数据，但非临床数据中也存在有价值的信息。本研究将分布式计算、文本检索、聚类和分类中的方法结合到一个连贯且计算高效的系统中，该系统可以根据非临床和免费提供的信息阐明癌症患者的轨迹。我们制作了一个功能齐全的原型，可以从非临床论坛帖子中检索、聚类和呈现有关癌症轨迹的信息。我们评估了三种聚类算法（MR-DBSCAN、DBSCAN 和 HDBSCAN），并根据调整兰德指数和总运行时间（作为检索的帖子数量和邻域半径的​​函数）对它们进行比较。聚类结果表明，邻域半径对聚类性能的影响最为显着。对于较小的值，数据集会相应地进行分割，但较高的值会产生大量可能的分区，因此搜索最佳分区非常耗时。与 DBSCAN (143.4) 和 HDBSCAN (282.3) 相比，在适当的估计半径下，MR-DBSCAN 可以在 46.1 秒内聚类 50000 个论坛帖子。我们对丹麦癌症协会进行了采访并展示了我们的软件原型。该组织看到了可以使有关癌症的在线信息民主化的软件的潜力，并预见未来将需要此类系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非临床文本信息检索的计算高效系统，用于标记癌症相关论坛帖子并分析患者轨迹。
AI.motivation: 尽管网络上存在大量癌症信息，但现有研究主要关注临床数据，忽视了非临床数据中的潜在价值。需开发工具从非结构化论坛数据中提取有用信息。
AI.method: 整合分布式计算、文本检索、聚类与分类技术，构建原型系统。对比MR-DBSCAN、DBSCAN和HDBSCAN三种聚类算法的性能（调整兰德指数与运行时间）。
AI.result: MR-DBSCAN在50000条帖子处理速度达46.1秒，显著优于其他算法；邻域半径对聚类效果影响最大。丹麦癌症协会认可该原型的实用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 系统验证了非临床数据在癌症轨迹分析中的可行性，MR-DBSCAN在效率与效果上表现最优，未来可推动癌症信息民主化应用。
