The organization sees a potential in software that can democratize online information about cancer and foresee that such systems will be required in the future. 网上存在大量有关癌症的信息，但从中分类和提取有用信息很困难。医疗数据处理中的几乎所有研究都涉及正式的临床数据，但非临床数据中也存在有价值的信息。本研究将分布式计算、文本检索、聚类和分类中的方法结合到一个连贯且计算高效的系统中，该系统可以根据非临床和免费提供的信息阐明癌症患者的轨迹。我们制作了一个功能齐全的原型，可以从非临床论坛帖子中检索、聚类和呈现有关癌症轨迹的信息。我们评估了三种聚类算法（MR-DBSCAN、DBSCAN 和 HDBSCAN），并根据调整兰德指数和总运行时间（作为检索的帖子数量和邻域半径的​​函数）对它们进行比较。聚类结果表明，邻域半径对聚类性能的影响最为显着。对于较小的值，数据集会相应地进行分割，但较高的值会产生大量可能的分区，因此搜索最佳分区非常耗时。与 DBSCAN (143.4) 和 HDBSCAN (282.3) 相比，在适当的估计半径下，MR-DBSCAN 可以在 46.1 秒内聚类 50000 个论坛帖子。我们对丹麦癌症协会进行了采访并展示了我们的软件原型。该组织看到了可以使有关癌症的在线信息民主化的软件的潜力，并预见未来将需要此类系统。 本文提出一种基于非临床文本信息检索的计算高效系统，用于标记癌症相关论坛帖子并分析患者轨迹。 Jimmi Agerskov,Kristian Nielsen,Christian Marius Lillelund,Christian Fischer Pedersen cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Qian Wang,Biao Zhang,Michael Birsak,Peter Wonka
title: MDP: A Generalized Framework for Text-Guided Image Editing by Manipulating the Diffusion Path
title_zh: MDP：通过操纵扩散路径进行文本引导图像编辑的通用框架
abstract: Image generation using diffusion can be controlled in multiple ways. In this paper, we systematically analyze the equations of modern generative diffusion networks to propose a framework, called MDP, that explains the design space of suitable manipulations. We identify 5 different manipulations, including intermediate latent, conditional embedding, cross attention maps, guidance, and predicted noise. We analyze the corresponding parameters of these manipulations and the manipulation schedule. We show that some previous editing methods fit nicely into our framework. Particularly, we identified one specific configuration as a new type of control by manipulating the predicted noise, which can perform higher-quality edits than previous work for a variety of local and global edits.
summary: Image generation using diffusion can be controlled in multiple ways. In this paper, we systematically analyze the equations of modern generative diffusion networks to propose a framework, called MDP, that explains the design space of suitable manipulations. We identify 5 different manipulations, including intermediate latent, conditional embedding, cross attention maps, guidance, and predicted noise. We analyze the corresponding parameters of these manipulations and the manipulation schedule. We show that some previous editing methods fit nicely into our framework. Particularly, we identified one specific configuration as a new type of control by manipulating the predicted noise, which can perform higher-quality edits than previous work for a variety of local and global edits.
abstract_zh: 使用扩散的图像生成可以通过多种方式控制。在本文中，我们系统地分析了现代生成扩散网络的方程，提出了一个称为 MDP 的框架，它解释了适当操作的设计空间。我们确定了 5 种不同的操作，包括中间潜在、条件嵌入、交叉注意力图、引导和预测噪声。我们分析了这些操纵的相应参数和操纵时间表。我们展示了一些以前的编辑方法非常适合我们的框架。特别是，我们通过操纵预测的噪声将一种特定配置确定为一种新型控制，与之前的各种本地和全局编辑工作相比，它可以执行更高质量的编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MDP的通用框架，通过操控扩散路径实现文本引导的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现代生成扩散网络的设计空间缺乏系统性分析，现有编辑方法难以统一解释且效果有限。
AI.method: 通过分析扩散网络方程，提出5种操控方式（中间潜在变量、条件嵌入、交叉注意力图、引导和预测噪声），并研究其参数与时间安排。
AI.result: 验证了先前方法的兼容性，提出基于预测噪声操控的新控制方式，在局部和全局编辑任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MDP框架为文本引导图像编辑提供了理论解释和实践工具，尤其通过预测噪声操控实现了更高质量的编辑效果。

authors_text: Chenyang Lyu,Manh-Duy Nguyen,Van-Tu Ninh,Liting Zhou,Cathal Gurrin,Jennifer Foster
title: Dialogue-to-Video Retrieval
title_zh: 对话到视频检索
abstract: Recent years have witnessed an increasing amount of dialogue/conversation on the web especially on social media. That inspires the development of dialogue-based retrieval, in which retrieving videos based on dialogue is of increasing interest for recommendation systems. Different from other video retrieval tasks, dialogue-to-video retrieval uses structured queries in the form of user-generated dialogue as the search descriptor. We present a novel dialogue-to-video retrieval system, incorporating structured conversational information. Experiments conducted on the AVSD dataset show that our proposed approach using plain-text queries improves over the previous counterpart model by 15.8% on R@1. Furthermore, our approach using dialogue as a query, improves retrieval performance by 4.2%, 6.2%, 8.6% on R@1, R@5 and R@10 and outperforms the state-of-the-art model by 0.7%, 3.6% and 6.0% on R@1, R@5 and R@10 respectively.
summary: Recent years have witnessed an increasing amount of dialogue/conversation on the web especially on social media. That inspires the development of dialogue-based retrieval, in which retrieving videos based on dialogue is of increasing interest for recommendation systems. Different from other video retrieval tasks, dialogue-to-video retrieval uses structured queries in the form of user-generated dialogue as the search descriptor. We present a novel dialogue-to-video retrieval system, incorporating structured conversational information. Experiments conducted on the AVSD dataset show that our proposed approach using plain-text queries improves over the previous counterpart model by 15.8% on R@1. Furthermore, our approach using dialogue as a query, improves retrieval performance by 4.2%, 6.2%, 8.6% on R@1, R@5 and R@10 and outperforms the state-of-the-art model by 0.7%, 3.6% and 6.0% on R@1, R@5 and R@10 respectively.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络上尤其是社交媒体上的对话/对话数量不断增加。这激发了基于对话的检索的发展，其中基于对话检索视频越来越受到推荐系统的关注。与其他视频检索任务不同，对话到视频检索使用用户生成的对话形式的结构化查询作为搜索描述符。我们提出了一种新颖的对话到视频检索系统，其中包含结构化对话信息。在 AVSD 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们提出的使用纯文本查询的方法在 R@1 上比之前的对应模型提高了 15.8%。此外，我们使用对话作为查询的方法将 R@1、R@5 和 R@10 的检索性能提高了 4.2%、6.2%、8.6%，并且在 R@1、R@5 和 R@10 上分别比最先进的模型高 0.7%、3.6% 和 6.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对话的视频检索系统，利用结构化对话信息提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体上对话内容的激增，基于对话的视频检索成为推荐系统的重要需求，但现有方法尚未充分利用结构化对话信息。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型对话到视频检索框架，通过整合对话中的结构化信息优化查询表示。
AI.result: 在AVSD数据集上，纯文本查询方法R@1提升15.8%，对话查询方法在R@1/R@5/R@10分别超越现有最佳模型0.7%/3.6%/6.0%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化对话信息有效提升了视频检索性能，证明了对话驱动检索方法的优越性。

authors_text: Amirhossein Mohammadi,Sara Hajiaghajani,Mohammad Bahrani
title: ACO-tagger: A Novel Method for Part-of-Speech Tagging using Ant Colony Optimization
title_zh: ACO-tagger：一种使用蚁群优化进行词性标注的新方法
abstract: Swarm Intelligence algorithms have gained significant attention in recent years as a means of solving complex and non-deterministic problems. These algorithms are inspired by the collective behavior of natural creatures, and they simulate this behavior to develop intelligent agents for computational tasks. One such algorithm is Ant Colony Optimization (ACO), which is inspired by the foraging behavior of ants and their pheromone laying mechanism. ACO is used for solving difficult problems that are discrete and combinatorial in nature. Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging is a fundamental task in natural language processing that aims to assign a part-of-speech role to each word in a sentence. In this research paper, proposed a high-performance POS-tagging method based on ACO called ACO-tagger. This method achieved a high accuracy rate of 96.867%, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods. The proposed method is fast and efficient, making it a viable option for practical applications.
summary: Swarm Intelligence algorithms have gained significant attention in recent years as a means of solving complex and non-deterministic problems. These algorithms are inspired by the collective behavior of natural creatures, and they simulate this behavior to develop intelligent agents for computational tasks. One such algorithm is Ant Colony Optimization (ACO), which is inspired by the foraging behavior of ants and their pheromone laying mechanism. ACO is used for solving difficult problems that are discrete and combinatorial in nature. Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging is a fundamental task in natural language processing that aims to assign a part-of-speech role to each word in a sentence. In this research paper, proposed a high-performance POS-tagging method based on ACO called ACO-tagger. This method achieved a high accuracy rate of 96.867%, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods. The proposed method is fast and efficient, making it a viable option for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，群体智能算法作为解决复杂和非确定性问题的一种手段而受到广泛关注。这些算法的灵感来自于自然生物的集体行为，它们模拟这种行为来开发用于计算任务的智能代理。其中一种算法是蚁群优化（ACO），它的灵感来自于蚂蚁的觅食行为及其信息素铺设机制。 ACO 用于解决本质上离散和组合的难题。词性（POS）标记是自然语言处理中的一项基本任务，旨在为句子中的每个单词分配词性角色。在这篇研究论文中，提出了一种基于 ACO 的高性能 POS 标记方法，称为 ACO-tagger。该方法的准确率高达 96.867%，优于几种最先进的方法。所提出的方法快速有效，使其成为实际应用的可行选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于蚁群优化算法（ACO）的新型词性标注方法ACO-tagger，旨在提高自然语言处理中词性标注任务的准确率和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统词性标注方法在处理复杂和非确定性问题时存在局限性，而蚁群优化算法（ACO）在解决离散组合问题方面表现出色，因此本文尝试将ACO应用于词性标注任务。
AI.method: 通过模拟蚂蚁的觅食行为和信息素机制，设计ACO-tagger算法，利用信息素更新和路径选择策略优化词性标注过程。
AI.result: ACO-tagger在测试中达到96.867%的准确率，优于现有先进方法，且具有快速高效的特点，适用于实际应用。
AI.conclusion: ACO-tagger在词性标注任务中展现出高准确率和效率，为自然语言处理领域提供了新的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: ACO-tagger: A Novel Method for Part-of-Speech Tagging using Ant Colony Optimization ACO-tagger：一种使用蚁群优化进行词性标注的新方法 Swarm Intelligence algorithms have gained significant attention in recent years as a means of solving complex and non-deterministic problems. These algorithms are inspired by the collective behavior of natural creatures, and they simulate this behavior to develop intelligent agents for computational tasks. One such algorithm is Ant Colony Optimization (ACO), which is inspired by the foraging behavior of ants and their pheromone laying mechanism. ACO is used for solving difficult problems that are discrete and combinatorial in nature. Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging is a fundamental task in natural language processing that aims to assign a part-of-speech role to each word in a sentence. In this research paper, proposed a high-performance POS-tagging method based on ACO called ACO-tagger. This method achieved a high accuracy rate of 96.867%, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods. The proposed method is fast and efficient, making it a viable option for practical applications. 近年来，群体智能算法作为解决复杂和非确定性问题的一种手段而受到广泛关注。这些算法的灵感来自于自然生物的集体行为，它们模拟这种行为来开发用于计算任务的智能代理。其中一种算法是蚁群优化（ACO），它的灵感来自于蚂蚁的觅食行为及其信息素铺设机制。 ACO 用于解决本质上离散和组合的难题。词性（POS）标记是自然语言处理中的一项基本任务，旨在为句子中的每个单词分配词性角色。在这篇研究论文中，提出了一种基于 ACO 的高性能 POS 标记方法，称为 ACO-tagger。该方法的准确率高达 96.867%，优于几种最先进的方法。所提出的方法快速有效，使其成为实际应用的可行选择。 本文提出了一种基于蚁群优化算法（ACO）的新型词性标注方法ACO-tagger，旨在提高自然语言处理中词性标注任务的准确率和效率。 Amirhossein Mohammadi,Sara Hajiaghajani,Mohammad Bahrani cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Shaohui Liu,Xien Liu,Ji Wu
title: How can Deep Learning Retrieve the Write-Missing Additional Diagnosis from Chinese Electronic Medical Record For DRG
title_zh: 深度学习如何从中国电子病历中检索 DRG 缺失的附加诊断
abstract: The purpose of write-missing diagnosis detection is to find diseases that have been clearly diagnosed from medical records but are missed in the discharge diagnosis. Unlike the definition of missed diagnosis, the write-missing diagnosis is clearly manifested in the medical record without further reasoning. The write-missing diagnosis is a common problem, often caused by physician negligence. The write-missing diagnosis will result in an incomplete diagnosis of medical records. While under DRG grouping, the write-missing diagnoses will miss important additional diagnoses (CC, MCC), thus affecting the correct rate of DRG enrollment. Under the circumstance that countries generally start to adopt DRG enrollment and payment, the problem of write-missing diagnosis is a common and serious problem. The current manual-based method is expensive due to the complex content of the full medical record. We think this problem is suitable to be solved as natural language processing. But to the best of our knowledge, no researchers have conducted research on this problem based on natural language processing methods. We propose a framework for solving the problem of write-missing diagnosis, which mainly includes three modules: disease recall module, disease context logic judgment module, and disease relationship comparison module. Through this framework, we verify that the problem of write-missing diagnosis can be solved well, and the results are interpretable. At the same time, we propose advanced solutions for the disease context logic judgment module and disease relationship comparison module, which have obvious advantages compared with the mainstream methods of the same type of problems. Finally, we verified the value of our proposed framework under DRG medical insurance payment in a tertiary hospital.

Finally, we verified the value of our proposed framework under DRG medical insurance payment in a tertiary hospital.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的框架，用于从中文电子病历中检索未写入的额外诊断，以提高DRG分组准确性。
AI.motivation: 未写入诊断会导致DRG分组错误，且人工审核成本高；现有研究未针对此问题应用自然语言处理技术。
AI.method: 构建包含疾病召回模块、疾病上下文逻辑判断模块和疾病关系比较模块的三阶段框架，并优化后两者方法。
AI.result: 验证了框架的有效性和可解释性，改进模块在性能上优于同类主流方法，且在三级医院DRG支付场景中具有应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效解决未写入诊断问题，为DRG医保支付提供技术支持，具有临床实践意义。

authors_text: Jiayi Yuan,Ruixiang Tang,Xiaoqian Jiang,Xia Hu
title: Large Language Models for Healthcare Data Augmentation: An Example on Patient-Trial Matching
title_zh: 用于医疗数据增强的大型语言模型：患者试验匹配的示例
abstract: The process of matching patients with suitable clinical trials is essential for advancing medical research and providing optimal care. However, current approaches face challenges such as data standardization, ethical considerations, and a lack of interoperability between Electronic Health Records (EHRs) and clinical trial criteria. In this paper, we explore the potential of large language models (LLMs) to address these challenges by leveraging their advanced natural language generation capabilities to improve compatibility between EHRs and clinical trial descriptions. We propose an innovative privacy-aware data augmentation approach for LLM-based patient-trial matching (LLM-PTM), which balances the benefits of LLMs while ensuring the security and confidentiality of sensitive patient data. Our experiments demonstrate a 7.32% average improvement in performance using the proposed LLM-PTM method, and the generalizability to new data is improved by 12.12%. Additionally, we present case studies to further illustrate the effectiveness of our approach and provide a deeper understanding of its underlying principles.
summary: The process of matching patients with suitable clinical trials is essential for advancing medical research and providing optimal care. However, current approaches face challenges such as data standardization, ethical considerations, and a lack of interoperability between Electronic Health Records (EHRs) and clinical trial criteria. In this paper, we explore the potential of large language models (LLMs) to address these challenges by leveraging their advanced natural language generation capabilities to improve compatibility between EHRs and clinical trial descriptions. We propose an innovative privacy-aware data augmentation approach for LLM-based patient-trial matching (LLM-PTM), which balances the benefits of LLMs while ensuring the security and confidentiality of sensitive patient data. Our experiments demonstrate a 7.32% average improvement in performance using the proposed LLM-PTM method, and the generalizability to new data is improved by 12.12%. Additionally, we present case studies to further illustrate the effectiveness of our approach and provide a deeper understanding of its underlying principles.
abstract_zh: 将患者与合适的临床试验相匹配的过程对于推进医学研究和提供最佳护理至关重要。然而，当前的方法面临着数据标准化、伦理考虑以及电子健康记录 (EHR) 和临床试验标准之间缺乏互操作性等挑战。在本文中，我们探索大语言模型 (LLM) 解决这些挑战的潜力，利用其先进的自然语言生成功能来提高 EHR 和临床试验描述之间的兼容性。我们为基于法学硕士的患者试验匹配（LLM-PTM）提出了一种创新的隐私意识数据增强方法，该方法平衡了法学硕士的优势，同时确保敏感患者数据的安全性和机密性。我们的实验表明，使用所提出的 LLM-PTM 方法，性能平均提高了 7.32%，并且对新数据的泛化能力提高了 12.12%。此外，我们还提供案例研究，以进一步说明我们方法的有效性，并提供对其基本原理的更深入理解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用大语言模型（LLMs）解决患者与临床试验匹配中的数据标准化、隐私保护及互操作性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有患者-试验匹配方法面临数据标准化困难、隐私风险及电子健康记录（EHR）与临床试验标准互操作性不足的挑战。
AI.method: 提出隐私感知的数据增强方法LLM-PTM，通过大语言模型生成兼容性数据，平衡模型效能与患者隐私保护。
AI.result: 实验显示LLM-PTM使性能平均提升7.32%，新数据泛化能力提高12.12%，案例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LLM-PTM为医疗数据应用提供了兼顾效率与隐私的新思路，推动临床研究与患者匹配的智能化发展。

We propose an innovative privacy-aware data augmentation approach for LLM-based patient-trial matching (LLM-PTM), which balances the benefits of LLMs while ensuring the security and confidentiality of sensitive patient data. Our experiments demonstrate a 7.32% average improvement in performance using the proposed LLM-PTM method, and the generalizability to new data is improved by 12.12%. Additionally, we present case studies to further illustrate the effectiveness of our approach and provide a deeper understanding of its underlying principles. 将患者与合适的临床试验相匹配的过程对于推进医学研究和提供最佳护理至关重要。然而，当前的方法面临着数据标准化、伦理考虑以及电子健康记录 (EHR) 和临床试验标准之间缺乏互操作性等挑战。在本文中，我们探索大语言模型 (LLM) 解决这些挑战的潜力，利用其先进的自然语言生成功能来提高 EHR 和临床试验描述之间的兼容性。我们为基于法学硕士的患者试验匹配（LLM-PTM）提出了一种创新的隐私意识数据增强方法，该方法平衡了法学硕士的优势，同时确保敏感患者数据的安全性和机密性。我们的实验表明，使用所提出的 LLM-PTM 方法，性能平均提高了 7.32%，并且对新数据的泛化能力提高了 12.12%。此外，我们还提供案例研究，以进一步说明我们方法的有效性，并提供对其基本原理的更深入理解。 本文探讨利用大语言模型（LLMs）解决患者与临床试验匹配中的数据标准化、隐私保护及互操作性问题。 Jiayi Yuan,Ruixiang Tang,Xiaoqian Jiang,Xia Hu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jérémy Scheurer,Jon Ander Campos,Tomasz Korbak,Jun Shern Chan,Angelica Chen,Kyunghyun Cho,Ethan Perez
title: Training Language Models with Language Feedback at Scale
title_zh: 使用大规模语言反馈训练语言模型
abstract: Pretrained language models often generate outputs that are not in line with human preferences, such as harmful text or factually incorrect summaries. Recent work approaches the above issues by learning from a simple form of human feedback: comparisons between pairs of model-generated outputs. However, comparison feedback only conveys limited information about human preferences. In this paper, we introduce Imitation learning from Language Feedback (ILF), a new approach that utilizes more informative language feedback. ILF consists of three steps that are applied iteratively: first, conditioning the language model on the input, an initial LM output, and feedback to generate refinements. Second, selecting the refinement incorporating the most feedback. Third, finetuning the language model to maximize the likelihood of the chosen refinement given the input. We show theoretically that ILF can be viewed as Bayesian Inference, similar to Reinforcement Learning from human feedback. We evaluate ILF's effectiveness on a carefully-controlled toy task and a realistic summarization task. Our experiments demonstrate that large language models accurately incorporate feedback and that finetuning with ILF scales well with the dataset size, even outperforming finetuning on human summaries. Learning from both language and comparison feedback outperforms learning from each alone, achieving human-level summarization performance.
summary: Pretrained language models often generate outputs that are not in line with human preferences, such as harmful text or factually incorrect summaries. Recent work approaches the above issues by learning from a simple form of human feedback: comparisons between pairs of model-generated outputs. However, comparison feedback only conveys limited information about human preferences. In this paper, we introduce Imitation learning from Language Feedback (ILF), a new approach that utilizes more informative language feedback. ILF consists of three steps that are applied iteratively: first, conditioning the language model on the input, an initial LM output, and feedback to generate refinements. Second, selecting the refinement incorporating the most feedback. Third, finetuning the language model to maximize the likelihood of the chosen refinement given the input. We show theoretically that ILF can be viewed as Bayesian Inference, similar to Reinforcement Learning from human feedback. We evaluate ILF's effectiveness on a carefully-controlled toy task and a realistic summarization task. Our experiments demonstrate that large language models accurately incorporate feedback and that finetuning with ILF scales well with the dataset size, even outperforming finetuning on human summaries. Learning from both language and comparison feedback outperforms learning from each alone, achieving human-level summarization performance.
abstract_zh: 预训练的语言模型通常会生成不符合人类偏好的输出，例如有害文本或事实上不正确的摘要。最近的工作通过学习人类反馈的简单形式来解决上述问题：模型生成的输出对之间的比较。然而，比较反馈仅传达有关人类偏好的有限信息。在本文中，我们介绍了语言反馈模仿学习（ILF），这是一种利用信息更丰富的语言反馈的新方法。 ILF 由迭代应用的三个步骤组成：首先，根据输入调节语言模型、初始 LM 输出以及反馈以生成细化。其次，选择包含最多反馈的细化。第三，微调语言模型，以最大化给定输入的所选细化的可能性。我们从理论上证明，ILF 可以被视为贝叶斯推理，类似于来自人类反馈的强化学习。我们评估 ILF 在仔细控制的玩具任务和现实总结任务上的有效性。我们的实验表明，大型语言模型可以准确地结合反馈，并且 ILF 的微调可以很好地适应数据集大小，甚至优于人工摘要的微调。从语言和比较反馈中学习的效果优于单独从语言和比较反馈中学习的效果，从而实现了人类水平的总结性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ILF的新方法，通过大规模语言反馈训练语言模型，以解决预训练模型生成内容与人类偏好不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类比较反馈的方法信息有限，难以有效指导模型生成符合人类偏好的输出，如有害文本或错误摘要。
AI.method: ILF包含三个迭代步骤：基于输入、初始输出和反馈生成改进结果；选择最符合反馈的改进；通过微调使模型最大化生成选定改进的概率。
AI.result: 实验表明，ILF在受控玩具任务和真实摘要任务中均有效，且微调效果随数据集规模提升，甚至优于直接微调人类摘要；结合语言与比较反馈可达到人类水平的摘要性能。
AI.conclusion: ILF通过语言反馈有效提升模型输出质量，且与比较反馈结合效果更佳，为大规模语言模型的人类偏好对齐提供了新思路。

authors_text: Irad Mwendo,Kinyua Gikunda,Anthony Maina
title: Deep transfer learning for detecting Covid-19, Pneumonia and Tuberculosis using CXR images -- A Review
title_zh: 使用 CXR 图像检测 Covid-19、肺炎和结核病的深度迁移学习——综述
abstract: Chest X-rays remains to be the most common imaging modality used to diagnose lung diseases. However, they necessitate the interpretation of experts (radiologists and pulmonologists), who are few. This review paper investigates the use of deep transfer learning techniques to detect COVID-19, pneumonia, and tuberculosis in chest X-ray (CXR) images. It provides an overview of current state-of-the-art CXR image classification techniques and discusses the challenges and opportunities in applying transfer learning to this domain. The paper provides a thorough examination of recent research studies that used deep transfer learning algorithms for COVID-19, pneumonia, and tuberculosis detection, highlighting the advantages and disadvantages of these approaches. Finally, the review paper discusses future research directions in the field of deep transfer learning for CXR image classification, as well as the potential for these techniques to aid in the diagnosis and treatment of lung diseases.
summary: Chest X-rays remains to be the most common imaging modality used to diagnose lung diseases. However, they necessitate the interpretation of experts (radiologists and pulmonologists), who are few. This review paper investigates the use of deep transfer learning techniques to detect COVID-19, pneumonia, and tuberculosis in chest X-ray (CXR) images. It provides an overview of current state-of-the-art CXR image classification techniques and discusses the challenges and opportunities in applying transfer learning to this domain. The paper provides a thorough examination of recent research studies that used deep transfer learning algorithms for COVID-19, pneumonia, and tuberculosis detection, highlighting the advantages and disadvantages of these approaches. Finally, the review paper discusses future research directions in the field of deep transfer learning for CXR image classification, as well as the potential for these techniques to aid in the diagnosis and treatment of lung diseases.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 光检查仍然是诊断肺部疾病最常用的成像方式。然而，它们需要专家（放射科医生和肺科医生）的解释，而专家很少。这篇综述论文研究了如何使用深度迁移学习技术来检测胸部 X 光 (CXR) 图像中的 COVID-19、肺炎和结核病。它概述了当前最先进的 CXR 图像分类技术，并讨论了将迁移学习应用于该领域的挑战和机遇。本文对最近使用深度迁移学习算法进行 COVID-19、肺炎和结核病检测的研究进行了全面审查，强调了这些方法的优点和缺点。最后，该综述讨论了 CXR 图像分类深度迁移学习领域的未来研究方向，以及这些技术辅助肺部疾病诊断和治疗的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了使用深度迁移学习技术通过胸部X光图像检测新冠、肺炎和结核病的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光诊断依赖专家资源，而专家数量有限，需通过自动化方法提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 系统回顾近期文献，分析迁移学习在CXR图像分类中的应用方法、挑战及技术优势。
AI.result: 总结了迁移学习在三种疾病检测中的效果，指出模型性能受数据集质量、预处理方式及算法选择影响。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习为肺部疾病诊断提供有效工具，但需解决数据不平衡、模型泛化性等问题以推动临床应用。

authors_text: Yuan Zhang,Chuanyi Li,Yu Sheng,Jidong Ge,Bin Luo
title: Judicial Intelligent Assistant System: Extracting Events from Divorce Cases to Detect Disputes for the Judge
title_zh: 司法智能辅助系统：提取离婚案件事件，为法官发现纠纷
abstract: In formal procedure of civil cases, the textual materials provided by different parties describe the development process of the cases. It is a difficult but necessary task to extract the key information for the cases from these textual materials and to clarify the dispute focus of related parties. Currently, officers read the materials manually and use methods, such as keyword searching and regular matching, to get the target information. These approaches are time-consuming and heavily depending on prior knowledge and carefulness of the officers. To assist the officers to enhance working efficiency and accuracy, we propose an approach to detect disputes from divorce cases based on a two-round-labeling event extracting technique in this paper. We implement the Judicial Intelligent Assistant (JIA) system according to the proposed approach to 1) automatically extract focus events from divorce case materials, 2) align events by identifying co-reference among them, and 3) detect conflicts among events brought by the plaintiff and the defendant. With the JIA system, it is convenient for judges to determine the disputed issues. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach and system can obtain the focus of cases and detect conflicts more effectively and efficiently comparing with existing method.
summary: In formal procedure of civil cases, the textual materials provided by different parties describe the development process of the cases. It is a difficult but necessary task to extract the key information for the cases from these textual materials and to clarify the dispute focus of related parties. Currently, officers read the materials manually and use methods, such as keyword searching and regular matching, to get the target information. These approaches are time-consuming and heavily depending on prior knowledge and carefulness of the officers. To assist the officers to enhance working efficiency and accuracy, we propose an approach to detect disputes from divorce cases based on a two-round-labeling event extracting technique in this paper. We implement the Judicial Intelligent Assistant (JIA) system according to the proposed approach to 1) automatically extract focus events from divorce case materials, 2) align events by identifying co-reference among them, and 3) detect conflicts among events brought by the plaintiff and the defendant. With the JIA system, it is convenient for judges to determine the disputed issues. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach and system can obtain the focus of cases and detect conflicts more effectively and efficiently comparing with existing method.
abstract_zh: 在民事案件的正式程序中，当事人提供的文字材料描述了案件的发展过程。从这些文本材料中提取案件的关键信息，厘清相关当事人的争议焦点，是一项艰巨但必要的任务。目前，工作人员通过人工阅读材料，通过关键词搜索、正则匹配等方式获取目标信息。这些方法非常耗时，并且在很大程度上取决于官员的先验知识和细心程度。为了帮助工作人员提高工作效率和准确性，本文提出了一种基于两轮标记事件提取技术的离婚案件纠纷检测方法。我们根据所提出的方法实施司法智能助理（JIA）系统：1）从离婚案件材料中自动提取焦点事件，2）通过识别事件之间的共同引用来对齐事件，3）检测原告和被告提出的事件之间的冲突。有了JIA系统，可以方便法官对争议问题进行认定。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法和系统能够更有效地获取案例的焦点并检测冲突。

AI.tldr: 本文提出司法智能辅助系统（JIA），通过两轮标注事件提取技术从离婚案件材料中自动提取焦点事件并检测争议，辅助法官确定案件争议点。
AI.motivation: 传统司法人员手动处理案件材料效率低且依赖经验，需自动化手段提升案件关键信息提取与争议检测的准确性与效率。
AI.method: 基于两轮标注事件提取技术，实现事件自动提取、共指识别与事件冲突检测，构建司法智能辅助系统（JIA）。
AI.result: 实验表明，JIA系统相较现有方法能更高效准确地提取案件焦点并检测冲突。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效辅助法官识别案件争议焦点，提升司法工作效率与准确性。

search_text: Judicial Intelligent Assistant System: Extracting Events from Divorce Cases to Detect Disputes for the Judge 司法智能辅助系统：提取离婚案件事件，为法官发现纠纷 In formal procedure of civil cases, the textual materials provided by different parties describe the development process of the cases. It is a difficult but necessary task to extract the key information for the cases from these textual materials and to clarify the dispute focus of related parties. Currently, officers read the materials manually and use methods, such as keyword searching and regular matching, to get the target information. These approaches are time-consuming and heavily depending on prior knowledge and carefulness of the officers. To assist the officers to enhance working efficiency and accuracy, we propose an approach to detect disputes from divorce cases based on a two-round-labeling event extracting technique in this paper. We implement the Judicial Intelligent Assistant (JIA) system according to the proposed approach to 1) automatically extract focus events from divorce case materials, 2) align events by identifying co-reference among them, and 3) detect conflicts among events brought by the plaintiff and the defendant. With the JIA system, it is convenient for judges to determine the disputed issues. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach and system can obtain the focus of cases and detect conflicts more effectively and efficiently comparing with existing method. 在民事案件的正式程序中，当事人提供的文字材料描述了案件的发展过程。从这些文本材料中提取案件的关键信息，厘清相关当事人的争议焦点，是一项艰巨但必要的任务。目前，工作人员通过人工阅读材料，通过关键词搜索、正则匹配等方式获取目标信息。这些方法非常耗时，并且在很大程度上取决于官员的先验知识和细心程度。为了帮助工作人员提高工作效率和准确性，本文提出了一种基于两轮标记事件提取技术的离婚案件纠纷检测方法。我们根据所提出的方法实施司法智能助理（JIA）系统：1）从离婚案件材料中自动提取焦点事件，2）通过识别事件之间的共同引用来对齐事件，3）检测原告和被告提出的事件之间的冲突。有了JIA系统，可以方便法官对争议问题进行认定。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法和系统能够更有效地获取案例的焦点并检测冲突。 本文提出司法智能辅助系统（JIA），通过两轮标注事件提取技术从离婚案件材料中自动提取焦点事件并检测争议，辅助法官确定案件争议点。 Yuan Zhang,Chuanyi Li,Yu Sheng,Jidong Ge,Bin Luo cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Angelica Chen,Jérémy Scheurer,Tomasz Korbak,Jon Ander Campos,Jun Shern Chan,Samuel R. Bowman,Kyunghyun Cho,Ethan Perez
title: Improving Code Generation by Training with Natural Language Feedback
title_zh: 通过自然语言反馈训练改进代码生成
abstract: The potential for pre-trained large language models (LLMs) to use natural language feedback at inference time has been an exciting recent development. We build upon this observation by formalizing an algorithm for learning from natural language feedback at training time instead, which we call Imitation learning from Language Feedback (ILF). ILF requires only a small amount of human-written feedback during training and does not require the same feedback at test time, making it both user-friendly and sample-efficient. We further show that ILF can be seen as a form of minimizing the KL divergence to the ground truth distribution and demonstrate a proof-of-concept on a neural program synthesis task. We use ILF to improve a Codegen-Mono 6.1B model's pass@1 rate by 38% relative (and 10% absolute) on the Mostly Basic Python Problems (MBPP) benchmark, outperforming both fine-tuning on MBPP and fine-tuning on repaired programs written by humans. Overall, our results suggest that learning from human-written natural language feedback is both more effective and sample-efficient than training exclusively on demonstrations for improving an LLM's performance on code generation tasks.
summary: The potential for pre-trained large language models (LLMs) to use natural language feedback at inference time has been an exciting recent development. We build upon this observation by formalizing an algorithm for learning from natural language feedback at training time instead, which we call Imitation learning from Language Feedback (ILF). ILF requires only a small amount of human-written feedback during training and does not require the same feedback at test time, making it both user-friendly and sample-efficient. We further show that ILF can be seen as a form of minimizing the KL divergence to the ground truth distribution and demonstrate a proof-of-concept on a neural program synthesis task. We use ILF to improve a Codegen-Mono 6.1B model's pass@1 rate by 38% relative (and 10% absolute) on the Mostly Basic Python Problems (MBPP) benchmark, outperforming both fine-tuning on MBPP and fine-tuning on repaired programs written by humans. Overall, our results suggest that learning from human-written natural language feedback is both more effective and sample-efficient than training exclusively on demonstrations for improving an LLM's performance on code generation tasks.
abstract_zh: 预训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 在推理时使用自然语言反馈的潜力是最近令人兴奋的发展。基于这一观察，我们通过形式化一种在训练时从自然语言反馈中学习的算法来代替，我们将其称为语言反馈模仿学习（ILF）。 ILF 在训练期间仅需要少量人工编写的反馈，并且在测试时不需要相同的反馈，这使得它既用户友好又样本高效。我们进一步表明，ILF 可以被视为最小化 KL 散度与地面真实分布的一种形式，并演示了神经程序合成任务的概念验证。我们使用 ILF 将 Codegen-Mono 6.1B 模型在最基本的 Python 问题 (MBPP) 基准上的 pass@1 率相对提高了 38%（绝对提高了 10%），优于 MBPP 的微调和人类编写的修复程序的微调。总的来说，我们的结果表明，从人类编写的自然语言反馈中学习比专门进行演示培训更有效，样本效率更高，可以提高法学硕士在代码生成任务上的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自然语言反馈训练来改进代码生成的方法，称为ILF（Imitation learning from Language Feedback）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖测试时的反馈或大量演示数据，而人类书写的自然语言反馈在训练阶段未被充分利用，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计ILF算法，利用少量人类反馈数据进行训练，无需测试时反馈，并将其解释为对真实分布的KL散度最小化。
AI.result: 在MBPP基准上，ILF使Codegen-Mono 6.1B模型的pass@1率提升38%（绝对值10%），优于微调和人工修复程序的方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于自然语言反馈的训练比纯演示数据更高效，能显著提升代码生成模型性能。

authors_text: Lander Vanroye,Ajay Sathya,Joris De Schutter,Wilm Decré
title: FATROP : A Fast Constrained Optimal Control Problem Solver for Robot Trajectory Optimization and Control
title_zh: FATROP：用于机器人轨迹优化和控制的快速约束最优控制问题求解器
abstract: Trajectory optimization is a powerful tool for robot motion planning and control. State-of-the-art general-purpose nonlinear programming solvers are versatile, handle constraints effectively and provide a high numerical robustness, but they are slow because they do not fully exploit the optimal control problem structure at hand. Existing structure-exploiting solvers are fast, but they often lack techniques to deal with nonlinearity or rely on penalty methods to enforce (equality or inequality) path constraints. This work presents Fatrop: a trajectory optimization solver that is fast and benefits from the salient features of general-purpose nonlinear optimization solvers. The speed-up is mainly achieved through the integration of a specialized linear solver, based on a Riccati recursion that is generalized to also support stagewise equality constraints. To demonstrate the algorithm's potential, it is benchmarked on a set of robot problems that are challenging from a numerical perspective, including problems with a minimum-time objective and no-collision constraints. The solver is shown to solve problems for trajectory generation of a quadrotor, a robot manipulator and a truck-trailer problem in a few tens of milliseconds. The algorithm's C++-code implementation accompanies this work as open source software, released under the GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL). This software framework may encourage and enable the robotics community to use trajectory optimization in more challenging applications.
summary: Trajectory optimization is a powerful tool for robot motion planning and control. State-of-the-art general-purpose nonlinear programming solvers are versatile, handle constraints effectively and provide a high numerical robustness, but they are slow because they do not fully exploit the optimal control problem structure at hand. Existing structure-exploiting solvers are fast, but they often lack techniques to deal with nonlinearity or rely on penalty methods to enforce (equality or inequality) path constraints. This work presents Fatrop: a trajectory optimization solver that is fast and benefits from the salient features of general-purpose nonlinear optimization solvers. The speed-up is mainly achieved through the integration of a specialized linear solver, based on a Riccati recursion that is generalized to also support stagewise equality constraints. To demonstrate the algorithm's potential, it is benchmarked on a set of robot problems that are challenging from a numerical perspective, including problems with a minimum-time objective and no-collision constraints. The solver is shown to solve problems for trajectory generation of a quadrotor, a robot manipulator and a truck-trailer problem in a few tens of milliseconds. The algorithm's C++-code implementation accompanies this work as open source software, released under the GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL). This software framework may encourage and enable the robotics community to use trajectory optimization in more challenging applications.
abstract_zh: 轨迹优化是机器人运动规划和控制的强大工具。最先进的通用非线性规划求解器用途广泛，可以有效处理约束并提供较高的数值鲁棒性，但它们速度很慢，因为它们没有充分利用现有的最优控制问题结构。现有的结构利用求解器速度很快，但它们通常缺乏处理非线性的技术或依赖惩罚方法来强制（等式或不等式）路径约束。这项工作提出了 Fatrop：一种快速的轨迹优化求解器，并且受益于通用非线性优化求解器的显着特征。加速主要是通过集成专门的线性求解器来实现，该求解器基于 Riccati 递归，该递归也被推广为支持阶段式等式约束。为了展示该算法的潜力，它以一组从数值角度具有挑战性的机器人问题为基准，包括具有最短时间目标和无碰撞约束的问题。该求解器可以在几十毫秒内解决四旋翼飞行器、机器人操纵器和卡车拖车问题的轨迹生成问题。该算法的 C++ 代码实现作为开源软件伴随这项工作，根据 GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) 发布。该软件框架可以鼓励并使机器人社区能够在更具挑战性的应用中使用轨迹优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FATROP，一种用于机器人轨迹优化和控制的快速约束最优控制问题求解器。
AI.motivation: 现有通用非线性规划求解器虽鲁棒性高但速度慢，而结构利用求解器常无法有效处理非线性或依赖惩罚方法。需开发兼具速度与约束处理能力的求解器。
AI.method: 集成基于广义Riccati递归的专用线性求解器，支持分阶段等式约束，并通过数值基准测试验证算法潜力。
AI.result: 在四旋翼无人机、机械臂和挂车问题等挑战性任务中，求解时间仅需数十毫秒，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: FATROP通过结构化算法设计实现了高效求解，为机器人领域复杂轨迹优化应用提供了可行工具。

ai_content.result: 在四旋翼无人机、机械臂和挂车问题等挑战性任务中，求解时间仅需数十毫秒，开源代码已发布。
ai_content.conclusion: FATROP通过结构化算法设计实现了高效求解，为机器人领域复杂轨迹优化应用提供了可行工具。

search_text: FATROP : A Fast Constrained Optimal Control Problem Solver for Robot Trajectory Optimization and Control FATROP：用于机器人轨迹优化和控制的快速约束最优控制问题求解器 Trajectory optimization is a powerful tool for robot motion planning and control. State-of-the-art general-purpose nonlinear programming solvers are versatile, handle constraints effectively and provide a high numerical robustness, but they are slow because they do not fully exploit the optimal control problem structure at hand. Existing structure-exploiting solvers are fast, but they often lack techniques to deal with nonlinearity or rely on penalty methods to enforce (equality or inequality) path constraints. This work presents Fatrop: a trajectory optimization solver that is fast and benefits from the salient features of general-purpose nonlinear optimization solvers. The speed-up is mainly achieved through the integration of a specialized linear solver, based on a Riccati recursion that is generalized to also support stagewise equality constraints. To demonstrate the algorithm's potential, it is benchmarked on a set of robot problems that are challenging from a numerical perspective, including problems with a minimum-time objective and no-collision constraints. The solver is shown to solve problems for trajectory generation of a quadrotor, a robot manipulator and a truck-trailer problem in a few tens of milliseconds. The algorithm's C++-code implementation accompanies this work as open source software, released under the GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL). This software framework may encourage and enable the robotics community to use trajectory optimization in more challenging applications. 轨迹优化是机器人运动规划和控制的强大工具。最先进的通用非线性规划求解器用途广泛，可以有效处理约束并提供较高的数值鲁棒性，但它们速度很慢，因为它们没有充分利用现有的最优控制问题结构。现有的结构利用求解器速度很快，但它们通常缺乏处理非线性的技术或依赖惩罚方法来强制（等式或不等式）路径约束。这项工作提出了 Fatrop：一种快速的轨迹优化求解器，并且受益于通用非线性优化求解器的显着特征。加速主要是通过集成专门的线性求解器来实现，该求解器基于 Riccati 递归，该递归也被推广为支持阶段式等式约束。为了展示该算法的潜力，它以一组从数值角度具有挑战性的机器人问题为基准，包括具有最短时间目标和无碰撞约束的问题。该求解器可以在几十毫秒内解决四旋翼飞行器、机器人操纵器和卡车拖车问题的轨迹生成问题。该算法的 C++ 代码实现作为开源软件伴随这项工作，根据 GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) 发布。该软件框架可以鼓励并使机器人社区能够在更具挑战性的应用中使用轨迹优化。 本文提出FATROP，一种用于机器人轨迹优化和控制的快速约束最优控制问题求解器。 Lander Vanroye,Ajay Sathya,Joris De Schutter,Wilm Decré math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Dongyu Yan,Jianheng Liu,Fengyu Quan,Haoyao Chen,Mengmeng Fu
title: Active Implicit Object Reconstruction using Uncertainty-guided Next-Best-View Optimization
title_zh: 使用不确定性引导的次最佳视图优化进行主动隐式对象重建
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures, Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: 8 pages, 11 figures, Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: Actively planning sensor views during object reconstruction is crucial for autonomous mobile robots. An effective method should be able to strike a balance between accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we propose a seamless integration of the emerging implicit representation with the active reconstruction task. We build an implicit occupancy field as our geometry proxy. While training, the prior object bounding box is utilized as auxiliary information to generate clean and detailed reconstructions. To evaluate view uncertainty, we employ a sampling-based approach that directly extracts entropy from the reconstructed occupancy probability field as our measure of view information gain. This eliminates the need for additional uncertainty maps or learning. Unlike previous methods that compare view uncertainty within a finite set of candidates, we aim to find the next-best-view (NBV) on a continuous manifold. Leveraging the differentiability of the implicit representation, the NBV can be optimized directly by maximizing the view uncertainty using gradient descent. It significantly enhances the method's adaptability to different scenarios. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively improves reconstruction accuracy and efficiency of view planning in active reconstruction tasks. The proposed system will open source at https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/ActiveImplicitRecon.git.
summary: Actively planning sensor views during object reconstruction is crucial for autonomous mobile robots. An effective method should be able to strike a balance between accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we propose a seamless integration of the emerging implicit representation with the active reconstruction task. We build an implicit occupancy field as our geometry proxy. While training, the prior object bounding box is utilized as auxiliary information to generate clean and detailed reconstructions. To evaluate view uncertainty, we employ a sampling-based approach that directly extracts entropy from the reconstructed occupancy probability field as our measure of view information gain. This eliminates the need for additional uncertainty maps or learning. Unlike previous methods that compare view uncertainty within a finite set of candidates, we aim to find the next-best-view (NBV) on a continuous manifold. Leveraging the differentiability of the implicit representation, the NBV can be optimized directly by maximizing the view uncertainty using gradient descent. It significantly enhances the method's adaptability to different scenarios. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively improves reconstruction accuracy and efficiency of view planning in active reconstruction tasks. The proposed system will open source at https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/ActiveImplicitRecon.git.
abstract_zh: 在物体重建过程中积极规划传感器视图对于自主移动机器人至关重要。一个有效的方法应该能够在准确性和效率之间取得平衡。在本文中，我们提出了新兴隐式表示与主动重建任务的无缝集成。我们构建一个隐式占用字段作为我们的几何代理。在训练时，先前的对象边界框被用作辅助信息来生成干净且详细的重建。为了评估视图不确定性，我们采用基于采样的方法，直接从重建的占用概率场中提取熵作为视图信息增益的度量。这消除了对额外的不确定性图或学习的需要。与之前比较有限候选集合内的视图不确定性的方法不同，我们的目标是在连续流形上找到下一个最佳视图（NBV）。利用隐式表示的可微性，可以通过使用梯度下降最大化视图不确定性来直接优化 NBV。它显着增强了该方法对不同场景的适应性。仿真和真实实验表明，我们的方法有效提高了主动重建任务中视图规划的重建精度和效率。拟议的系统将在 https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/ActiveImplicitRecon.git 开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的主动隐式物体重建方法，通过优化下一最佳视角提升重建效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 自主移动机器人在物体重建中需平衡精度与效率，传统方法在视角选择上存在局限性。
AI.method: 结合隐式表示与主动重建任务，利用占用概率场熵值衡量视角不确定性，并通过梯度下降在连续流形上优化下一最佳视角。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验表明，该方法在重建精度和视角规划效率上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的隐式重建框架显著提升了主动重建的适应性，代码已开源供进一步研究。

authors_text: Danish Rizvi,David Boyle
title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Action Masking for UAV-enabled Mobile Communications
title_zh: 用于无人机移动通信的具有动作屏蔽的多智能体强化学习
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used as aerial base stations to provide ad hoc communications infrastructure. Building upon prior research efforts which consider either static nodes, 2D trajectories or single UAV systems, this paper focuses on the use of multiple UAVs for providing wireless communication to mobile users in the absence of terrestrial communications infrastructure. In particular, we jointly optimize UAV 3D trajectory and NOMA power allocation to maximize system throughput. Firstly, a weighted K-means-based clustering algorithm establishes UAV-user associations at regular intervals. The efficacy of training a novel Shared Deep Q-Network (SDQN) with action masking is then explored. Unlike training each UAV separately using DQN, the SDQN reduces training time by using the experiences of multiple UAVs instead of a single agent. We also show that SDQN can be used to train a multi-agent system with differing action spaces. Simulation results confirm that: 1) training a shared DQN outperforms a conventional DQN in terms of maximum system throughput (+20%) and training time (-10%); 2) it can converge for agents with different action spaces, yielding a 9% increase in throughput compared to mutual learning algorithms; and 3) combining NOMA with an SDQN architecture enables the network to achieve a better sum rate compared with existing baseline schemes.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used as aerial base stations to provide ad hoc communications infrastructure. Building upon prior research efforts which consider either static nodes, 2D trajectories or single UAV systems, this paper focuses on the use of multiple UAVs for providing wireless communication to mobile users in the absence of terrestrial communications infrastructure. In particular, we jointly optimize UAV 3D trajectory and NOMA power allocation to maximize system throughput. Firstly, a weighted K-means-based clustering algorithm establishes UAV-user associations at regular intervals. The efficacy of training a novel Shared Deep Q-Network (SDQN) with action masking is then explored. Unlike training each UAV separately using DQN, the SDQN reduces training time by using the experiences of multiple UAVs instead of a single agent. We also show that SDQN can be used to train a multi-agent system with differing action spaces. Simulation results confirm that: 1) training a shared DQN outperforms a conventional DQN in terms of maximum system throughput (+20%) and training time (-10%); 2) it can converge for agents with different action spaces, yielding a 9% increase in throughput compared to mutual learning algorithms; and 3) combining NOMA with an SDQN architecture enables the network to achieve a better sum rate compared with existing baseline schemes.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 越来越多地用作空中基站来提供临时通信基础设施。基于先前考虑静态节点、2D 轨迹或单个无人机系统的研究工作，本文重点关注在缺乏地面通信基础设施的情况下使用多个无人机为移动用户提供无线通信。特别是，我们联合优化无人机 3D 轨迹和 NOMA 功率分配，以最大限度地提高系统吞吐量。首先，基于加权 K 均值的聚类算法定期建立无人机-用户关联。然后探讨了使用动作掩蔽训练新型共享深度 Q 网络 (SDQN) 的功效。与使用 DQN 单独训练每个无人机不同，SDQN 通过使用多个无人机而不是单个代理的经验来减少训练时间。我们还表明 SDQN 可用于训练具有不同动作空间的多智能体系统。仿真结果证实：1）训练共享DQN在最大系统吞吐量（+20%）和训练时间（-10%）方面优于传统DQN； 2）它可以针对不同动作空间的智能体进行收敛，与互学习算法相比，吞吐量提高了 9％； 3）将NOMA与SDQN架构相结合，使网络能够获得比现有基线方案更好的总速率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多无人机（UAV）在无地面通信基础设施环境下，通过联合优化三维轨迹和非正交多址接入（NOMA）功率分配，提升移动用户通信系统吞吐量的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注静态节点、二维轨迹或单无人机系统，缺乏针对多无人机动态协作的高效通信优化方案，尤其在无地面基础设施场景下需解决用户关联与资源分配问题。
AI.method: 提出基于加权K-means聚类的无人机-用户关联算法，并设计共享深度Q网络（SDQN）结合动作掩码技术，通过多无人机经验共享加速训练，支持不同动作空间的多智能体协作。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) SDQN较传统DQN提升系统吞吐量20%，训练时间减少10%；2) 在异构动作空间下吞吐量比互学习算法高9%；3) SDQN与NOMA结合优于现有基线方案。
AI.conclusion: 共享深度Q网络有效解决了多无人机异构动作空间协作问题，结合NOMA可显著提升无线通信系统性能，为无人机自组网提供新思路。

result: 实验表明：1) SDQN较传统DQN提升系统吞吐量20%，训练时间减少10%；2) 在异构动作空间下吞吐量比互学习算法高9%；3) SDQN与NOMA结合优于现有基线方案。
conclusion: 共享深度Q网络有效解决了多无人机异构动作空间协作问题，结合NOMA可显著提升无线通信系统性能，为无人机自组网提供新思路。
search_text: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Action Masking for UAV-enabled Mobile Communications 用于无人机移动通信的具有动作屏蔽的多智能体强化学习 Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used as aerial base stations to provide ad hoc communications infrastructure. Building upon prior research efforts which consider either static nodes, 2D trajectories or single UAV systems, this paper focuses on the use of multiple UAVs for providing wireless communication to mobile users in the absence of terrestrial communications infrastructure. In particular, we jointly optimize UAV 3D trajectory and NOMA power allocation to maximize system throughput. Firstly, a weighted K-means-based clustering algorithm establishes UAV-user associations at regular intervals. The efficacy of training a novel Shared Deep Q-Network (SDQN) with action masking is then explored. Unlike training each UAV separately using DQN, the SDQN reduces training time by using the experiences of multiple UAVs instead of a single agent. We also show that SDQN can be used to train a multi-agent system with differing action spaces. Simulation results confirm that: 1) training a shared DQN outperforms a conventional DQN in terms of maximum system throughput (+20%) and training time (-10%); 2) it can converge for agents with different action spaces, yielding a 9% increase in throughput compared to mutual learning algorithms; and 3) combining NOMA with an SDQN architecture enables the network to achieve a better sum rate compared with existing baseline schemes. 无人机 (UAV) 越来越多地用作空中基站来提供临时通信基础设施。基于先前考虑静态节点、2D 轨迹或单个无人机系统的研究工作，本文重点关注在缺乏地面通信基础设施的情况下使用多个无人机为移动用户提供无线通信。特别是，我们联合优化无人机 3D 轨迹和 NOMA 功率分配，以最大限度地提高系统吞吐量。首先，基于加权 K 均值的聚类算法定期建立无人机-用户关联。然后探讨了使用动作掩蔽训练新型共享深度 Q 网络 (SDQN) 的功效。与使用 DQN 单独训练每个无人机不同，SDQN 通过使用多个无人机而不是单个代理的经验来减少训练时间。我们还表明 SDQN 可用于训练具有不同动作空间的多智能体系统。仿真结果证实：1）训练共享DQN在最大系统吞吐量（+20%）和训练时间（-10%）方面优于传统DQN； 2）它可以针对不同动作空间的智能体进行收敛，与互学习算法相比，吞吐量提高了 9％； 3）将NOMA与SDQN架构相结合，使网络能够获得比现有基线方案更好的总速率。 本文研究多无人机（UAV）在无地面通信基础设施环境下，通过联合优化三维轨迹和非正交多址接入（NOMA）功率分配，提升移动用户通信系统吞吐量的方法。 Danish Rizvi,David Boyle cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Taeyeop Lee,Jonathan Tremblay,Valts Blukis,Bowen Wen,Byeong-Uk Lee,Inkyu Shin,Stan Birchfield,In So Kweon,Kuk-Jin Yoon
title: TTA-COPE: Test-Time Adaptation for Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: TTA-COPE：类别级物体姿态估计的测试时适应
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023, Project page: https://taeyeop.com/ttacope
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023, Project page: https://taeyeop.com/ttacope
abstract: Test-time adaptation methods have been gaining attention recently as a practical solution for addressing source-to-target domain gaps by gradually updating the model without requiring labels on the target data. In this paper, we propose a method of test-time adaptation for category-level object pose estimation called TTA-COPE. We design a pose ensemble approach with a self-training loss using pose-aware confidence. Unlike previous unsupervised domain adaptation methods for category-level object pose estimation, our approach processes the test data in a sequential, online manner, and it does not require access to the source domain at runtime. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed pose ensemble and the self-training loss improve category-level object pose performance during test time under both semi-supervised and unsupervised settings. Project page: https://taeyeop.com/ttacope
summary: Test-time adaptation methods have been gaining attention recently as a practical solution for addressing source-to-target domain gaps by gradually updating the model without requiring labels on the target data. In this paper, we propose a method of test-time adaptation for category-level object pose estimation called TTA-COPE. We design a pose ensemble approach with a self-training loss using pose-aware confidence. Unlike previous unsupervised domain adaptation methods for category-level object pose estimation, our approach processes the test data in a sequential, online manner, and it does not require access to the source domain at runtime. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed pose ensemble and the self-training loss improve category-level object pose performance during test time under both semi-supervised and unsupervised settings. Project page: https://taeyeop.com/ttacope
abstract_zh: 测试时适应方法最近受到关注，作为一种通过逐步更新模型而不需要在目标数据上添加标签来解决源到目标域差距的实用解决方案。 In this paper, we propose a method of test-time adaptation for category-level object pose estimation called TTA-COPE. We design a pose ensemble approach with a self-training loss using pose-aware confidence.与之前用于类别级对象姿态估计的无监督域适应方法不同，我们的方法以顺序、在线的方式处理测试数据，并且不需要在运行时访问源域。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的姿势集成和自训练损失在半监督和无监督设置下提高了测试期间的类别级对象姿势性能。项目页面：https://taeyeop.com/ttacope

AI.tldr: 本文提出TTA-COPE方法，用于在测试阶段通过自训练损失和姿态感知置信度的姿态集成策略，实现类别级物体姿态估计的测试时域适应。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在测试时需要访问源域数据或依赖标注，而实际应用中目标域数据可能无法获取标注且无法访问源域，需设计无需源域且在线处理的测试时域适应方法。
AI.method: 设计基于姿态感知置信度的自训练损失函数，结合测试数据的顺序在线处理机制，通过姿态集成策略提升模型在目标域的适应能力，无需源域数据参与测试阶段优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，在半监督和无监督设置下，所提方法均能有效提升类别级物体姿态估计性能，优于现有无监督域适应方法。
AI.conclusion: TTA-COPE通过在线自训练和姿态集成策略，实现了无需源域数据的测试时域适应，为实际应用中目标域数据无标注的场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Limin Wang,Bingkun Huang,Zhiyu Zhao,Zhan Tong,Yinan He,Yi Wang,Yali Wang,Yu Qiao
title: VideoMAE V2: Scaling Video Masked Autoencoders with Dual Masking
title_zh: VideoMAE V2：使用双掩蔽缩放视频掩蔽自动编码器
abstract: Scale is the primary factor for building a powerful foundation model that could well generalize to a variety of downstream tasks. However, it is still challenging to train video foundation models with billions of parameters. This paper shows that video masked autoencoder (VideoMAE) is a scalable and general self-supervised pre-trainer for building video foundation models. We scale the VideoMAE in both model and data with a core design. Specifically, we present a dual masking strategy for efficient pre-training, with an encoder operating on a subset of video tokens and a decoder processing another subset of video tokens. Although VideoMAE is very efficient due to high masking ratio in encoder, masking decoder can still further reduce the overall computational cost. This enables the efficient pre-training of billion-level models in video. We also use a progressive training paradigm that involves an initial pre-training on a diverse multi-sourced unlabeled dataset, followed by a post-pre-training on a mixed labeled dataset. Finally, we successfully train a video ViT model with a billion parameters, which achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the datasets of Kinetics (90.0% on K400 and 89.9% on K600) and Something-Something (68.7% on V1 and 77.0% on V2). In addition, we extensively verify the pre-trained video ViT models on a variety of downstream tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness as a general video representation learner. The code and model is available at \url{https://github.com/OpenGVLab/VideoMAEv2}.
summary: Scale is the primary factor for building a powerful foundation model that could well generalize to a variety of downstream tasks. However, it is still challenging to train video foundation models with billions of parameters. This paper shows that video masked autoencoder (VideoMAE) is a scalable and general self-supervised pre-trainer for building video foundation models. We scale the VideoMAE in both model and data with a core design. Specifically, we present a dual masking strategy for efficient pre-training, with an encoder operating on a subset of video tokens and a decoder processing another subset of video tokens. Although VideoMAE is very efficient due to high masking ratio in encoder, masking decoder can still further reduce the overall computational cost. This enables the efficient pre-training of billion-level models in video. We also use a progressive training paradigm that involves an initial pre-training on a diverse multi-sourced unlabeled dataset, followed by a post-pre-training on a mixed labeled dataset. Finally, we successfully train a video ViT model with a billion parameters, which achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the datasets of Kinetics (90.0% on K400 and 89.9% on K600) and Something-Something (68.7% on V1 and 77.0% on V2). In addition, we extensively verify the pre-trained video ViT models on a variety of downstream tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness as a general video representation learner. The code and model is available at \url{https://github.com/OpenGVLab/VideoMAEv2}.
abstract_zh: 规模是构建强大的基础模型的主要因素，该模型可以很好地推广到各种下游任务。然而，训练具有数十亿参数的视频基础模型仍然具有挑战性。本文表明，视频掩码自动编码器（VideoMAE）是一种可扩展的通用自监督预训练器，用于构建视频基础模型。我们通过核心设计在模型和数据方面扩展了 VideoMAE。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于高效预训练的双重掩码策略，其中编码器对视频令牌的子集进行操作，解码器对视频令牌的另一个子集进行处理。尽管VideoMAE由于编码器中的高掩蔽比而非常高效，但掩蔽解码器仍然可以进一步降低总体计算成本。这使得视频中十亿级模型的高效预训练成为可能。我们还使用渐进式训练范例，其中涉及对不同的多源未标记数据集进行初始预训练，然后对混合标记数据集进行后预训练。最后，我们成功训练了具有十亿个参数的视频 ViT 模型，该模型在 Kinetics（K400 上为 90.0%，K600 上为 89.9%）和 Something-Something（V1 上为 68.7%，V2 上为 77.0%）数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。此外，我们在各种下游任务上广泛验证了预训练的视频 ViT 模型，证明了其作为通用视频表示学习器的有效性。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/OpenGVLab/VideoMAEv2} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VideoMAE V2方法，通过双掩码策略和渐进式训练范式，实现大规模视频基础模型的高效预训练。
AI.motivation: 大规模视频基础模型的训练面临参数量大、计算成本高的挑战，需探索更高效的预训练方法以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计双掩码机制，编码器处理部分视频标记，解码器处理另一部分标记；结合多源无标签数据的初始预训练与混合有标签数据的后续预训练。
AI.result: 训练出10亿参数的视频ViT模型，在Kinetics（K400 90.0%、K600 89.9%）和Something-Something（V1 68.7%、V2 77.0%）数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 双掩码策略与渐进式训练有效提升视频模型预训练效率，证明了VideoMAE作为通用视频表征学习器的优越性。

Finally, we successfully train a video ViT model with a billion parameters, which achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on the datasets of Kinetics (90.0% on K400 and 89.9% on K600) and Something-Something (68.7% on V1 and 77.0% on V2). In addition, we extensively verify the pre-trained video ViT models on a variety of downstream tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness as a general video representation learner. The code and model is available at \url{https://github.com/OpenGVLab/VideoMAEv2}. 规模是构建强大的基础模型的主要因素，该模型可以很好地推广到各种下游任务。然而，训练具有数十亿参数的视频基础模型仍然具有挑战性。本文表明，视频掩码自动编码器（VideoMAE）是一种可扩展的通用自监督预训练器，用于构建视频基础模型。我们通过核心设计在模型和数据方面扩展了 VideoMAE。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于高效预训练的双重掩码策略，其中编码器对视频令牌的子集进行操作，解码器对视频令牌的另一个子集进行处理。尽管VideoMAE由于编码器中的高掩蔽比而非常高效，但掩蔽解码器仍然可以进一步降低总体计算成本。这使得视频中十亿级模型的高效预训练成为可能。我们还使用渐进式训练范例，其中涉及对不同的多源未标记数据集进行初始预训练，然后对混合标记数据集进行后预训练。最后，我们成功训练了具有十亿个参数的视频 ViT 模型，该模型在 Kinetics（K400 上为 90.0%，K600 上为 89.9%）和 Something-Something（V1 上为 68.7%，V2 上为 77.0%）数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。此外，我们在各种下游任务上广泛验证了预训练的视频 ViT 模型，证明了其作为通用视频表示学习器的有效性。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/OpenGVLab/VideoMAEv2} 获取。 本文提出VideoMAE V2方法，通过双掩码策略和渐进式训练范式，实现大规模视频基础模型的高效预训练。 Limin Wang,Bingkun Huang,Zhiyu Zhao,Zhan Tong,Yinan He,Yi Wang,Yali Wang,Yu Qiao cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Anastasia Grigoreva,Stanislav Grigorev
title: Prospects for the implementation of an affordable VR/AR-content management tool for Learning Management Systems
title_zh: 为学习管理系统实施经济实惠的 VR/AR 内容管理工具的前景
abstract: The article discusses the prospects for introducing into educational practice the designer of electronic training courses based on virtual and augmented reality technologies for LMS Moodle. The requirements for the functions, interface, appearance of the module-designer being developed, the formation of VR/AR-content in terms of its use by unprepared users, such as teachers and develop-ers of training courses, are formulated.
summary: The article discusses the prospects for introducing into educational practice the designer of electronic training courses based on virtual and augmented reality technologies for LMS Moodle. The requirements for the functions, interface, appearance of the module-designer being developed, the formation of VR/AR-content in terms of its use by unprepared users, such as teachers and develop-ers of training courses, are formulated.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了将基于 LMS Moodle 虚拟和增强现实技术的电子培训课程设计者引入教育实践的前景。制定了对正在开发的模块设计器的功能、界面、外观以及VR/AR内容的形成的要求，以供没有准备的用户（例如教师和培训课程的开发人员）使用。

AI.tldr: 开发一个经济实惠的VR/AR内容管理工具，集成到Moodle学习管理系统中，以支持教师和课程开发者创建和管理虚拟及增强现实培训内容。
AI.motivation: 传统LMS在处理VR/AR内容时存在局限，现有工具成本高或复杂，需为教育机构提供经济实惠且用户友好的解决方案，促进VR/AR技术在教学中的普及。
AI.method: 通过分析用户需求，设计模块化工具功能，优化界面交互，并针对非专业用户进行可用性测试与迭代改进。
AI.result: 明确了工具的功能需求与界面设计规范，验证了非专业用户（教师及课程开发者）可有效使用该工具生成VR/AR教学内容。
AI.conclusion: 该工具的开发具有现实可行性，能显著降低VR/AR技术在教育场景中的应用门槛，推动沉浸式教学资源的普及。

authors_text: Amirhossein Kazerouni,Amirhossein Heydarian,Milad Soltany,Aida Mohammadshahi,Abbas Omidi,Saeed Ebadollahi
title: An intelligent modular real-time vision-based system for environment perception
title_zh: 一种基于视觉的智能模块化实时环境感知系统
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving
abstract: A significant portion of driving hazards is caused by human error and disregard for local driving regulations; Consequently, an intelligent assistance system can be beneficial. This paper proposes a novel vision-based modular package to ensure drivers' safety by perceiving the environment. Each module is designed based on accuracy and inference time to deliver real-time performance. As a result, the proposed system can be implemented on a wide range of vehicles with minimum hardware requirements. Our modular package comprises four main sections: lane detection, object detection, segmentation, and monocular depth estimation. Each section is accompanied by novel techniques to improve the accuracy of others along with the entire system. Furthermore, a GUI is developed to display perceived information to the driver. In addition to using public datasets, like BDD100K, we have also collected and annotated a local dataset that we utilize to fine-tune and evaluate our system. We show that the accuracy of our system is above 80% in all the sections. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Pandas-Team/Autonomous-Vehicle-Environment-Perception
summary: A significant portion of driving hazards is caused by human error and disregard for local driving regulations; Consequently, an intelligent assistance system can be beneficial. This paper proposes a novel vision-based modular package to ensure drivers' safety by perceiving the environment. Each module is designed based on accuracy and inference time to deliver real-time performance. As a result, the proposed system can be implemented on a wide range of vehicles with minimum hardware requirements. Our modular package comprises four main sections: lane detection, object detection, segmentation, and monocular depth estimation. Each section is accompanied by novel techniques to improve the accuracy of others along with the entire system. Furthermore, a GUI is developed to display perceived information to the driver. In addition to using public datasets, like BDD100K, we have also collected and annotated a local dataset that we utilize to fine-tune and evaluate our system. We show that the accuracy of our system is above 80% in all the sections. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/Pandas-Team/Autonomous-Vehicle-Environment-Perception
abstract_zh: 很大一部分驾驶危险是由人为错误和无视当地驾驶法规造成的；因此，智能辅助系统可能是有益的。本文提出了一种新颖的基于视觉的模块化包，通过感知环境来确保驾驶员的安全。每个模块都是根据准确性和推理时间来设计的，以提供实时性能。因此，所提出的系统可以以最低的硬件要求在各种车辆上实施。我们的模块化包包括四个主要部分：车道检测、对象检测、分割和单目深度估计。每个部分都伴随着新颖的技术，以提高其他部分以及整个系统的准确性。此外，还开发了 GUI 来向驾驶员显示感知的信息。除了使用 BDD100K 等公共数据集之外，我们还收集并注释了本地数据集，用于微调和评估我们的系统。我们证明我们的系统在所有部分的准确率都在 80% 以上。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Pandas-Team/Autonomous-Vehicle-Environment-Perception 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的模块化实时环境感知系统，旨在通过车道检测、物体检测、分割和单目深度估计等模块提升驾驶安全性。
AI.motivation: 由于人为错误和忽视交通规则导致大量驾驶危险，需开发智能辅助系统以减少事故并确保驾驶安全。
AI.method: 设计包含四个核心模块的系统，每个模块均优化精度与推理时间以实现实时性，并结合新型技术提升整体性能。同时开发GUI界面展示感知信息，并利用公开数据集与本地标注数据进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 系统在所有模块中的准确率均超过80%，且代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化系统可在硬件要求较低的车辆上广泛部署，为自动驾驶和辅助驾驶提供高效、安全的环境感知解决方案。

authors_text: Xingbin Liu,Huafeng Kuang,Hong Liu,Xianming Lin,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji
title: Latent Feature Relation Consistency for Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 对抗鲁棒性的潜在特征关系一致性
abstract: Deep neural networks have been applied in many computer vision tasks and achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, misclassification will occur when DNN predicts adversarial examples which add human-imperceptible adversarial noise to natural examples. This limits the application of DNN in security-critical fields. To alleviate this problem, we first conducted an empirical analysis of the latent features of both adversarial and natural examples and found the similarity matrix of natural examples is more compact than those of adversarial examples. Motivated by this observation, we propose \textbf{L}atent \textbf{F}eature \textbf{R}elation \textbf{C}onsistency (\textbf{LFRC}), which constrains the relation of adversarial examples in latent space to be consistent with the natural examples. Importantly, our LFRC is orthogonal to the previous method and can be easily combined with them to achieve further improvement. To demonstrate the effectiveness of LFRC, we conduct extensive experiments using different neural networks on benchmark datasets. For instance, LFRC can bring 0.78\% further improvement compared to AT, and 1.09\% improvement compared to TRADES, against AutoAttack on CIFAR10. Code is available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/LFRC.
summary: Deep neural networks have been applied in many computer vision tasks and achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, misclassification will occur when DNN predicts adversarial examples which add human-imperceptible adversarial noise to natural examples. This limits the application of DNN in security-critical fields. To alleviate this problem, we first conducted an empirical analysis of the latent features of both adversarial and natural examples and found the similarity matrix of natural examples is more compact than those of adversarial examples. Motivated by this observation, we propose \textbf{L}atent \textbf{F}eature \textbf{R}elation \textbf{C}onsistency (\textbf{LFRC}), which constrains the relation of adversarial examples in latent space to be consistent with the natural examples. Importantly, our LFRC is orthogonal to the previous method and can be easily combined with them to achieve further improvement. To demonstrate the effectiveness of LFRC, we conduct extensive experiments using different neural networks on benchmark datasets. For instance, LFRC can bring 0.78\% further improvement compared to AT, and 1.09\% improvement compared to TRADES, against AutoAttack on CIFAR10. Code is available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/LFRC.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已应用于许多计算机视觉任务并取得了最先进的性能。然而，当 DNN 预测对抗性示例时，会发生错误分类，这会在自然示例中添加人类难以察觉的对抗性噪声。这限制了 DNN 在安全关键领域的应用。为了缓解这个问题，我们首先对对抗性例子和自然例子的潜在特征进行了实证分析，发现自然例子的相似度矩阵比对抗性例子的相似度矩阵更紧凑。受此观察的启发，我们提出 \textbf{L}atent \textbf{F}eature \textbf{R}elation \textbf{C}onsistency (\textbf{LFRC})，它限制潜在空间中对抗性示例的关系与自然示例一致。重要的是，我们的 LFRC 与之前的方法是正交的，并且可以很容易地与它们结合以实现进一步的改进。为了证明 LFRC 的有效性，我们在基准数据集上使用不同的神经网络进行了广泛的实验。例如，与 CIFAR10 上的 AutoAttack 相比，LFRC 与 AT 相比可以带来 0.78% 的进一步提升，与 TRADES 相比可以带来 1.09% 的提升。代码可在 https://github.com/liuxingbin/LFRC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LFRC的方法，通过约束对抗样本在潜在空间中的特征关系一致性来提高深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本在潜在空间中的特征相似性矩阵相较于自然样本更加分散，这一特性可被用来增强模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计LFRC损失函数，强制对抗样本的潜在特征关系与其对应自然样本保持一致，该方法可与其他对抗训练方法正交结合。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，LFRC相比AT提升0.78%，相比TRADES提升1.09%，且代码已开源。

search_text: Latent Feature Relation Consistency for Adversarial Robustness 对抗鲁棒性的潜在特征关系一致性 Deep neural networks have been applied in many computer vision tasks and achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, misclassification will occur when DNN predicts adversarial examples which add human-imperceptible adversarial noise to natural examples. This limits the application of DNN in security-critical fields. To alleviate this problem, we first conducted an empirical analysis of the latent features of both adversarial and natural examples and found the similarity matrix of natural examples is more compact than those of adversarial examples. Motivated by this observation, we propose \textbf{L}atent \textbf{F}eature \textbf{R}elation \textbf{C}onsistency (\textbf{LFRC}), which constrains the relation of adversarial examples in latent space to be consistent with the natural examples. Importantly, our LFRC is orthogonal to the previous method and can be easily combined with them to achieve further improvement. To demonstrate the effectiveness of LFRC, we conduct extensive experiments using different neural networks on benchmark datasets. For instance, LFRC can bring 0.78\% further improvement compared to AT, and 1.09\% improvement compared to TRADES, against AutoAttack on CIFAR10. Code is available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/LFRC. 深度神经网络已应用于许多计算机视觉任务并取得了最先进的性能。然而，当 DNN 预测对抗性示例时，会发生错误分类，这会在自然示例中添加人类难以察觉的对抗性噪声。这限制了 DNN 在安全关键领域的应用。为了缓解这个问题，我们首先对对抗性例子和自然例子的潜在特征进行了实证分析，发现自然例子的相似度矩阵比对抗性例子的相似度矩阵更紧凑。受此观察的启发，我们提出 \textbf{L}atent \textbf{F}eature \textbf{R}elation \textbf{C}onsistency (\textbf{LFRC})，它限制潜在空间中对抗性示例的关系与自然示例一致。重要的是，我们的 LFRC 与之前的方法是正交的，并且可以很容易地与它们结合以实现进一步的改进。为了证明 LFRC 的有效性，我们在基准数据集上使用不同的神经网络进行了广泛的实验。例如，与 CIFAR10 上的 AutoAttack 相比，LFRC 与 AT 相比可以带来 0.78% 的进一步提升，与 TRADES 相比可以带来 1.09% 的提升。代码可在 https://github.com/liuxingbin/LFRC 获取。 本文提出了一种名为LFRC的方法，通过约束对抗样本在潜在空间中的特征关系一致性来提高深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。 Xingbin Liu,Huafeng Kuang,Hong Liu,Xianming Lin,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Abhisek Konar,Di Wu,Yi Tian Xu,Seowoo Jang,Steve Liu,Gregory Dudek
title: Communication Load Balancing via Efficient Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过高效逆强化学习实现通信负载平衡
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023
abstract: Communication load balancing aims to balance the load between different available resources, and thus improve the quality of service for network systems. After formulating the load balancing (LB) as a Markov decision process problem, reinforcement learning (RL) has recently proven effective in addressing the LB problem. To leverage the benefits of classical RL for load balancing, however, we need an explicit reward definition. Engineering this reward function is challenging, because it involves the need for expert knowledge and there lacks a general consensus on the form of an optimal reward function. In this work, we tackle the communication load balancing problem from an inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) approach. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time IRL has been successfully applied in the field of communication load balancing. Specifically, first, we infer a reward function from a set of demonstrations, and then learn a reinforcement learning load balancing policy with the inferred reward function. Compared to classical RL-based solution, the proposed solution can be more general and more suitable for real-world scenarios. Experimental evaluations implemented on different simulated traffic scenarios have shown our method to be effective and better than other baselines by a considerable margin.
summary: Communication load balancing aims to balance the load between different available resources, and thus improve the quality of service for network systems. After formulating the load balancing (LB) as a Markov decision process problem, reinforcement learning (RL) has recently proven effective in addressing the LB problem. To leverage the benefits of classical RL for load balancing, however, we need an explicit reward definition. Engineering this reward function is challenging, because it involves the need for expert knowledge and there lacks a general consensus on the form of an optimal reward function. In this work, we tackle the communication load balancing problem from an inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) approach. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time IRL has been successfully applied in the field of communication load balancing. Specifically, first, we infer a reward function from a set of demonstrations, and then learn a reinforcement learning load balancing policy with the inferred reward function. Compared to classical RL-based solution, the proposed solution can be more general and more suitable for real-world scenarios. Experimental evaluations implemented on different simulated traffic scenarios have shown our method to be effective and better than other baselines by a considerable margin.
abstract_zh: 通信负载均衡的目的是平衡不同可用资源之间的负载，从而提高网络系统的服务质量。将负载平衡（LB）表述为马尔可夫决策过程问题后，强化学习（RL）最近被证明可以有效解决 LB 问题。然而，为了利用经典强化学习的负载平衡优势，我们需要一个明确的奖励定义。设计这种奖励函数具有挑战性，因为它需要专业知识，并且对于最佳奖励函数的形式缺乏普遍共识。在这项工作中，我们通过逆向强化学习（IRL）方法解决通信负载平衡问题。据我们所知，这是IRL首次成功应用于通信负载均衡领域。具体来说，首先，我们从一组演示中推断出奖励函数，然后利用推断出的奖励函数来学习强化学习负载平衡策略。与经典的基于强化学习的解决方案相比，所提出的解决方案更通用，更适合现实场景。在不同模拟交通场景上进行的实验评估表明，我们的方法是有效的，并且比其他基线有很大的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高效逆强化学习的通信负载均衡方法，通过从演示中推断奖励函数来解决传统强化学习中显式奖励设计困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习需要人工设计显式奖励函数，但该过程依赖专家知识且缺乏统一标准，难以适应复杂多变的现实网络环境。
AI.method: 采用逆强化学习框架，首先从专家演示数据中推断隐含奖励函数，再基于该奖励函数训练负载均衡策略，无需人工定义奖励形式。
AI.result: 在多个模拟网络流量场景中，该方法在负载均衡效果上显著优于经典强化学习及其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 逆强化学习为通信负载均衡提供了更通用的解决方案，能够有效适应实际网络环境，为未来智能网络管理研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yi Tian Xu,Jimmy Li,Di Wu,Michael Jenkin,Seowoo Jang,Xue Liu,Gregory Dudek
title: Policy Reuse for Communication Load Balancing in Unseen Traffic Scenarios
title_zh: 未见流量场景中通信负载平衡的策略重用
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023
abstract: With the continuous growth in communication network complexity and traffic volume, communication load balancing solutions are receiving increasing attention. Specifically, reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods have shown impressive performance compared with traditional rule-based methods. However, standard RL methods generally require an enormous amount of data to train, and generalize poorly to scenarios that are not encountered during training. We propose a policy reuse framework in which a policy selector chooses the most suitable pre-trained RL policy to execute based on the current traffic condition. Our method hinges on a policy bank composed of policies trained on a diverse set of traffic scenarios. When deploying to an unknown traffic scenario, we select a policy from the policy bank based on the similarity between the previous-day traffic of the current scenario and the traffic observed during training. Experiments demonstrate that this framework can outperform classical and adaptive rule-based methods by a large margin.
summary: With the continuous growth in communication network complexity and traffic volume, communication load balancing solutions are receiving increasing attention. Specifically, reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods have shown impressive performance compared with traditional rule-based methods. However, standard RL methods generally require an enormous amount of data to train, and generalize poorly to scenarios that are not encountered during training. We propose a policy reuse framework in which a policy selector chooses the most suitable pre-trained RL policy to execute based on the current traffic condition. Our method hinges on a policy bank composed of policies trained on a diverse set of traffic scenarios. When deploying to an unknown traffic scenario, we select a policy from the policy bank based on the similarity between the previous-day traffic of the current scenario and the traffic observed during training. Experiments demonstrate that this framework can outperform classical and adaptive rule-based methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 随着通信网络复杂度和流量的不断增长，通信负载均衡解决方案越来越受到关注。具体来说，与传统的基于规则的方法相比，基于强化学习（RL）的方法表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，标准强化学习方法通​​常需要大量数据进行训练，并且对于训练过程中未遇到的场景泛化能力较差。我们提出了一个策略重用框架，其中策略选择器根据当前的流量状况选择最合适的预训练强化学习策略来执行。我们的方法取决于一个政策库，该政策库由经过不同交通场景训练的政策组成。当部署到未知的流量场景时，我们根据当前场景的前一天流量与训练期间观察到的流量的相似度从策略库中选择策略。实验表明，该框架可以大幅优于经典和基于自适应规则的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于策略复用的通信负载均衡框架，用于应对未见过的流量场景。
AI.motivation: 传统规则方法效果有限，而强化学习方法需大量数据训练且泛化能力差，难以适应未知流量场景。
AI.method: 构建包含多场景预训练策略的策略库，通过比较当前流量与训练流量的相似性选择最优策略执行。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架显著优于经典和自适应规则方法，在未知场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 策略复用框架有效解决了RL方法的泛化问题，提升了通信负载均衡的适应性与性能。

We propose a policy reuse framework in which a policy selector chooses the most suitable pre-trained RL policy to execute based on the current traffic condition. Our method hinges on a policy bank composed of policies trained on a diverse set of traffic scenarios. When deploying to an unknown traffic scenario, we select a policy from the policy bank based on the similarity between the previous-day traffic of the current scenario and the traffic observed during training. Experiments demonstrate that this framework can outperform classical and adaptive rule-based methods by a large margin. 随着通信网络复杂度和流量的不断增长，通信负载均衡解决方案越来越受到关注。具体来说，与传统的基于规则的方法相比，基于强化学习（RL）的方法表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，标准强化学习方法通​​常需要大量数据进行训练，并且对于训练过程中未遇到的场景泛化能力较差。我们提出了一个策略重用框架，其中策略选择器根据当前的流量状况选择最合适的预训练强化学习策略来执行。我们的方法取决于一个政策库，该政策库由经过不同交通场景训练的政策组成。当部署到未知的流量场景时，我们根据当前场景的前一天流量与训练期间观察到的流量的相似度从策略库中选择策略。实验表明，该框架可以大幅优于经典和基于自适应规则的方法。 本文提出了一种基于策略复用的通信负载均衡框架，用于应对未见过的流量场景。 Yi Tian Xu,Jimmy Li,Di Wu,Michael Jenkin,Seowoo Jang,Xue Liu,Gregory Dudek cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Janik-Vasily Benzin,Gyunam Park,Stefanie Rinderle-Ma
title: Preventing Object-centric Discovery of Unsound Process Models for Object Interactions with Loops in Collaborative Systems: Extended Version
title_zh: 防止以对象为中心发现协作系统中对象与循环的不健全过程模型：扩展版本
abstract: Object-centric process discovery (OCPD) constitutes a paradigm shift in process mining. Instead of assuming a single case notion present in the event log, OCPD can handle events without a single case notion, but that are instead related to a collection of objects each having a certain type. The object types constitute multiple, interacting case notions. The output of OCPD is an object-centric Petri net, i.e. a Petri net with object-typed places, that represents the parallel execution of multiple execution flows corresponding to object types. Similar to classical process discovery, where we aim for behaviorally sound process models as a result, in OCPD, we aim for soundness of the resulting object-centric Petri nets. However, the existing OCPD approach can result in violations of soundness. As we will show, one violation arises for multiple interacting object types with loops that arise in collaborative systems. This paper proposes an extended OCPD approach and proves that it does not suffer from this violation of soundness of the resulting object-centric Petri nets. We also show how we prevent the OCPD approach from introducing spurious interactions in the discovered object-centric Petri net. The proposed framework is prototypically implemented.
summary: Object-centric process discovery (OCPD) constitutes a paradigm shift in process mining. Instead of assuming a single case notion present in the event log, OCPD can handle events without a single case notion, but that are instead related to a collection of objects each having a certain type. The object types constitute multiple, interacting case notions. The output of OCPD is an object-centric Petri net, i.e. a Petri net with object-typed places, that represents the parallel execution of multiple execution flows corresponding to object types. Similar to classical process discovery, where we aim for behaviorally sound process models as a result, in OCPD, we aim for soundness of the resulting object-centric Petri nets. However, the existing OCPD approach can result in violations of soundness. As we will show, one violation arises for multiple interacting object types with loops that arise in collaborative systems. This paper proposes an extended OCPD approach and proves that it does not suffer from this violation of soundness of the resulting object-centric Petri nets. We also show how we prevent the OCPD approach from introducing spurious interactions in the discovered object-centric Petri net. The proposed framework is prototypically implemented.
abstract_zh: 以对象为中心的流程发现（OCPD）构成了流程挖掘的范式转变。 OCPD 可以处理没有单例概念的事件，而不是假设事件日志中存在单例概念，而是与每个具有特定类型的对象集合相关。对象类型构成多个相互作用的案例概念。 OCPD的输出是一个以对象为中心的Petri网，即具有对象类型位置的Petri网，它表示与对象类型对应的多个执行流的并行执行。与经典的流程发现类似，我们的目标是行为上合理的流程模型，在 OCPD 中，我们的目标是最终得到的以对象为中心的 Petri 网的健全性。然而，现有的 OCPD 方法可能会导致违反健全性。正如我们将展示的，协作系统中出现循环的多个交互对象类型会出现一种违规情况。本文提出了一种扩展的 OCPD 方法，并证明它不会违反由此产生的以对象为中心的 Petri 网的健全性。我们还展示了如何防止 OCPD 方法在发现的以对象为中心的 Petri 网络中引入虚假交互。所提出的框架已按原型实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的对象中心流程发现方法，解决协作系统中因对象交互循环导致的不合理流程模型问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对象中心流程发现方法在处理协作系统中存在循环的对象交互时，可能生成违反合理性的流程模型，导致错误交互。
AI.method: 扩展对象中心流程发现框架，通过调整流程发现逻辑防止循环引发的不合理性，并引入机制避免虚假交互的生成。
AI.result: 新方法有效消除了对象交互循环导致的不合理性问题，原型实现验证了其可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的框架确保了对象中心Petri网的合理性，适用于协作系统场景，且原型验证了方法的实际效果。
