authors_text: Kexin Gu Baugh,Nuri Cingillioglu,Alessandra Russo
title: Neuro-symbolic Rule Learning in Real-world Classification Tasks
title_zh: 现实世界分类任务中的神经符号规则学习
abstract: Neuro-symbolic rule learning has attracted lots of attention as it offers better interpretability than pure neural models and scales better than symbolic rule learning. A recent approach named pix2rule proposes a neural Disjunctive Normal Form (neural DNF) module to learn symbolic rules with feed-forward layers. Although proved to be effective in synthetic binary classification, pix2rule has not been applied to more challenging tasks such as multi-label and multi-class classifications over real-world data. In this paper, we address this limitation by extending the neural DNF module to (i) support rule learning in real-world multi-class and multi-label classification tasks, (ii) enforce the symbolic property of mutual exclusivity (i.e. predicting exactly one class) in multi-class classification, and (iii) explore its scalability over large inputs and outputs. We train a vanilla neural DNF model similar to pix2rule's neural DNF module for multi-label classification, and we propose a novel extended model called neural DNF-EO (Exactly One) which enforces mutual exclusivity in multi-class classification. We evaluate the classification performance, scalability and interpretability of our neural DNF-based models, and compare them against pure neural models and a state-of-the-art symbolic rule learner named FastLAS. We demonstrate that our neural DNF-based models perform similarly to neural networks, but provide better interpretability by enabling the extraction of logical rules. Our models also scale well when the rule search space grows in size, in contrast to FastLAS, which fails to learn in multi-class classification tasks with 200 classes and in all multi-label settings.
summary: Neuro-symbolic rule learning has attracted lots of attention as it offers better interpretability than pure neural models and scales better than symbolic rule learning. A recent approach named pix2rule proposes a neural Disjunctive Normal Form (neural DNF) module to learn symbolic rules with feed-forward layers. Although proved to be effective in synthetic binary classification, pix2rule has not been applied to more challenging tasks such as multi-label and multi-class classifications over real-world data. In this paper, we address this limitation by extending the neural DNF module to (i) support rule learning in real-world multi-class and multi-label classification tasks, (ii) enforce the symbolic property of mutual exclusivity (i.e. predicting exactly one class) in multi-class classification, and (iii) explore its scalability over large inputs and outputs. We train a vanilla neural DNF model similar to pix2rule's neural DNF module for multi-label classification, and we propose a novel extended model called neural DNF-EO (Exactly One) which enforces mutual exclusivity in multi-class classification. We evaluate the classification performance, scalability and interpretability of our neural DNF-based models, and compare them against pure neural models and a state-of-the-art symbolic rule learner named FastLAS. We demonstrate that our neural DNF-based models perform similarly to neural networks, but provide better interpretability by enabling the extraction of logical rules. Our models also scale well when the rule search space grows in size, in contrast to FastLAS, which fails to learn in multi-class classification tasks with 200 classes and in all multi-label settings.
abstract_zh: 神经符号规则学习引起了广泛的关注，因为它比纯神经模型提供了更好的可解释性，并且比符号规则学习具有更好的规模。最近一种名为 pix2rule 的方法提出了一种神经析取范式（神经 DNF）模块，用于通过前馈层学习符号规则。尽管已被证明在合成二元分类中有效，但 pix2rule 尚未应用于更具挑战性的任务，例如对现实世界数据的多标签和多类分类。在本文中，我们通过扩展神经 DNF 模块来解决这一限制：(i) 支持现实世界多类和多标签分类任务中的规则学习，(ii) 在多类分类中强制执行互斥性的符号属性（即准确预测一个类），以及 (iii) 探索其在大输入和输出上的可扩展性。我们训练了一个类似于 pix2rule 的神经 DNF 模块的普通神经 DNF 模型，用于多标签分类，并提出了一种称为神经 DNF-EO（Exactly One）的新型扩展模型，该模型在多类分类中强制执行互斥性。我们评估了基于 DNF 的神经模型的分类性能、可扩展性和可解释性，并将它们与纯神经模型和名为 FastLAS 的最先进的符号规则学习器进行比较。我们证明，我们的基于 DNF 的神经模型的性能与神经网络类似，但通过提取逻辑规则来提供更好的可解释性。当规则搜索空间增大时，我们的模型也能很好地扩展，而 FastLAS 则无法在具有 200 个类的多类分类任务和所有多标签设置中进行学习。

AI.tldr: 本文将神经符号规则学习方法扩展至真实世界的多类别和多标签分类任务，提出改进的神经DNF模型以提升可解释性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号规则学习方法（如pix2rule）在合成数据上表现良好，但尚未有效应用于真实世界的复杂分类任务，且缺乏对多类别互斥性和大规模数据的处理能力。
AI.method: 扩展神经DNF模块以支持多标签分类，提出神经DNF-EO模型强制多类别分类的互斥性，并通过实验验证模型在可扩展性、分类性能和可解释性上的表现。
AI.result: 模型在分类性能上与神经网络相当，但能提取逻辑规则提升可解释性；在规则搜索空间扩大时表现优于FastLAS，后者在200类多分类和多标签任务中失效。
AI.conclusion: 神经DNF模型在真实世界分类任务中实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，且在可扩展性上优于现有符号规则学习方法。

Our models also scale well when the rule search space grows in size, in contrast to FastLAS, which fails to learn in multi-class classification tasks with 200 classes and in all multi-label settings. 神经符号规则学习引起了广泛的关注，因为它比纯神经模型提供了更好的可解释性，并且比符号规则学习具有更好的规模。最近一种名为 pix2rule 的方法提出了一种神经析取范式（神经 DNF）模块，用于通过前馈层学习符号规则。尽管已被证明在合成二元分类中有效，但 pix2rule 尚未应用于更具挑战性的任务，例如对现实世界数据的多标签和多类分类。在本文中，我们通过扩展神经 DNF 模块来解决这一限制：(i) 支持现实世界多类和多标签分类任务中的规则学习，(ii) 在多类分类中强制执行互斥性的符号属性（即准确预测一个类），以及 (iii) 探索其在大输入和输出上的可扩展性。我们训练了一个类似于 pix2rule 的神经 DNF 模块的普通神经 DNF 模型，用于多标签分类，并提出了一种称为神经 DNF-EO（Exactly One）的新型扩展模型，该模型在多类分类中强制执行互斥性。我们评估了基于 DNF 的神经模型的分类性能、可扩展性和可解释性，并将它们与纯神经模型和名为 FastLAS 的最先进的符号规则学习器进行比较。我们证明，我们的基于 DNF 的神经模型的性能与神经网络类似，但通过提取逻辑规则来提供更好的可解释性。当规则搜索空间增大时，我们的模型也能很好地扩展，而 FastLAS 则无法在具有 200 个类的多类分类任务和所有多标签设置中进行学习。 本文将神经符号规则学习方法扩展至真实世界的多类别和多标签分类任务，提出改进的神经DNF模型以提升可解释性和可扩展性。 Kexin Gu Baugh,Nuri Cingillioglu,Alessandra Russo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Edoardo Gabrielli,Dimitri Belli,Zoe Matrullo,Vittorio Miori,Gabriele Tolomei
title: Protecting Federated Learning from Extreme Model Poisoning Attacks via Multidimensional Time Series Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 通过多维时间序列异常检测保护联邦学习免受极端模型中毒攻击
abstract: Current defense mechanisms against model poisoning attacks in federated learning (FL) systems have proven effective up to a certain threshold of malicious clients. In this work, we introduce FLANDERS, a novel pre-aggregation filter for FL resilient to large-scale model poisoning attacks, i.e., when malicious clients far exceed legitimate participants. FLANDERS treats the sequence of local models sent by clients in each FL round as a matrix-valued time series. Then, it identifies malicious client updates as outliers in this time series by comparing actual observations with estimates generated by a matrix autoregressive forecasting model maintained by the server. Experiments conducted in several non-iid FL setups show that FLANDERS significantly improves robustness across a wide spectrum of attacks when paired with standard and robust existing aggregation methods.
summary: Current defense mechanisms against model poisoning attacks in federated learning (FL) systems have proven effective up to a certain threshold of malicious clients. In this work, we introduce FLANDERS, a novel pre-aggregation filter for FL resilient to large-scale model poisoning attacks, i.e., when malicious clients far exceed legitimate participants. FLANDERS treats the sequence of local models sent by clients in each FL round as a matrix-valued time series. Then, it identifies malicious client updates as outliers in this time series by comparing actual observations with estimates generated by a matrix autoregressive forecasting model maintained by the server. Experiments conducted in several non-iid FL setups show that FLANDERS significantly improves robustness across a wide spectrum of attacks when paired with standard and robust existing aggregation methods.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）系统中针对模型中毒攻击的当前防御机制已被证明在恶意客户端达到一定阈值时是有效的。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 FLANDERS，这是一种新颖的预聚合过滤器，用于 FL 抵御大规模模型中毒攻击，即当恶意客户端远远超过合法参与者时。 FLANDERS 将每个 FL 轮中客户端发送的本地模型序列视为矩阵值时间序列。然后，它通过将实际观察结果与服务器维护的矩阵自回归预测模型生成的估计值进行比较，将恶意客户端更新识别为该时间序列中的异常值。在多个非独立同分布 FL 设置中进行的实验表明，当与标准且稳健的现有聚合方法配合使用时，FLANDERS 显着提高了各种攻击的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLANDERS，一种通过多维时间序列异常检测抵御联邦学习中大规模模型投毒攻击的预聚合过滤方法。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制在恶意客户端数量超过合法参与者时失效，需应对极端模型投毒攻击的场景。
AI.method: 将客户端每轮更新的本地模型序列视为矩阵时间序列，利用服务器端维护的矩阵自回归模型预测值与实际观测值对比，识别异常更新作为恶意客户端。
AI.result: 在多种非独立同分布设置下，FLANDERS与标准或鲁棒聚合方法结合时，显著提升对抗广泛攻击类型的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FLANDERS通过时间序列分析有效检测极端投毒攻击，为联邦学习提供新型安全防护方案。

authors_text: Pan Xiao,Peijie Qiu,Sungmin Ha,Abdalla Bani,Shuang Zhou,Aristeidis Sotiras
title: SC-VAE: Sparse Coding-based Variational Autoencoder with Learned ISTA
title_zh: SC-VAE：具有学习 ISTA 的基于稀疏编码的变分自动编码器
abstract: Learning rich data representations from unlabeled data is a key challenge towards applying deep learning algorithms in downstream tasks. Several variants of variational autoencoders (VAEs) have been proposed to learn compact data representations by encoding high-dimensional data in a lower dimensional space. Two main classes of VAEs methods may be distinguished depending on the characteristics of the meta-priors that are enforced in the representation learning step. The first class of methods derives a continuous encoding by assuming a static prior distribution in the latent space. The second class of methods learns instead a discrete latent representation using vector quantization (VQ) along with a codebook. However, both classes of methods suffer from certain challenges, which may lead to suboptimal image reconstruction results. The first class suffers from posterior collapse, whereas the second class suffers from codebook collapse. To address these challenges, we introduce a new VAE variant, termed sparse coding-based VAE with learned ISTA (SC-VAE), which integrates sparse coding within variational autoencoder framework. The proposed method learns sparse data representations that consist of a linear combination of a small number of predetermined orthogonal atoms. The sparse coding problem is solved using a learnable version of the iterative shrinkage thresholding algorithm (ISTA). Experiments on two image datasets demonstrate that our model achieves improved image reconstruction results compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, we demonstrate that the use of learned sparse code vectors allows us to perform downstream tasks like image generation and unsupervised image segmentation through clustering image patches.
summary: Learning rich data representations from unlabeled data is a key challenge towards applying deep learning algorithms in downstream tasks. Several variants of variational autoencoders (VAEs) have been proposed to learn compact data representations by encoding high-dimensional data in a lower dimensional space. Two main classes of VAEs methods may be distinguished depending on the characteristics of the meta-priors that are enforced in the representation learning step. The first class of methods derives a continuous encoding by assuming a static prior distribution in the latent space. The second class of methods learns instead a discrete latent representation using vector quantization (VQ) along with a codebook. However, both classes of methods suffer from certain challenges, which may lead to suboptimal image reconstruction results. The first class suffers from posterior collapse, whereas the second class suffers from codebook collapse. To address these challenges, we introduce a new VAE variant, termed sparse coding-based VAE with learned ISTA (SC-VAE), which integrates sparse coding within variational autoencoder framework. The proposed method learns sparse data representations that consist of a linear combination of a small number of predetermined orthogonal atoms. The sparse coding problem is solved using a learnable version of the iterative shrinkage thresholding algorithm (ISTA). Experiments on two image datasets demonstrate that our model achieves improved image reconstruction results compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, we demonstrate that the use of learned sparse code vectors allows us to perform downstream tasks like image generation and unsupervised image segmentation through clustering image patches.
abstract_zh: 从未标记的数据中学习丰富的数据表示是在下游任务中应用深度学习算法的关键挑战。已经提出了变分自动编码器（VAE）的几种变体，通过在较低维空间中编码高维数据来学习紧凑的数据表示。根据表示学习步骤中强制执行的元先验的特征，可以区分两类主要的 VAE 方法。第一类方法通过假设潜在空间中的静态先验分布来导出连续编码。第二类方法使用矢量量化（VQ）和密码本来学习离散潜在表示。然而，这两类方法都面临着某些挑战，这可能导致图像重建结果不理想。第一类遭受后塌陷，而第二类遭受码本塌陷。为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了一种新的 VAE 变体，称为基于稀疏编码的 VAE 和学习的 ISTA (SC-VAE)，它将稀疏编码集成到变分自动编码器框架中。所提出的方法学习由少量预定正交原子的线性组合组成的稀疏数据表示。使用迭代收缩阈值算法 (ISTA) 的可学习版本来解决稀疏编码问题。对两个图像数据集的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的模型实现了改进的图像重建结果。此外，我们证明，使用学习到的稀疏代码向量使我们能够通过聚类图像块来执行下游任务，例如图像生成和无监督图像分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏编码的变分自编码器（SC-VAE），通过引入可学习的ISTA算法解决传统VAE在图像重建中的后验坍塌和码本坍塌问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VAE方法存在后验坍塌（连续编码）和码本坍塌（离散编码）的缺陷，导致图像重建效果不佳，需探索新的稀疏编码框架提升表示学习能力。
AI.method: 将稀疏编码整合到VAE框架中，利用可学习的迭代收缩阈值算法（ISTA）求解稀疏编码问题，通过预设正交原子的线性组合生成稀疏表示。
AI.result: 在两个图像数据集上实现优于现有方法的图像重建效果，并通过聚类图像块完成图像生成和无监督分割等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: SC-VAE通过稀疏编码有效缓解了VAE的表示学习缺陷，在图像重建和下游任务中展现出优越性能。

authors_text: Abhish Khanal,Gregory J. Stein
title: Learning Augmented, Multi-Robot Long-Horizon Navigation in Partially Mapped Environments
title_zh: 在部分地图环境中学习增强型多机器人长视野导航
abstract: We present a novel approach for efficient and reliable goal-directed long-horizon navigation for a multi-robot team in a structured, unknown environment by predicting statistics of unknown space. Building on recent work in learning-augmented model based planning under uncertainty, we introduce a high-level state and action abstraction that lets us approximate the challenging Dec-POMDP into a tractable stochastic MDP. Our Multi-Robot Learning over Subgoals Planner (MR-LSP) guides agents towards coordinated exploration of regions more likely to reach the unseen goal. We demonstrate improvement in cost against other multi-robot strategies; in simulated office-like environments, we show that our approach saves 13.29% (2 robot) and 4.6% (3 robot) average cost versus standard non-learned optimistic planning and a learning-informed baseline.
summary: We present a novel approach for efficient and reliable goal-directed long-horizon navigation for a multi-robot team in a structured, unknown environment by predicting statistics of unknown space. Building on recent work in learning-augmented model based planning under uncertainty, we introduce a high-level state and action abstraction that lets us approximate the challenging Dec-POMDP into a tractable stochastic MDP. Our Multi-Robot Learning over Subgoals Planner (MR-LSP) guides agents towards coordinated exploration of regions more likely to reach the unseen goal. We demonstrate improvement in cost against other multi-robot strategies; in simulated office-like environments, we show that our approach saves 13.29% (2 robot) and 4.6% (3 robot) average cost versus standard non-learned optimistic planning and a learning-informed baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过预测未知空间的统计数据，为结构化、未知环境中的多机器人团队提供高效、可靠的目标导向长视野导航。基于最近在不确定性下基于学习增强模型的规划工作，我们引入了高级状态和动作抽象，使我们能够将具有挑战性的 Dec-POMDP 近似为易于处理的随机 MDP。我们的多机器人子目标学习规划器 (MR-LSP) 指导智能体协调探索更有可能实现看不见的目标的区域。我们展示了相对于其他多机器人策略的成本改进；在模拟的类似办公室的环境中，我们表明，与标准的非学习乐观规划和学习知情基线相比，我们的方法可节省 13.29%（2 个机器人）和 4.6%（3 个机器人）的平均成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习增强的多机器人长时距导航方法，用于部分已知环境中的高效目标探索。
AI.motivation: 传统多机器人规划方法在部分映射环境中难以平衡探索与利用，导致导航效率低下且成本较高。
AI.method: 通过预测未知空间统计特征，将复杂Dec-POMDP问题抽象为随机MDP，并设计MR-LSP算法实现子目标驱动的协同探索。
AI.result: 在模拟办公室场景中，2机器人团队平均成本降低13.29%，3机器人团队降低4.6%。
AI.conclusion: 学习增强框架有效提升了多机器人团队在未知环境中的长期导航效率，验证了统计预测与协同规划结合的可行性。

authors_text: Jiahao Chang,Jiahuan Yu,Tianzhu Zhang
title: Structured Epipolar Matcher for Local Feature Matching
title_zh: 用于局部特征匹配的结构化极线匹配器
comment: Accepted to CVPR Workshop 2023 (Image Matching: Local Features & Beyond). Project Page: https://sem2023.github.io
comments: Accepted to CVPR Workshop 2023 (Image Matching: Local Features & Beyond). Project Page: https://sem2023.github.io
abstract: Local feature matching is challenging due to textureless and repetitive patterns. Existing methods focus on using appearance features and global interaction and matching, while the importance of geometry priors in local feature matching has not been fully exploited. Different from these methods, in this paper, we delve into the importance of geometry prior and propose Structured Epipolar Matcher (SEM) for local feature matching, which can leverage the geometric information in an iterative matching way. The proposed model enjoys several merits. First, our proposed Structured Feature Extractor can model the relative positional relationship between pixels and high-confidence anchor points. Second, our proposed Epipolar Attention and Matching can filter out irrelevant areas by utilizing the epipolar constraint. Extensive experimental results on five standard benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of our SEM compared to state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://sem2023.github.io.
summary: Local feature matching is challenging due to textureless and repetitive patterns. Existing methods focus on using appearance features and global interaction and matching, while the importance of geometry priors in local feature matching has not been fully exploited. Different from these methods, in this paper, we delve into the importance of geometry prior and propose Structured Epipolar Matcher (SEM) for local feature matching, which can leverage the geometric information in an iterative matching way. The proposed model enjoys several merits. First, our proposed Structured Feature Extractor can model the relative positional relationship between pixels and high-confidence anchor points. Second, our proposed Epipolar Attention and Matching can filter out irrelevant areas by utilizing the epipolar constraint. Extensive experimental results on five standard benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of our SEM compared to state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://sem2023.github.io.
abstract_zh: 由于无纹理和重复的模式，局部特征匹配具有挑战性。现有方法侧重于使用外观特征以及全局交互和匹配，而几何先验在局部特征匹配中的重要性尚未得到充分利用。与这些方法不同，在本文中，我们深入研究了几何先验的重要性，并提出了用于局部特征匹配的结构化对极匹配器（SEM），它可以以迭代匹配的方式利用几何信息。所提出的模型有几个优点。首先，我们提出的结构化特征提取器可以对像素和高置信度锚点之间的相对位置关系进行建模。其次，我们提出的极线注意力和匹配可以利用极线约束过滤掉不相关的区域。五个标准基准的广泛实验结果证明了我们的 SEM 与最先进的方法相比具有卓越的性能。项目页面：https://sem2023.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化极线匹配器（SEM），用于解决局部特征匹配中因纹理缺失和重复模式导致的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖外观特征和全局交互，未充分挖掘几何先验在局部特征匹配中的潜力。
AI.method: 设计了结构化特征提取器建模像素与高置信度锚点的相对位置关系，并引入极线注意力机制利用极线约束过滤无关区域。
AI.result: 在五个标准基准测试中，SEM相较于最先进方法展现出更优的匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何先验的迭代利用，SEM有效提升了局部特征匹配的鲁棒性和准确性。

authors_text: Qin Yang,Ramviyas Parasuraman
title: A Hierarchical Game-Theoretic Decision-Making for Cooperative Multi-Agent Systems Under the Presence of Adversarial Agents
title_zh: 对抗性智能体存在下合作多智能体系统的分层博弈论决策
comment: This paper is accepted by the ACM Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC) 2023 Technical Track on Intelligent Robotics and Multi-Agent Systems (IRMAS)
comments: This paper is accepted by the ACM Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC) 2023 Technical Track on Intelligent Robotics and Multi-Agent Systems (IRMAS)
abstract: Underlying relationships among Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) in hazardous scenarios can be represented as Game-theoretic models. This paper proposes a new hierarchical network-based model called Game-theoretic Utility Tree (GUT), which decomposes high-level strategies into executable low-level actions for cooperative MAS decisions. It combines with a new payoff measure based on agent needs for real-time strategy games. We present an Explore game domain, where we measure the performance of MAS achieving tasks from the perspective of balancing the success probability and system costs. We evaluate the GUT approach against state-of-the-art methods that greedily rely on rewards of the composite actions. Conclusive results on extensive numerical simulations indicate that GUT can organize more complex relationships among MAS cooperation, helping the group achieve challenging tasks with lower costs and higher winning rates. Furthermore, we demonstrated the applicability of the GUT using the simulator-hardware testbed - Robotarium. The performances verified the effectiveness of the GUT in the real robot application and validated that the GUT could effectively organize MAS cooperation strategies, helping the group with fewer advantages achieve higher performance.
summary: Underlying relationships among Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) in hazardous scenarios can be represented as Game-theoretic models. This paper proposes a new hierarchical network-based model called Game-theoretic Utility Tree (GUT), which decomposes high-level strategies into executable low-level actions for cooperative MAS decisions. It combines with a new payoff measure based on agent needs for real-time strategy games. We present an Explore game domain, where we measure the performance of MAS achieving tasks from the perspective of balancing the success probability and system costs. We evaluate the GUT approach against state-of-the-art methods that greedily rely on rewards of the composite actions. Conclusive results on extensive numerical simulations indicate that GUT can organize more complex relationships among MAS cooperation, helping the group achieve challenging tasks with lower costs and higher winning rates. Furthermore, we demonstrated the applicability of the GUT using the simulator-hardware testbed - Robotarium. The performances verified the effectiveness of the GUT in the real robot application and validated that the GUT could effectively organize MAS cooperation strategies, helping the group with fewer advantages achieve higher performance.
abstract_zh: 危险场景中多代理系统 (MAS) 之间的潜在关系可以表示为博弈论模型。本文提出了一种新的基于分层网络的模型，称为博弈论效用树（GUT），它将高级策略分解为可执行的低级动作，以供 MAS 合作决策。它结合了基于代理对实时策略游戏的需求的新收益衡量标准。我们提出了一个探索游戏域，从平衡成功概率和系统成本的角度来衡量 MAS 完成任务的性能。我们根据最先进的方法来评估 GUT 方法，这些方法贪婪地依赖于复合动作的奖励。大量数值模拟的结论性结果表明，GUT可以组织MAS合作之间更复杂的关系，帮助团队以更低的成本和更高的胜率完成具有挑战性的任务。此外，我们使用模拟器硬件测试台 - Robotarium 展示了 GUT 的适用性。性能验证了GUT在真实机器人应用中的有效性，验证了GUT能够有效组织MAS合作策略，帮助优势较少的群体获得更高的绩效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于博弈论的分层决策模型GUT，用于在存在对抗代理的情况下，实现多智能体系统的协作决策。
AI.motivation: 在危险场景中，多智能体系统之间的协作关系复杂，传统的基于奖励的贪心方法难以有效组织复杂的协作关系，因此需要一种新的方法来提升协作效率和任务完成率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的分层网络模型Game-theoretic Utility Tree（GUT），将高层策略分解为可执行的低层动作，并结合基于代理需求的新收益度量方法，用于实时策略游戏。
AI.result: 通过大量数值模拟和Robotarium仿真平台的测试，结果表明GUT能够更有效地组织多智能体协作关系，实现更复杂任务，同时降低系统成本并提高任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: GUT模型在协作多智能体系统的任务执行中表现出色，验证了其在实际机器人应用中的有效性，能够帮助资源较少的团队实现更高性能。

method: 本文提出了一种新的分层网络模型Game-theoretic Utility Tree（GUT），将高层策略分解为可执行的低层动作，并结合基于代理需求的新收益度量方法，用于实时策略游戏。
result: 通过大量数值模拟和Robotarium仿真平台的测试，结果表明GUT能够更有效地组织多智能体协作关系，实现更复杂任务，同时降低系统成本并提高任务成功率。
conclusion: GUT模型在协作多智能体系统的任务执行中表现出色，验证了其在实际机器人应用中的有效性，能够帮助资源较少的团队实现更高性能。
search_text: A Hierarchical Game-Theoretic Decision-Making for Cooperative Multi-Agent Systems Under the Presence of Adversarial Agents 对抗性智能体存在下合作多智能体系统的分层博弈论决策 Underlying relationships among Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) in hazardous scenarios can be represented as Game-theoretic models. This paper proposes a new hierarchical network-based model called Game-theoretic Utility Tree (GUT), which decomposes high-level strategies into executable low-level actions for cooperative MAS decisions. It combines with a new payoff measure based on agent needs for real-time strategy games. We present an Explore game domain, where we measure the performance of MAS achieving tasks from the perspective of balancing the success probability and system costs. We evaluate the GUT approach against state-of-the-art methods that greedily rely on rewards of the composite actions. Conclusive results on extensive numerical simulations indicate that GUT can organize more complex relationships among MAS cooperation, helping the group achieve challenging tasks with lower costs and higher winning rates. Furthermore, we demonstrated the applicability of the GUT using the simulator-hardware testbed - Robotarium. The performances verified the effectiveness of the GUT in the real robot application and validated that the GUT could effectively organize MAS cooperation strategies, helping the group with fewer advantages achieve higher performance. 危险场景中多代理系统 (MAS) 之间的潜在关系可以表示为博弈论模型。本文提出了一种新的基于分层网络的模型，称为博弈论效用树（GUT），它将高级策略分解为可执行的低级动作，以供 MAS 合作决策。它结合了基于代理对实时策略游戏的需求的新收益衡量标准。我们提出了一个探索游戏域，从平衡成功概率和系统成本的角度来衡量 MAS 完成任务的性能。我们根据最先进的方法来评估 GUT 方法，这些方法贪婪地依赖于复合动作的奖励。大量数值模拟的结论性结果表明，GUT可以组织MAS合作之间更复杂的关系，帮助团队以更低的成本和更高的胜率完成具有挑战性的任务。此外，我们使用模拟器硬件测试台 - Robotarium 展示了 GUT 的适用性。性能验证了GUT在真实机器人应用中的有效性，验证了GUT能够有效组织MAS合作策略，帮助优势较少的群体获得更高的绩效。 本文提出了一种基于博弈论的分层决策模型GUT，用于在存在对抗代理的情况下，实现多智能体系统的协作决策。 Qin Yang,Ramviyas Parasuraman cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yi-Syuan Liou,Tsung-Han Wu,Jia-Fong Yeh,Wen-Chin Chen,Winston H. Hsu
title: MuRAL: Multi-Scale Region-based Active Learning for Object Detection
title_zh: MuRAL：用于目标检测的多尺度区域主动学习
abstract: Obtaining large-scale labeled object detection dataset can be costly and time-consuming, as it involves annotating images with bounding boxes and class labels. Thus, some specialized active learning methods have been proposed to reduce the cost by selecting either coarse-grained samples or fine-grained instances from unlabeled data for labeling. However, the former approaches suffer from redundant labeling, while the latter methods generally lead to training instability and sampling bias. To address these challenges, we propose a novel approach called Multi-scale Region-based Active Learning (MuRAL) for object detection. MuRAL identifies informative regions of various scales to reduce annotation costs for well-learned objects and improve training performance. The informative region score is designed to consider both the predicted confidence of instances and the distribution of each object category, enabling our method to focus more on difficult-to-detect classes. Moreover, MuRAL employs a scale-aware selection strategy that ensures diverse regions are selected from different scales for labeling and downstream finetuning, which enhances training stability. Our proposed method surpasses all existing coarse-grained and fine-grained baselines on Cityscapes and MS COCO datasets, and demonstrates significant improvement in difficult category performance.
summary: Obtaining large-scale labeled object detection dataset can be costly and time-consuming, as it involves annotating images with bounding boxes and class labels. Thus, some specialized active learning methods have been proposed to reduce the cost by selecting either coarse-grained samples or fine-grained instances from unlabeled data for labeling. However, the former approaches suffer from redundant labeling, while the latter methods generally lead to training instability and sampling bias. To address these challenges, we propose a novel approach called Multi-scale Region-based Active Learning (MuRAL) for object detection. MuRAL identifies informative regions of various scales to reduce annotation costs for well-learned objects and improve training performance. The informative region score is designed to consider both the predicted confidence of instances and the distribution of each object category, enabling our method to focus more on difficult-to-detect classes. Moreover, MuRAL employs a scale-aware selection strategy that ensures diverse regions are selected from different scales for labeling and downstream finetuning, which enhances training stability. Our proposed method surpasses all existing coarse-grained and fine-grained baselines on Cityscapes and MS COCO datasets, and demonstrates significant improvement in difficult category performance.
abstract_zh: 获取大规模标记对象检测数据集可能既昂贵又耗时，因为它涉及使用边界框和类标签来注释图像。因此，人们提出了一些专门的主动学习方法，通过从未标记的数据中选择粗粒度样本或细粒度实例进行标记来降低成本。然而，前一种方法存在冗余标签，而后一种方法通常会导致训练不稳定和采样偏差。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种称为基于多尺度区域的主动学习（MuRAL）的新方法来进行对象检测。 MuRAL 识别各种尺度的信息区域，以减少学习良好的对象的注释成本并提高训练性能。信息区域得分旨在考虑实例的预测置信度和每个对象类别的分布，使我们的方法能够更多地关注难以检测的类。此外，MuRAL 采用尺度感知选择策略，确保从不同尺度选择不同区域进行标记和下游微调，从而增强训练稳定性。我们提出的方法超越了 Cityscapes 和 MS COCO 数据集上所有现有的粗粒度和细粒度基线，并展示了困难类别性能的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度区域主动学习方法MuRAL，用于减少目标检测数据集的标注成本并提升训练性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法在目标检测中存在冗余标注或训练不稳定的问题，需平衡粗粒度与细粒度样本选择的不足。
AI.method: MuRAL通过多尺度区域信息度量，结合实例置信度与类别分布计算区域得分，并采用尺度感知策略选择多样化区域进行标注与微调。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和MS COCO数据集上超越所有现有粗粒度与细粒度基线方法，尤其在难检类别上表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MuRAL通过多尺度区域选择策略有效降低了标注成本，同时提升了目标检测模型的训练稳定性与性能。

authors_text: Yuyang Wang,Jean-Rémy Chardonnet,Frédéric Merienne
title: Modeling online adaptive navigation in virtual environments based on PID control
title_zh: 基于PID控制的虚拟环境中在线自适应导航建模
abstract: It is well known that locomotion-dominated navigation tasks may highly provoke cybersickness effects. Past research has proposed numerous approaches to tackle this issue based on offline considerations. In this work, a novel approach to mitigate cybersickness is presented based on online adaptative navigation. Considering the Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) control method, we proposed a mathematical model for online adaptive navigation parameterized with several parameters, taking as input the users' electro-dermal activity (EDA), an efficient indicator to measure the cybersickness level, and providing as output adapted navigation accelerations. Therefore, minimizing the cybersickness level is regarded as an argument optimization problem: find the PID model parameters which can reduce the severity of cybersickness. User studies were organized to collect non-adapted navigation accelerations and the corresponding EDA signals. A deep neural network was then formulated to learn the correlation between EDA and navigation accelerations. The hyperparameters of the network were obtained through the Optuna open-source framework. To validate the performance of the optimized online adaptive navigation developed through the PID control, we performed an analysis in a simulated user study based on the pre-trained deep neural network. Results indicate a significant reduction of cybersickness in terms of EDA signal analysis and motion sickness dose value. This is a pioneering work which presented a systematic strategy for adaptive navigation settings from a theoretical point.

Past research has proposed numerous approaches to tackle this issue based on offline considerations. In this work, a novel approach to mitigate cybersickness is presented based on online adaptative navigation. Considering the Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) control method, we proposed a mathematical model for online adaptive navigation parameterized with several parameters, taking as input the users' electro-dermal activity (EDA), an efficient indicator to measure the cybersickness level, and providing as output adapted navigation accelerations. Therefore, minimizing the cybersickness level is regarded as an argument optimization problem: find the PID model parameters which can reduce the severity of cybersickness. User studies were organized to collect non-adapted navigation accelerations and the corresponding EDA signals. A deep neural network was then formulated to learn the correlation between EDA and navigation accelerations. The hyperparameters of the network were obtained through the Optuna open-source framework. To validate the performance of the optimized online adaptive navigation developed through the PID control, we performed an analysis in a simulated user study based on the pre-trained deep neural network. abstract_zh: 众所周知，以运动为主的导航任务可能会严重引发晕机效应。过去的研究提出了许多基于离线考虑的方法来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于在线自适应导航的减轻晕眩症的新方法。考虑到比例积分微分（PID）控制方法，我们提出了一种用多个参数参数化的在线自适应导航数学模型，以用户的皮肤电活动（EDA）作为输入，这是衡量眩晕程度的有效指标，并提供自适应导航加速度作为输出。因此，最小化晕眩程度被视为参数优化问题：找到能够降低晕眩严重程度的PID模型参数。组织用户研究来收集未适应的导航加速度和相应的 EDA 信号。然后制定深度神经网络来学习 EDA 和导航加速度之间的相关性。网络的超参数是通过Optuna开源框架获得的。为了验证通过 PID 控制开发的优化在线自适应导航的性能，我们在基于预训练深度神经网络的模拟用户研究中进行了分析。结果表明，在 EDA 信号分析和晕动病剂量值方面，晕动症显着减少。这是一项开创性的工作，从理论角度提出了自适应导航设置的系统策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于PID控制的在线自适应导航模型，通过用户皮肤电活动（EDA）实时调整虚拟环境中的导航参数以减轻晕动症。
AI.motivation: 传统离线导航方法无法有效缓解虚拟环境中的晕动症，需开发实时自适应策略以动态优化导航参数。
AI.method: 结合PID控制理论，以EDA为输入构建数学模型，利用深度神经网络学习EDA与导航加速度的关系，并通过Optuna框架优化网络超参数。
AI.result: 模拟用户实验显示，优化后的在线自适应导航显著降低了EDA信号和晕动症剂量值，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统提出基于PID控制的实时自适应导航框架，为虚拟环境中的晕动症缓解提供了理论与实践方案。

To validate the performance of the optimized online adaptive navigation developed through the PID control, we performed an analysis in a simulated user study based on the pre-trained deep neural network. Results indicate a significant reduction of cybersickness in terms of EDA signal analysis and motion sickness dose value. This is a pioneering work which presented a systematic strategy for adaptive navigation settings from a theoretical point. 众所周知，以运动为主的导航任务可能会严重引发晕机效应。过去的研究提出了许多基于离线考虑的方法来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于在线自适应导航的减轻晕眩症的新方法。考虑到比例积分微分（PID）控制方法，我们提出了一种用多个参数参数化的在线自适应导航数学模型，以用户的皮肤电活动（EDA）作为输入，这是衡量眩晕程度的有效指标，并提供自适应导航加速度作为输出。因此，最小化晕眩程度被视为参数优化问题：找到能够降低晕眩严重程度的PID模型参数。组织用户研究来收集未适应的导航加速度和相应的 EDA 信号。然后制定深度神经网络来学习 EDA 和导航加速度之间的相关性。网络的超参数是通过Optuna开源框架获得的。为了验证通过 PID 控制开发的优化在线自适应导航的性能，我们在基于预训练深度神经网络的模拟用户研究中进行了分析。结果表明，在 EDA 信号分析和晕动病剂量值方面，晕动症显着减少。这是一项开创性的工作，从理论角度提出了自适应导航设置的系统策略。 本文提出基于PID控制的在线自适应导航模型，通过用户皮肤电活动（EDA）实时调整虚拟环境中的导航参数以减轻晕动症。 Yuyang Wang,Jean-Rémy Chardonnet,Frédéric Merienne cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Yang Liu,Dan Iter,Yichong Xu,Shuohang Wang,Ruochen Xu,Chenguang Zhu
title: G-Eval: NLG Evaluation using GPT-4 with Better Human Alignment
title_zh: G-Eval：使用具有更好人类一致性的 GPT-4 进行 NLG 评估
abstract: The quality of texts generated by natural language generation (NLG) systems is hard to measure automatically. Conventional reference-based metrics, such as BLEU and ROUGE, have been shown to have relatively low correlation with human judgments, especially for tasks that require creativity and diversity. Recent studies suggest using large language models (LLMs) as reference-free metrics for NLG evaluation, which have the benefit of being applicable to new tasks that lack human references. However, these LLM-based evaluators still have lower human correspondence than medium-size neural evaluators. In this work, we present G-Eval, a framework of using large language models with chain-of-thoughts (CoT) and a form-filling paradigm, to assess the quality of NLG outputs. We experiment with two generation tasks, text summarization and dialogue generation. We show that G-Eval with GPT-4 as the backbone model achieves a Spearman correlation of 0.514 with human on summarization task, outperforming all previous methods by a large margin. We also propose preliminary analysis on the behavior of LLM-based evaluators, and highlight the potential issue of LLM-based evaluators having a bias towards the LLM-generated texts. The code is at https://github.com/nlpyang/geval
summary: The quality of texts generated by natural language generation (NLG) systems is hard to measure automatically. Conventional reference-based metrics, such as BLEU and ROUGE, have been shown to have relatively low correlation with human judgments, especially for tasks that require creativity and diversity. Recent studies suggest using large language models (LLMs) as reference-free metrics for NLG evaluation, which have the benefit of being applicable to new tasks that lack human references. However, these LLM-based evaluators still have lower human correspondence than medium-size neural evaluators. In this work, we present G-Eval, a framework of using large language models with chain-of-thoughts (CoT) and a form-filling paradigm, to assess the quality of NLG outputs. We experiment with two generation tasks, text summarization and dialogue generation. We show that G-Eval with GPT-4 as the backbone model achieves a Spearman correlation of 0.514 with human on summarization task, outperforming all previous methods by a large margin. We also propose preliminary analysis on the behavior of LLM-based evaluators, and highlight the potential issue of LLM-based evaluators having a bias towards the LLM-generated texts. The code is at https://github.com/nlpyang/geval
abstract_zh: 自然语言生成（NLG）系统生成的文本的质量很难自动测量。传统的基于参考的指标（例如 BLEU 和 ROUGE）已被证明与人类判断的相关性相对较低，特别是对于需要创造力和多样性的任务。最近的研究建议使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 作为 NLG 评估的无参考指标，其优点是适用于缺乏人类参考的新任务。然而，这些基于 LLM 的评估器的人类对应性仍然低于中等规模的神经评估器。在这项工作中，我们提出了 G-Eval，一个使用具有思想链 (CoT) 的大型语言模型和表单填写范例的框架，来评估 NLG 输出的质量。我们尝试了两个生成任务：文本摘要和对话生成。我们表明，以 GPT-4 作为骨干模型的 G-Eval 在摘要任务上与人类的 Spearman 相关性达到 0.514，大幅优于之前的所有方法。我们还对基于LLM的评估者的行为提出初步分析，并强调基于LLM的评估者对LLM生成的文本存在偏见的潜在问题。代码位于 https://github.com/nlpyang/geval

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-Eval框架，利用GPT-4结合思维链（CoT）和填表范式，提升自然语言生成（NLG）评估与人类判断的一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统自动评估指标（如BLEU、ROUGE）与人类判断相关性较低，而现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的评估方法仍存在对人类判断的偏差，尤其在创意性任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 采用GPT-4作为核心模型，结合思维链推理（CoT）和结构化填表范式，设计评估框架并应用于文本摘要和对话生成任务。
AI.result: 在摘要任务中，G-Eval与人类判断的Spearman相关性达0.514，显著优于先前方法；同时发现LLM评估器对自身生成文本存在偏好偏差。
AI.conclusion: G-Eval通过CoT和填表范式提升了NLG评估效果，但需警惕LLM评估器对生成内容的潜在偏见，未来需进一步优化对齐策略。

authors_text: Qing Lian,Tai Wang,Dahua Lin,Jiangmiao Pang
title: DORT: Modeling Dynamic Objects in Recurrent for Multi-Camera 3D Object Detection and Tracking
title_zh: DORT：循环建模动态对象以实现多摄像头 3D 对象检测和跟踪
abstract: Recent multi-camera 3D object detectors usually leverage temporal information to construct multi-view stereo that alleviates the ill-posed depth estimation. However, they typically assume all the objects are static and directly aggregate features across frames. This work begins with a theoretical and empirical analysis to reveal that ignoring the motion of moving objects can result in serious localization bias. Therefore, we propose to model Dynamic Objects in RecurrenT (DORT) to tackle this problem. In contrast to previous global Bird-Eye-View (BEV) methods, DORT extracts object-wise local volumes for motion estimation that also alleviates the heavy computational burden. By iteratively refining the estimated object motion and location, the preceding features can be precisely aggregated to the current frame to mitigate the aforementioned adverse effects. The simple framework has two significant appealing properties. It is flexible and practical that can be plugged into most camera-based 3D object detectors. As there are predictions of object motion in the loop, it can easily track objects across frames according to their nearest center distances. Without bells and whistles, DORT outperforms all the previous methods on the nuScenes detection and tracking benchmarks with 62.5\% NDS and 57.6\% AMOTA, respectively. The source code will be released.
summary: Recent multi-camera 3D object detectors usually leverage temporal information to construct multi-view stereo that alleviates the ill-posed depth estimation. However, they typically assume all the objects are static and directly aggregate features across frames. This work begins with a theoretical and empirical analysis to reveal that ignoring the motion of moving objects can result in serious localization bias. Therefore, we propose to model Dynamic Objects in RecurrenT (DORT) to tackle this problem. In contrast to previous global Bird-Eye-View (BEV) methods, DORT extracts object-wise local volumes for motion estimation that also alleviates the heavy computational burden. By iteratively refining the estimated object motion and location, the preceding features can be precisely aggregated to the current frame to mitigate the aforementioned adverse effects. The simple framework has two significant appealing properties. It is flexible and practical that can be plugged into most camera-based 3D object detectors. As there are predictions of object motion in the loop, it can easily track objects across frames according to their nearest center distances. Without bells and whistles, DORT outperforms all the previous methods on the nuScenes detection and tracking benchmarks with 62.5\% NDS and 57.6\% AMOTA, respectively. The source code will be released.
abstract_zh: 最近的多摄像头 3D 物体检测器通常利用时间信息来构建多视图立体，从而减轻不适定的深度估计。然而，他们通常假设所有对象都是静态的，并直接聚合跨帧的特征。这项工作从理论和实证分析开始，揭示忽略移动物体的运动可能会导致严重的定位偏差。因此，我们建议在 RecurrenT (DORT) 中对动态对象进行建模来解决这个问题。与之前的全局鸟瞰 (BEV) 方法相比，DORT 提取对象局部体积进行运动估计，这也减轻了繁重的计算负担。通过迭代地细化估计的对象运动和位置，可以将前面的特征精确地聚合到当前帧，以减轻上述不利影响。这个简单的框架有两个重要的吸引人的特性。它灵活实用，可以插入大多数基于相机的 3D 物体检测器。由于循环中存在对象运动的预测，因此它可以根据最近的中心距离轻松跨帧跟踪对象。没有花里胡哨的东西，DORT 在 nuScenes 检测和跟踪基准上的表现优于之前的所有方法，分别为 62.5\% NDS 和 57.6\% AMOTA。源代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DORT方法，通过建模动态对象的运动来改进多摄像头3D目标检测与跟踪，解决静态假设导致的定位偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设所有对象静止，忽略运动导致定位偏差，需通过建模动态对象运动来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: DORT采用对象级局部体素估计运动，迭代优化运动与位置，精确聚合跨帧特征，支持灵活集成至主流检测器并实现跨帧跟踪。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，DORT达到62.5% NDS和57.6% AMOTA，优于所有先前方法。
AI.conclusion: DORT通过动态建模有效提升多摄像头3D检测与跟踪精度，兼具灵活性与高效性。

authors_text: Hilde Weerts,Miroslav Dudík,Richard Edgar,Adrin Jalali,Roman Lutz,Michael Madaio
title: Fairlearn: Assessing and Improving Fairness of AI Systems
title_zh: Fairlearn：评估和提高人工智能系统的公平性
abstract: Fairlearn is an open source project to help practitioners assess and improve fairness of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. The associated Python library, also named fairlearn, supports evaluation of a model's output across affected populations and includes several algorithms for mitigating fairness issues. Grounded in the understanding that fairness is a sociotechnical challenge, the project integrates learning resources that aid practitioners in considering a system's broader societal context.
summary: Fairlearn is an open source project to help practitioners assess and improve fairness of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. The associated Python library, also named fairlearn, supports evaluation of a model's output across affected populations and includes several algorithms for mitigating fairness issues. Grounded in the understanding that fairness is a sociotechnical challenge, the project integrates learning resources that aid practitioners in considering a system's broader societal context.
abstract_zh: Fairlearn 是一个开源项目，旨在帮助从业者评估和提高人工智能（AI）系统的公平性。相关的 Python 库也称为 fairlearn，支持对受影响人群的模型输出进行评估，并包含多种用于缓解公平问题的算法。该项目基于对公平是一项社会技术挑战的理解，整合了学习资源，帮助从业者考虑系统更广泛的社会背景。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Fairlearn的开源项目，旨在帮助从业者评估和改进人工智能系统的公平性，并提供了相应的Python库支持。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统可能存在公平性问题，需通过工具和方法评估并缓解这些问题，同时需结合社会技术视角考虑更广泛的社会背景。
AI.method: 开发Python库支持跨群体模型评估，集成多种公平性缓解算法，并提供学习资源帮助从业者理解社会技术挑战。
AI.result: 提供了评估AI公平性的工具和算法，帮助从业者识别和缓解公平性问题，促进更负责任的AI系统开发。
AI.conclusion: Fairlearn项目通过技术工具与社会视角结合，为改善AI公平性提供了实践框架和资源支持。

authors_text: Jiahuan Yu,Jiahao Chang,Jianfeng He,Tianzhu Zhang,Feng Wu
title: Adaptive Spot-Guided Transformer for Consistent Local Feature Matching
title_zh: 用于一致局部特征匹配的自适应点引导变压器
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page: https://astr2023.github.io/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page: https://astr2023.github.io/
abstract: Local feature matching aims at finding correspondences between a pair of images. Although current detector-free methods leverage Transformer architecture to obtain an impressive performance, few works consider maintaining local consistency. Meanwhile, most methods struggle with large scale variations. To deal with the above issues, we propose Adaptive Spot-Guided Transformer (ASTR) for local feature matching, which jointly models the local consistency and scale variations in a unified coarse-to-fine architecture. The proposed ASTR enjoys several merits. First, we design a spot-guided aggregation module to avoid interfering with irrelevant areas during feature aggregation. Second, we design an adaptive scaling module to adjust the size of grids according to the calculated depth information at fine stage. Extensive experimental results on five standard benchmarks demonstrate that our ASTR performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Our code will be released on https://astr2023.github.io.
summary: Local feature matching aims at finding correspondences between a pair of images. Although current detector-free methods leverage Transformer architecture to obtain an impressive performance, few works consider maintaining local consistency. Meanwhile, most methods struggle with large scale variations. To deal with the above issues, we propose Adaptive Spot-Guided Transformer (ASTR) for local feature matching, which jointly models the local consistency and scale variations in a unified coarse-to-fine architecture. The proposed ASTR enjoys several merits. First, we design a spot-guided aggregation module to avoid interfering with irrelevant areas during feature aggregation. Second, we design an adaptive scaling module to adjust the size of grids according to the calculated depth information at fine stage. Extensive experimental results on five standard benchmarks demonstrate that our ASTR performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Our code will be released on https://astr2023.github.io.
abstract_zh: 局部特征匹配旨在找到一对图像之间的对应关系。尽管当前的无检测器方法利用 Transformer 架构来获得令人印象深刻的性能，但很少有工作考虑保持局部一致性。与此同时，大多数方法都在应对大规模变化。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了用于局部特征匹配的自适应点引导变换器（ASTR），它在统一的从粗到细的架构中联合建模局部一致性和尺度变化。拟议的 ASTR 有几个优点。首先，我们设计了一个点引导聚合模块，以避免在特征聚合过程中干扰不相关区域。其次，我们设计了一个自适应缩放模块，根据精细阶段计算的深度信息来调整网格的大小。五个标准基准的广泛实验结果表明，我们的 ASTR 的性能优于最先进的方法。我们的代码将在 https://astr2023.github.io 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应斑点引导的Transformer（ASTR），用于实现一致的局部特征匹配。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的无检测器方法利用Transformer架构在局部特征匹配中取得了令人印象深刻的效果，但很少有工作考虑到保持局部一致性，同时大多数方法在处理大尺度变化时存在困难。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种自适应斑点引导的Transformer（ASTR），通过统一的粗到细架构联合建模局部一致性和尺度变化。设计了斑点引导聚合模块以避免在特征聚合过程中干扰无关区域，并设计了自适应缩放模块以根据细阶段计算的深度信息调整网格大小。
AI.result: 在五个标准基准测试中进行了广泛的实验，结果表明ASTR在与最先进的方法相比时表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ASTR方法在局部特征匹配任务中表现出色，有效解决了局部一致性和尺度变化的问题。

authors_text: Mahmoud Salhab,Haidar Harmanani
title: AraSpot: Arabic Spoken Command Spotting
title_zh: AraSpot：阿拉伯语口语命令识别
abstract: Spoken keyword spotting (KWS) is the task of identifying a keyword in an audio stream and is widely used in smart devices at the edge in order to activate voice assistants and perform hands-free tasks. The task is daunting as there is a need, on the one hand, to achieve high accuracy while at the same time ensuring that such systems continue to run efficiently on low power and possibly limited computational capabilities devices. This work presents AraSpot for Arabic keyword spotting trained on 40 Arabic keywords, using different online data augmentation, and introducing ConformerGRU model architecture. Finally, we further improve the performance of the model by training a text-to-speech model for synthetic data generation. AraSpot achieved a State-of-the-Art SOTA 99.59% result outperforming previous approaches.
summary: Spoken keyword spotting (KWS) is the task of identifying a keyword in an audio stream and is widely used in smart devices at the edge in order to activate voice assistants and perform hands-free tasks. The task is daunting as there is a need, on the one hand, to achieve high accuracy while at the same time ensuring that such systems continue to run efficiently on low power and possibly limited computational capabilities devices. This work presents AraSpot for Arabic keyword spotting trained on 40 Arabic keywords, using different online data augmentation, and introducing ConformerGRU model architecture. Finally, we further improve the performance of the model by training a text-to-speech model for synthetic data generation. AraSpot achieved a State-of-the-Art SOTA 99.59% result outperforming previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 语音关键字识别 (KWS) 是识别音频流中的关键字的任务，广泛应用于边缘智能设备中，以激活语音助手并执行免提任务。这项任务是艰巨的，因为一方面需要实现高精度，同时确保此类系统继续在低功耗且计算能力可能有限的设备上高效运行。这项工作提出了 AraSpot，用于在 40 个阿拉伯语关键字上进行阿拉伯语关键字识别训练，使用不同的在线数据增强，并引入 ConformerGRU 模型架构。最后，我们通过训练用于合成数据生成的文本到语音模型来进一步提高模型的性能。 AraSpot 取得了最先进的 SOTA 99.59% 结果，优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AraSpot系统，专注于阿拉伯语语音指令识别，用于在低功耗设备中高效激活语音助手。
AI.motivation: 现有语音关键词识别系统在低功耗设备上难以兼顾高准确率与计算效率，需优化模型架构与数据策略。
AI.method: 采用在线数据增强技术，设计ConformerGRU混合模型架构，并通过文本到语音模型生成合成数据提升训练效果。
AI.result: AraSpot在阿拉伯语关键词识别任务中达到99.59%的准确率，超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: AraSpot验证了混合模型架构与合成数据增强在阿拉伯语语音指令识别中的有效性，为边缘设备部署提供新方案。

authors_text: Sebastian Vincent,Alice Dowek,Rowanne Sumner,Charlotte Blundell,Emily Preston,Chris Bayliss,Chris Oakley,Carolina Scarton
title: Reference-less Analysis of Context Specificity in Translation with Personalised Language Models
title_zh: 使用个性化语言模型对翻译中的上下文特异性进行无参考分析
abstract: Sensitising language models (LMs) to external context helps them to more effectively capture the speaking patterns of individuals with specific characteristics or in particular environments. This work investigates to what extent rich character and film annotations can be leveraged to personalise LMs in a scalable manner. We then explore the use of such models in evaluating context specificity in machine translation. We build LMs which leverage rich contextual information to reduce perplexity by up to 6.5% compared to a non-contextual model, and generalise well to a scenario with no speaker-specific data, relying on combinations of demographic characteristics expressed via metadata. Our findings are consistent across two corpora, one of which (Cornell-rich) is also a contribution of this paper. We then use our personalised LMs to measure the co-occurrence of extra-textual context and translation hypotheses in a machine translation setting. Our results suggest that the degree to which professional translations in our domain are context-specific can be preserved to a better extent by a contextual machine translation model than a non-contextual model, which is also reflected in the contextual model's superior reference-based scores.
summary: Sensitising language models (LMs) to external context helps them to more effectively capture the speaking patterns of individuals with specific characteristics or in particular environments. This work investigates to what extent rich character and film annotations can be leveraged to personalise LMs in a scalable manner. We then explore the use of such models in evaluating context specificity in machine translation. We build LMs which leverage rich contextual information to reduce perplexity by up to 6.5% compared to a non-contextual model, and generalise well to a scenario with no speaker-specific data, relying on combinations of demographic characteristics expressed via metadata. Our findings are consistent across two corpora, one of which (Cornell-rich) is also a contribution of this paper. We then use our personalised LMs to measure the co-occurrence of extra-textual context and translation hypotheses in a machine translation setting. Our results suggest that the degree to which professional translations in our domain are context-specific can be preserved to a better extent by a contextual machine translation model than a non-contextual model, which is also reflected in the contextual model's superior reference-based scores.
abstract_zh: 使语言模型 (LM) 对外部上下文敏感有助于它们更有效地捕捉具有特定特征或特定环境中的个体的说话模式。这项工作研究了在多大程度上可以利用丰富的角色和电影注释以可扩展的方式个性化 LM。然后，我们探索使用此类模型来评估机器翻译中的上下文特异性。与非上下文模型相比，我们构建的语言模型利用丰富的上下文信息将困惑度降低了高达 6.5%，并且依赖于通过元数据表达的人口统计特征的组合，可以很好地推广到没有特定于说话者的数据的场景。我们的研究结果在两个语料库中是一致的，其中一个（Cornell-rich）也是本文的贡献。然后，我们使用个性化的 LM 来衡量机器翻译环境中文本外上下文和翻译假设的共现。我们的结果表明，与非语境模型相比，语境机器翻译模型可以更好地保留我们领域中专业翻译的语境特定程度，这也反映在语境模型卓越的基于参考的分数中。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用个性化语言模型分析翻译中的上下文特异性，无需参考译文。
AI.motivation: 现有翻译模型未充分考虑外部上下文信息，导致无法准确捕捉特定人物或环境下的表达模式。
AI.method: 构建利用角色和影视标注信息的个性化语言模型，通过降低困惑度评估上下文相关性，并在机器翻译中验证上下文特异性保留效果。
AI.result: 模型困惑度降低6.5%，且在无特定说话人数据时仍能通过元数据组合泛化；上下文模型比非上下文模型更有效保留专业翻译的上下文特异性。
AI.conclusion: 结合外部上下文的个性化语言模型能显著提升机器翻译对领域内专业翻译上下文特异性的保留能力。

authors_text: Haoqian Wu,Zhipeng Hu,Lincheng Li,Yongqiang Zhang,Changjie Fan,Xin Yu
title: NeFII: Inverse Rendering for Reflectance Decomposition with Near-Field Indirect Illumination
title_zh: NeFII：利用近场间接照明进行反射率分解的逆向渲染
abstract: Inverse rendering methods aim to estimate geometry, materials and illumination from multi-view RGB images. In order to achieve better decomposition, recent approaches attempt to model indirect illuminations reflected from different materials via Spherical Gaussians (SG), which, however, tends to blur the high-frequency reflection details. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end inverse rendering pipeline that decomposes materials and illumination from multi-view images, while considering near-field indirect illumination. In a nutshell, we introduce the Monte Carlo sampling based path tracing and cache the indirect illumination as neural radiance, enabling a physics-faithful and easy-to-optimize inverse rendering method. To enhance efficiency and practicality, we leverage SG to represent the smooth environment illuminations and apply importance sampling techniques. To supervise indirect illuminations from unobserved directions, we develop a novel radiance consistency constraint between implicit neural radiance and path tracing results of unobserved rays along with the joint optimization of materials and illuminations, thus significantly improving the decomposition performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on multiple synthetic and real datasets, especially in terms of inter-reflection decomposition.Our code and data are available at https://woolseyyy.github.io/nefii/.
summary: Inverse rendering methods aim to estimate geometry, materials and illumination from multi-view RGB images. In order to achieve better decomposition, recent approaches attempt to model indirect illuminations reflected from different materials via Spherical Gaussians (SG), which, however, tends to blur the high-frequency reflection details. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end inverse rendering pipeline that decomposes materials and illumination from multi-view images, while considering near-field indirect illumination. In a nutshell, we introduce the Monte Carlo sampling based path tracing and cache the indirect illumination as neural radiance, enabling a physics-faithful and easy-to-optimize inverse rendering method. To enhance efficiency and practicality, we leverage SG to represent the smooth environment illuminations and apply importance sampling techniques. To supervise indirect illuminations from unobserved directions, we develop a novel radiance consistency constraint between implicit neural radiance and path tracing results of unobserved rays along with the joint optimization of materials and illuminations, thus significantly improving the decomposition performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art on multiple synthetic and real datasets, especially in terms of inter-reflection decomposition.Our code and data are available at https://woolseyyy.github.io/nefii/.
abstract_zh: 逆渲染方法旨在从多视图 RGB 图像中估计几何形状、材质和照明。为了实现更好的分解，最近的方法尝试通过球面高斯（SG）对从不同材料反射的间接照明进行建模，然而，这往往会模糊高频反射细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端逆渲染管道，可以分解多视图图像中的材质和照明，同时考虑近场间接照明。简而言之，我们引入了基于蒙特卡罗采样的路径追踪，并将间接照明缓存为神经辐射率，从而实现了一种忠实于物理且易于优化的逆渲染方法。为了提高效率和实用性，我们利用 SG 来表示平滑的环境照明并应用重要性采样技术。为了监督来自未观察方向的间接照明，我们在隐式神经辐射和未观察光线的路径追踪结果之间开发了一种新颖的辐射一致性约束，并结合材料和照明的联合优化，从而显着提高了分解性能。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在多个合成和真实数据集上优于最先进的方法，特别是在相互反射分解方面。我们的代码和数据可在 https://woolseyyy.github.io/nefii/ 上获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的逆向渲染方法NeFII，通过考虑近场间接光照，从多视角RGB图像中分解材质和光照。
AI.motivation: 现有基于球面高斯（SG）的间接光照建模方法容易模糊高频反射细节，难以准确分解材质与光照。
AI.method: 引入基于蒙特卡洛采样的路径追踪技术，将间接光照缓存为神经辐射度；结合SG表示环境光照并应用重要性采样；通过隐式神经辐射度与未观测光线路径追踪结果的辐射一致性约束，联合优化材质与光照。
AI.result: 在多个合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在镜面反射分解任务中表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合物理保真路径追踪与神经表示，本文方法有效解决了近场间接光照下的反射分解难题。

authors_text: Dajana Dimitrić,Mitar Simić,Vladimir Risojević
title: Nearest Neighbor Based Out-of-Distribution Detection in Remote Sensing Scene Classification
title_zh: 遥感场景分类中基于最近邻的分布外检测
abstract: Deep learning models for image classification are typically trained under the "closed-world" assumption with a predefined set of image classes. However, when the models are deployed they may be faced with input images not belonging to the classes encountered during training. This type of scenario is common in remote sensing image classification where images come from different geographic areas, sensors, and imaging conditions. In this paper we deal with the problem of detecting remote sensing images coming from a different distribution compared to the training data - out of distribution images. We propose a benchmark for out of distribution detection in remote sensing scene classification and evaluate detectors based on maximum softmax probability and nearest neighbors. The experimental results show convincing advantages of the method based on nearest neighbors.
summary: Deep learning models for image classification are typically trained under the "closed-world" assumption with a predefined set of image classes. However, when the models are deployed they may be faced with input images not belonging to the classes encountered during training. This type of scenario is common in remote sensing image classification where images come from different geographic areas, sensors, and imaging conditions. In this paper we deal with the problem of detecting remote sensing images coming from a different distribution compared to the training data - out of distribution images. We propose a benchmark for out of distribution detection in remote sensing scene classification and evaluate detectors based on maximum softmax probability and nearest neighbors. The experimental results show convincing advantages of the method based on nearest neighbors.
abstract_zh: 用于图像分类的深度学习模型通常在“封闭世界”假设下使用一组预定义的图像类进行训练。然而，当部署模型时，它们可能会面临不属于训练期间遇到的类别的输入图像。这种场景在遥感图像分类中很常见，其中图像来自不同的地理区域、传感器和成像条件。在本文中，我们处理检测来自与训练数据不同分布的遥感图像的问题 - 分布图像之外。我们提出了遥感场景分类中分布外检测的基准，并基于最大 softmax 概率和最近邻居评估检测器。实验结果表明基于最近邻的方法具有令人信服的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文针对遥感场景分类中的分布外检测问题，提出基准并评估基于最近邻的方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在封闭世界假设下训练，但实际部署时可能遇到训练未见的分布外数据，尤其在遥感图像中因地理、传感器差异导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建分布外检测基准，对比最大softmax概率与最近邻两种检测方法。
AI.result: 实验表明基于最近邻的方法在检测分布外遥感图像上具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 最近邻方法在遥感场景分类的分布外检测中表现优异，为后续研究提供有效方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文针对遥感场景分类中的分布外检测问题，提出基准并评估基于最近邻的方法。

search_text: Nearest Neighbor Based Out-of-Distribution Detection in Remote Sensing Scene Classification 遥感场景分类中基于最近邻的分布外检测 Deep learning models for image classification are typically trained under the "closed-world" assumption with a predefined set of image classes. However, when the models are deployed they may be faced with input images not belonging to the classes encountered during training. This type of scenario is common in remote sensing image classification where images come from different geographic areas, sensors, and imaging conditions. In this paper we deal with the problem of detecting remote sensing images coming from a different distribution compared to the training data - out of distribution images. We propose a benchmark for out of distribution detection in remote sensing scene classification and evaluate detectors based on maximum softmax probability and nearest neighbors. The experimental results show convincing advantages of the method based on nearest neighbors. 用于图像分类的深度学习模型通常在“封闭世界”假设下使用一组预定义的图像类进行训练。然而，当部署模型时，它们可能会面临不属于训练期间遇到的类别的输入图像。这种场景在遥感图像分类中很常见，其中图像来自不同的地理区域、传感器和成像条件。在本文中，我们处理检测来自与训练数据不同分布的遥感图像的问题 - 分布图像之外。我们提出了遥感场景分类中分布外检测的基准，并基于最大 softmax 概率和最近邻居评估检测器。实验结果表明基于最近邻的方法具有令人信服的优势。 本文针对遥感场景分类中的分布外检测问题，提出基准并评估基于最近邻的方法。 Dajana Dimitrić,Mitar Simić,Vladimir Risojević cs.CV

authors_text: Kaifeng Zou,Sylvain Faisan,Boyang Yu,Sébastien Valette,Hyewon Seo
title: 4D Facial Expression Diffusion Model
title_zh: 4D面部表情扩散模型
abstract: Facial expression generation is one of the most challenging and long-sought aspects of character animation, with many interesting applications. The challenging task, traditionally having relied heavily on digital craftspersons, remains yet to be explored. In this paper, we introduce a generative framework for generating 3D facial expression sequences (i.e. 4D faces) that can be conditioned on different inputs to animate an arbitrary 3D face mesh. It is composed of two tasks: (1) Learning the generative model that is trained over a set of 3D landmark sequences, and (2) Generating 3D mesh sequences of an input facial mesh driven by the generated landmark sequences. The generative model is based on a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), which has achieved remarkable success in generative tasks of other domains. While it can be trained unconditionally, its reverse process can still be conditioned by various condition signals. This allows us to efficiently develop several downstream tasks involving various conditional generation, by using expression labels, text, partial sequences, or simply a facial geometry. To obtain the full mesh deformation, we then develop a landmark-guided encoder-decoder to apply the geometrical deformation embedded in landmarks on a given facial mesh. Experiments show that our model has learned to generate realistic, quality expressions solely from the dataset of relatively small size, improving over the state-of-the-art methods. Videos and qualitative comparisons with other methods can be found at \url{https://github.com/ZOUKaifeng/4DFM}.
summary: Facial expression generation is one of the most challenging and long-sought aspects of character animation, with many interesting applications. The challenging task, traditionally having relied heavily on digital craftspersons, remains yet to be explored. In this paper, we introduce a generative framework for generating 3D facial expression sequences (i.e. 4D faces) that can be conditioned on different inputs to animate an arbitrary 3D face mesh. It is composed of two tasks: (1) Learning the generative model that is trained over a set of 3D landmark sequences, and (2) Generating 3D mesh sequences of an input facial mesh driven by the generated landmark sequences. The generative model is based on a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), which has achieved remarkable success in generative tasks of other domains. While it can be trained unconditionally, its reverse process can still be conditioned by various condition signals. This allows us to efficiently develop several downstream tasks involving various conditional generation, by using expression labels, text, partial sequences, or simply a facial geometry. To obtain the full mesh deformation, we then develop a landmark-guided encoder-decoder to apply the geometrical deformation embedded in landmarks on a given facial mesh. Experiments show that our model has learned to generate realistic, quality expressions solely from the dataset of relatively small size, improving over the state-of-the-art methods. Videos and qualitative comparisons with other methods can be found at \url{https://github.com/ZOUKaifeng/4DFM}.
abstract_zh: 面部表情生成是角色动画中最具挑战性和长期寻求的方面之一，有许多有趣的应用。这项具有挑战性的任务传统上严重依赖数字工匠，但仍有待探索。在本文中，我们介绍了一个用于生成 3D 面部表情序列（即 4D 面部）的生成框架，该框架可以根据不同的输入来对任意 3D 面部网格进行动画处理。它由两个任务组成：(1) 学习在一组 3D 地标序列上训练的生成模型，以及 (2) 生成由生成的地标序列驱动的输入面部网格的 3D 网格序列。该生成模型基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），该模型在其他领域的生成任务中取得了显着的成功。虽然它可以无条件地训练，但它的逆过程仍然可以通过各种条件信号来调节。这使我们能够通过使用表情标签、文本、部分序列或简单的面部几何形状，有效地开发涉及各种条件生成的多个下游任务。为了获得完整的网格变形，我们开发了一个地标引导的编码器-解码器，以应用嵌入在给定面部网格上的地标中的几何变形。实验表明，我们的模型已经学会仅从相对较小的数据集生成真实的、高质量的表达式，从而改进了最先进的方法。视频以及与其他方法的定性比较可以在 \url{https://github.com/ZOUKafeng/4DFM} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的4D人脸表情生成框架，能够根据不同输入条件生成任意3D人脸网格的动态表情序列。
AI.motivation: 面部表情生成是角色动画中最具挑战性的领域之一，传统方法依赖人工制作且效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）学习3D关键点序列生成模型，并设计关键点引导的编码器-解码器实现网格变形，支持多条件输入（如表情标签、文本、部分序列等）。
AI.result: 模型在较小数据集上训练即可生成高质量真实表情，优于现有方法，在GitHub提供视频和对比实验。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为4D人脸动画提供了高效可控的生成方案，验证了扩散模型在面部表情生成任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Maryam Viqar,Violeta Madjarova,Elena Stoykova
title: Modified watershed approach for segmentation of complex optical coherence tomographic images
title_zh: 用于复杂光学相干断层扫描图像分割的改进分水岭方法
abstract: Watershed segmentation method has been used in various applications. But many a times, due to its over-segmentation attributes, it underperforms in several tasks where noise is a dominant source. In this study, Optical Coherence Tomography images have been acquired, and segmentation has been performed to analyse the different regions of fluid filled sacs in a lemon. A modified watershed algorithm has been proposed which gives promising results for segmentation of internal lemon structures.
summary: Watershed segmentation method has been used in various applications. But many a times, due to its over-segmentation attributes, it underperforms in several tasks where noise is a dominant source. In this study, Optical Coherence Tomography images have been acquired, and segmentation has been performed to analyse the different regions of fluid filled sacs in a lemon. A modified watershed algorithm has been proposed which gives promising results for segmentation of internal lemon structures.
abstract_zh: 分水岭分割方法已用于各种应用中。但很多时候，由于其过度分割的属性，它在一些以噪声为主要来源的任务中表现不佳。在这项研究中，获取了光学相干断层扫描图像，并进行了分割来分析柠檬中充满液体的囊的不同区域。提出了一种改进的分水岭算法，它为内部柠檬结构的分割提供了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的分水岭算法用于分割复杂光学相干断层扫描图像，并应用于柠檬内部液体填充囊区域的分析。
AI.motivation: 传统分水岭算法存在过度分割问题，在噪声主导的场景下分割效果不佳，需改进方法提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 通过改进分水岭算法，结合光学相干断层扫描图像特性，优化分割过程以减少过度分割现象。
AI.result: 改进后的算法在柠檬内部结构分割任务中表现出良好效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的分水岭算法能有效处理复杂光学图像分割问题，为类似医学或生物图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Zheyuan Liu,Weixuan Sun,Yicong Hong,Damien Teney,Stephen Gould
title: Bi-directional Training for Composed Image Retrieval via Text Prompt Learning
title_zh: 通过文本提示学习进行组合图像检索的双向训练
abstract: Composed image retrieval searches for a target image based on a multi-modal user query comprised of a reference image and modification text describing the desired changes. Existing approaches to solving this challenging task learn a mapping from the (reference image, modification text)-pair to an image embedding that is then matched against a large image corpus. One area that has not yet been explored is the reverse direction, which asks the question, what reference image when modified as described by the text would produce the given target image? In this work we propose a bi-directional training scheme that leverages such reversed queries and can be applied to existing composed image retrieval architectures with minimum changes, which improves the performance of the model. To encode the bi-directional query we prepend a learnable token to the modification text that designates the direction of the query and then finetune the parameters of the text embedding module. We make no other changes to the network architecture. Experiments on two standard datasets show that our novel approach achieves improved performance over a baseline BLIP-based model that itself already achieves competitive performance. Our code is released at https://github.com/Cuberick-Orion/Bi-Blip4CIR.
summary: Composed image retrieval searches for a target image based on a multi-modal user query comprised of a reference image and modification text describing the desired changes. Existing approaches to solving this challenging task learn a mapping from the (reference image, modification text)-pair to an image embedding that is then matched against a large image corpus. One area that has not yet been explored is the reverse direction, which asks the question, what reference image when modified as described by the text would produce the given target image? In this work we propose a bi-directional training scheme that leverages such reversed queries and can be applied to existing composed image retrieval architectures with minimum changes, which improves the performance of the model. To encode the bi-directional query we prepend a learnable token to the modification text that designates the direction of the query and then finetune the parameters of the text embedding module. We make no other changes to the network architecture. Experiments on two standard datasets show that our novel approach achieves improved performance over a baseline BLIP-based model that itself already achieves competitive performance. Our code is released at https://github.com/Cuberick-Orion/Bi-Blip4CIR.
abstract_zh: 组合图像检索基于由参考图像和描述所需更改的修改文本组成的多模式用户查询来搜索目标图像。解决这一具有挑战性的任务的现有方法学习从（参考图像，修改文本）对到图像嵌入的映射，然后将其与大型图像语料库进行匹配。尚未探索的一个领域是反向方向，它提出了一个问题，当按照文本描述进行修改时，什么参考图像会产生给定的目标图像？在这项工作中，我们提出了一种双向训练方案，该方案利用这种反向查询，并且可以以最小的变化应用于现有的组合图像检索架构，从而提高模型的性能。为了对双向查询进行编码，我们在修改文本前添加一个可学习的标记，该标记指定查询的方向，然后微调文本嵌入模块的参数。我们没有对网络架构进行其他更改。对两个标准数据集的实验表明，与基于 BLIP 的基线模型相比，我们的新颖方法实现了更高的性能，而该模型本身已经实现了有竞争力的性能。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/Cuberick-Orion/Bi-Blip4CIR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双向训练方法，通过文本提示学习提升组合图像检索性能，同时处理正向和反向查询任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注正向查询（参考图+修改文本→目标图），未探索反向查询（目标图→参考图+修改文本）的潜在信息，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 在修改文本前添加可学习方向标记，微调文本嵌入模块参数，无需改变网络架构即可实现双向查询编码。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上优于基线BLIP模型，证明双向训练能有效提升组合图像检索效果。
AI.conclusion: 双向训练策略通过简单架构修改即可提升模型性能，为组合图像检索提供了新思路，代码已开源促进后续研究。

search_text: Bi-directional Training for Composed Image Retrieval via Text Prompt Learning 通过文本提示学习进行组合图像检索的双向训练 Composed image retrieval searches for a target image based on a multi-modal user query comprised of a reference image and modification text describing the desired changes. Existing approaches to solving this challenging task learn a mapping from the (reference image, modification text)-pair to an image embedding that is then matched against a large image corpus. One area that has not yet been explored is the reverse direction, which asks the question, what reference image when modified as described by the text would produce the given target image? In this work we propose a bi-directional training scheme that leverages such reversed queries and can be applied to existing composed image retrieval architectures with minimum changes, which improves the performance of the model. To encode the bi-directional query we prepend a learnable token to the modification text that designates the direction of the query and then finetune the parameters of the text embedding module. We make no other changes to the network architecture. Experiments on two standard datasets show that our novel approach achieves improved performance over a baseline BLIP-based model that itself already achieves competitive performance. Our code is released at https://github.com/Cuberick-Orion/Bi-Blip4CIR. 组合图像检索基于由参考图像和描述所需更改的修改文本组成的多模式用户查询来搜索目标图像。解决这一具有挑战性的任务的现有方法学习从（参考图像，修改文本）对到图像嵌入的映射，然后将其与大型图像语料库进行匹配。尚未探索的一个领域是反向方向，它提出了一个问题，当按照文本描述进行修改时，什么参考图像会产生给定的目标图像？在这项工作中，我们提出了一种双向训练方案，该方案利用这种反向查询，并且可以以最小的变化应用于现有的组合图像检索架构，从而提高模型的性能。为了对双向查询进行编码，我们在修改文本前添加一个可学习的标记，该标记指定查询的方向，然后微调文本嵌入模块的参数。我们没有对网络架构进行其他更改。对两个标准数据集的实验表明，与基于 BLIP 的基线模型相比，我们的新颖方法实现了更高的性能，而该模型本身已经实现了有竞争力的性能。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/Cuberick-Orion/Bi-Blip4CIR。 本文提出一种双向训练方法，通过文本提示学习提升组合图像检索性能，同时处理正向和反向查询任务。 Zheyuan Liu,Weixuan Sun,Yicong Hong,Damien Teney,Stephen Gould cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Yongquan Hu,Dawen Zhang,Mingyue Yuan,Kaiqi Xian,Don Samitha Elvitigala,June Kim,Gelareh Mohammadi,Zhenchang Xing,Xiwei Xu,Aaron Quigley
title: Investigating the Design Considerations for Integrating Text-to-Image Generative AI within Augmented Reality Environments
title_zh: 研究在增强现实环境中集成文本到图像生成人工智能的设计注意事项
abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) has emerged as a fundamental component of intelligent interactive systems, enabling the automatic generation of multimodal media content. The continuous enhancement in the quality of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC), including but not limited to images and text, is forging new paradigms for its application, particularly within the domain of Augmented Reality (AR). Nevertheless, the application of GenAI within the AR design process remains opaque. This paper aims to articulate a design space encapsulating a series of criteria and a prototypical process to aid practitioners in assessing the aptness of adopting pertinent technologies. The proposed model has been formulated based on a synthesis of design insights garnered from ten experts, obtained through focus group interviews. Leveraging these initial insights, we delineate potential applications of GenAI in AR.
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) has emerged as a fundamental component of intelligent interactive systems, enabling the automatic generation of multimodal media content. The continuous enhancement in the quality of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC), including but not limited to images and text, is forging new paradigms for its application, particularly within the domain of Augmented Reality (AR). Nevertheless, the application of GenAI within the AR design process remains opaque. This paper aims to articulate a design space encapsulating a series of criteria and a prototypical process to aid practitioners in assessing the aptness of adopting pertinent technologies. The proposed model has been formulated based on a synthesis of design insights garnered from ten experts, obtained through focus group interviews. Leveraging these initial insights, we delineate potential applications of GenAI in AR.
abstract_zh: 生成人工智能（GenAI）已成为智能交互系统的基本组成部分，能够自动生成多模式媒体内容。人工智能生成内容（AIGC）（包括但不限于图像和文本）质量的不断提高，正在为其应用打造新的范例，特别是在增强现实（AR）领域。然而，GenAI 在 AR 设计过程中的应用仍然不透明。本文旨在阐明一个包含一系列标准和原型流程的设计空间，以帮助从业者评估采用相关技术的适应性。所提出的模型是根据十位专家通过焦点小组访谈获得的设计见解的综合而制定的。利用这些初步见解，我们描绘了 GenAI 在 AR 中的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提出一个设计框架和原型流程，指导在增强现实（AR）环境中整合文本到图像的生成式AI（GenAI）的技术应用。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI在AR领域的应用缺乏系统性设计指导，需明确技术整合的关键考量因素以支持实践应用。
AI.method: 通过焦点小组访谈10位专家，综合设计见解并构建包含标准和流程的设计空间模型。
AI.result: 提出涵盖技术适配性评估标准的原型流程，并列举了GenAI在AR中的潜在应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从业者提供了评估GenAI技术适用性的依据，推动AR领域创新应用的发展。

authors_text: Shenyuan Gao,Chunluan Zhou,Jun Zhang
title: Generalized Relation Modeling for Transformer Tracking
title_zh: 变压器跟踪的广义关系模型
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. v3: fix a typo in equation (7). Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Little-Podi/GRM
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. v3: fix a typo in equation (7). Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Little-Podi/GRM
abstract: Compared with previous two-stream trackers, the recent one-stream tracking pipeline, which allows earlier interaction between the template and search region, has achieved a remarkable performance gain. However, existing one-stream trackers always let the template interact with all parts inside the search region throughout all the encoder layers. This could potentially lead to target-background confusion when the extracted feature representations are not sufficiently discriminative. To alleviate this issue, we propose a generalized relation modeling method based on adaptive token division. The proposed method is a generalized formulation of attention-based relation modeling for Transformer tracking, which inherits the merits of both previous two-stream and one-stream pipelines whilst enabling more flexible relation modeling by selecting appropriate search tokens to interact with template tokens. An attention masking strategy and the Gumbel-Softmax technique are introduced to facilitate the parallel computation and end-to-end learning of the token division module. Extensive experiments show that our method is superior to the two-stream and one-stream pipelines and achieves state-of-the-art performance on six challenging benchmarks with a real-time running speed.
summary: Compared with previous two-stream trackers, the recent one-stream tracking pipeline, which allows earlier interaction between the template and search region, has achieved a remarkable performance gain. However, existing one-stream trackers always let the template interact with all parts inside the search region throughout all the encoder layers. This could potentially lead to target-background confusion when the extracted feature representations are not sufficiently discriminative. To alleviate this issue, we propose a generalized relation modeling method based on adaptive token division. The proposed method is a generalized formulation of attention-based relation modeling for Transformer tracking, which inherits the merits of both previous two-stream and one-stream pipelines whilst enabling more flexible relation modeling by selecting appropriate search tokens to interact with template tokens. An attention masking strategy and the Gumbel-Softmax technique are introduced to facilitate the parallel computation and end-to-end learning of the token division module. Extensive experiments show that our method is superior to the two-stream and one-stream pipelines and achieves state-of-the-art performance on six challenging benchmarks with a real-time running speed.
abstract_zh: 与以前的双流跟踪器相比，最近的单流跟踪管道允许模板和搜索区域之间更早的交互，取得了显着的性能提升。然而，现有的单流跟踪器总是让模板与所有编码器层中搜索区域内的所有部分进行交互。当提取的特征表示没有足够的辨别力时，这可能会导致目标背景混淆。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于自适应令牌划分的广义关系建模方法。所提出的方法是用于 Transformer 跟踪的基于注意力的关系建模的通用表述，它继承了之前的双流和单流管道的优点，同时通过选择适当的搜索标记与模板标记交互来实现更灵活的关系建模。引入注意力屏蔽策略和Gumbel-Softmax技术来促进令牌划分模块的并行计算和端到端学习。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于两流和一流管道，并且在六个具有挑战性的基准测试上以实时运行速度实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应令牌划分的广义关系建模方法，用于改进Transformer跟踪器中模板与搜索区域的交互方式。
AI.motivation: 现有单流跟踪器在所有编码层中让模板与搜索区域所有部分交互，可能导致目标与背景混淆，而双流结构虽能避免此问题但效率较低。
AI.method: 通过自适应令牌划分选择性交互模板与搜索令牌，结合注意力掩码策略和Gumbel-Softmax技术实现并行计算与端到端学习。
AI.result: 在六个具有挑战性的基准测试中达到最先进性能，同时保持实时运行速度，优于传统双流和单流跟踪框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在继承双流与单流优势的基础上，通过灵活的关系建模显著提升了跟踪精度与效率。
