conclusion: 该方法在继承双流与单流优势的基础上，通过灵活的关系建模显著提升了跟踪精度与效率。
search_text: Generalized Relation Modeling for Transformer Tracking 变压器跟踪的广义关系模型 Compared with previous two-stream trackers, the recent one-stream tracking pipeline, which allows earlier interaction between the template and search region, has achieved a remarkable performance gain. However, existing one-stream trackers always let the template interact with all parts inside the search region throughout all the encoder layers. This could potentially lead to target-background confusion when the extracted feature representations are not sufficiently discriminative. To alleviate this issue, we propose a generalized relation modeling method based on adaptive token division. The proposed method is a generalized formulation of attention-based relation modeling for Transformer tracking, which inherits the merits of both previous two-stream and one-stream pipelines whilst enabling more flexible relation modeling by selecting appropriate search tokens to interact with template tokens. An attention masking strategy and the Gumbel-Softmax technique are introduced to facilitate the parallel computation and end-to-end learning of the token division module. Extensive experiments show that our method is superior to the two-stream and one-stream pipelines and achieves state-of-the-art performance on six challenging benchmarks with a real-time running speed. 与以前的双流跟踪器相比，最近的单流跟踪管道允许模板和搜索区域之间更早的交互，取得了显着的性能提升。然而，现有的单流跟踪器总是让模板与所有编码器层中搜索区域内的所有部分进行交互。当提取的特征表示没有足够的辨别力时，这可能会导致目标背景混淆。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于自适应令牌划分的广义关系建模方法。所提出的方法是用于 Transformer 跟踪的基于注意力的关系建模的通用表述，它继承了之前的双流和单流管道的优点，同时通过选择适当的搜索标记与模板标记交互来实现更灵活的关系建模。引入注意力屏蔽策略和Gumbel-Softmax技术来促进令牌划分模块的并行计算和端到端学习。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于两流和一流管道，并且在六个具有挑战性的基准测试上以实时运行速度实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于自适应令牌划分的广义关系建模方法，用于改进Transformer跟踪器中模板与搜索区域的交互方式。 Shenyuan Gao,Chunluan Zhou,Jun Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Konstantina Nikolaidou,George Retsinas,Vincent Christlein,Mathias Seuret,Giorgos Sfikas,Elisa Barney Smith,Hamam Mokayed,Marcus Liwicki
title: WordStylist: Styled Verbatim Handwritten Text Generation with Latent Diffusion Models
title_zh: WordStylist：使用潜在扩散模型生成风格逐字手写文本
abstract: Text-to-Image synthesis is the task of generating an image according to a specific text description. Generative Adversarial Networks have been considered the standard method for image synthesis virtually since their introduction. Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models are recently setting a new baseline, with remarkable results in Text-to-Image synthesis, among other fields. Aside its usefulness per se, it can also be particularly relevant as a tool for data augmentation to aid training models for other document image processing tasks. In this work, we present a latent diffusion-based method for styled text-to-text-content-image generation on word-level. Our proposed method is able to generate realistic word image samples from different writer styles, by using class index styles and text content prompts without the need of adversarial training, writer recognition, or text recognition. We gauge system performance with the Fréchet Inception Distance, writer recognition accuracy, and writer retrieval. We show that the proposed model produces samples that are aesthetically pleasing, help boosting text recognition performance, and get similar writer retrieval score as real data. Code is available at: https://github.com/koninik/WordStylist.
summary: Text-to-Image synthesis is the task of generating an image according to a specific text description. Generative Adversarial Networks have been considered the standard method for image synthesis virtually since their introduction. Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models are recently setting a new baseline, with remarkable results in Text-to-Image synthesis, among other fields. Aside its usefulness per se, it can also be particularly relevant as a tool for data augmentation to aid training models for other document image processing tasks. In this work, we present a latent diffusion-based method for styled text-to-text-content-image generation on word-level. Our proposed method is able to generate realistic word image samples from different writer styles, by using class index styles and text content prompts without the need of adversarial training, writer recognition, or text recognition. We gauge system performance with the Fréchet Inception Distance, writer recognition accuracy, and writer retrieval. We show that the proposed model produces samples that are aesthetically pleasing, help boosting text recognition performance, and get similar writer retrieval score as real data. Code is available at: https://github.com/koninik/WordStylist.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像合成是根据特定文本描述生成图像的任务。自推出以来，生成对抗网络实际上已被认为是图像合成的标准方法。去噪扩散概率模型最近设定了新的基线，在文本到图像合成等领域取得了显着的成果。除了其本身的实用性之外，它还可以作为数据增强工具特别相关，以帮助训练其他文档图像处理任务的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于潜在扩散的方法，用于在单词级别生成样式文本到文本内容图像。我们提出的方法能够通过使用类别索引样式和文本内容提示，从不同的作者风格生成真实的单词图像样本，而不需要对抗性训练、作者识别或文本识别。我们通过 Fréchet 起始距离、作者识别准确性和作者检索来衡量系统性能。我们表明，所提出的模型生成的样本美观，有助于提高文本识别性能，并获得与真实数据相似的作者检索分数。代码位于：https://github.com/koninik/WordStylist。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在扩散模型的单词级风格化文本到图像生成方法，能够根据文本内容和作者风格生成逼真的手写体图像。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像合成在数据增强等领域具有重要意义，传统GAN方法存在局限性，而扩散模型在生成质量上表现更优。现有方法常依赖对抗训练或识别模块，本文旨在提出无需这些组件的更高效方案。
AI.method: 采用潜在扩散模型框架，通过结合文本内容提示和作者风格类别索引，在潜在空间中生成手写体图像，无需对抗训练、作者识别或文本识别模块。
AI.result: 生成样本在美学评价、文本识别性能提升及作者检索准确率方面表现优异，FID分数和作者检索得分接近真实数据水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了风格化手写体图像生成，为文档图像处理任务提供了高质量的数据增强方案。

authors_text: Yuning Wang,Pu Zhang,Lei Bai,Jianru Xue
title: FEND: A Future Enhanced Distribution-Aware Contrastive Learning Framework for Long-tail Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: FEND：用于长尾轨迹预测的未来增强型分布感知对比学习框架
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023 (CVPR 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023 (CVPR 2023)
abstract: Predicting the future trajectories of the traffic agents is a gordian technique in autonomous driving. However, trajectory prediction suffers from data imbalance in the prevalent datasets, and the tailed data is often more complicated and safety-critical. In this paper, we focus on dealing with the long-tail phenomenon in trajectory prediction. Previous methods dealing with long-tail data did not take into account the variety of motion patterns in the tailed data. In this paper, we put forward a future enhanced contrastive learning framework to recognize tail trajectory patterns and form a feature space with separate pattern clusters. Furthermore, a distribution aware hyper predictor is brought up to better utilize the shaped feature space. Our method is a model-agnostic framework and can be plugged into many well-known baselines. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art long-tail prediction method on tailed samples by 9.5% on ADE and 8.5% on FDE, while maintaining or slightly improving the averaged performance. Our method also surpasses many long-tail techniques on trajectory prediction task.
summary: Predicting the future trajectories of the traffic agents is a gordian technique in autonomous driving. However, trajectory prediction suffers from data imbalance in the prevalent datasets, and the tailed data is often more complicated and safety-critical. In this paper, we focus on dealing with the long-tail phenomenon in trajectory prediction. Previous methods dealing with long-tail data did not take into account the variety of motion patterns in the tailed data. In this paper, we put forward a future enhanced contrastive learning framework to recognize tail trajectory patterns and form a feature space with separate pattern clusters. Furthermore, a distribution aware hyper predictor is brought up to better utilize the shaped feature space. Our method is a model-agnostic framework and can be plugged into many well-known baselines. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art long-tail prediction method on tailed samples by 9.5% on ADE and 8.5% on FDE, while maintaining or slightly improving the averaged performance. Our method also surpasses many long-tail techniques on trajectory prediction task.
abstract_zh: 预测交通人员的未来轨迹是自动驾驶中的一项关键技术。然而，轨迹预测受到普遍数据集中数据不平衡的影响，并且尾部数据通常更加复杂且安全性更高。在本文中，我们重点关注轨迹预测中的长尾现象。以前处理长尾数据的方法没有考虑尾部数据中运动模式的多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种未来的增强对比学习框架来识别尾部轨迹模式并形成具有单独模式簇的特征空间。此外，提出了一个分布感知超预测器，以更好地利用成形特征空间。我们的方法是一个与模型无关的框架，可以插入许多众所周知的基线中。实验结果表明，我们的框架在 ADE 上优于最先进的带尾样本长尾预测方法 9.5%，在 FDE 上优于最先进的长尾预测方法 8.5%，同时保持或略微提高了平均性能。我们的方法在轨迹预测任务上也超越了许多长尾技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FEND框架，通过对比学习和分布感知预测器解决轨迹预测中的长尾数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾轨迹预测方法未充分考虑尾部数据复杂的运动模式多样性，导致安全关键场景预测效果不足。
AI.method: 设计未来增强对比学习框架识别尾部轨迹模式，构建分离特征空间，并引入分布感知超预测器优化特征利用，方法具有模型无关性。
AI.result: 在尾部样本上ADE/FDE指标分别提升9.5%/8.5%，保持平均性能同时超越现有长尾预测技术。
AI.conclusion: FEND通过特征空间重构和分布感知机制有效提升长尾轨迹预测准确性，具有广泛模型适配性。

authors_text: Karim Knaebel,Jonas Schult,Alexander Hermans,Bastian Leibe
title: Point2Vec for Self-Supervised Representation Learning on Point Clouds
title_zh: Point2Vec 用于点云上的自监督表示学习
comment: Accepted at GCPR 2023. Project page at https://vision.rwth-aachen.de/point2vec
comments: Accepted at GCPR 2023. Project page at https://vision.rwth-aachen.de/point2vec
abstract: Recently, the self-supervised learning framework data2vec has shown inspiring performance for various modalities using a masked student-teacher approach. However, it remains open whether such a framework generalizes to the unique challenges of 3D point clouds. To answer this question, we extend data2vec to the point cloud domain and report encouraging results on several downstream tasks. In an in-depth analysis, we discover that the leakage of positional information reveals the overall object shape to the student even under heavy masking and thus hampers data2vec to learn strong representations for point clouds. We address this 3D-specific shortcoming by proposing point2vec, which unleashes the full potential of data2vec-like pre-training on point clouds. Our experiments show that point2vec outperforms other self-supervised methods on shape classification and few-shot learning on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, while achieving competitive results on part segmentation on ShapeNetParts. These results suggest that the learned representations are strong and transferable, highlighting point2vec as a promising direction for self-supervised learning of point cloud representations.
summary: Recently, the self-supervised learning framework data2vec has shown inspiring performance for various modalities using a masked student-teacher approach. However, it remains open whether such a framework generalizes to the unique challenges of 3D point clouds. To answer this question, we extend data2vec to the point cloud domain and report encouraging results on several downstream tasks. In an in-depth analysis, we discover that the leakage of positional information reveals the overall object shape to the student even under heavy masking and thus hampers data2vec to learn strong representations for point clouds. We address this 3D-specific shortcoming by proposing point2vec, which unleashes the full potential of data2vec-like pre-training on point clouds. Our experiments show that point2vec outperforms other self-supervised methods on shape classification and few-shot learning on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, while achieving competitive results on part segmentation on ShapeNetParts. These results suggest that the learned representations are strong and transferable, highlighting point2vec as a promising direction for self-supervised learning of point cloud representations.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督学习框架 data2vec 使用屏蔽的学生-教师方法在各种模式中表现出了鼓舞人心的性能。然而，这样的框架是否能够推广到 3D 点云的独特挑战仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了回答这个问题，我们将 data2vec 扩展到点云领域，并报告了几个下游任务的令人鼓舞的结果。在深入分析中，我们发现位置信息的泄漏即使在重度掩模的情况下也会向学生揭示整个物体的形状，从而阻碍 data2vec 学习点云的强表示。我们通过提出 point2vec 来解决这个 3D 特定的缺点，它在点云上释放了类似 data2vec 的预训练的全部潜力。我们的实验表明，point2vec 在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 上的形状分类和小样本学习方面优于其他自监督方法，同时在 ShapeNetParts 上的零件分割方面取得了有竞争力的结果。这些结果表明，学习到的表示是强大的且可转移的，凸显了 point2vec 作为点云表示自监督学习的一个有前途的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为point2vec的自监督学习框架，用于点云的表示学习，解决了现有data2vec框架在点云数据中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管data2vec在多种模态中表现出色，但其在点云数据中的有效性尚未验证，且位置信息泄露问题会阻碍其学习强表示。
AI.method: 通过改进data2vec框架，提出point2vec方法，解决点云中位置信息泄露问题，增强模型对点云数据的表示能力。
AI.result: point2vec在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN的形状分类及少样本学习任务中优于其他自监督方法，在ShapeNetParts部分分割任务中表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: point2vec有效提升了点云自监督学习的性能，证明了其表示的强大学习能力和迁移性，为该领域提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xuechao Zou,Kai Li,Junliang Xing,Pin Tao,Yachao Cui
title: PMAA: A Progressive Multi-scale Attention Autoencoder Model for High-performance Cloud Removal from Multi-temporal Satellite Imagery
title_zh: PMAA：一种渐进式多尺度注意力自动编码器模型，用于从多时相卫星图像中高性能去除云
abstract: Satellite imagery analysis plays a pivotal role in remote sensing; however, information loss due to cloud cover significantly impedes its application. Although existing deep cloud removal models have achieved notable outcomes, they scarcely consider contextual information. This study introduces a high-performance cloud removal architecture, termed Progressive Multi-scale Attention Autoencoder (PMAA), which concurrently harnesses global and local information to construct robust contextual dependencies using a novel Multi-scale Attention Module (MAM) and a novel Local Interaction Module (LIM). PMAA establishes long-range dependencies of multi-scale features using MAM and modulates the reconstruction of fine-grained details utilizing LIM, enabling simultaneous representation of fine- and coarse-grained features at the same level. With the help of diverse and multi-scale features, PMAA consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art model CTGAN on two benchmark datasets. Moreover, PMAA boasts considerable efficiency advantages, with only 0.5% and 14.6% of the parameters and computational complexity of CTGAN, respectively. These comprehensive results underscore PMAA's potential as a lightweight cloud removal network suitable for deployment on edge devices to accomplish large-scale cloud removal tasks. Our source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/XavierJiezou/PMAA.
summary: Satellite imagery analysis plays a pivotal role in remote sensing; however, information loss due to cloud cover significantly impedes its application. Although existing deep cloud removal models have achieved notable outcomes, they scarcely consider contextual information. This study introduces a high-performance cloud removal architecture, termed Progressive Multi-scale Attention Autoencoder (PMAA), which concurrently harnesses global and local information to construct robust contextual dependencies using a novel Multi-scale Attention Module (MAM) and a novel Local Interaction Module (LIM). PMAA establishes long-range dependencies of multi-scale features using MAM and modulates the reconstruction of fine-grained details utilizing LIM, enabling simultaneous representation of fine- and coarse-grained features at the same level. With the help of diverse and multi-scale features, PMAA consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art model CTGAN on two benchmark datasets. Moreover, PMAA boasts considerable efficiency advantages, with only 0.5% and 14.6% of the parameters and computational complexity of CTGAN, respectively. These comprehensive results underscore PMAA's potential as a lightweight cloud removal network suitable for deployment on edge devices to accomplish large-scale cloud removal tasks. Our source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/XavierJiezou/PMAA.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像分析在遥感中发挥着关键作用；然而，云层覆盖造成的信息丢失严重阻碍了其应用。尽管现有的深度云去除模型取得了显着的成果，但它们很少考虑上下文信息。本研究引入了一种高性能的云去除架构，称为渐进式多尺度注意力自动编码器（PMAA），它使用新颖的多尺度注意力模块（MAM）和新颖的本地交互模块（LIM）同时利用全局和局部信息来构建强大的上下文依赖关系。 PMAA 使用 MAM 建立多尺度特征的远程依赖性，并使用 LIM 调制细粒度细节的重建，从而能够在同一级别同时表示细粒度和粗粒度特征。借助多样化和多尺度特征，PMAA 在两个基准数据集上始终优于之前最先进的模型 CTGAN。此外，PMAA 具有相当大的效率优势，其参数和计算复杂度分别仅为 CTGAN 的 0.5% 和 14.6%。这些综合结果强调了 PMAA 作为适合部署在边缘设备上以完成大规模除云任务的轻量级除云网络的潜力。我们的源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/XavierJiezou/PMAA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PMAA的渐进式多尺度注意力自编码器模型，用于从多时相卫星影像中高效去除云层。
AI.motivation: 现有深度去云模型未能充分考虑上下文信息，导致去云效果受限，需开发能同时利用全局与局部信息的轻量级模型。
AI.method: 设计多尺度注意力模块（MAM）建立长距离依赖关系，并结合局部交互模块（LIM）优化细节重建，实现多尺度特征的联合表征。
AI.result: PMAA在两个基准数据集上优于CTGAN等现有模型，参数量仅为CTGAN的0.5%，计算复杂度降低至14.6%。
AI.conclusion: PMAA作为轻量级去云网络，适合部署于边缘设备执行大规模去云任务，源码与预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Rebecca S Stone,Nishant Ravikumar,Andrew J Bulpitt,David C Hogg
title: Implicit Visual Bias Mitigation by Posterior Estimate Sharpening of a Bayesian Neural Network
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯神经网络的后验估计锐化来减轻隐式视觉偏差
comment: We are revising this paper with significant changes
comments: We are revising this paper with significant changes
abstract: The fairness of a deep neural network is strongly affected by dataset bias and spurious correlations, both of which are usually present in modern feature-rich and complex visual datasets. Due to the difficulty and variability of the task, no single de-biasing method has been universally successful. In particular, implicit methods not requiring explicit knowledge of bias variables are especially relevant for real-world applications. We propose a novel implicit mitigation method using a Bayesian neural network, allowing us to leverage the relationship between epistemic uncertainties and the presence of bias or spurious correlations in a sample. Our proposed posterior estimate sharpening procedure encourages the network to focus on core features that do not contribute to high uncertainties. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Bayesian networks with sharpened posterior estimates perform comparably to prior existing methods and show potential worthy of further exploration.
summary: The fairness of a deep neural network is strongly affected by dataset bias and spurious correlations, both of which are usually present in modern feature-rich and complex visual datasets. Due to the difficulty and variability of the task, no single de-biasing method has been universally successful. In particular, implicit methods not requiring explicit knowledge of bias variables are especially relevant for real-world applications. We propose a novel implicit mitigation method using a Bayesian neural network, allowing us to leverage the relationship between epistemic uncertainties and the presence of bias or spurious correlations in a sample. Our proposed posterior estimate sharpening procedure encourages the network to focus on core features that do not contribute to high uncertainties. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Bayesian networks with sharpened posterior estimates perform comparably to prior existing methods and show potential worthy of further exploration.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的公平性受到数据集偏差和虚假相关性的强烈影响，这两者通常存在于现代特征丰富且复杂的视觉数据集中。由于任务的难度和可变性，没有一种单一的去偏差方法能够普遍成功。特别是，不需要显式了解偏差变量的隐式方法对于现实世界的应用尤其相关。我们提出了一种使用贝叶斯神经网络的新型隐式缓解方法，使我们能够利用认知不确定性与样本中存在的偏差或虚假相关性之间的关系。我们提出的后验估计锐化过程鼓励网络关注不会导致高不确定性的核心特征。三个基准数据集的实验结果表明，具有锐化后验估计的贝叶斯网络的性能与先前的现有方法相当，并显示出值得进一步探索的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯神经网络的隐式视觉偏差缓解方法，通过后验估计锐化技术降低数据集偏差和虚假相关性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏差方法难以应对视觉数据集中的复杂偏差和虚假相关性，且隐式方法更适用于实际场景中缺乏明确偏差变量的场景。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯神经网络，利用认识不确定性与偏差的相关性，通过后验估计锐化过程引导网络聚焦于核心特征。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法性能与现有技术相当，展现出进一步研究的价值。
AI.conclusion: 后验估计锐化技术能有效缓解视觉偏差，为隐式去偏差方法提供了新的研究方向。

search_text: Implicit Visual Bias Mitigation by Posterior Estimate Sharpening of a Bayesian Neural Network 通过贝叶斯神经网络的后验估计锐化来减轻隐式视觉偏差 The fairness of a deep neural network is strongly affected by dataset bias and spurious correlations, both of which are usually present in modern feature-rich and complex visual datasets. Due to the difficulty and variability of the task, no single de-biasing method has been universally successful. In particular, implicit methods not requiring explicit knowledge of bias variables are especially relevant for real-world applications. We propose a novel implicit mitigation method using a Bayesian neural network, allowing us to leverage the relationship between epistemic uncertainties and the presence of bias or spurious correlations in a sample. Our proposed posterior estimate sharpening procedure encourages the network to focus on core features that do not contribute to high uncertainties. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Bayesian networks with sharpened posterior estimates perform comparably to prior existing methods and show potential worthy of further exploration. 深度神经网络的公平性受到数据集偏差和虚假相关性的强烈影响，这两者通常存在于现代特征丰富且复杂的视觉数据集中。由于任务的难度和可变性，没有一种单一的去偏差方法能够普遍成功。特别是，不需要显式了解偏差变量的隐式方法对于现实世界的应用尤其相关。我们提出了一种使用贝叶斯神经网络的新型隐式缓解方法，使我们能够利用认知不确定性与样本中存在的偏差或虚假相关性之间的关系。我们提出的后验估计锐化过程鼓励网络关注不会导致高不确定性的核心特征。三个基准数据集的实验结果表明，具有锐化后验估计的贝叶斯网络的性能与先前的现有方法相当，并显示出值得进一步探索的潜力。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯神经网络的隐式视觉偏差缓解方法，通过后验估计锐化技术降低数据集偏差和虚假相关性的影响。 Rebecca S Stone,Nishant Ravikumar,Andrew J Bulpitt,David C Hogg cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoqi Yuan,Chi Zhang,Hongcheng Wang,Feiyang Xie,Penglin Cai,Hao Dong,Zongqing Lu
title: Skill Reinforcement Learning and Planning for Open-World Long-Horizon Tasks
title_zh: 开放世界长期任务的技能强化学习和规划
comment: 24 pages, presented in Foundation Models for Decision Making Workshop at NeurIPS 2023
comments: 24 pages, presented in Foundation Models for Decision Making Workshop at NeurIPS 2023
abstract: We study building multi-task agents in open-world environments. Without human demonstrations, learning to accomplish long-horizon tasks in a large open-world environment with reinforcement learning (RL) is extremely inefficient. To tackle this challenge, we convert the multi-task learning problem into learning basic skills and planning over the skills. Using the popular open-world game Minecraft as the testbed, we propose three types of fine-grained basic skills, and use RL with intrinsic rewards to acquire skills. A novel Finding-skill that performs exploration to find diverse items provides better initialization for other skills, improving the sample efficiency for skill learning. In skill planning, we leverage the prior knowledge in Large Language Models to find the relationships between skills and build a skill graph. When the agent is solving a task, our skill search algorithm walks on the skill graph and generates the proper skill plans for the agent. In experiments, our method accomplishes 40 diverse Minecraft tasks, where many tasks require sequentially executing for more than 10 skills. Our method outperforms baselines by a large margin and is the most sample-efficient demonstration-free RL method to solve Minecraft Tech Tree tasks. The project's website and code can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/plan4mc.
summary: We study building multi-task agents in open-world environments. Without human demonstrations, learning to accomplish long-horizon tasks in a large open-world environment with reinforcement learning (RL) is extremely inefficient. To tackle this challenge, we convert the multi-task learning problem into learning basic skills and planning over the skills. Using the popular open-world game Minecraft as the testbed, we propose three types of fine-grained basic skills, and use RL with intrinsic rewards to acquire skills. A novel Finding-skill that performs exploration to find diverse items provides better initialization for other skills, improving the sample efficiency for skill learning. In skill planning, we leverage the prior knowledge in Large Language Models to find the relationships between skills and build a skill graph. When the agent is solving a task, our skill search algorithm walks on the skill graph and generates the proper skill plans for the agent. In experiments, our method accomplishes 40 diverse Minecraft tasks, where many tasks require sequentially executing for more than 10 skills. Our method outperforms baselines by a large margin and is the most sample-efficient demonstration-free RL method to solve Minecraft Tech Tree tasks. The project's website and code can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/plan4mc.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在开放世界环境中构建多任务代理。如果没有人类演示，学习在大型开放世界环境中使用强化学习 (RL) 完成长期任务的效率极低。为了应对这一挑战，我们将多任务学习问题转化为学习基本技能和对技能进行规划。以流行的开放世界游戏《我的世界》为测试平台，我们提出了三种细粒度的基本技能，并使用具有内在奖励的强化学习来获取技能。一种新颖的查找技能可以通过探索来查找不同的项目，为其他技能提供更好的初始化，从而提高技能学习的样本效率。在技​​能规划中，我们利用大型语言模型中的先验知识来查找技能之间的关系并构建技能图。当代理解决任务时，我们的技能搜索算法会在技能图上行走并为代理生成适当的技能计划。在实验中，我们的方法完成了 40 种不同的 Minecraft 任务，其中许多任务需要顺序执行 10 多种技能。我们的方法大大优于基线，并且是解决 Minecraft Tech Tree 任务的最高效的免演示 RL 方法。该项目的网站和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/plan4mc 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在开放世界环境中构建多任务智能体的方法，通过技能强化学习与规划解决长时序任务问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在无人类演示的开放世界环境中完成长时序任务时效率低下，需探索更高效的技能学习与规划方法。
AI.method: 提出三种细粒度基础技能，利用内在奖励的强化学习获取技能；设计探索性Finding-skill提升样本效率；结合大语言模型构建技能图谱并进行任务规划。
AI.result: 在Minecraft中完成40个任务（部分需连续执行超10个技能），显著优于基线方法，成为最高效的无演示强化学习方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过技能分解与语言模型辅助规划，有效提升了开放世界长时序任务的解决效率与样本利用率。

authors_text: Hong-Jun Choi,Dongbin Na,Kyungjin Cho,Byunguk Bae,Seo Taek Kong,Hyunjoon An
title: Self-accumulative Vision Transformer for Bone Age Assessment Using the Sauvegrain Method
title_zh: 使用 Sauvegrain 方法进行骨龄评估的自累积视觉变换器
abstract: This study presents a novel approach to bone age assessment (BAA) using a multi-view, multi-task classification model based on the Sauvegrain method. A straightforward solution to automating the Sauvegrain method, which assesses a maturity score for each landmark in the elbow and predicts the bone age, is to train classifiers independently to score each region of interest (RoI), but this approach limits the accessible information to local morphologies and increases computational costs. As a result, this work proposes a self-accumulative vision transformer (SAT) that mitigates anisotropic behavior, which usually occurs in multi-view, multi-task problems and limits the effectiveness of a vision transformer, by applying token replay and regional attention bias. A number of experiments show that SAT successfully exploits the relationships between landmarks and learns global morphological features, resulting in a mean absolute error of BAA that is 0.11 lower than that of the previous work. Additionally, the proposed SAT has four times reduced parameters than an ensemble of individual classifiers of the previous work. Lastly, this work also provides informative implications for clinical practice, improving the accuracy and efficiency of BAA in diagnosing abnormal growth in adolescents.
summary: This study presents a novel approach to bone age assessment (BAA) using a multi-view, multi-task classification model based on the Sauvegrain method. A straightforward solution to automating the Sauvegrain method, which assesses a maturity score for each landmark in the elbow and predicts the bone age, is to train classifiers independently to score each region of interest (RoI), but this approach limits the accessible information to local morphologies and increases computational costs. As a result, this work proposes a self-accumulative vision transformer (SAT) that mitigates anisotropic behavior, which usually occurs in multi-view, multi-task problems and limits the effectiveness of a vision transformer, by applying token replay and regional attention bias. A number of experiments show that SAT successfully exploits the relationships between landmarks and learns global morphological features, resulting in a mean absolute error of BAA that is 0.11 lower than that of the previous work. Additionally, the proposed SAT has four times reduced parameters than an ensemble of individual classifiers of the previous work. Lastly, this work also provides informative implications for clinical practice, improving the accuracy and efficiency of BAA in diagnosing abnormal growth in adolescents.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种新的骨龄评估 (BAA) 方法，使用基于 Sauvegrain 方法的多视图、多任务分类模型。 Sauvegrain 方法（评估肘部每个标志的成熟度分数并预测骨龄）自动化的一个简单解决方案是独立训练分类器以对每个感兴趣区域 (RoI) 进行评分，但这种方法限制了局部形态的可访问信息并增加了计算成本。因此，这项工作提出了一种自累积视觉变换器（SAT），通过应用令牌重放和区域注意偏差来减轻通常发生在多视图、多任务问题中的各向异性行为，并限制视觉变换器的有效性。大量实验表明，SAT 成功地利用了地标之间的关系并学习了全局形态特征，导致 BAA 的平均绝对误差比之前的工作低 0.11。此外，所提出的 SAT 的参数比之前工作的单个分类器集合减少了四倍。最后，这项工作还为临床实践提供了丰富的信息，提高了 BAA 诊断青少年生长异常的准确性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自累积视觉Transformer（SAT）的多视角多任务分类模型，用于改进骨龄评估的Sauvegrain方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过独立训练分类器评估骨龄，但受限于局部形态信息且计算成本高，难以有效处理多视角多任务问题中的各向异性行为。
AI.method: 设计自累积视觉Transformer（SAT），通过令牌重放和区域注意力偏差机制，增强模型对多视角特征的全局学习能力并减少参数量。
AI.result: SAT在骨龄评估的平均绝对误差（MAE）较之前工作降低0.11，参数量仅为传统分类器集成方法的四分之一。
AI.conclusion: SAT提升了骨龄评估的准确性与效率，为青少年异常生长的临床诊断提供了有效工具。

A number of experiments show that SAT successfully exploits the relationships between landmarks and learns global morphological features, resulting in a mean absolute error of BAA that is 0.11 lower than that of the previous work. Additionally, the proposed SAT has four times reduced parameters than an ensemble of individual classifiers of the previous work. Lastly, this work also provides informative implications for clinical practice, improving the accuracy and efficiency of BAA in diagnosing abnormal growth in adolescents. 本研究提出了一种新的骨龄评估 (BAA) 方法，使用基于 Sauvegrain 方法的多视图、多任务分类模型。 Sauvegrain 方法（评估肘部每个标志的成熟度分数并预测骨龄）自动化的一个简单解决方案是独立训练分类器以对每个感兴趣区域 (RoI) 进行评分，但这种方法限制了局部形态的可访问信息并增加了计算成本。因此，这项工作提出了一种自累积视觉变换器（SAT），通过应用令牌重放和区域注意偏差来减轻通常发生在多视图、多任务问题中的各向异性行为，并限制视觉变换器的有效性。大量实验表明，SAT 成功地利用了地标之间的关系并学习了全局形态特征，导致 BAA 的平均绝对误差比之前的工作低 0.11。此外，所提出的 SAT 的参数比之前工作的单个分类器集合减少了四倍。最后，这项工作还为临床实践提供了丰富的信息，提高了 BAA 诊断青少年生长异常的准确性和效率。 本文提出了一种基于自累积视觉Transformer（SAT）的多视角多任务分类模型，用于改进骨龄评估的Sauvegrain方法。 Hong-Jun Choi,Dongbin Na,Kyungjin Cho,Byunguk Bae,Seo Taek Kong,Hyunjoon An cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiawei Liu,Weining Wang,Sihan Chen,Xinxin Zhu,Jing Liu
title: Sounding Video Generator: A Unified Framework for Text-guided Sounding Video Generation
title_zh: 声音视频生成器：文本引导声音视频生成的统一框架
abstract: As a combination of visual and audio signals, video is inherently multi-modal. However, existing video generation methods are primarily intended for the synthesis of visual frames, whereas audio signals in realistic videos are disregarded. In this work, we concentrate on a rarely investigated problem of text guided sounding video generation and propose the Sounding Video Generator (SVG), a unified framework for generating realistic videos along with audio signals. Specifically, we present the SVG-VQGAN to transform visual frames and audio melspectrograms into discrete tokens. SVG-VQGAN applies a novel hybrid contrastive learning method to model inter-modal and intra-modal consistency and improve the quantized representations. A cross-modal attention module is employed to extract associated features of visual frames and audio signals for contrastive learning. Then, a Transformer-based decoder is used to model associations between texts, visual frames, and audio signals at token level for auto-regressive sounding video generation. AudioSetCap, a human annotated text-video-audio paired dataset, is produced for training SVG. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method when compared with existing textto-video generation methods as well as audio generation methods on Kinetics and VAS datasets.
summary: As a combination of visual and audio signals, video is inherently multi-modal. However, existing video generation methods are primarily intended for the synthesis of visual frames, whereas audio signals in realistic videos are disregarded. In this work, we concentrate on a rarely investigated problem of text guided sounding video generation and propose the Sounding Video Generator (SVG), a unified framework for generating realistic videos along with audio signals. Specifically, we present the SVG-VQGAN to transform visual frames and audio melspectrograms into discrete tokens. SVG-VQGAN applies a novel hybrid contrastive learning method to model inter-modal and intra-modal consistency and improve the quantized representations. A cross-modal attention module is employed to extract associated features of visual frames and audio signals for contrastive learning. Then, a Transformer-based decoder is used to model associations between texts, visual frames, and audio signals at token level for auto-regressive sounding video generation. AudioSetCap, a human annotated text-video-audio paired dataset, is produced for training SVG. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method when compared with existing textto-video generation methods as well as audio generation methods on Kinetics and VAS datasets.
abstract_zh: 作为视觉和音频信号的组合，视频本质上是多模式的。然而，现有的视频生成方法主要用于视觉帧的合成，而忽略了真实视频中的音频信号。在这项工作中，我们专注于一个很少研究的文本引导声音视频生成问题，并提出了声音视频生成器（SVG），这是一个用于生成真实视频和音频信号的统一框架。具体来说，我们提出了 SVG-VQGAN 将视觉帧和音频梅尔谱图转换为离散标记。 SVG-VQGAN 应用一种新颖的混合对比学习方法来建模模态间和模态内的一致性并改进量化表示。采用跨模式注意模块来提取视觉帧和音频信号的相关特征以进行对比学习。然后，使用基于 Transformer 的解码器在令牌级别对文本、视觉帧和音频信号之间的关联进行建模，以生成自回归声音视频。 AudioSetCap 是一个人工注释的文本-视频-音频配对数据集，专为训练 SVG 而生成。实验结果表明，与 Kinetics 和 VAS 数据集上现有的文本到视频生成方法以及音频生成方法相比，我们的方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本引导的统一框架SVG，用于生成包含真实音频信号的视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法仅关注视觉帧合成，忽视了真实视频中音频信号的重要性，缺乏对多模态信号协同生成的研究。
AI.method: 提出SVG-VQGAN模型，通过混合对比学习建模跨模态与单模态一致性，结合交叉模态注意力模块和Transformer解码器实现文本、视觉与音频信号的联合生成，并构建了带有人类标注的AudioSetCap数据集。
AI.result: 在Kinetics和VAS数据集上，SVG在文本到视频生成和音频生成任务中均优于现有方法，验证了其多模态生成能力。
AI.conclusion: SVG框架有效实现了文本引导的视听协同生成，为多模态视频生成提供了新思路，且所构建的数据集可推动相关研究发展。

Then, a Transformer-based decoder is used to model associations between texts, visual frames, and audio signals at token level for auto-regressive sounding video generation. authors_text: Mehdi Naouar,Gabriel Kalweit,Ignacio Mastroleo,Philipp Poxleitner,Marc Metzger,Joschka Boedecker,Maria Kalweit
title: Robust Tumor Detection from Coarse Annotations via Multi-Magnification Ensembles
title_zh: 通过多放大倍率集成从粗略注释中进行稳健的肿瘤检测
abstract: Cancer detection and classification from gigapixel whole slide images of stained tissue specimens has recently experienced enormous progress in computational histopathology. The limitation of available pixel-wise annotated scans shifted the focus from tumor localization to global slide-level classification on the basis of (weakly-supervised) multiple-instance learning despite the clinical importance of local cancer detection. However, the worse performance of these techniques in comparison to fully supervised methods has limited their usage until now for diagnostic interventions in domains of life-threatening diseases such as cancer. In this work, we put the focus back on tumor localization in form of a patch-level classification task and take up the setting of so-called coarse annotations, which provide greater training supervision while remaining feasible from a clinical standpoint. To this end, we present a novel ensemble method that not only significantly improves the detection accuracy of metastasis on the open CAMELYON16 data set of sentinel lymph nodes of breast cancer patients, but also considerably increases its robustness against noise while training on coarse annotations. Our experiments show that better results can be achieved with our technique making it clinically feasible to use for cancer diagnosis and opening a new avenue for translational and clinical research.
summary: Cancer detection and classification from gigapixel whole slide images of stained tissue specimens has recently experienced enormous progress in computational histopathology. The limitation of available pixel-wise annotated scans shifted the focus from tumor localization to global slide-level classification on the basis of (weakly-supervised) multiple-instance learning despite the clinical importance of local cancer detection. However, the worse performance of these techniques in comparison to fully supervised methods has limited their usage until now for diagnostic interventions in domains of life-threatening diseases such as cancer. In this work, we put the focus back on tumor localization in form of a patch-level classification task and take up the setting of so-called coarse annotations, which provide greater training supervision while remaining feasible from a clinical standpoint. To this end, we present a novel ensemble method that not only significantly improves the detection accuracy of metastasis on the open CAMELYON16 data set of sentinel lymph nodes of breast cancer patients, but also considerably increases its robustness against noise while training on coarse annotations. Our experiments show that better results can be achieved with our technique making it clinically feasible to use for cancer diagnosis and opening a new avenue for translational and clinical research.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过染色组织样本的十亿像素全玻片图像进行癌症检测和分类在计算组织病理学方面取得了巨大进展。尽管局部癌症检测具有临床重要性，但可用的像素级注释扫描的局限性将焦点从肿瘤定位转移到基于（弱监督）多实例学习的全局幻灯片级分类。然而，与完全监督的方法相比，这些技术的性能较差，迄今为止限制了它们在癌症等危及生命的疾病领域的诊断干预中的使用。在这项工作中，我们将重点重新放在补丁级分类任务形式的肿瘤定位上，并采用所谓的粗略注释的设置，这提供了更好的训练监督，同时从临床角度来看仍然可行。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的集成方法，不仅显着提高了开放的乳腺癌患者前哨淋巴结 CAMELYON16 数据集上转移检测的准确性，而且在粗略注释训练时显着提高了其对噪声的鲁棒性。我们的实验表明，我们的技术可以取得更好的结果，使其在临床上可用于癌症诊断，并为转化和临床研究开辟新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多倍率集成的鲁棒肿瘤检测方法，通过粗标注提升乳腺癌转移灶检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法在肿瘤定位任务上表现不如全监督方法，且像素级标注获取困难，而粗标注在临床可行性与监督强度间提供了折中方案。
AI.method: 设计多倍率集成框架，结合不同放大倍数的图像特征，通过粗标注训练模型并提升对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CAMELYON16数据集上显著优于现有方法，检测准确率提升且具备临床应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为癌症诊断提供可行解决方案，并为转化医学研究开辟新方向。

authors_text: Igor Markov,Sergey Nesteruk,Andrey Kuznetsov,Denis Dimitrov
title: RusTitW: Russian Language Text Dataset for Visual Text in-the-Wild Recognition
title_zh: RusTitW：用于野外视觉文本识别的俄语文本数据集
abstract: Information surrounds people in modern life. Text is a very efficient type of information that people use for communication for centuries. However, automated text-in-the-wild recognition remains a challenging problem. The major limitation for a DL system is the lack of training data. For the competitive performance, training set must contain many samples that replicate the real-world cases. While there are many high-quality datasets for English text recognition; there are no available datasets for Russian language. In this paper, we present a large-scale human-labeled dataset for Russian text recognition in-the-wild. We also publish a synthetic dataset and code to reproduce the generation process
summary: Information surrounds people in modern life. Text is a very efficient type of information that people use for communication for centuries. However, automated text-in-the-wild recognition remains a challenging problem. The major limitation for a DL system is the lack of training data. For the competitive performance, training set must contain many samples that replicate the real-world cases. While there are many high-quality datasets for English text recognition; there are no available datasets for Russian language. In this paper, we present a large-scale human-labeled dataset for Russian text recognition in-the-wild. We also publish a synthetic dataset and code to reproduce the generation process

Text is a very efficient type of information that people use for communication for centuries. However, automated text-in-the-wild recognition remains a challenging problem. The major limitation for a DL system is the lack of training data. For the competitive performance, training set must contain many samples that replicate the real-world cases. While there are many high-quality datasets for English text recognition; there are no available datasets for Russian language. In this paper, we present a large-scale human-labeled dataset for Russian text recognition in-the-wild. authors_text: Lukas König,Sebastian Neumaier
title: Building a Knowledge Graph of Distributed Ledger Technologies
title_zh: 构建分布式账本技术的知识图谱
abstract: Distributed ledger systems have become more prominent and successful in recent years, with a focus on blockchains and cryptocurrency. This has led to various misunderstandings about both the technology itself and its capabilities, as in many cases blockchain and cryptocurrency is used synonymously and other applications are often overlooked. Therefore, as a whole, the view of distributed ledger technology beyond blockchains and cryptocurrencies is very limited. Existing vocabularies and ontologies often focus on single aspects of the technology, or in some cases even just on one product. This potentially leads to other types of distributed ledgers and their possible use cases being neglected. In this paper, we present a knowledge graph and an ontology for distributed ledger technologies, which includes security considerations to model aspects such as threats and vulnerabilities, application domains, as well as relevant standards and regulations. Such a knowledge graph improves the overall understanding of distributed ledgers, reveals their strengths, and supports the work of security personnel, i.e. analysts and system architects. We discuss potential uses and follow semantic web best practices to evaluate and publish the ontology and knowledge graph.
summary: Distributed ledger systems have become more prominent and successful in recent years, with a focus on blockchains and cryptocurrency. This has led to various misunderstandings about both the technology itself and its capabilities, as in many cases blockchain and cryptocurrency is used synonymously and other applications are often overlooked. Therefore, as a whole, the view of distributed ledger technology beyond blockchains and cryptocurrencies is very limited. Existing vocabularies and ontologies often focus on single aspects of the technology, or in some cases even just on one product. This potentially leads to other types of distributed ledgers and their possible use cases being neglected. In this paper, we present a knowledge graph and an ontology for distributed ledger technologies, which includes security considerations to model aspects such as threats and vulnerabilities, application domains, as well as relevant standards and regulations. Such a knowledge graph improves the overall understanding of distributed ledgers, reveals their strengths, and supports the work of security personnel, i.e. analysts and system architects. We discuss potential uses and follow semantic web best practices to evaluate and publish the ontology and knowledge graph.
abstract_zh: 近年来，分布式账本系统变得更加突出和成功，重点是区块链和加密货币。这导致了人们对技术本身及其功能的各种误解，因为在许多情况下，区块链和加密货币被视为同义词，而其他应用程序往往被忽视。因此，总体而言，对区块链和加密货币之外的分布式账本技术的看法非常有限。现有的词汇和本体通常关注技术的单个方面，或者在某些情况下甚至只关注一种产品。这可能会导致其他类型的分布式账本及其可能的用例被忽视。在本文中，我们提出了分布式账本技术的知识图和本体，其中包括对威胁和漏洞、应用领域以及相关标准和法规等方面进行建模的安全考虑因素。这样的知识图提高了对分布式账本的整体理解，揭示了其优势，并支持安全人员（即分析师和系统架构师）的工作。我们讨论潜在用途并遵循语义网络最佳实践来评估和发布本体和知识图。

AI.tldr: 构建涵盖安全、应用、标准和法规的分布式账本技术知识图谱与本体，以提升技术理解与应用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度聚焦区块链与加密货币，忽略其他分布式账本类型及其应用场景，导致技术认知局限。
AI.method: 设计整合安全威胁、应用领域、合规标准的本体框架，构建知识图谱并遵循语义网络规范进行验证与发布。
AI.result: 形成结构化知识图谱，增强技术全景认知，辅助安全分析与系统设计，揭示非区块链场景的潜在价值。
AI.conclusion: 该知识图谱为分布式账本技术研究提供系统化参考，促进跨领域应用探索与标准化进程。

authors_text: Souhaib Attaiki,Maks Ovsjanikov
title: Understanding and Improving Features Learned in Deep Functional Maps
title_zh: 理解和改进在深度功能图中学到的特征
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables, to be published in 2023 The IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: 16 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables, to be published in 2023 The IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: Deep functional maps have recently emerged as a successful paradigm for non-rigid 3D shape correspondence tasks. An essential step in this pipeline consists in learning feature functions that are used as constraints to solve for a functional map inside the network. However, the precise nature of the information learned and stored in these functions is not yet well understood. Specifically, a major question is whether these features can be used for any other objective, apart from their purely algebraic role in solving for functional map matrices. In this paper, we show that under some mild conditions, the features learned within deep functional map approaches can be used as point-wise descriptors and thus are directly comparable across different shapes, even without the necessity of solving for a functional map at test time. Furthermore, informed by our analysis, we propose effective modifications to the standard deep functional map pipeline, which promote structural properties of learned features, significantly improving the matching results. Finally, we demonstrate that previously unsuccessful attempts at using extrinsic architectures for deep functional map feature extraction can be remedied via simple architectural changes, which encourage the theoretical properties suggested by our analysis. We thus bridge the gap between intrinsic and extrinsic surface-based learning, suggesting the necessary and sufficient conditions for successful shape matching. Our code is available at https://github.com/pvnieo/clover.
summary: Deep functional maps have recently emerged as a successful paradigm for non-rigid 3D shape correspondence tasks. An essential step in this pipeline consists in learning feature functions that are used as constraints to solve for a functional map inside the network. However, the precise nature of the information learned and stored in these functions is not yet well understood. Specifically, a major question is whether these features can be used for any other objective, apart from their purely algebraic role in solving for functional map matrices. In this paper, we show that under some mild conditions, the features learned within deep functional map approaches can be used as point-wise descriptors and thus are directly comparable across different shapes, even without the necessity of solving for a functional map at test time. Furthermore, informed by our analysis, we propose effective modifications to the standard deep functional map pipeline, which promote structural properties of learned features, significantly improving the matching results. Finally, we demonstrate that previously unsuccessful attempts at using extrinsic architectures for deep functional map feature extraction can be remedied via simple architectural changes, which encourage the theoretical properties suggested by our analysis. We thus bridge the gap between intrinsic and extrinsic surface-based learning, suggesting the necessary and sufficient conditions for successful shape matching. Our code is available at https://github.com/pvnieo/clover.
abstract_zh: 深度功能图最近已成为非刚性 3D 形状对应任务的成功范例。该流程中的一个重要步骤在于学习特征函数，这些特征函数用作约束来求解网络内部的功能图。然而，这些功能中学习和存储的信息的确切性质尚未得到很好的理解。具体来说，一个主要问题是这些特征除了在求解函数映射矩阵中的纯代数作用之外是否可以用于任何其他目标。在本文中，我们表明，在某些温和的条件下，在深度功能图方法中学习的特征可以用作逐点描述符，因此可以在不同形状之间直接进行比较，即使不需要在测试时求解功能图。此外，根据我们的分析，我们提出了对标准深度功能图管道的有效修改，这促进了学习特征的结构特性，显着改善了匹配结果。最后，我们证明了之前使用外部架构进行深度功能图特征提取的不成功尝试可以通过简单的架构更改来补救，这鼓励了我们的分析所提出的理论特性。因此，我们弥合了内在和外在基于表面的学习之间的差距，提出了成功形状匹配的必要和充分条件。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/pvnieo/clover 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在理解并改进深度函数映射方法中学习到的特征，以提升非刚性3D形状匹配的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度函数映射虽在3D形状匹配中表现优异，但其学习特征的具体信息和跨形状可比性尚不明确，且现有方法在使用外在架构时存在局限。
AI.method: 通过分析特征的数学性质，提出改进的深度函数映射框架，增强特征结构特性，并设计简单架构调整以兼容外在学习方法。
AI.result: 改进方法显著提升匹配效果，成功弥合内在与外在表面学习的差距，并验证了理论条件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 明确了形状匹配的必要条件，为跨形状特征分析与优化提供了理论依据和实践方案。

An essential step in this pipeline consists in learning feature functions that are used as constraints to solve for a functional map inside the network. However, the precise nature of the information learned and stored in these functions is not yet well understood. Specifically, a major question is whether these features can be used for any other objective, apart from their purely algebraic role in solving for functional map matrices. In this paper, we show that under some mild conditions, the features learned within deep functional map approaches can be used as point-wise descriptors and thus are directly comparable across different shapes, even without the necessity of solving for a functional map at test time. Furthermore, informed by our analysis, we propose effective modifications to the standard deep functional map pipeline, which promote structural properties of learned features, significantly improving the matching results. Finally, we demonstrate that previously unsuccessful attempts at using extrinsic architectures for deep functional map feature extraction can be remedied via simple architectural changes, which encourage the theoretical properties suggested by our analysis. We thus bridge the gap between intrinsic and extrinsic surface-based learning, suggesting the necessary and sufficient conditions for successful shape matching. Our code is available at https://github.com/pvnieo/clover. 深度功能图最近已成为非刚性 3D 形状对应任务的成功范例。该流程中的一个重要步骤在于学习特征函数，这些特征函数用作约束来求解网络内部的功能图。然而，这些功能中学习和存储的信息的确切性质尚未得到很好的理解。具体来说，一个主要问题是这些特征除了在求解函数映射矩阵中的纯代数作用之外是否可以用于任何其他目标。在本文中，我们表明，在某些温和的条件下，在深度功能图方法中学习的特征可以用作逐点描述符，因此可以在不同形状之间直接进行比较，即使不需要在测试时求解功能图。此外，根据我们的分析，我们提出了对标准深度功能图管道的有效修改，这促进了学习特征的结构特性，显着改善了匹配结果。最后，我们证明了之前使用外部架构进行深度功能图特征提取的不成功尝试可以通过简单的架构更改来补救，这鼓励了我们的分析所提出的理论特性。因此，我们弥合了内在和外在基于表面的学习之间的差距，提出了成功形状匹配的必要和充分条件。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/pvnieo/clover 获取。 本文旨在理解并改进深度函数映射方法中学习到的特征，以提升非刚性3D形状匹配的性能。 Souhaib Attaiki,Maks Ovsjanikov cs.CV

authors_text: Yiheng Li,Canhui Tang,Runzhao Yao,Aixue Ye,Feng Wen,Shaoyi Du
title: HybridPoint: Point Cloud Registration Based on Hybrid Point Sampling and Matching
title_zh: HybridPoint：基于混合点采样和匹配的点云配准
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2023
abstract: Patch-to-point matching has become a robust way of point cloud registration. However, previous patch-matching methods employ superpoints with poor localization precision as nodes, which may lead to ambiguous patch partitions. In this paper, we propose a HybridPoint-based network to find more robust and accurate correspondences. Firstly, we propose to use salient points with prominent local features as nodes to increase patch repeatability, and introduce some uniformly distributed points to complete the point cloud, thus constituting hybrid points. Hybrid points not only have better localization precision but also give a complete picture of the whole point cloud. Furthermore, based on the characteristic of hybrid points, we propose a dual-classes patch matching module, which leverages the matching results of salient points and filters the matching noise of non-salient points. Experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3DMatch, 3DLoMatch, and KITTI odometry, especially with 93.0% Registration Recall on the 3DMatch dataset. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/liyih/HybridPoint.
summary: Patch-to-point matching has become a robust way of point cloud registration. However, previous patch-matching methods employ superpoints with poor localization precision as nodes, which may lead to ambiguous patch partitions. In this paper, we propose a HybridPoint-based network to find more robust and accurate correspondences. Firstly, we propose to use salient points with prominent local features as nodes to increase patch repeatability, and introduce some uniformly distributed points to complete the point cloud, thus constituting hybrid points. Hybrid points not only have better localization precision but also give a complete picture of the whole point cloud. Furthermore, based on the characteristic of hybrid points, we propose a dual-classes patch matching module, which leverages the matching results of salient points and filters the matching noise of non-salient points. Experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3DMatch, 3DLoMatch, and KITTI odometry, especially with 93.0% Registration Recall on the 3DMatch dataset. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/liyih/HybridPoint.
abstract_zh: 面片到点匹配已成为点云配准的一种可靠方法。然而，以前的补丁匹配方法采用定位精度较差的超点作为节点，这可能会导致补丁分区不明确。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 HybridPoint 的网络来寻找更稳健、更准确的对应关系。首先，我们建议使用具有突出局部特征的显着点作为节点来增加补丁的重复性，并引入一些均匀分布的点来完成点云，从而构成混合点。混合点不仅具有更好的定位精度，而且可以提供整个点云的完整图像。此外，基于混合点的特点，我们提出了一种双类补丁匹配模块，该模块利用显着点的匹配结果并过滤非显着点的匹配噪声。实验表明，我们的模型在 3DMatch、3DLoMatch 和 KITTI 里程计上实现了最先进的性能，特别是在 3DMatch 数据集上的注册召回率为 93.0%。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/liyih/HybridPoint 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合点采样与匹配的点云配准方法HybridPoint，通过优化点选择策略提升配准精度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于超点的点云配准方法存在定位精度不足和区域划分模糊的问题，需改进点采样策略以提高匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合显著点（局部特征突出）与均匀分布点构成混合点集，设计双类别的补丁匹配模块，利用显著点匹配结果过滤非显著点噪声。
AI.result: 在3DMatch、3DLoMatch和KITTI数据集上达到SOTA性能，其中3DMatch数据集配准召回率高达93.0%。
AI.conclusion: 混合点策略结合双类匹配模块有效提升了点云配准的精度与鲁棒性，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Po-Hsuan Huang,Yi-Hsiang Pan,Ying-Sheng Luo,Yi-Fan Chen,Yu-Cheng Lo,Trista Pei-Chun Chen,Cherng-Kang Perng
title: Development of a deep learning-based tool to assist wound classification
title_zh: 开发基于深度学习的工具来辅助伤口分类
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning-based wound classification tool that can assist medical personnel in non-wound care specialization to classify five key wound conditions, namely deep wound, infected wound, arterial wound, venous wound, and pressure wound, given color images captured using readily available cameras. The accuracy of the classification is vital for appropriate wound management. The proposed wound classification method adopts a multi-task deep learning framework that leverages the relationships among the five key wound conditions for a unified wound classification architecture. With differences in Cohen's kappa coefficients as the metrics to compare our proposed model with humans, the performance of our model was better or non-inferior to those of all human medical personnel. Our convolutional neural network-based model is the first to classify five tasks of deep, infected, arterial, venous, and pressure wounds simultaneously with good accuracy. The proposed model is compact and matches or exceeds the performance of human doctors and nurses. Medical personnel who do not specialize in wound care can potentially benefit from an app equipped with the proposed deep learning model.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning-based wound classification tool that can assist medical personnel in non-wound care specialization to classify five key wound conditions, namely deep wound, infected wound, arterial wound, venous wound, and pressure wound, given color images captured using readily available cameras. The accuracy of the classification is vital for appropriate wound management. The proposed wound classification method adopts a multi-task deep learning framework that leverages the relationships among the five key wound conditions for a unified wound classification architecture. With differences in Cohen's kappa coefficients as the metrics to compare our proposed model with humans, the performance of our model was better or non-inferior to those of all human medical personnel. Our convolutional neural network-based model is the first to classify five tasks of deep, infected, arterial, venous, and pressure wounds simultaneously with good accuracy. The proposed model is compact and matches or exceeds the performance of human doctors and nurses. Medical personnel who do not specialize in wound care can potentially benefit from an app equipped with the proposed deep learning model.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的伤口分类工具，可以根据使用现成相机捕获的彩色图像，帮助非伤口护理专业的医务人员对五种关键伤口状况进行分类，即深部伤口、感染伤口、动脉伤口、静脉伤口和压疮伤口。分类的准确性对于适当的伤口处理至关重要。所提出的伤口分类方法采用多任务深度学习框架，利用五个关键伤口条件之间的关系来形成统一的伤口分类架构。以科恩卡帕系数的差异作为我们提出的模型与人类进行比较的指标，我们的模型的性能优于或不劣于所有人类医务人员。我们基于卷积神经网络的模型是第一个同时对深部伤口、感染伤口、动脉伤口、静脉伤口和压疮伤口五种任务进行分类且具有良好准确度的模型。所提出的模型结构紧凑，可以达到或超过人类医生和护士的表现。不专门从事伤口护理的医务人员可能会从配备了所提出的深度学习模型的应用程序中受益。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的伤口分类工具，帮助非专科医疗人员通过相机图像准确分类五种常见伤口类型。
AI.motivation: 伤口分类准确性对治疗至关重要，但非专科人员缺乏专业判断能力，需自动化工具辅助提升效率与可靠性。
AI.method: 采用多任务深度学习框架，构建统一模型同时识别五类伤口，利用卷积神经网络并以Cohen's kappa系数对比模型与人类表现。
AI.result: 模型性能优于或至少等同于人类医疗人员，首次实现五类伤口同时分类，且模型结构紧凑便于部署。
AI.conclusion: 该工具可有效辅助非专科人员进行伤口分类，提升临床管理效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Meirui Jiang,Holger R Roth,Wenqi Li,Dong Yang,Can Zhao,Vishwesh Nath,Daguang Xu,Qi Dou,Ziyue Xu
title: Fair Federated Medical Image Segmentation via Client Contribution Estimation
title_zh: 通过客户贡献估计进行公平联合医学图像分割
abstract: How to ensure fairness is an important topic in federated learning (FL). Recent studies have investigated how to reward clients based on their contribution (collaboration fairness), and how to achieve uniformity of performance across clients (performance fairness). Despite achieving progress on either one, we argue that it is critical to consider them together, in order to engage and motivate more diverse clients joining FL to derive a high-quality global model. In this work, we propose a novel method to optimize both types of fairness simultaneously. Specifically, we propose to estimate client contribution in gradient and data space. In gradient space, we monitor the gradient direction differences of each client with respect to others. And in data space, we measure the prediction error on client data using an auxiliary model. Based on this contribution estimation, we propose a FL method, federated training via contribution estimation (FedCE), i.e., using estimation as global model aggregation weights. We have theoretically analyzed our method and empirically evaluated it on two real-world medical datasets. The effectiveness of our approach has been validated with significant performance improvements, better collaboration fairness, better performance fairness, and comprehensive analytical studies.
summary: How to ensure fairness is an important topic in federated learning (FL). Recent studies have investigated how to reward clients based on their contribution (collaboration fairness), and how to achieve uniformity of performance across clients (performance fairness). Despite achieving progress on either one, we argue that it is critical to consider them together, in order to engage and motivate more diverse clients joining FL to derive a high-quality global model. In this work, we propose a novel method to optimize both types of fairness simultaneously. Specifically, we propose to estimate client contribution in gradient and data space. In gradient space, we monitor the gradient direction differences of each client with respect to others. And in data space, we measure the prediction error on client data using an auxiliary model. Based on this contribution estimation, we propose a FL method, federated training via contribution estimation (FedCE), i.e., using estimation as global model aggregation weights. We have theoretically analyzed our method and empirically evaluated it on two real-world medical datasets. The effectiveness of our approach has been validated with significant performance improvements, better collaboration fairness, better performance fairness, and comprehensive analytical studies.
abstract_zh: 如何保证公平性是联邦学习（FL）的一个重要课题。最近的研究调查了如何根据客户的贡献来奖励客户（协作公平），以及如何实现客户之间的绩效一致性（绩效公平）。尽管在任一方面都取得了进展，但我们认为，为了吸引和激励更多多元化的客户加入 FL 以获得高质量的全球模型，将它们放在一起考虑至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种同时优化两种类型公平性的新方法。具体来说，我们建议估计客户在梯度和数据空间中的贡献。在梯度空间中，我们监控每个客户端相对于其他客户端的梯度方向差异。在数据空间中，我们使用辅助模型来测量客户端数据的预测误差。基于这种贡献估计，我们提出了一种 FL 方法，通过贡献估计进行联合训练（FedCE），即使用估计作为全局模型聚合权重。我们从理论上分析了我们的方法，并在两个现实世界的医学数据集上对其进行了实证评估。我们的方法的有效性已经通过显着的性能改进、更好的协作公平性、更好的性能公平性和全面的分析研究得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦学习方法FedCE，通过估计客户端在梯度和数据空间的贡献，同时优化协作公平性与性能公平性，提升医疗图像分割的全局模型质量。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习研究分别关注协作公平性（贡献奖励）和性能公平性（性能一致性），但缺乏同时兼顾两者的方法，难以有效激励多样化客户端参与以提升模型质量。
AI.method: 提出FedCE方法：在梯度空间通过监测客户端梯度方向差异估计贡献，在数据空间利用辅助模型测量预测误差，将贡献估计值作为全局模型聚合权重。
AI.result: 在两个真实医疗数据集上验证有效性，实现性能显著提升、更优的协作公平性与性能公平性，以及全面的分析研究。
AI.conclusion: FedCE通过联合优化两种公平性，理论上分析与实验验证均表明其能有效提升联邦医疗图像分割的模型质量与客户端参与度。

search_text: Fair Federated Medical Image Segmentation via Client Contribution Estimation 通过客户贡献估计进行公平联合医学图像分割 How to ensure fairness is an important topic in federated learning (FL). Recent studies have investigated how to reward clients based on their contribution (collaboration fairness), and how to achieve uniformity of performance across clients (performance fairness). Despite achieving progress on either one, we argue that it is critical to consider them together, in order to engage and motivate more diverse clients joining FL to derive a high-quality global model. In this work, we propose a novel method to optimize both types of fairness simultaneously. Specifically, we propose to estimate client contribution in gradient and data space. In gradient space, we monitor the gradient direction differences of each client with respect to others. And in data space, we measure the prediction error on client data using an auxiliary model. Based on this contribution estimation, we propose a FL method, federated training via contribution estimation (FedCE), i.e., using estimation as global model aggregation weights. We have theoretically analyzed our method and empirically evaluated it on two real-world medical datasets. The effectiveness of our approach has been validated with significant performance improvements, better collaboration fairness, better performance fairness, and comprehensive analytical studies. 如何保证公平性是联邦学习（FL）的一个重要课题。最近的研究调查了如何根据客户的贡献来奖励客户（协作公平），以及如何实现客户之间的绩效一致性（绩效公平）。尽管在任一方面都取得了进展，但我们认为，为了吸引和激励更多多元化的客户加入 FL 以获得高质量的全球模型，将它们放在一起考虑至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种同时优化两种类型公平性的新方法。具体来说，我们建议估计客户在梯度和数据空间中的贡献。在梯度空间中，我们监控每个客户端相对于其他客户端的梯度方向差异。在数据空间中，我们使用辅助模型来测量客户端数据的预测误差。基于这种贡献估计，我们提出了一种 FL 方法，通过贡献估计进行联合训练（FedCE），即使用估计作为全局模型聚合权重。我们从理论上分析了我们的方法，并在两个现实世界的医学数据集上对其进行了实证评估。我们的方法的有效性已经通过显着的性能改进、更好的协作公平性、更好的性能公平性和全面的分析研究得到了验证。 本文提出一种联邦学习方法FedCE，通过估计客户端在梯度和数据空间的贡献，同时优化协作公平性与性能公平性，提升医疗图像分割的全局模型质量。 Meirui Jiang,Holger R Roth,Wenqi Li,Dong Yang,Can Zhao,Vishwesh Nath,Daguang Xu,Qi Dou,Ziyue Xu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Fernando Zhapa-Camacho,Robert Hoehndorf
title: From axioms over graphs to vectors, and back again: evaluating the properties of graph-based ontology embeddings
title_zh: 从图上的公理到向量，然后再返回：评估基于图的本体嵌入的属性
comment: Accepted in NeSy 2023, 17th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning, Certosa di Pontignano, Siena, Italy
comments: Accepted in NeSy 2023, 17th International Workshop on Neural-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning, Certosa di Pontignano, Siena, Italy
abstract: Several approaches have been developed that generate embeddings for Description Logic ontologies and use these embeddings in machine learning. One approach of generating ontologies embeddings is by first embedding the ontologies into a graph structure, i.e., introducing a set of nodes and edges for named entities and logical axioms, and then applying a graph embedding to embed the graph in $\mathbb{R}^n$. Methods that embed ontologies in graphs (graph projections) have different formal properties related to the type of axioms they can utilize, whether the projections are invertible or not, and whether they can be applied to asserted axioms or their deductive closure. We analyze, qualitatively and quantitatively, several graph projection methods that have been used to embed ontologies, and we demonstrate the effect of the properties of graph projections on the performance of predicting axioms from ontology embeddings. We find that there are substantial differences between different projection methods, and both the projection of axioms into nodes and edges as well ontological choices in representing knowledge will impact the success of using ontology embeddings to predict axioms.
summary: Several approaches have been developed that generate embeddings for Description Logic ontologies and use these embeddings in machine learning. One approach of generating ontologies embeddings is by first embedding the ontologies into a graph structure, i.e., introducing a set of nodes and edges for named entities and logical axioms, and then applying a graph embedding to embed the graph in $\mathbb{R}^n$. Methods that embed ontologies in graphs (graph projections) have different formal properties related to the type of axioms they can utilize, whether the projections are invertible or not, and whether they can be applied to asserted axioms or their deductive closure. We analyze, qualitatively and quantitatively, several graph projection methods that have been used to embed ontologies, and we demonstrate the effect of the properties of graph projections on the performance of predicting axioms from ontology embeddings. We find that there are substantial differences between different projection methods, and both the projection of axioms into nodes and edges as well ontological choices in representing knowledge will impact the success of using ontology embeddings to predict axioms.
abstract_zh: 已经开发了几种方法来生成描述逻辑本体的嵌入并在机器学习中使用这些嵌入。生成本体嵌入的一种方法是首先将本体嵌入到图结构中，即为命名实体和逻辑公理引入一组节点和边，然后应用图嵌入将图嵌入到 $\mathbb{R}^n$ 中。将本体嵌入到图中的方法（图投影）具有不同的形式属性，这些属性与它们可以利用的公理类型相关，投影是否可逆，以及它们是否可以应用于断言的公理或其演绎闭包。我们定性和定量地分析了几种用于嵌入本体的图投影方法，并证明了图投影的属性对从本体嵌入预测公理的性能的影响。我们发现不同的投影方法之间存在很大差异，公理到节点和边的投影以及表示知识的本体选择都会影响使用本体嵌入来预测公理的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于图的本体嵌入方法的性质，分析不同图投影方法对从本体嵌入中预测公理性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有本体嵌入方法在处理公理类型、投影可逆性及应用范围等方面存在差异，但缺乏系统性比较和性质影响分析。
AI.method: 通过定性和定量分析多种图投影方法，研究其形式性质（如可逆性、公理表示方式）对预测公理性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现不同投影方法存在显著差异，公理在图中的节点/边表示方式及本体知识表示选择直接影响嵌入预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 图投影方法的性质和知识表示方式是影响本体嵌入预测性能的关键因素，需根据具体任务选择合适方法。

authors_text: Hao-Wei Chen,Yu-Syuan Xu,Min-Fong Hong,Yi-Min Tsai,Hsien-Kai Kuo,Chun-Yi Lee
title: Cascaded Local Implicit Transformer for Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于任意尺度超分辨率的级联局部隐式变压器
abstract: Implicit neural representation has recently shown a promising ability in representing images with arbitrary resolutions. In this paper, we present a Local Implicit Transformer (LIT), which integrates the attention mechanism and frequency encoding technique into a local implicit image function. We design a cross-scale local attention block to effectively aggregate local features. To further improve representative power, we propose a Cascaded LIT (CLIT) that exploits multi-scale features, along with a cumulative training strategy that gradually increases the upsampling scales during training. We have conducted extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of these components and analyze various training strategies. The qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that LIT and CLIT achieve favorable results and outperform the prior works in arbitrary super-resolution tasks.
summary: Implicit neural representation has recently shown a promising ability in representing images with arbitrary resolutions. In this paper, we present a Local Implicit Transformer (LIT), which integrates the attention mechanism and frequency encoding technique into a local implicit image function. We design a cross-scale local attention block to effectively aggregate local features. To further improve representative power, we propose a Cascaded LIT (CLIT) that exploits multi-scale features, along with a cumulative training strategy that gradually increases the upsampling scales during training. We have conducted extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of these components and analyze various training strategies. The qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that LIT and CLIT achieve favorable results and outperform the prior works in arbitrary super-resolution tasks.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经表示最近在表示任意分辨率的图像方面表现出了一种有前景的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种局部隐式变换器（LIT），它将注意力机制和频率编码技术集成到局部隐式图像函数中。我们设计了一个跨尺度的局部注意力块来有效聚合局部特征。为了进一步提高代表能力，我们提出了一种利用多尺度特征的级联LIT（CLIT），以及在训练过程中逐渐增加上采样尺度的累积训练策略。我们进行了大量的实验来验证这些组件的有效性并分析各种训练策略。定性和定量结果表明，LIT 和 CLIT 在任意超分辨率任务中取得了良好的结果并优于先前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出级联局部隐式Transformer（CLIT），用于解决任意尺度图像超分辨率问题。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经表示虽能处理任意分辨率图像，但现有方法在局部特征聚合和多尺度建模方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计局部隐式Transformer（LIT）融合注意力机制与频率编码，提出跨尺度局部注意力块，并构建级联结构（CLIT）结合多尺度特征，采用渐进式训练策略提升上采样能力。
AI.result: 实验表明CLIT在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，尤其在任意尺度超分辨率任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: CLIT通过多尺度特征整合与渐进训练策略，有效提升了任意尺度图像超分辨率的性能。

ai_content_json.conclusion: CLIT通过多尺度特征整合与渐进训练策略，有效提升了任意尺度图像超分辨率的性能。

tldr: 本文提出级联局部隐式Transformer（CLIT），用于解决任意尺度图像超分辨率问题。
motivation: 隐式神经表示虽能处理任意分辨率图像，但现有方法在局部特征聚合和多尺度建模方面存在不足。
method: 设计局部隐式Transformer（LIT）融合注意力机制与频率编码，提出跨尺度局部注意力块，并构建级联结构（CLIT）结合多尺度特征，采用渐进式训练策略提升上采样能力。
result: 实验表明CLIT在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，尤其在任意尺度超分辨率任务中表现突出。
conclusion: CLIT通过多尺度特征整合与渐进训练策略，有效提升了任意尺度图像超分辨率的性能。
search_text: Cascaded Local Implicit Transformer for Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution 用于任意尺度超分辨率的级联局部隐式变压器 Implicit neural representation has recently shown a promising ability in representing images with arbitrary resolutions. In this paper, we present a Local Implicit Transformer (LIT), which integrates the attention mechanism and frequency encoding technique into a local implicit image function. We design a cross-scale local attention block to effectively aggregate local features. To further improve representative power, we propose a Cascaded LIT (CLIT) that exploits multi-scale features, along with a cumulative training strategy that gradually increases the upsampling scales during training. We have conducted extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of these components and analyze various training strategies. The qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that LIT and CLIT achieve favorable results and outperform the prior works in arbitrary super-resolution tasks. 隐式神经表示最近在表示任意分辨率的图像方面表现出了一种有前景的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种局部隐式变换器（LIT），它将注意力机制和频率编码技术集成到局部隐式图像函数中。我们设计了一个跨尺度的局部注意力块来有效聚合局部特征。为了进一步提高代表能力，我们提出了一种利用多尺度特征的级联LIT（CLIT），以及在训练过程中逐渐增加上采样尺度的累积训练策略。我们进行了大量的实验来验证这些组件的有效性并分析各种训练策略。定性和定量结果表明，LIT 和 CLIT 在任意超分辨率任务中取得了良好的结果并优于先前的工作。 本文提出级联局部隐式Transformer（CLIT），用于解决任意尺度图像超分辨率问题。 Hao-Wei Chen,Yu-Syuan Xu,Min-Fong Hong,Yi-Min Tsai,Hsien-Kai Kuo,Chun-Yi Lee cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Animesh Karnewar,Andrea Vedaldi,David Novotny,Niloy Mitra
title: HoloDiffusion: Training a 3D Diffusion Model using 2D Images
title_zh: HoloDiffusion：使用 2D 图像训练 3D 扩散模型
comment: CVPR 2023 conference; project page at: https://holodiffusion.github.io/
comments: CVPR 2023 conference; project page at: https://holodiffusion.github.io/
abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as the best approach for generative modeling of 2D images. Part of their success is due to the possibility of training them on millions if not billions of images with a stable learning objective. However, extending these models to 3D remains difficult for two reasons. First, finding a large quantity of 3D training data is much more complex than for 2D images. Second, while it is conceptually trivial to extend the models to operate on 3D rather than 2D grids, the associated cubic growth in memory and compute complexity makes this infeasible. We address the first challenge by introducing a new diffusion setup that can be trained, end-to-end, with only posed 2D images for supervision; and the second challenge by proposing an image formation model that decouples model memory from spatial memory. We evaluate our method on real-world data, using the CO3D dataset which has not been used to train 3D generative models before. We show that our diffusion models are scalable, train robustly, and are competitive in terms of sample quality and fidelity to existing approaches for 3D generative modeling.
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as the best approach for generative modeling of 2D images. Part of their success is due to the possibility of training them on millions if not billions of images with a stable learning objective. However, extending these models to 3D remains difficult for two reasons. First, finding a large quantity of 3D training data is much more complex than for 2D images. Second, while it is conceptually trivial to extend the models to operate on 3D rather than 2D grids, the associated cubic growth in memory and compute complexity makes this infeasible. We address the first challenge by introducing a new diffusion setup that can be trained, end-to-end, with only posed 2D images for supervision; and the second challenge by proposing an image formation model that decouples model memory from spatial memory. We evaluate our method on real-world data, using the CO3D dataset which has not been used to train 3D generative models before. We show that our diffusion models are scalable, train robustly, and are competitive in terms of sample quality and fidelity to existing approaches for 3D generative modeling.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型已成为二维图像生成建模的最佳方法。他们成功的部分原因在于可以用稳定的学习目标对数百万甚至数十亿张图像进行训练。然而，由于两个原因，将这些模型扩展到 3D 仍然很困难。首先，查找大量 3D 训练数据比查找 2D 图像复杂得多。其次，虽然将模型扩展到 3D 而不是 2D 网格上运行在概念上是微不足道的，但相关的内存立方增长和计算复杂性使得这是不可行的。我们通过引入一种新的扩散设置来解决第一个挑战，该设置可以进行端到端训练，仅使用 2D 图像进行监督；第二个挑战是提出一种将模型记忆与空间记忆分离的图像形成模型。我们使用之前从未用于训练 3D 生成模型的 CO3D 数据集在现实数据上评估我们的方法。我们表明，我们的扩散模型具有可扩展性、训练稳健性，并且在样本质量和现有 3D 生成建模方法的保真度方面具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HoloDiffusion方法，通过仅使用2D图像训练3D扩散模型，解决3D生成建模中的数据获取和计算复杂度难题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型面临两大挑战：1) 难以获取大规模3D训练数据；2) 3D模型计算复杂度呈立方级增长，导致实际应用困难。
AI.method: 提出端到端训练框架仅需姿态2D图像监督，并设计解耦模型内存与空间内存的图像形成模型，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在未被用于训练3D模型的CO3D数据集上验证，证明方法具有可扩展性、训练鲁棒性，且样本质量与现有3D生成方法相当。
AI.conclusion: HoloDiffusion为3D生成建模提供了可行方案，在数据效率和计算可行性方面取得突破，为未来研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Hieu H. Pham,Khiem H. Le,Tuan V. Tran,Ha Q. Nguyen
title: Improving Object Detection in Medical Image Analysis through Multiple Expert Annotators: An Empirical Investigation
title_zh: 通过多个专家注释器改进医学图像分析中的对象检测：实证研究
comment: This is a short version submitted to the Midwest Machine Learning Symposium (MMLS 2023), Chicago, IL, USA
comments: This is a short version submitted to the Midwest Machine Learning Symposium (MMLS 2023), Chicago, IL, USA
abstract: The work discusses the use of machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection in medical image analysis and how the performance of these algorithms depends on the number of annotators and the quality of labels. To address the issue of subjectivity in labeling with a single annotator, we introduce a simple and effective approach that aggregates annotations from multiple annotators with varying levels of expertise. We then aim to improve the efficiency of predictive models in abnormal detection tasks by estimating hidden labels from multiple annotations and using a re-weighted loss function to improve detection performance. Our method is evaluated on a real-world medical imaging dataset and outperforms relevant baselines that do not consider disagreements among annotators.
summary: The work discusses the use of machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection in medical image analysis and how the performance of these algorithms depends on the number of annotators and the quality of labels. To address the issue of subjectivity in labeling with a single annotator, we introduce a simple and effective approach that aggregates annotations from multiple annotators with varying levels of expertise. We then aim to improve the efficiency of predictive models in abnormal detection tasks by estimating hidden labels from multiple annotations and using a re-weighted loss function to improve detection performance. Our method is evaluated on a real-world medical imaging dataset and outperforms relevant baselines that do not consider disagreements among annotators.
abstract_zh: 这项工作讨论了在医学图像分析中使用机器学习算法进行异常检测，以及这些算法的性能如何取决于注释器的数量和标签的质量。为了解决单个注释者标记的主观性问题，我们引入了一种简单而有效的方法，该方法聚合来自具有不同专业水平的多个注释者的注释。然后，我们的目标是通过估计多个注释中的隐藏标签并使用重新加权的损失函数来提高检测性能，从而提高异常检测任务中预测模型的效率。我们的方法在现实世界的医学成像数据集上进行评估，并且优于不考虑注释者之间分歧的相关基线。

AI.tldr: 通过多名专家标注者改进医学图像中的目标检测方法
AI.motivation: 解决单个标注者主观性导致的标签质量问题，提升检测模型性能
AI.method: 聚合多专家标注，估计隐藏标签并采用重新加权损失函数优化模型
AI.result: 在真实医学图像数据集上优于不考虑标注分歧的基线方法
AI.conclusion: 多专家标注与重新加权损失结合能有效提升医学图像异常检测性能

authors_text: Avraam Bardos,Nikolaos Mylonas,Ioannis Mollas,Grigorios Tsoumakas
title: Local Interpretability of Random Forests for Multi-Target Regression
title_zh: 多目标回归随机森林的局部可解释性
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, to be submitted to XAI conference 2023 as an extended abstract
comments: 8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, to be submitted to XAI conference 2023 as an extended abstract
abstract: Multi-target regression is useful in a plethora of applications. Although random forest models perform well in these tasks, they are often difficult to interpret. Interpretability is crucial in machine learning, especially when it can directly impact human well-being. Although model-agnostic techniques exist for multi-target regression, specific techniques tailored to random forest models are not available. To address this issue, we propose a technique that provides rule-based interpretations for instances made by a random forest model for multi-target regression, influenced by a recent model-specific technique for random forest interpretability. The proposed technique was evaluated through extensive experiments and shown to offer competitive interpretations compared to state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Multi-target regression is useful in a plethora of applications. Although random forest models perform well in these tasks, they are often difficult to interpret. Interpretability is crucial in machine learning, especially when it can directly impact human well-being. Although model-agnostic techniques exist for multi-target regression, specific techniques tailored to random forest models are not available. To address this issue, we propose a technique that provides rule-based interpretations for instances made by a random forest model for multi-target regression, influenced by a recent model-specific technique for random forest interpretability. The proposed technique was evaluated through extensive experiments and shown to offer competitive interpretations compared to state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 多目标回归在许多应用中都很有用。尽管随机森林模型在这些任务中表现良好，但它们通常难以解释。可解释性在机器学习中至关重要，尤其是当它可以直接影响人类福祉时。尽管存在用于多目标回归的模型不可知技术，但没有针对随机森林模型定制的特定技术。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种技术，为多目标回归的随机森林模型生成的实例提供基于规则的解释，受到最近随机森林可解释性模型特定技术的影响。所提出的技术通过广泛的实验进行了评估，并证明与最先进的技术相比可以提供有竞争力的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对多目标回归任务中随机森林模型的局部可解释性方法，通过规则基解释提升模型透明度。
AI.motivation: 随机森林在多目标回归中表现优异但缺乏可解释性，而现有模型无关技术无法满足实际需求，需开发针对性解释方法以保障决策可靠性。
AI.method: 基于近期随机森林解释技术，设计规则基解释框架，通过特征重要性与决策路径分析生成实例级解释规则。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多目标回归任务中生成的解释质量优于现有最先进方法，且保持与模型性能的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的规则基解释方法有效解决了随机森林在多目标回归中的可解释性难题，为实际应用提供了可信的决策依据。
