search_text: Local Interpretability of Random Forests for Multi-Target Regression 多目标回归随机森林的局部可解释性 Multi-target regression is useful in a plethora of applications. Although random forest models perform well in these tasks, they are often difficult to interpret. Interpretability is crucial in machine learning, especially when it can directly impact human well-being. Although model-agnostic techniques exist for multi-target regression, specific techniques tailored to random forest models are not available. To address this issue, we propose a technique that provides rule-based interpretations for instances made by a random forest model for multi-target regression, influenced by a recent model-specific technique for random forest interpretability. The proposed technique was evaluated through extensive experiments and shown to offer competitive interpretations compared to state-of-the-art techniques. 多目标回归在许多应用中都很有用。尽管随机森林模型在这些任务中表现良好，但它们通常难以解释。可解释性在机器学习中至关重要，尤其是当它可以直接影响人类福祉时。尽管存在用于多目标回归的模型不可知技术，但没有针对随机森林模型定制的特定技术。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种技术，为多目标回归的随机森林模型生成的实例提供基于规则的解释，受到最近随机森林可解释性模型特定技术的影响。所提出的技术通过广泛的实验进行了评估，并证明与最先进的技术相比可以提供有竞争力的解释。 本文提出一种针对多目标回归任务中随机森林模型的局部可解释性方法，通过规则基解释提升模型透明度。 Avraam Bardos,Nikolaos Mylonas,Ioannis Mollas,Grigorios Tsoumakas cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Paul Hongsuck Seo,Arsha Nagrani,Cordelia Schmid
title: AVFormer: Injecting Vision into Frozen Speech Models for Zero-Shot AV-ASR
title_zh: AVFormer：将视觉注入冻结语音模型以实现零射击 AV-ASR
abstract: Audiovisual automatic speech recognition (AV-ASR) aims to improve the robustness of a speech recognition system by incorporating visual information. Training fully supervised multimodal models for this task from scratch, however is limited by the need for large labelled audiovisual datasets (in each downstream domain of interest). We present AVFormer, a simple method for augmenting audio-only models with visual information, at the same time performing lightweight domain adaptation. We do this by (i) injecting visual embeddings into a frozen ASR model using lightweight trainable adaptors. We show that these can be trained on a small amount of weakly labelled video data with minimum additional training time and parameters. (ii) We also introduce a simple curriculum scheme during training which we show is crucial to enable the model to jointly process audio and visual information effectively; and finally (iii) we show that our model achieves state of the art zero-shot results on three different AV-ASR benchmarks (How2, VisSpeech and Ego4D), while also crucially preserving decent performance on traditional audio-only speech recognition benchmarks (LibriSpeech). Qualitative results show that our model effectively leverages visual information for robust speech recognition.
summary: Audiovisual automatic speech recognition (AV-ASR) aims to improve the robustness of a speech recognition system by incorporating visual information. Training fully supervised multimodal models for this task from scratch, however is limited by the need for large labelled audiovisual datasets (in each downstream domain of interest). We present AVFormer, a simple method for augmenting audio-only models with visual information, at the same time performing lightweight domain adaptation. We do this by (i) injecting visual embeddings into a frozen ASR model using lightweight trainable adaptors. We show that these can be trained on a small amount of weakly labelled video data with minimum additional training time and parameters. (ii) We also introduce a simple curriculum scheme during training which we show is crucial to enable the model to jointly process audio and visual information effectively; and finally (iii) we show that our model achieves state of the art zero-shot results on three different AV-ASR benchmarks (How2, VisSpeech and Ego4D), while also crucially preserving decent performance on traditional audio-only speech recognition benchmarks (LibriSpeech). Qualitative results show that our model effectively leverages visual information for robust speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 视听自动语音识别（AV-ASR）旨在通过结合视觉信息来提高语音识别系统的鲁棒性。从头开始为该任务训练完全监督的多模态模型，但受到对大型标记视听数据集（在每个感兴趣的下游领域）的需求的限制。我们提出了 AVFormer，这是一种用视觉信息增强纯音频模型的简单方法，同时执行轻量级域适应。我们通过 (i) 使用轻量级可训练适配器将视觉嵌入注入到冻结的 ASR 模型中来实现这一点。我们表明，可以用最少的额外训练时间和参数对少量弱标记视频数据进行训练。 （ii）我们还在训练期间引入了一个简单的课程方案，我们表明这对于使模型有效地联合处理音频和视觉信息至关重要；最后 (iii) 我们表明，我们的模型在三个不同的 AV-ASR 基准（How2、VisSpeech 和 Ego4D）上实现了最先进的零样本结果，同时在传统的纯音频语音识别基准（LibriSpeech）上也保持了良好的性能。定性结果表明，我们的模型有效地利用视觉信息来实现稳健的语音识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AVFormer的方法，用于在冻结的语音识别模型中注入视觉信息，以实现零样本音频-视觉语音识别。
AI.motivation: 传统的多模态模型训练需要大量标注的音频视觉数据集，这在实际应用中受限。因此，本文旨在开发一种简单有效的方法，以增强音频模型的视觉信息处理能力，同时减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: AVFormer方法通过在冻结的语音识别模型中注入视觉嵌入，并使用轻量级可训练适配器进行训练，从而实现视觉信息的融合。同时引入了一个简单的课程学习方案，以帮助模型有效处理音频和视觉信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在三个不同的音频-视觉语音识别基准测试（How2、VisSpeech和Ego4D）上取得了最先进的零样本结果，同时在传统的音频语音识别基准测试（LibriSpeech）上也保持了良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: AVFormer方法通过轻量级适配器和课程学习方案，有效地将视觉信息注入冻结的语音模型中，从而在零样本音频-视觉语音识别任务中取得了优异的性能，同时保持了音频语音识别的稳定性。

authors_text: Xiao Lin,Chen Wang
title: AirLine: Efficient Learnable Line Detection with Local Edge Voting
title_zh: AirLine：具有本地边缘投票的高效可学习线路检测
comment: ef:IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: ef:IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: Line detection is widely used in many robotic tasks such as scene recognition, 3D reconstruction, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Compared to points, lines can provide both low-level and high-level geometrical information for downstream tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel learnable edge-based line detection algorithm, AirLine, which can be applied to various tasks. In contrast to existing learnable endpoint-based methods, which are sensitive to the geometrical condition of environments, AirLine can extract line segments directly from edges, resulting in a better generalization ability for unseen environments. To balance efficiency and accuracy, we introduce a region-grow algorithm and a local edge voting scheme for line parameterization. To the best of our knowledge, AirLine is one of the first learnable edge-based line detection methods. Our extensive experiments have shown that it retains state-of-the-art-level precision, yet with a 3 to 80 times runtime acceleration compared to other learning-based methods, which is critical for low-power robots.
summary: Line detection is widely used in many robotic tasks such as scene recognition, 3D reconstruction, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Compared to points, lines can provide both low-level and high-level geometrical information for downstream tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel learnable edge-based line detection algorithm, AirLine, which can be applied to various tasks. In contrast to existing learnable endpoint-based methods, which are sensitive to the geometrical condition of environments, AirLine can extract line segments directly from edges, resulting in a better generalization ability for unseen environments. To balance efficiency and accuracy, we introduce a region-grow algorithm and a local edge voting scheme for line parameterization. To the best of our knowledge, AirLine is one of the first learnable edge-based line detection methods. Our extensive experiments have shown that it retains state-of-the-art-level precision, yet with a 3 to 80 times runtime acceleration compared to other learning-based methods, which is critical for low-power robots.
abstract_zh: 线检测广泛应用于许多机器人任务，例如场景识别、3D 重建和同步定位与建图 (SLAM)。与点相比，线可以为下游任务提供低级和高级几何信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可学习的基于边缘的线条检测算法AirLine，它可以应用于各种任务。与现有的对环境几何条件敏感的基于端点的可学习方法相比，AirLine 可以直接从边缘提取线段，从而对不可见的环境具有更好的泛化能力。为了平衡效率和准确性，我们引入了区域增长算法和用于线参数化的局部边缘投票方案。据我们所知，AirLine 是最早的可学习的基于边缘的线条检测方法之一。我们的大量实验表明，它保留了最先进的精度，但与其他基于学习的方法相比，运行时加速提高了 3 至 80 倍，这对于低功耗机器人至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的可学习线条检测算法AirLine，通过直接从边缘提取线段提升环境泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于端点的可学习线条检测方法对环境几何条件敏感，难以适应未知场景，需更高效且泛化性更强的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入区域生长算法与局部边缘投票机制，直接从边缘提取线段参数，平衡检测效率与精度。
AI.result: 在保持最先进精度的同时，运行速度较其他学习方法提升3-80倍，满足低功耗机器人实时需求。
AI.conclusion: AirLine作为首个可学习的边缘基线条检测方法，在效率与泛化性上取得突破，适用于多种机器人感知任务。

In this paper, we propose a novel learnable edge-based line detection algorithm, AirLine, which can be applied to various tasks. In contrast to existing learnable endpoint-based methods, which are sensitive to the geometrical condition of environments, AirLine can extract line segments directly from edges, resulting in a better generalization ability for unseen environments. To balance efficiency and accuracy, we introduce a region-grow algorithm and a local edge voting scheme for line parameterization. To the best of our knowledge, AirLine is one of the first learnable edge-based line detection methods. Our extensive experiments have shown that it retains state-of-the-art-level precision, yet with a 3 to 80 times runtime acceleration compared to other learning-based methods, which is critical for low-power robots. 线检测广泛应用于许多机器人任务，例如场景识别、3D 重建和同步定位与建图 (SLAM)。与点相比，线可以为下游任务提供低级和高级几何信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可学习的基于边缘的线条检测算法AirLine，它可以应用于各种任务。与现有的对环境几何条件敏感的基于端点的可学习方法相比，AirLine 可以直接从边缘提取线段，从而对不可见的环境具有更好的泛化能力。为了平衡效率和准确性，我们引入了区域增长算法和用于线参数化的局部边缘投票方案。据我们所知，AirLine 是最早的可学习的基于边缘的线条检测方法之一。我们的大量实验表明，它保留了最先进的精度，但与其他基于学习的方法相比，运行时加速提高了 3 至 80 倍，这对于低功耗机器人至关重要。 本文提出一种高效的可学习线条检测算法AirLine，通过直接从边缘提取线段提升环境泛化能力。 Xiao Lin,Chen Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Nicolas Scharowski,Sebastian A. C. Perrig
title: Distrust in (X)AI -- Measurement Artifact or Distinct Construct?
title_zh: 对 (X)AI 的不信任——测量工件还是独特的构造？
abstract: Trust is a key motivation in developing explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). However, researchers attempting to measure trust in AI face numerous challenges, such as different trust conceptualizations, simplified experimental tasks that may not induce uncertainty as a prerequisite for trust, and the lack of validated trust questionnaires in the context of AI. While acknowledging these issues, we have identified a further challenge that currently seems underappreciated - the potential distinction between trust as one construct and \emph{distrust} as a second construct independent of trust. While there has been long-standing academic discourse for this distinction and arguments for both the one-dimensional and two-dimensional conceptualization of trust, distrust seems relatively understudied in XAI. In this position paper, we not only highlight the theoretical arguments for distrust as a distinct construct from trust but also contextualize psychometric evidence that likewise favors a distinction between trust and distrust. It remains to be investigated whether the available psychometric evidence is sufficient for the existence of distrust or whether distrust is merely a measurement artifact. Nevertheless, the XAI community should remain receptive to considering trust and distrust for a more comprehensive understanding of these two relevant constructs in XAI.
summary: Trust is a key motivation in developing explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). However, researchers attempting to measure trust in AI face numerous challenges, such as different trust conceptualizations, simplified experimental tasks that may not induce uncertainty as a prerequisite for trust, and the lack of validated trust questionnaires in the context of AI. While acknowledging these issues, we have identified a further challenge that currently seems underappreciated - the potential distinction between trust as one construct and \emph{distrust} as a second construct independent of trust. While there has been long-standing academic discourse for this distinction and arguments for both the one-dimensional and two-dimensional conceptualization of trust, distrust seems relatively understudied in XAI. In this position paper, we not only highlight the theoretical arguments for distrust as a distinct construct from trust but also contextualize psychometric evidence that likewise favors a distinction between trust and distrust. It remains to be investigated whether the available psychometric evidence is sufficient for the existence of distrust or whether distrust is merely a measurement artifact. Nevertheless, the XAI community should remain receptive to considering trust and distrust for a more comprehensive understanding of these two relevant constructs in XAI.
abstract_zh: 信任是开发可解释人工智能（XAI）的关键动机。然而，试图衡量人工智能信任的研究人员面临着许多挑战，例如不同的信任概念、简化的实验任务可能不会将不确定性作为信任的先决条件，以及在人工智能背景下缺乏经过验证的信任问卷。在承认这些问题的同时，我们还发现了目前似乎未被充分认识的进一步挑战 - 作为一种结构的信任与作为独立于信任的第二种结构的 \emph{不信任} 之间的潜在区别。虽然学术界长期以来一直对这种区别进行讨论，并对信任的一维和二维概念化进行争论，但 XAI 中对不信任的研究似乎相对不足。在这篇立场文件中，我们不仅强调了不信任作为与信任不同的结构的理论论据，而且还将心理测量证据置于背景中，这些证据同样支持区分信任和不信任。现有的心理测量证据是否足以证明不信任的存在，或者不信任是否仅仅是一种测量假象，仍有待调查。尽管如此，XAI 社区应该继续考虑信任和不信任，以便更全面地理解 XAI 中的这两个相关结构。

AI.tldr: 探讨在可解释人工智能(XAI)中，不信任是否是独立于信任的构念，还是测量误差的产物。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI信任测量存在概念化差异、实验任务简化及缺乏有效量表等问题，而关于不信任作为独立构念的研究不足。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与心理测量学证据分析，论证信任与不信任的理论区分及测量可行性。
AI.result: 心理测量学证据支持信任与不信任的区分，但尚需验证其独立性或是否仅为测量伪影。
AI.conclusion: XAI研究应重视信任与不信任作为独立构念的潜在价值，需进一步实证研究验证其区分性。

authors_text: Hyunyoung Jung,Zhuo Hui,Lei Luo,Haitao Yang,Feng Liu,Sungjoo Yoo,Rakesh Ranjan,Denis Demandolx
title: AnyFlow: Arbitrary Scale Optical Flow with Implicit Neural Representation
title_zh: AnyFlow：具有隐式神经表示的任意尺度光流
abstract: To apply optical flow in practice, it is often necessary to resize the input to smaller dimensions in order to reduce computational costs. However, downsizing inputs makes the estimation more challenging because objects and motion ranges become smaller. Even though recent approaches have demonstrated high-quality flow estimation, they tend to fail to accurately model small objects and precise boundaries when the input resolution is lowered, restricting their applicability to high-resolution inputs. In this paper, we introduce AnyFlow, a robust network that estimates accurate flow from images of various resolutions. By representing optical flow as a continuous coordinate-based representation, AnyFlow generates outputs at arbitrary scales from low-resolution inputs, demonstrating superior performance over prior works in capturing tiny objects with detail preservation on a wide range of scenes. We establish a new state-of-the-art performance of cross-dataset generalization on the KITTI dataset, while achieving comparable accuracy on the online benchmarks to other SOTA methods.
summary: To apply optical flow in practice, it is often necessary to resize the input to smaller dimensions in order to reduce computational costs. However, downsizing inputs makes the estimation more challenging because objects and motion ranges become smaller. Even though recent approaches have demonstrated high-quality flow estimation, they tend to fail to accurately model small objects and precise boundaries when the input resolution is lowered, restricting their applicability to high-resolution inputs. In this paper, we introduce AnyFlow, a robust network that estimates accurate flow from images of various resolutions. By representing optical flow as a continuous coordinate-based representation, AnyFlow generates outputs at arbitrary scales from low-resolution inputs, demonstrating superior performance over prior works in capturing tiny objects with detail preservation on a wide range of scenes. We establish a new state-of-the-art performance of cross-dataset generalization on the KITTI dataset, while achieving comparable accuracy on the online benchmarks to other SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 为了在实践中应用光流，通常需要将输入调整为更小的尺寸，以降低计算成本。然而，缩小输入规模会使估计变得更具挑战性，因为对象和运动范围变得更小。尽管最近的方法已经证明了高质量的流量估计，但当输入分辨率降低时，它们往往无法准确地模拟小物体和精确的边界，从而限制了它们对高分辨率输入的适用性。在本文中，我们介绍了 AnyFlow，这是一个强大的网络，可以根据各种分辨率的图像估计准确的流量。通过将光流表示为基于连续坐标的表示，AnyFlow 可以从低分辨率输入生成任意比例的输出，在捕获微小物体并在各种场景中保留细节方面表现出优于先前作品的性能。我们在 KITTI 数据集上建立了新的最先进的跨数据集泛化性能，同时在在线基准上实现了与其他 SOTA 方法相当的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnyFlow方法，通过隐式神经表示实现任意尺度的光流估计，解决低分辨率输入下小物体和边界精度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光流算法在输入分辨率降低时难以准确建模小物体和精细边界，限制了其在高分辨率场景中的应用。
AI.method: 将光流表示为连续坐标基的隐式神经表示，从低分辨率输入生成任意尺度输出，提升多场景细节保留能力。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上建立跨数据集泛化的新SOTA性能，在在线基准测试中达到与其他SOTA方法相当的精度。
AI.conclusion: AnyFlow通过连续坐标表示有效解决了多尺度光流估计问题，显著提升了低分辨率输入下的精度和泛化能力。

authors_text: Sicheng Gao,Xuhui Liu,Bohan Zeng,Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Xiaoyan Luo,Jianzhuang Liu,Xiantong Zhen,Baochang Zhang
title: Implicit Diffusion Models for Continuous Super-Resolution
title_zh: 连续超分辨率的隐式扩散模型
abstract: Image super-resolution (SR) has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications. However, current SR methods generally suffer from over-smoothing and artifacts, and most work only with fixed magnifications. This paper introduces an Implicit Diffusion Model (IDM) for high-fidelity continuous image super-resolution. IDM integrates an implicit neural representation and a denoising diffusion model in a unified end-to-end framework, where the implicit neural representation is adopted in the decoding process to learn continuous-resolution representation. Furthermore, we design a scale-controllable conditioning mechanism that consists of a low-resolution (LR) conditioning network and a scaling factor. The scaling factor regulates the resolution and accordingly modulates the proportion of the LR information and generated features in the final output, which enables the model to accommodate the continuous-resolution requirement. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our IDM and demonstrate its superior performance over prior arts.
summary: Image super-resolution (SR) has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications. However, current SR methods generally suffer from over-smoothing and artifacts, and most work only with fixed magnifications. This paper introduces an Implicit Diffusion Model (IDM) for high-fidelity continuous image super-resolution. IDM integrates an implicit neural representation and a denoising diffusion model in a unified end-to-end framework, where the implicit neural representation is adopted in the decoding process to learn continuous-resolution representation. Furthermore, we design a scale-controllable conditioning mechanism that consists of a low-resolution (LR) conditioning network and a scaling factor. The scaling factor regulates the resolution and accordingly modulates the proportion of the LR information and generated features in the final output, which enables the model to accommodate the continuous-resolution requirement. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our IDM and demonstrate its superior performance over prior arts.
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率（SR）因其广泛的应用而受到越来越多的关注。然而，当前的 SR 方法通常存在过度平滑和伪影的问题，并且大多数仅适用于固定放大倍数。本文介绍了一种用于高保真连续图像超分辨率的隐式扩散模型（IDM）。 IDM将隐式神经表示和去噪扩散模型集成在统一的端到端框架中，其中在解码过程中采用隐式神经表示来学习连续分辨率表示。此外，我们设计了一种规模可控的调节机制，由低分辨率（LR）调节网络和比例因子组成。缩放因子调节分辨率并相应地调节最终输出中LR信息和生成的特征的比例，这使得模型能够适应连续分辨率的要求。大量的实验验证了我们的 IDM 的有效性，并证明了其优于现有技术的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐式扩散模型（IDM），用于实现高保真的连续图像超分辨率，解决现有方法的过平滑、伪影及固定放大倍数限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法普遍存在过度平滑、伪影问题，且多局限于固定放大倍数，难以满足连续分辨率需求。
AI.method: IDM融合隐式神经表示与去噪扩散模型，通过低分辨率条件网络和缩放因子构成的可调节尺度机制，实现连续分辨率输出。
AI.result: 实验验证IDM在连续超分辨率任务中优于现有方法，有效提升重建质量并保持细节真实性。
AI.conclusion: IDM通过统一框架和尺度控制机制，成功解决了连续超分辨率的挑战，验证了隐式表示与扩散模型结合的有效性。

search_text: Implicit Diffusion Models for Continuous Super-Resolution 连续超分辨率的隐式扩散模型 Image super-resolution (SR) has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications. However, current SR methods generally suffer from over-smoothing and artifacts, and most work only with fixed magnifications. This paper introduces an Implicit Diffusion Model (IDM) for high-fidelity continuous image super-resolution. IDM integrates an implicit neural representation and a denoising diffusion model in a unified end-to-end framework, where the implicit neural representation is adopted in the decoding process to learn continuous-resolution representation. Furthermore, we design a scale-controllable conditioning mechanism that consists of a low-resolution (LR) conditioning network and a scaling factor. The scaling factor regulates the resolution and accordingly modulates the proportion of the LR information and generated features in the final output, which enables the model to accommodate the continuous-resolution requirement. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our IDM and demonstrate its superior performance over prior arts. 图像超分辨率（SR）因其广泛的应用而受到越来越多的关注。然而，当前的 SR 方法通常存在过度平滑和伪影的问题，并且大多数仅适用于固定放大倍数。本文介绍了一种用于高保真连续图像超分辨率的隐式扩散模型（IDM）。 IDM将隐式神经表示和去噪扩散模型集成在统一的端到端框架中，其中在解码过程中采用隐式神经表示来学习连续分辨率表示。此外，我们设计了一种规模可控的调节机制，由低分辨率（LR）调节网络和比例因子组成。缩放因子调节分辨率并相应地调节最终输出中LR信息和生成的特征的比例，这使得模型能够适应连续分辨率的要求。大量的实验验证了我们的 IDM 的有效性，并证明了其优于现有技术的性能。 本文提出一种隐式扩散模型（IDM），用于实现高保真的连续图像超分辨率，解决现有方法的过平滑、伪影及固定放大倍数限制问题。 Sicheng Gao,Xuhui Liu,Bohan Zeng,Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Xiaoyan Luo,Jianzhuang Liu,Xiantong Zhen,Baochang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Tao Hu,Xiaogang Xu,Ruihang Chu,Jiaya Jia
title: TriVol: Point Cloud Rendering via Triple Volumes
title_zh: TriVol：通过三体积进行点云渲染
abstract: Existing learning-based methods for point cloud rendering adopt various 3D representations and feature querying mechanisms to alleviate the sparsity problem of point clouds. However, artifacts still appear in rendered images, due to the challenges in extracting continuous and discriminative 3D features from point clouds. In this paper, we present a dense while lightweight 3D representation, named TriVol, that can be combined with NeRF to render photo-realistic images from point clouds. Our TriVol consists of triple slim volumes, each of which is encoded from the point cloud. TriVol has two advantages. First, it fuses respective fields at different scales and thus extracts local and non-local features for discriminative representation. Second, since the volume size is greatly reduced, our 3D decoder can be efficiently inferred, allowing us to increase the resolution of the 3D space to render more point details. Extensive experiments on different benchmarks with varying kinds of scenes/objects demonstrate our framework's effectiveness compared with current approaches. Moreover, our framework has excellent generalization ability to render a category of scenes/objects without fine-tuning.
summary: Existing learning-based methods for point cloud rendering adopt various 3D representations and feature querying mechanisms to alleviate the sparsity problem of point clouds. However, artifacts still appear in rendered images, due to the challenges in extracting continuous and discriminative 3D features from point clouds. In this paper, we present a dense while lightweight 3D representation, named TriVol, that can be combined with NeRF to render photo-realistic images from point clouds. Our TriVol consists of triple slim volumes, each of which is encoded from the point cloud. TriVol has two advantages. First, it fuses respective fields at different scales and thus extracts local and non-local features for discriminative representation. Second, since the volume size is greatly reduced, our 3D decoder can be efficiently inferred, allowing us to increase the resolution of the 3D space to render more point details. Extensive experiments on different benchmarks with varying kinds of scenes/objects demonstrate our framework's effectiveness compared with current approaches. Moreover, our framework has excellent generalization ability to render a category of scenes/objects without fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于学习的点云渲染方法采用各种3D表示和特征查询机制来缓解点云的稀疏问题。然而，由于从点云中提取连续且有区别的 3D 特征存在挑战，渲染图像中仍然出现伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种密集而轻量级的 3D 表示，称为 TriVol，它可以与 NeRF 结合使用，从点云渲染照片般逼真的图像。 Our TriVol consists of triple slim volumes, each of which is encoded from the point cloud. TriVol 有两个优点。 First, it fuses respective fields at different scales and thus extracts local and non-local features for discriminative representation.其次，由于体积大小大大减小，我们的 3D 解码器可以有效地进行推断，从而使我们能够提高 3D 空间的分辨率以渲染更多的点细节。对不同类型场景/对象的不同基准进行的广泛实验证明了我们的框架与当前方法相比的有效性。 Moreover, our framework has excellent generalization ability to render a category of scenes/objects without fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriVol方法，通过结合NeRF和三重体积表示，解决点云渲染中的伪影问题，生成高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 现有点云渲染方法因难以提取连续且有区别的3D特征，导致渲染图像出现伪影，需更有效的3D表示方案。
AI.method: 设计TriVol三重瘦体积结构，融合多尺度特征并缩小体积尺寸，结合NeRF实现高效高分辨率渲染。
AI.result: 在多场景基准测试中优于现有方法，且无需微调即可泛化渲染不同类别场景/物体。
AI.conclusion: TriVol通过创新体积表示有效提升点云渲染质量，为后续研究提供轻量化且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Tao Hu,Xiaogang Xu,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia
title: Point2Pix: Photo-Realistic Point Cloud Rendering via Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: Point2Pix：通过神经辐射场进行逼真点云渲染
abstract: Synthesizing photo-realistic images from a point cloud is challenging because of the sparsity of point cloud representation. Recent Neural Radiance Fields and extensions are proposed to synthesize realistic images from 2D input. In this paper, we present Point2Pix as a novel point renderer to link the 3D sparse point clouds with 2D dense image pixels. Taking advantage of the point cloud 3D prior and NeRF rendering pipeline, our method can synthesize high-quality images from colored point clouds, generally for novel indoor scenes. To improve the efficiency of ray sampling, we propose point-guided sampling, which focuses on valid samples. Also, we present Point Encoding to build Multi-scale Radiance Fields that provide discriminative 3D point features. Finally, we propose Fusion Encoding to efficiently synthesize high-quality images. Extensive experiments on the ScanNet and ArkitScenes datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization.
summary: Synthesizing photo-realistic images from a point cloud is challenging because of the sparsity of point cloud representation. Recent Neural Radiance Fields and extensions are proposed to synthesize realistic images from 2D input. In this paper, we present Point2Pix as a novel point renderer to link the 3D sparse point clouds with 2D dense image pixels. Taking advantage of the point cloud 3D prior and NeRF rendering pipeline, our method can synthesize high-quality images from colored point clouds, generally for novel indoor scenes. To improve the efficiency of ray sampling, we propose point-guided sampling, which focuses on valid samples. Also, we present Point Encoding to build Multi-scale Radiance Fields that provide discriminative 3D point features. Finally, we propose Fusion Encoding to efficiently synthesize high-quality images. Extensive experiments on the ScanNet and ArkitScenes datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization.
abstract_zh: 由于点云表示的稀疏性，从点云合成逼真的图像具有挑战性。最近提出了神经辐射场和扩展来从 2D 输入合成逼真的图像。在本文中，我们提出 Point2Pix 作为一种新颖的点渲染器，用于将 3D 稀疏点云与 2D 密集图像像素链接起来。利用点云 3D 先验和 NeRF 渲染管道，我们的方法可以从彩色点云合成高质量图像，通常适用于新颖的室内场景。为了提高射线采样的效率，我们提出了点引导采样，重点关注有效样本。此外，我们还提出了点编码来构建多尺度辐射场，提供有区别的 3D 点特征。最后，我们提出融合编码来有效地合成高质量图像。在 ScanNet 和 ArkitScenes 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了其有效性和泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Point2Pix方法，利用神经辐射场（NeRF）从稀疏点云生成高质量真实感图像。
AI.motivation: 点云表示稀疏性导致从点云生成真实感图像具有挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理3D点云与2D图像的映射关系。
AI.method: 提出点引导采样提升效率，设计点编码构建多尺度辐射场，结合融合编码实现高质量图像合成，结合点云3D先验与NeRF渲染流程。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和ArkitScenes数据集上验证了方法有效性，展示了对室内场景的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Point2Pix通过创新编码与采样策略，成功解决了点云到图像的渲染难题，为稀疏3D数据生成真实感图像提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xianghui Xie,Bharat Lal Bhatnagar,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: Visibility Aware Human-Object Interaction Tracking from Single RGB Camera
title_zh: 通过单个 RGB 摄像头进行可见性感知的人机交互跟踪
abstract: Capturing the interactions between humans and their environment in 3D is important for many applications in robotics, graphics, and vision. Recent works to reconstruct the 3D human and object from a single RGB image do not have consistent relative translation across frames because they assume a fixed depth. Moreover, their performance drops significantly when the object is occluded. In this work, we propose a novel method to track the 3D human, object, contacts between them, and their relative translation across frames from a single RGB camera, while being robust to heavy occlusions. Our method is built on two key insights. First, we condition our neural field reconstructions for human and object on per-frame SMPL model estimates obtained by pre-fitting SMPL to a video sequence. This improves neural reconstruction accuracy and produces coherent relative translation across frames. Second, human and object motion from visible frames provides valuable information to infer the occluded object. We propose a novel transformer-based neural network that explicitly uses object visibility and human motion to leverage neighbouring frames to make predictions for the occluded frames. Building on these insights, our method is able to track both human and object robustly even under occlusions. Experiments on two datasets show that our method significantly improves over the state-of-the-art methods. Our code and pretrained models are available at: https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/VisTracker
summary: Capturing the interactions between humans and their environment in 3D is important for many applications in robotics, graphics, and vision. Recent works to reconstruct the 3D human and object from a single RGB image do not have consistent relative translation across frames because they assume a fixed depth. Moreover, their performance drops significantly when the object is occluded. In this work, we propose a novel method to track the 3D human, object, contacts between them, and their relative translation across frames from a single RGB camera, while being robust to heavy occlusions. Our method is built on two key insights. First, we condition our neural field reconstructions for human and object on per-frame SMPL model estimates obtained by pre-fitting SMPL to a video sequence. This improves neural reconstruction accuracy and produces coherent relative translation across frames. Second, human and object motion from visible frames provides valuable information to infer the occluded object. We propose a novel transformer-based neural network that explicitly uses object visibility and human motion to leverage neighbouring frames to make predictions for the occluded frames. Building on these insights, our method is able to track both human and object robustly even under occlusions. Experiments on two datasets show that our method significantly improves over the state-of-the-art methods. Our code and pretrained models are available at: https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/VisTracker
abstract_zh: 以 3D 方式捕捉人类与其环境之间的交互对于机器人、图形和视觉领域的许多应用非常重要。最近从单个 RGB 图像重建 3D 人和物体的工作在帧之间没有一致的相对平移，因为它们假设固定的深度。此外，当物体被遮挡时，它们的性能会显着下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来跟踪 3D 人类、物体、它们之间的接触以及它们在单个 RGB 相机的帧之间的相对平移，同时对严重遮挡具有鲁棒性。我们的方法建立在两个关键见解之上。首先，我们根据通过将 SMPL 预先拟合到视频序列而获得的每帧 SMPL 模型估计来调整人类和物体的神经场重建。这提高了神经重建的准确性并产生跨帧的连贯相对翻译。其次，可见帧中的人和物体运动提供了有价值的信息来推断被遮挡的物体。我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的神经网络，它明确地使用对象可见性和人体运动来利用相邻帧来对被遮挡的帧进行预测。基于这些见解，我们的方法即使在遮挡情况下也能够稳健地跟踪人和物体。对两个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法有了显着的改进。我们的代码和预训练模型可在以下网址获取：https://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/VisTracker

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单目RGB相机中跟踪人类与物体交互及相对位移的方法，能够在严重遮挡情况下保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D重建方法在跨帧相对位移一致性及遮挡场景下表现不佳，需解决遮挡鲁棒性和位移连续性问题。
AI.method: 基于SMPL模型预估的帧间人体姿态条件化神经场重建，并设计融合可见帧信息的Transformer网络预测遮挡帧物体状态。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上显著优于现有方法，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可见性感知机制和跨帧信息融合，有效提升了遮挡场景下的人体-物体交互跟踪性能。

search_text: Visibility Aware Human-Object Interaction Tracking from Single RGB Camera 通过单个 RGB 摄像头进行可见性感知的人机交互跟踪 Capturing the interactions between humans and their environment in 3D is important for many applications in robotics, graphics, and vision. Recent works to reconstruct the 3D human and object from a single RGB image do not have consistent relative translation across frames because they assume a fixed depth. Moreover, their performance drops significantly when the object is occluded. In this work, we propose a novel method to track the 3D human, object, contacts between them, and their relative translation across frames from a single RGB camera, while being robust to heavy occlusions. Our method is built on two key insights. First, we condition our neural field reconstructions for human and object on per-frame SMPL model estimates obtained by pre-fitting SMPL to a video sequence. This improves neural reconstruction accuracy and produces coherent relative translation across frames. Second, human and object motion from visible frames provides valuable information to infer the occluded object. We propose a novel transformer-based neural network that explicitly uses object visibility and human motion to leverage neighbouring frames to make predictions for the occluded frames. Building on these insights, our method is able to track both human and object robustly even under occlusions. Experiments on two datasets show that our method significantly improves over the state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: Liu Haofeng,Chen Yiwen,Tan Jiayi,Marcelo H Ang
title: Learning Complicated Manipulation Skills via Deterministic Policy with Limited Demonstrations
title_zh: 通过有限演示的确定性策略学习复杂的操作技能
abstract: Combined with demonstrations, deep reinforcement learning can efficiently develop policies for manipulators. However, it takes time to collect sufficient high-quality demonstrations in practice. And human demonstrations may be unsuitable for robots. The non-Markovian process and over-reliance on demonstrations are further challenges. For example, we found that RL agents are sensitive to demonstration quality in manipulation tasks and struggle to adapt to demonstrations directly from humans. Thus it is challenging to leverage low-quality and insufficient demonstrations to assist reinforcement learning in training better policies, and sometimes, limited demonstrations even lead to worse performance. We propose a new algorithm named TD3fG (TD3 learning from a generator) to solve these problems. It forms a smooth transition from learning from experts to learning from experience. This innovation can help agents extract prior knowledge while reducing the detrimental effects of the demonstrations. Our algorithm performs well in Adroit manipulator and MuJoCo tasks with limited demonstrations.
summary: Combined with demonstrations, deep reinforcement learning can efficiently develop policies for manipulators. However, it takes time to collect sufficient high-quality demonstrations in practice. And human demonstrations may be unsuitable for robots. The non-Markovian process and over-reliance on demonstrations are further challenges. For example, we found that RL agents are sensitive to demonstration quality in manipulation tasks and struggle to adapt to demonstrations directly from humans. Thus it is challenging to leverage low-quality and insufficient demonstrations to assist reinforcement learning in training better policies, and sometimes, limited demonstrations even lead to worse performance. We propose a new algorithm named TD3fG (TD3 learning from a generator) to solve these problems. It forms a smooth transition from learning from experts to learning from experience. This innovation can help agents extract prior knowledge while reducing the detrimental effects of the demonstrations. Our algorithm performs well in Adroit manipulator and MuJoCo tasks with limited demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 与演示相结合，深度强化学习可以有效地制定针对操纵者的策略。然而，在实践中收集足够的高质量示范还需要时间。而且人类的演示可能不适合机器人。非马尔可夫过程和过度依赖示威是进一步的挑战。例如，我们发现强化学习智能体对操作任务中的演示质量很敏感，并且很难适应直接来自人类的演示。因此，利用低质量和不充分的演示来帮助强化学习训练更好的政策是具有挑战性的，有时，有限的演示甚至会导致性能更差。我们提出了一种名为 TD3fG（TD3 从生成器学习）的新算法来解决这些问题。形成了从向专家学习到向经验学习的平稳过渡。这项创新可以帮助代理人提取先验知识，同时减少演示的有害影响。我们的算法在 Adroit 操纵器和 MuJoCo 任务中表现良好，但演示有限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TD3fG的算法，通过有限的人类演示数据学习复杂的机械臂操作技能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习依赖大量高质量演示数据，但实际中获取这些数据困难且人类演示可能不适用于机器人，导致策略性能下降。
AI.method: 设计TD3fG算法，通过生成器实现从专家演示到经验学习的平滑过渡，减少对演示数据的依赖并提取先验知识。
AI.result: 在Adroit机械臂和MuJoCo任务中，TD3fG算法在有限演示数据下表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: TD3fG通过平衡演示数据与经验学习，有效解决了有限低质量演示对强化学习的负面影响。

authors_text: Xiangyu Zhu,Dong Du,Weikai Chen,Zhiyou Zhao,Yinyu Nie,Xiaoguang Han
title: NerVE: Neural Volumetric Edges for Parametric Curve Extraction from Point Cloud
title_zh: NerVE：用于从点云中提取参数曲线的神经体积边缘
abstract: Extracting parametric edge curves from point clouds is a fundamental problem in 3D vision and geometry processing. Existing approaches mainly rely on keypoint detection, a challenging procedure that tends to generate noisy output, making the subsequent edge extraction error-prone. To address this issue, we propose to directly detect structured edges to circumvent the limitations of the previous point-wise methods. We achieve this goal by presenting NerVE, a novel neural volumetric edge representation that can be easily learned through a volumetric learning framework. NerVE can be seamlessly converted to a versatile piece-wise linear (PWL) curve representation, enabling a unified strategy for learning all types of free-form curves. Furthermore, as NerVE encodes rich structural information, we show that edge extraction based on NerVE can be reduced to a simple graph search problem. After converting NerVE to the PWL representation, parametric curves can be obtained via off-the-shelf spline fitting algorithms. We evaluate our method on the challenging ABC dataset. We show that a simple network based on NerVE can already outperform the previous state-of-the-art methods by a great margin. Project page: https://dongdu3.github.io/projects/2023/NerVE/.
summary: Extracting parametric edge curves from point clouds is a fundamental problem in 3D vision and geometry processing. Existing approaches mainly rely on keypoint detection, a challenging procedure that tends to generate noisy output, making the subsequent edge extraction error-prone. To address this issue, we propose to directly detect structured edges to circumvent the limitations of the previous point-wise methods. We achieve this goal by presenting NerVE, a novel neural volumetric edge representation that can be easily learned through a volumetric learning framework. NerVE can be seamlessly converted to a versatile piece-wise linear (PWL) curve representation, enabling a unified strategy for learning all types of free-form curves. Furthermore, as NerVE encodes rich structural information, we show that edge extraction based on NerVE can be reduced to a simple graph search problem. After converting NerVE to the PWL representation, parametric curves can be obtained via off-the-shelf spline fitting algorithms. We evaluate our method on the challenging ABC dataset. We show that a simple network based on NerVE can already outperform the previous state-of-the-art methods by a great margin. Project page: https://dongdu3.github.io/projects/2023/NerVE/.
abstract_zh: 从点云中提取参数化边缘曲线是 3D 视觉和几何处理中的一个基本问题。现有的方法主要依赖于关键点检测，这是一个具有挑战性的过程，往往会产生噪声输出，使得后续的边缘提取容易出错。为了解决这个问题，我们建议直接检测结构化边缘以规避以前的逐点方法的局限性。我们通过提出 NerVE 来实现这一目标，这是一种新颖的神经体积边缘表示，可以通过体积学习框架轻松学习。 NerVE 可以无缝转换为通用的分段线性 (PWL) 曲线表示形式，从而实现学习所有类型的自由曲线的统一策略。此外，由于 NerVE 编码了丰富的结构信息，我们表明基于 NerVE 的边缘提取可以简化为简单的图搜索问题。将 NerVE 转换为 PWL 表示后，可以通过现成的样条拟合算法获得参数曲线。我们在具有挑战性的 ABC 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们证明，基于 NerVE 的简单网络已经可以大幅超越之前最先进的方法。项目页面：https://dongdu3.github.io/projects/2023/NerVE/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NerVE方法，通过神经体积边缘表示直接从点云中提取参数曲线，避免传统关键点检测的噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖关键点检测进行边缘提取，但该过程易产生噪声导致后续误差。需直接检测结构化边缘以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计神经体积边缘表示（NerVE），通过体积学习框架直接学习结构化边缘，并转换为分段线性曲线表示，结合图搜索与样条拟合完成参数曲线提取。
AI.result: 在ABC数据集上，基于NerVE的简单网络显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: NerVE通过避免关键点检测，提供统一的参数曲线提取框架，在精度和鲁棒性上取得突破。

search_text: NerVE: Neural Volumetric Edges for Parametric Curve Extraction from Point Cloud NerVE：用于从点云中提取参数曲线的神经体积边缘 Extracting parametric edge curves from point clouds is a fundamental problem in 3D vision and geometry processing. Existing approaches mainly rely on keypoint detection, a challenging procedure that tends to generate noisy output, making the subsequent edge extraction error-prone. To address this issue, we propose to directly detect structured edges to circumvent the limitations of the previous point-wise methods. We achieve this goal by presenting NerVE, a novel neural volumetric edge representation that can be easily learned through a volumetric learning framework. NerVE can be seamlessly converted to a versatile piece-wise linear (PWL) curve representation, enabling a unified strategy for learning all types of free-form curves. Furthermore, as NerVE encodes rich structural information, we show that edge extraction based on NerVE can be reduced to a simple graph search problem. After converting NerVE to the PWL representation, parametric curves can be obtained via off-the-shelf spline fitting algorithms. We evaluate our method on the challenging ABC dataset. We show that a simple network based on NerVE can already outperform the previous state-of-the-art methods by a great margin. Project page: https://dongdu3.github.io/projects/2023/NerVE/. 从点云中提取参数化边缘曲线是 3D 视觉和几何处理中的一个基本问题。现有的方法主要依赖于关键点检测，这是一个具有挑战性的过程，往往会产生噪声输出，使得后续的边缘提取容易出错。为了解决这个问题，我们建议直接检测结构化边缘以规避以前的逐点方法的局限性。我们通过提出 NerVE 来实现这一目标，这是一种新颖的神经体积边缘表示，可以通过体积学习框架轻松学习。 NerVE 可以无缝转换为通用的分段线性 (PWL) 曲线表示形式，从而实现学习所有类型的自由曲线的统一策略。此外，由于 NerVE 编码了丰富的结构信息，我们表明基于 NerVE 的边缘提取可以简化为简单的图搜索问题。将 NerVE 转换为 PWL 表示后，可以通过现成的样条拟合算法获得参数曲线。我们在具有挑战性的 ABC 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们证明，基于 NerVE 的简单网络已经可以大幅超越之前最先进的方法。项目页面：https://dongdu3.github.io/projects/2023/NerVE/。 本文提出NerVE方法，通过神经体积边缘表示直接从点云中提取参数曲线，避免传统关键点检测的噪声问题。 Xiangyu Zhu,Dong Du,Weikai Chen,Zhiyou Zhao,Yinyu Nie,Xiaoguang Han cs.CV

authors_text: Stefan Abi-Karam,Cong Hao
title: GNNBuilder: An Automated Framework for Generic Graph Neural Network Accelerator Generation, Simulation, and Optimization
title_zh: GNNBuilder：通用图神经网络加速器生成、模拟和优化的自动化框架
abstract: There are plenty of graph neural network (GNN) accelerators being proposed. However, they highly rely on users' hardware expertise and are usually optimized for one specific GNN model, making them challenging for practical use. Therefore, in this work, we propose GNNBuilder, the first automated, generic, end-to-end GNN accelerator generation framework. It features four advantages: (1) GNNBuilder can automatically generate GNN accelerators for a wide range of GNN models arbitrarily defined by users; (2) GNNBuilder takes standard PyTorch programming interface, introducing zero overhead for algorithm developers; (3) GNNBuilder supports end-to-end code generation, simulation, accelerator optimization, and hardware deployment, realizing a push-button fashion for GNN accelerator design; (4) GNNBuilder is equipped with accurate performance models of its generated accelerator, enabling fast and flexible design space exploration (DSE). In the experiments, first, we show that our accelerator performance model has errors within $36\%$ for latency prediction and $18\%$ for BRAM count prediction. Second, we show that our generated accelerators can outperform CPU by $6.33\times$ and GPU by $6.87\times$. This framework is open-source, and the code is available at https://github.com/sharc-lab/gnn-builder.
summary: There are plenty of graph neural network (GNN) accelerators being proposed. However, they highly rely on users' hardware expertise and are usually optimized for one specific GNN model, making them challenging for practical use. Therefore, in this work, we propose GNNBuilder, the first automated, generic, end-to-end GNN accelerator generation framework. It features four advantages: (1) GNNBuilder can automatically generate GNN accelerators for a wide range of GNN models arbitrarily defined by users; (2) GNNBuilder takes standard PyTorch programming interface, introducing zero overhead for algorithm developers; (3) GNNBuilder supports end-to-end code generation, simulation, accelerator optimization, and hardware deployment, realizing a push-button fashion for GNN accelerator design; (4) GNNBuilder is equipped with accurate performance models of its generated accelerator, enabling fast and flexible design space exploration (DSE). In the experiments, first, we show that our accelerator performance model has errors within $36\%$ for latency prediction and $18\%$ for BRAM count prediction. Second, we show that our generated accelerators can outperform CPU by $6.33\times$ and GPU by $6.87\times$. This framework is open-source, and the code is available at https://github.com/sharc-lab/gnn-builder.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了许多图神经网络（GNN）加速器。然而，它们高度依赖用户的硬件专业知识，并且通常针对一种特定的 GNN 模型进行优化，这使得它们在实际使用中具有挑战性。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了 GNNBuilder，这是第一个自动化、通用、端到端的 GNN 加速器生成框架。它具有四个优点：（1）GNNBuilder可以为用户任意定义的各种GNN模型自动生成GNN加速器； （2）GNNBuilder采用标准PyTorch编程接口，为算法开发人员引入零开销； （3）GNNBuilder支持端到端的代码生成、仿真、加速器优化和硬件部署，实现GNN加速器设计的一键式时尚； (4) GNNBuilder 配备了其生成的加速器的准确性能模型，可实现快速灵活的设计空间探索（DSE）。在实验中，首先，我们表明我们的加速器性能模型对于延迟预测的误差在 $36\%$ 以内，对于 BRAM 计数预测的误差在 $18\%$ 以内。其次，我们证明我们生成的加速器的性能比 CPU 好 6.33 倍，比 GPU 好 6.87 倍。该框架是开源的，代码可在 https://github.com/sharc-lab/gnn-builder 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GNNBuilder，一个自动化生成、模拟和优化通用图神经网络（GNN）加速器的端到端框架。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN加速器依赖用户硬件专业知识且仅针对特定模型优化，导致实际应用困难。
AI.method: 通过标准化PyTorch接口实现零开销算法开发，支持端到端代码生成、模拟、优化及部署，并配备精确性能模型以加速设计空间探索。
AI.result: 加速器性能模型预测误差在延迟为36%、BRAM数量为18%，生成的加速器性能较CPU提升6.33倍、较GPU提升6.87倍。
AI.conclusion: GNNBuilder实现了通用GNN加速器的自动化设计，开源代码可提升实际应用可行性。

authors_text: Wenhao Chai,Zhongyu Jiang,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Gaoang Wang
title: Global Adaptation meets Local Generalization: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 全局适应满足局部泛化：3D 人体姿势估计的无监督域适应
abstract: When applying a pre-trained 2D-to-3D human pose lifting model to a target unseen dataset, large performance degradation is commonly encountered due to domain shift issues. We observe that the degradation is caused by two factors: 1) the large distribution gap over global positions of poses between the source and target datasets due to variant camera parameters and settings, and 2) the deficient diversity of local structures of poses in training. To this end, we combine \textbf{global adaptation} and \textbf{local generalization} in \textit{PoseDA}, a simple yet effective framework of unsupervised domain adaptation for 3D human pose estimation. Specifically, global adaptation aims to align global positions of poses from the source domain to the target domain with a proposed global position alignment (GPA) module. And local generalization is designed to enhance the diversity of 2D-3D pose mapping with a local pose augmentation (LPA) module. These modules bring significant performance improvement without introducing additional learnable parameters. In addition, we propose local pose augmentation (LPA) to enhance the diversity of 3D poses following an adversarial training scheme consisting of 1) a augmentation generator that generates the parameters of pre-defined pose transformations and 2) an anchor discriminator to ensure the reality and quality of the augmented data. Our approach can be applicable to almost all 2D-3D lifting models. \textit{PoseDA} achieves 61.3 mm of MPJPE on MPI-INF-3DHP under a cross-dataset evaluation setup, improving upon the previous state-of-the-art method by 10.2\%.
summary: When applying a pre-trained 2D-to-3D human pose lifting model to a target unseen dataset, large performance degradation is commonly encountered due to domain shift issues. We observe that the degradation is caused by two factors: 1) the large distribution gap over global positions of poses between the source and target datasets due to variant camera parameters and settings, and 2) the deficient diversity of local structures of poses in training. To this end, we combine \textbf{global adaptation} and \textbf{local generalization} in \textit{PoseDA}, a simple yet effective framework of unsupervised domain adaptation for 3D human pose estimation. Specifically, global adaptation aims to align global positions of poses from the source domain to the target domain with a proposed global position alignment (GPA) module. And local generalization is designed to enhance the diversity of 2D-3D pose mapping with a local pose augmentation (LPA) module. These modules bring significant performance improvement without introducing additional learnable parameters. In addition, we propose local pose augmentation (LPA) to enhance the diversity of 3D poses following an adversarial training scheme consisting of 1) a augmentation generator that generates the parameters of pre-defined pose transformations and 2) an anchor discriminator to ensure the reality and quality of the augmented data. Our approach can be applicable to almost all 2D-3D lifting models. \textit{PoseDA} achieves 61.3 mm of MPJPE on MPI-INF-3DHP under a cross-dataset evaluation setup, improving upon the previous state-of-the-art method by 10.2\%.
abstract_zh: 当将预训练的 2D 到 3D 人体姿势提升模型应用于目标看不见的数据集时，由于域转移问题，通常会遇到较大的性能下降。我们观察到，退化是由两个因素引起的：1）由于相机参数和设置不同，源数据集和目标数据集之间的姿势全局位置分布差距较大，2）训练中姿势的局部结构缺乏多样性。为此，我们将 \textbf{全局适应} 和 \textbf{局部泛化} 结合在 \textit{PoseDA} 中，这是一个简单而有效的用于 3D 人体姿势估计的无监督域适应框架。具体来说，全局适应旨在通过提出的全局位置对齐（GPA）模块将姿势的全局位置从源域对齐到目标域。局部泛化旨在通过局部姿态增强（LPA）模块增强 2D-3D 姿态映射的多样性。这些模块带来了显着的性能改进，而无需引入额外的可学习参数。此外，我们提出了局部姿势增强（LPA）来增强 3D 姿势的多样性，遵循对抗性训练方案，该方案由 1）生成预定义姿势变换参数的增强生成器和 2）确保增强数据的真实性和质量的锚鉴别器组成。我们的方法可以适用于几乎所有 2D-3D 提升模型。 \textit{PoseDA} 在跨数据集评估设置下在 MPI-INF-3DHP 上实现了 61.3 mm 的 MPJPE，比之前最先进的方法提高了 10.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督域适应框架PoseDA，用于解决3D人体姿态估计中的域偏移问题，提升跨数据集的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练2D-3D姿态提升模型在目标数据集上性能下降主要由两因素导致：源目标域全局姿态位置分布差异及训练数据局部结构多样性不足。
AI.method: 设计PoseDA框架结合全局适应（GPA模块对齐全局位置）与局部泛化（LPA模块通过对抗训练增强局部多样性），无需新增可学习参数。
AI.result: 在MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上实现61.3mm MPJPE，较先前最优方法提升10.2%。
AI.conclusion: PoseDA通过协同优化全局域适应与局部结构泛化，有效缓解域偏移问题，且适用于主流2D-3D姿态提升模型。

We observe that the degradation is caused by two factors: 1) the large distribution gap over global positions of poses between the source and target datasets due to variant camera parameters and settings, and 2) the deficient diversity of local structures of poses in training. To this end, we combine \textbf{global adaptation} and \textbf{local generalization} in \textit{PoseDA}, a simple yet effective framework of unsupervised domain adaptation for 3D human pose estimation. Specifically, global adaptation aims to align global positions of poses from the source domain to the target domain with a proposed global position alignment (GPA) module. And local generalization is designed to enhance the diversity of 2D-3D pose mapping with a local pose augmentation (LPA) module. These modules bring significant performance improvement without introducing additional learnable parameters. In addition, we propose local pose augmentation (LPA) to enhance the diversity of 3D poses following an adversarial training scheme consisting of 1) a augmentation generator that generates the parameters of pre-defined pose transformations and 2) an anchor discriminator to ensure the reality and quality of the augmented data. Our approach can be applicable to almost all 2D-3D lifting models. \textit{PoseDA} achieves 61.3 mm of MPJPE on MPI-INF-3DHP under a cross-dataset evaluation setup, improving upon the previous state-of-the-art method by 10.2\%. 当将预训练的 2D 到 3D 人体姿势提升模型应用于目标看不见的数据集时，由于域转移问题，通常会遇到较大的性能下降。我们观察到，退化是由两个因素引起的：1）由于相机参数和设置不同，源数据集和目标数据集之间的姿势全局位置分布差距较大，2）训练中姿势的局部结构缺乏多样性。为此，我们将 \textbf{全局适应} 和 \textbf{局部泛化} 结合在 \textit{PoseDA} 中，这是一个简单而有效的用于 3D 人体姿势估计的无监督域适应框架。具体来说，全局适应旨在通过提出的全局位置对齐（GPA）模块将姿势的全局位置从源域对齐到目标域。局部泛化旨在通过局部姿态增强（LPA）模块增强 2D-3D 姿态映射的多样性。这些模块带来了显着的性能改进，而无需引入额外的可学习参数。此外，我们提出了局部姿势增强（LPA）来增强 3D 姿势的多样性，遵循对抗性训练方案，该方案由 1）生成预定义姿势变换参数的增强生成器和 2）确保增强数据的真实性和质量的锚鉴别器组成。我们的方法可以适用于几乎所有 2D-3D 提升模型。 \textit{PoseDA} 在跨数据集评估设置下在 MPI-INF-3DHP 上实现了 61.3 mm 的 MPJPE，比之前最先进的方法提高了 10.2%。 本文提出了一种无监督域适应框架PoseDA，用于解决3D人体姿态估计中的域偏移问题，提升跨数据集的性能。 Wenhao Chai,Zhongyu Jiang,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Gaoang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Youhan Lee,Hasun Yu
title: ProtFIM: Fill-in-Middle Protein Sequence Design via Protein Language Models
title_zh: ProtFIM：通过蛋白质语言模型进行中间填充蛋白质序列设计
abstract: Protein language models (pLMs), pre-trained via causal language modeling on protein sequences, have been a promising tool for protein sequence design. In real-world protein engineering, there are many cases where the amino acids in the middle of a protein sequence are optimized while maintaining other residues. Unfortunately, because of the left-to-right nature of pLMs, existing pLMs modify suffix residues by prompting prefix residues, which are insufficient for the infilling task that considers the whole surrounding context. To find the more effective pLMs for protein engineering, we design a new benchmark, Secondary structureE InFilling rEcoveRy, SEIFER, which approximates infilling sequence design scenarios. With the evaluation of existing models on the benchmark, we reveal the weakness of existing language models and show that language models trained via fill-in-middle transformation, called ProtFIM, are more appropriate for protein engineering. Also, we prove that ProtFIM generates protein sequences with decent protein representations through exhaustive experiments and visualizations.
summary: Protein language models (pLMs), pre-trained via causal language modeling on protein sequences, have been a promising tool for protein sequence design. In real-world protein engineering, there are many cases where the amino acids in the middle of a protein sequence are optimized while maintaining other residues. Unfortunately, because of the left-to-right nature of pLMs, existing pLMs modify suffix residues by prompting prefix residues, which are insufficient for the infilling task that considers the whole surrounding context. To find the more effective pLMs for protein engineering, we design a new benchmark, Secondary structureE InFilling rEcoveRy, SEIFER, which approximates infilling sequence design scenarios. With the evaluation of existing models on the benchmark, we reveal the weakness of existing language models and show that language models trained via fill-in-middle transformation, called ProtFIM, are more appropriate for protein engineering. Also, we prove that ProtFIM generates protein sequences with decent protein representations through exhaustive experiments and visualizations.
abstract_zh: 通过蛋白质序列的因果语言模型进行预训练的蛋白质语言模型（pLM）已成为蛋白质序列设计的有前途的工具。在现实世界的蛋白质工程中，在许多情况下，蛋白质序列中间的氨基酸被优化，同时保留其他残基。不幸的是，由于 pLM 的从左到右的性质，现有的 pLM 通过提示前缀残基来修改后缀残基，这对于考虑整个周围上下文的填充任务来说是不够的。为了找到更有效的蛋白质工程 pLM，我们设计了一个新的基准，二级结构填充 rEcoveRy，SEIFER，它近似于填充序列设计方案。通过在基准上对现有模型的评估，我们揭示了现有语言模型的弱点，并表明通过中间填充变换训练的语言模型（称为 ProtFIM）更适合蛋白质工程。此外，我们通过详尽的实验和可视化证明 ProtFIM 生成具有良好蛋白质表示的蛋白质序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProtFIM方法，通过改进蛋白质语言模型解决中间序列填充问题，提升蛋白质工程设计效果。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质语言模型因单向生成特性，难以有效优化蛋白质序列中间区域，无法充分考虑上下文信息。
AI.method: 设计SEIFER基准测试评估模型性能，提出基于中间填充训练的ProtFIM方法，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: ProtFIM在基准测试中表现优于现有模型，生成的蛋白质序列具有更优的结构表示且通过可视化验证。
AI.conclusion: ProtFIM通过针对性训练策略解决了蛋白质中间区域优化难题，为蛋白质工程提供更有效的工具。

authors_text: Jinyoung Park,Sanghyeok Lee,Sihyeon Kim,Yunyang Xiong,Hyunwoo J. Kim
title: Self-positioning Point-based Transformer for Point Cloud Understanding
title_zh: 用于点云理解的自定位基于点的变压器
abstract: Transformers have shown superior performance on various computer vision tasks with their capabilities to capture long-range dependencies. Despite the success, it is challenging to directly apply Transformers on point clouds due to their quadratic cost in the number of points. In this paper, we present a Self-Positioning point-based Transformer (SPoTr), which is designed to capture both local and global shape contexts with reduced complexity. Specifically, this architecture consists of local self-attention and self-positioning point-based global cross-attention. The self-positioning points, adaptively located based on the input shape, consider both spatial and semantic information with disentangled attention to improve expressive power. With the self-positioning points, we propose a novel global cross-attention mechanism for point clouds, which improves the scalability of global self-attention by allowing the attention module to compute attention weights with only a small set of self-positioning points. Experiments show the effectiveness of SPoTr on three point cloud tasks such as shape classification, part segmentation, and scene segmentation. In particular, our proposed model achieves an accuracy gain of 2.6% over the previous best models on shape classification with ScanObjectNN. We also provide qualitative analyses to demonstrate the interpretability of self-positioning points. The code of SPoTr is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/SPoTr.
summary: Transformers have shown superior performance on various computer vision tasks with their capabilities to capture long-range dependencies. Despite the success, it is challenging to directly apply Transformers on point clouds due to their quadratic cost in the number of points. In this paper, we present a Self-Positioning point-based Transformer (SPoTr), which is designed to capture both local and global shape contexts with reduced complexity. Specifically, this architecture consists of local self-attention and self-positioning point-based global cross-attention. The self-positioning points, adaptively located based on the input shape, consider both spatial and semantic information with disentangled attention to improve expressive power. With the self-positioning points, we propose a novel global cross-attention mechanism for point clouds, which improves the scalability of global self-attention by allowing the attention module to compute attention weights with only a small set of self-positioning points. Experiments show the effectiveness of SPoTr on three point cloud tasks such as shape classification, part segmentation, and scene segmentation. In particular, our proposed model achieves an accuracy gain of 2.6% over the previous best models on shape classification with ScanObjectNN. We also provide qualitative analyses to demonstrate the interpretability of self-positioning points. The code of SPoTr is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/SPoTr.
abstract_zh: Transformers have shown superior performance on various computer vision tasks with their capabilities to capture long-range dependencies. Despite the success, it is challenging to directly apply Transformers on point clouds due to their quadratic cost in the number of points.在本文中，我们提出了一种基于点的自定位变换器（SPoTr），旨在以降低的复杂性捕获局部和全局形状上下文。 Specifically, this architecture consists of local self-attention and self-positioning point-based global cross-attention.根据输入形状自适应定位的自定位点，以解开注意力的方式考虑空间和语义信息，以提高表达能力。通过自定位点，我们提出了一种新颖的点云全局交叉注意力机制，通过允许注意力模块仅用一小组自定位点来计算注意力权重，从而提高了全局自注意力的可扩展性。 Experiments show the effectiveness of SPoTr on three point cloud tasks such as shape classification, part segmentation, and scene segmentation. In particular, our proposed model achieves an accuracy gain of 2.6% over the previous best models on shape classification with ScanObjectNN. We also provide qualitative analyses to demonstrate the interpretability of self-positioning points. The code of SPoTr is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/SPoTr.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SPoTr的自定位点基Transformer模型，用于高效处理点云数据，解决传统Transformer在点云任务中计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在计算机视觉中表现优异，但直接应用于点云时存在计算复杂度随点数二次增长的问题，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 设计包含局部自注意力和自定位点全局交叉注意力的SPoTr架构，通过自适应定位的自定位点融合空间与语义信息，降低全局注意力计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在形状分类、部件分割和场景分割任务中均取得提升，尤其在ScanObjectNN数据集上形状分类准确率较之前最佳模型提升2.6%。
AI.conclusion: SPoTr通过创新的自定位点机制有效平衡了点云处理的效率与表征能力，实验结果验证了其有效性与可解释性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Xu Cao,Hiroaki Santo,Fumio Okura,Yasuyuki Matsushita
title: Multi-View Azimuth Stereo via Tangent Space Consistency
title_zh: 通过切线空间一致性实现多视图方位立体
comment: CVPR 2023 camera-ready. Appendices after references. 16 pages, 20 figures. Project page: https://xucao-42.github.io/mvas_homepage/
comments: CVPR 2023 camera-ready. Appendices after references. 16 pages, 20 figures. Project page: https://xucao-42.github.io/mvas_homepage/
abstract: We present a method for 3D reconstruction only using calibrated multi-view surface azimuth maps. Our method, multi-view azimuth stereo, is effective for textureless or specular surfaces, which are difficult for conventional multi-view stereo methods. We introduce the concept of tangent space consistency: Multi-view azimuth observations of a surface point should be lifted to the same tangent space. Leveraging this consistency, we recover the shape by optimizing a neural implicit surface representation. Our method harnesses the robust azimuth estimation capabilities of photometric stereo methods or polarization imaging while bypassing potentially complex zenith angle estimation. Experiments using azimuth maps from various sources validate the accurate shape recovery with our method, even without zenith angles.
summary: We present a method for 3D reconstruction only using calibrated multi-view surface azimuth maps. Our method, multi-view azimuth stereo, is effective for textureless or specular surfaces, which are difficult for conventional multi-view stereo methods. We introduce the concept of tangent space consistency: Multi-view azimuth observations of a surface point should be lifted to the same tangent space. Leveraging this consistency, we recover the shape by optimizing a neural implicit surface representation. Our method harnesses the robust azimuth estimation capabilities of photometric stereo methods or polarization imaging while bypassing potentially complex zenith angle estimation. Experiments using azimuth maps from various sources validate the accurate shape recovery with our method, even without zenith angles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种仅使用校准的多视图表面​​方位图进行 3D 重建的方法。我们的方法，多视图方位立体，对于无纹理或镜面表面是有效的，这对于传统的多视图立体方法来说是困难的。我们引入切线空间一致性的概念：表面点的多视角方位观测应提升到相同的切线空间。利用这种一致性，我们通过优化神经隐式表面表示来恢复形状。我们的方法利用光度立体方法或偏振成像强大的方位角估计功能，同时绕过潜在复杂的天顶角估计。使用来自各种来源的方位角图进行的实验验证了我们的方法即使没有天顶角也能准确恢复形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角方位图和切空间一致性的3D重建方法，适用于无纹理或镜面表面。
AI.motivation: 传统多视角立体视觉方法难以处理无纹理或镜面表面，而方位信息估计更鲁棒且无需复杂天顶角计算。
AI.method: 引入切空间一致性约束，将多视角方位观测映射至统一切空间，并通过优化神经隐式表面实现形状恢复。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多种方位图来源下可准确重建形状，且无需天顶角信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂表面提供了新的重建途径，有效结合了方位估计优势并规避了天顶角估计难题。

search_text: Multi-View Azimuth Stereo via Tangent Space Consistency 通过切线空间一致性实现多视图方位立体 We present a method for 3D reconstruction only using calibrated multi-view surface azimuth maps. Our method, multi-view azimuth stereo, is effective for textureless or specular surfaces, which are difficult for conventional multi-view stereo methods. We introduce the concept of tangent space consistency: Multi-view azimuth observations of a surface point should be lifted to the same tangent space. Leveraging this consistency, we recover the shape by optimizing a neural implicit surface representation. Our method harnesses the robust azimuth estimation capabilities of photometric stereo methods or polarization imaging while bypassing potentially complex zenith angle estimation. Experiments using azimuth maps from various sources validate the accurate shape recovery with our method, even without zenith angles. 我们提出了一种仅使用校准的多视图表面​​方位图进行 3D 重建的方法。我们的方法，多视图方位立体，对于无纹理或镜面表面是有效的，这对于传统的多视图立体方法来说是困难的。我们引入切线空间一致性的概念：表面点的多视角方位观测应提升到相同的切线空间。利用这种一致性，我们通过优化神经隐式表面表示来恢复形状。我们的方法利用光度立体方法或偏振成像强大的方位角估计功能，同时绕过潜在复杂的天顶角估计。使用来自各种来源的方位角图进行的实验验证了我们的方法即使没有天顶角也能准确恢复形状。 本文提出一种基于多视角方位图和切空间一致性的3D重建方法，适用于无纹理或镜面表面。 Xu Cao,Hiroaki Santo,Fumio Okura,Yasuyuki Matsushita cs.CV
